title: Robust Reinforcement Learning using Offline Data
title_zh: 使用离线数据的鲁棒强化学习
comment: Appeared in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: Appeared in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: The goal of robust reinforcement learning (RL) is to learn a policy that is robust against the uncertainty in model parameters. Parameter uncertainty commonly occurs in many real-world RL applications due to simulator modeling errors, changes in the real-world system dynamics over time, and adversarial disturbances. Robust RL is typically formulated as a max-min problem, where the objective is to learn the policy that maximizes the value against the worst possible models that lie in an uncertainty set. In this work, we propose a robust RL algorithm called Robust Fitted Q-Iteration (RFQI), which uses only an offline dataset to learn the optimal robust policy. Robust RL with offline data is significantly more challenging than its non-robust counterpart because of the minimization over all models present in the robust Bellman operator. This poses challenges in offline data collection, optimization over the models, and unbiased estimation. In this work, we propose a systematic approach to overcome these challenges, resulting in our RFQI algorithm. We prove that RFQI learns a near-optimal robust policy under standard assumptions and demonstrate its superior performance on standard benchmark problems.
summary: The goal of robust reinforcement learning (RL) is to learn a policy that is robust against the uncertainty in model parameters. Parameter uncertainty commonly occurs in many real-world RL applications due to simulator modeling errors, changes in the real-world system dynamics over time, and adversarial disturbances. In this work, we propose a robust RL algorithm called Robust Fitted Q-Iteration (RFQI), which uses only an offline dataset to learn the optimal robust policy. Robust RL with offline data is significantly more challenging than its non-robust counterpart because of the minimization over all models present in the robust Bellman operator. This poses challenges in offline data collection, optimization over the models, and unbiased estimation. In this work, we propose a systematic approach to overcome these challenges, resulting in our RFQI algorithm. We prove that RFQI learns a near-optimal robust policy under standard assumptions and demonstrate its superior performance on standard benchmark problems.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒强化学习（RL）的目标是学习一种针对模型参数不确定性的鲁棒策略。由于模拟器建模错误、现实世界系统动态随时间的变化以及对抗性干扰，参数不确定性通常出现在许多现实世界的强化学习应用中。鲁棒强化学习通常被表述为最大最小问题，其目标是学习针对不确定性集中的最坏可能模型最大化价值的策略。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为鲁棒拟合 Q 迭代 (RFQI) 的鲁棒 RL 算法，该算法仅使用离线数据集来学习最优鲁棒策略。具有离线数据的鲁棒强化学习比非鲁棒强化学习更具挑战性，因为鲁棒贝尔曼算子中存在的所有模型都被最小化。这给离线数据收集、模型优化和无偏估计带来了挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种系统方法来克服这些挑战，从而产生了我们的 RFQI 算法。我们证明 RFQI 在标准假设下学习近乎最优的鲁棒策略，并证明其在标准基准问题上的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离线数据的鲁棒强化学习算法RFQI，用于应对模型参数不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中因模拟器建模误差、系统动态变化和对抗扰动导致模型参数不确定性普遍存在，而传统鲁棒RL在离线数据场景下面临优化难度大、估计偏差等挑战。
AI.method: 设计鲁棒拟合Q迭代算法(RFQI)，通过系统性解决离线数据收集、模型空间优化和无偏估计等核心问题，实现对鲁棒Bellman算子的最小化处理。
AI.result: 理论证明RFQI在标准假设下可学习近似最优鲁棒策略，并在基准测试中展现出优于现有方法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: RFQI算法有效解决了离线数据场景下的鲁棒RL难题，为应对现实世界模型不确定性提供了理论保证和实践方案。

Robust RL with offline data is significantly more challenging than its non-robust counterpart because of the minimization over all models present in the robust Bellman operator. In this work, we propose a systematic approach to overcome these challenges, resulting in our RFQI algorithm. title: D-BIAS: A Causality-Based Human-in-the-Loop System for Tackling Algorithmic Bias
title_zh: D-BIAS：一种基于因果关系的人机循环系统，用于解决算法偏差
abstract: With the rise of AI, algorithms have become better at learning underlying patterns from the training data including ingrained social biases based on gender, race, etc. Deployment of such algorithms to domains such as hiring, healthcare, law enforcement, etc. has raised serious concerns about fairness, accountability, trust and interpretability in machine learning algorithms. To alleviate this problem, we propose D-BIAS, a visual interactive tool that embodies human-in-the-loop AI approach for auditing and mitigating social biases from tabular datasets. It uses a graphical causal model to represent causal relationships among different features in the dataset and as a medium to inject domain knowledge. A user can detect the presence of bias against a group, say females, or a subgroup, say black females, by identifying unfair causal relationships in the causal network and using an array of fairness metrics. Thereafter, the user can mitigate bias by acting on the unfair causal edges. For each interaction, say weakening/deleting a biased causal edge, the system uses a novel method to simulate a new (debiased) dataset based on the current causal model. Users can visually assess the impact of their interactions on different fairness metrics, utility metrics, data distortion, and the underlying data distribution. Once satisfied, they can download the debiased dataset and use it for any downstream application for fairer predictions. We evaluate D-BIAS by conducting experiments on 3 datasets and also a formal user study. We found that D-BIAS helps reduce bias significantly compared to the baseline debiasing approach across different fairness metrics while incurring little data distortion and a small loss in utility. Moreover, our human-in-the-loop based approach significantly outperforms an automated approach on trust, interpretability and accountability.
summary: With the rise of AI, algorithms have become better at learning underlying patterns from the training data including ingrained social biases based on gender, race, etc. Deployment of such algorithms to domains such as hiring, healthcare, law enforcement, etc. has raised serious concerns about fairness, accountability, trust and interpretability in machine learning algorithms. To alleviate this problem, we propose D-BIAS, a visual interactive tool that embodies human-in-the-loop AI approach for auditing and mitigating social biases from tabular datasets. It uses a graphical causal model to represent causal relationships among different features in the dataset and as a medium to inject domain knowledge. A user can detect the presence of bias against a group, say females, or a subgroup, say black females, by identifying unfair causal relationships in the causal network and using an array of fairness metrics. Thereafter, the user can mitigate bias by acting on the unfair causal edges. For each interaction, say weakening/deleting a biased causal edge, the system uses a novel method to simulate a new (debiased) dataset based on the current causal model. Users can visually assess the impact of their interactions on different fairness metrics, utility metrics, data distortion, and the underlying data distribution. Once satisfied, they can download the debiased dataset and use it for any downstream application for fairer predictions. We evaluate D-BIAS by conducting experiments on 3 datasets and also a formal user study. We found that D-BIAS helps reduce bias significantly compared to the baseline debiasing approach across different fairness metrics while incurring little data distortion and a small loss in utility. Moreover, our human-in-the-loop based approach significantly outperforms an automated approach on trust, interpretability and accountability.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能的兴起，算法越来越擅长从训练数据中学习潜在模式，包括基于性别、种族等根深蒂固的社会偏见。将此类算法部署到招聘、医疗保健、执法等领域引起了人们对机器学习算法的公平性、问责制、信任和可解释性的严重担忧。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 D-BIAS，这是一种视觉交互工具，体现了人机交互的人工智能方法，用于审计和减轻表格数据集中的社会偏见。它使用图形因果模型来表示数据集中不同特征之间的因果关系，并作为注入领域知识的媒介。用户可以通过识别因果网络中的不公平因果关系并使用一系列公平性指标来检测针对某个群体（例如女性）或子群体（例如黑人女性）的偏见的存在。此后，用户可以通过对不公平的因果边缘采取行动来减轻偏差。对于每次交互，例如弱化/删除有偏差的因果边缘，系统使用一种新颖的方法来基于当前因果模型模拟新的（无偏差的）数据集。用户可以直观地评估他们的交互对不同公平性指标、效用指标、数据失真和底层数据分布的影响。一旦满意，他们就可以下载除偏数据集并将其用于任何下游应用程序以进行更公平的预测。我们通过对 3 个数据集进行实验以及正式的用户研究来评估 D-BIAS。我们发现，与不同公平性指标的基线去偏差方法相比，D-BIAS 有助于显着减少偏差，同时几乎不会造成数据失真和效用损失。此外，我们基于人机交互的方法在信任、可解释性和问责制方面显着优于自动化方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出D-BIAS系统，通过因果模型和人机交互机制检测并缓解数据集中的算法偏见。
AI.motivation: AI算法在学习数据模式时可能继承性别、种族等社会偏见，导致在招聘、医疗等关键领域出现公平性、可解释性问题，亟需有效去偏方法。
AI.method: 构建基于因果图的可视化交互工具，通过公平性指标识别偏见因果关系，允许用户调整因果边并模拟去偏数据集，平衡公平性、效用与数据失真。
AI.result: 在3个数据集和用户实验中，D-BIAS相比基线方法显著降低偏见，数据失真和效用损失较小，且在信任度、可解释性上优于自动化方法。
AI.conclusion: 人机协同的因果分析框架能更有效解决算法偏见，兼顾公平性与数据质量，为AI伦理实践提供可行方案。

title: Ghost-free High Dynamic Range Imaging with Context-aware Transformer
title_zh: 使用情境感知变压器实现无重影高动态范围成像
abstract: High dynamic range (HDR) deghosting algorithms aim to generate ghost-free HDR images with realistic details. Restricted by the locality of the receptive field, existing CNN-based methods are typically prone to producing ghosting artifacts and intensity distortions in the presence of large motion and severe saturation. In this paper, we propose a novel Context-Aware Vision Transformer (CA-ViT) for ghost-free high dynamic range imaging. The CA-ViT is designed as a dual-branch architecture, which can jointly capture both global and local dependencies. Specifically, the global branch employs a window-based Transformer encoder to model long-range object movements and intensity variations to solve ghosting. For the local branch, we design a local context extractor (LCE) to capture short-range image features and use the channel attention mechanism to select informative local details across the extracted features to complement the global branch. By incorporating the CA-ViT as basic components, we further build the HDR-Transformer, a hierarchical network to reconstruct high-quality ghost-free HDR images. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively with considerably reduced computational budgets. Codes are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/HDR-Transformer
summary: High dynamic range (HDR) deghosting algorithms aim to generate ghost-free HDR images with realistic details. Restricted by the locality of the receptive field, existing CNN-based methods are typically prone to producing ghosting artifacts and intensity distortions in the presence of large motion and severe saturation. In this paper, we propose a novel Context-Aware Vision Transformer (CA-ViT) for ghost-free high dynamic range imaging. The CA-ViT is designed as a dual-branch architecture, which can jointly capture both global and local dependencies. Specifically, the global branch employs a window-based Transformer encoder to model long-range object movements and intensity variations to solve ghosting. For the local branch, we design a local context extractor (LCE) to capture short-range image features and use the channel attention mechanism to select informative local details across the extracted features to complement the global branch. By incorporating the CA-ViT as basic components, we further build the HDR-Transformer, a hierarchical network to reconstruct high-quality ghost-free HDR images. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively with considerably reduced computational budgets. Codes are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/HDR-Transformer
abstract_zh: 高动态范围 (HDR) 去鬼影算法旨在生成具有真实细节的无鬼影 HDR 图像。受感受野局部性的限制，现有的基于 CNN 的方法通常在大运动和严重饱和的情况下容易产生重影伪影和强度失真。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的上下文感知视觉变换器（CA-ViT），用于无重影高动态范围成像。 CA-ViT被设计为双分支架构，可以共同捕获全局和局部依赖关系。具体来说，全局分支采用基于窗口的 Transformer 编码器来模拟远程对象运动和强度变化，以解决重影问题。对于局部分支，我们设计了一个局部上下文提取器（LCE）来捕获短程图像特征，并使用通道注意机制在提取的特征中选择信息丰富的局部细节以补充全局分支。通过将 CA-ViT 作为基本组件，我们进一步构建了 HDR-Transformer，这是一个用于重建高质量无重影 HDR 图像的分层网络。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在质量和数量上都优于最先进的方法，并且大大减少了计算预算。代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/HDR-Transformer 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文感知Transformer的高动态范围成像方法，用于消除图像鬼影并提升细节质量。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法因感受野局限性，在处理大运动和严重饱和场景时易产生鬼影和强度失真，需更全局的特征建模方案。
AI.method: 设计双分支CA-ViT架构：全局分支采用窗口Transformer编码器建模长距离运动与光照变化，局部分支通过局部上下文提取器(LCE)与通道注意力机制捕捉细节特征，最终构建分层HDR-Transformer网络。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验显示，该方法在视觉效果和定量指标上均优于现有方法，且计算成本显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 通过全局-局部特征联合建模，所提方法有效解决了HDR去鬼影问题，在保持细节真实性的同时提升了计算效率。

search_text: Ghost-free High Dynamic Range Imaging with Context-aware Transformer 使用情境感知变压器实现无重影高动态范围成像 High dynamic range (HDR) deghosting algorithms aim to generate ghost-free HDR images with realistic details. Restricted by the locality of the receptive field, existing CNN-based methods are typically prone to producing ghosting artifacts and intensity distortions in the presence of large motion and severe saturation. In this paper, we propose a novel Context-Aware Vision Transformer (CA-ViT) for ghost-free high dynamic range imaging. The CA-ViT is designed as a dual-branch architecture, which can jointly capture both global and local dependencies. Specifically, the global branch employs a window-based Transformer encoder to model long-range object movements and intensity variations to solve ghosting. For the local branch, we design a local context extractor (LCE) to capture short-range image features and use the channel attention mechanism to select informative local details across the extracted features to complement the global branch. By incorporating the CA-ViT as basic components, we further build the HDR-Transformer, a hierarchical network to reconstruct high-quality ghost-free HDR images. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively with considerably reduced computational budgets. title: Research on restaurant recommendation using machine learning
title_zh: 基于机器学习的餐厅推荐研究
abstract: A recommender system is a system that helps users filter irrelevant information and create user interest models based on their historical records. With the continuous development of Internet information, recommendation systems have received widespread attention in the industry. In this era of ubiquitous data and information, how to obtain and analyze these data has become the research topic of many people. In view of this situation, this paper makes some brief overviews of machine learning-related recommendation systems. By analyzing some technologies and ideas used by machine learning in recommender systems, let more people understand what is Big data and what is machine learning. The most important point is to let everyone understand the profound impact of machine learning on our daily life.
summary: A recommender system is a system that helps users filter irrelevant information and create user interest models based on their historical records. With the continuous development of Internet information, recommendation systems have received widespread attention in the industry. In this era of ubiquitous data and information, how to obtain and analyze these data has become the research topic of many people. In view of this situation, this paper makes some brief overviews of machine learning-related recommendation systems. By analyzing some technologies and ideas used by machine learning in recommender systems, let more people understand what is Big data and what is machine learning. The most important point is to let everyone understand the profound impact of machine learning on our daily life.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统是一种帮助用户过滤不相关信息并根据用户的历史记录创建用户兴趣模型的系统。随着互联网信息的不断发展，推荐系统受到了业界的广泛关注。在这个数据和信息无处不在的时代，如何获取和分析这些数据成为了很多人的研究课题。针对这种情况，本文对机器学习相关推荐系统进行一些简要概述。通过分析机器学习在推荐系统中使用的一些技术和思想，让更多的人了解什么是大数据，什么是机器学习。最重要的一点是让大家了解机器学习对我们日常生活的深刻影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用机器学习技术构建餐厅推荐系统，以帮助用户过滤信息并建立兴趣模型。
AI.motivation: 随着互联网信息爆炸式增长，用户面临信息过载问题，推荐系统成为解决该问题的关键技术，而机器学习在其中的应用值得深入探讨。
AI.method: 通过概述机器学习在推荐系统中的相关技术，分析其核心思想与实现方法，结合实际案例阐述大数据与机器学习的关联性。
AI.result: 使读者理解大数据和机器学习的基本概念，并认识到机器学习对日常生活（如个性化推荐）的深远影响。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习技术显著提升了推荐系统的智能化水平，未来将在更多生活场景中发挥核心作用。

authors_text: Mario Michael Krell,Nils Wilshusen,Anett Seeland,Su Kyoung Kim
title: Classifier Transfer with Data Selection Strategies for Online Support Vector Machine Classification with Class Imbalance
title_zh: 具有类不平衡的在线支持向量机分类的数据选择策略的分类器迁移
abstract: Objective: Classifier transfers usually come with dataset shifts. To overcome them, online strategies have to be applied. For practical applications, limitations in the computational resources for the adaptation of batch learning algorithms, like the SVM, have to be considered. Approach: We review and compare several strategies for online learning with SVMs. We focus on data selection strategies which limit the size of the stored training data [...] Main Results: For different data shifts, different criteria are appropriate. For the synthetic data, adding all samples to the pool of considered samples performs often significantly worse than other criteria. Especially, adding only misclassified samples performed astoundingly well. Here, balancing criteria were very important when the other criteria were not well chosen. For the transfer setups, the results show that the best strategy depends on the intensity of the drift during the transfer. Adding all and removing the oldest samples results in the best performance, whereas for smaller drifts, it can be sufficient to only add potential new support vectors of the SVM which reduces processing resources. Significance: For BCIs based on EEG models, trained on data from a calibration session, a previous recording session, or even from a recording session with one or several other subjects, are used. This transfer of the learned model usually decreases the performance and can therefore benefit from online learning which adapts the classifier like the established SVM. We show that by using the right combination of data selection criteria, it is possible to adapt the classifier and largely increase the performance. Furthermore, in some cases it is possible to speed up the processing and save computational by updating with a subset of special samples and keeping a small subset of samples for training the classifier.
summary: Objective: Classifier transfers usually come with dataset shifts. To overcome them, online strategies have to be applied. For practical applications, limitations in the computational resources for the adaptation of batch learning algorithms, like the SVM, have to be considered. Approach: We review and compare several strategies for online learning with SVMs. We focus on data selection strategies which limit the size of the stored training data [...] Main Results: For different data shifts, different criteria are appropriate. For the synthetic data, adding all samples to the pool of considered samples performs often significantly worse than other criteria. Especially, adding only misclassified samples performed astoundingly well. Here, balancing criteria were very important when the other criteria were not well chosen. For the transfer setups, the results show that the best strategy depends on the intensity of the drift during the transfer. Adding all and removing the oldest samples results in the best performance, whereas for smaller drifts, it can be sufficient to only add potential new support vectors of the SVM which reduces processing resources. Significance: For BCIs based on EEG models, trained on data from a calibration session, a previous recording session, or even from a recording session with one or several other subjects, are used. This transfer of the learned model usually decreases the performance and can therefore benefit from online learning which adapts the classifier like the established SVM. We show that by using the right combination of data selection criteria, it is possible to adapt the classifier and largely increase the performance. Furthermore, in some cases it is possible to speed up the processing and save computational by updating with a subset of special samples and keeping a small subset of samples for training the classifier.
abstract_zh: 目标：分类器传输通常伴随着数据集的变化。为了克服这些问题，必须采用在线策略。对于实际应用，必须考虑用于适应批量学习算法（如支持向量机）的计算资源的限制。方法：我们回顾并比较了使用 SVM 进行在线学习的几种策略。我们专注于限制存储的训练数据大小的数据选择策略[...]主要结果：对于不同的数据转移，不同的标准是合适的。对于合成数据，将所有样本添加到考虑样本池中的性能通常比其他标准要差得多。特别是，仅添加错误分类的样本表现得非常好。在这里，当其他标准没有很好选择时，平衡标准就非常重要。对于转移设置，结果表明最佳策略取决于转移期间漂移的强度。添加所有样本并删除最旧的样本可以获得最佳性能，而对于较小的漂移，仅添加 SVM 的潜在新支持向量就足够了，从而减少了处理资源。意义：对于基于脑电图模型的脑机接口，使用来自校准会话、先前记录会话、甚至来自与一个或多个其他受试者的记录会话的数据进行训练。这种学习模型的迁移通常会降低性能，因此可以从像已建立的 SVM 一样适应分类器的在线学习中受益。我们表明，通过使用数据选择标准的正确组合，可以调整分类器并大大提高性能。此外，在某些情况下，可以通过使用特殊样本的子集进行更新并保留一小部分样本来训练分类器来加速处理并节省计算量。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在线支持向量机（SVM）分类中通过数据选择策略应对类别不平衡和数据集偏移的分类器迁移方法。
AI.motivation: 传统批量学习算法（如SVM）在计算资源有限的场景下难以适应数据漂移，而脑机接口（BCI）等应用需要从不同会话或主体的数据中迁移模型，需解决性能下降问题。
AI.method: 比较了多种在线SVM学习策略，重点分析数据选择策略（如添加所有样本、仅添加误分类样本、平衡准则等），并根据数据漂移强度调整策略。
AI.result: 在合成数据中，仅添加误分类样本表现优异；在迁移场景中，添加所有样本并移除旧样本效果最佳，而小漂移场景下仅更新新支持向量可节省资源。
AI.conclusion: 通过合理选择数据策略可显著提升分类器迁移性能，尤其在BCI等资源受限场景中，策略选择需结合漂移强度与计算效率。

ai_content.motivation: 传统批量学习算法（如SVM）在计算资源有限的场景下难以适应数据漂移，而脑机接口（BCI）等应用需要从不同会话或主体的数据中迁移模型，需解决性能下降问题。
ai_content.method: 比较了多种在线SVM学习策略，重点分析数据选择策略（如添加所有样本、仅添加误分类样本、平衡准则等），并根据数据漂移强度调整策略。
ai_content.result: 在合成数据中，仅添加误分类样本表现优异；在迁移场景中，添加所有样本并移除旧样本效果最佳，而小漂移场景下仅更新新支持向量可节省资源。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过合理选择数据策略可显著提升分类器迁移性能，尤其在BCI等资源受限场景中，策略选择需结合漂移强度与计算效率。

search_text: Classifier Transfer with Data Selection Strategies for Online Support Vector Machine Classification with Class Imbalance 具有类不平衡的在线支持向量机分类的数据选择策略的分类器迁移 Objective: Classifier transfers usually come with dataset shifts. To overcome them, online strategies have to be applied. For practical applications, limitations in the computational resources for the adaptation of batch learning algorithms, like the SVM, have to be considered. Approach: We review and compare several strategies for online learning with SVMs. We focus on data selection strategies which limit the size of the stored training data [...] Main Results: For different data shifts, different criteria are appropriate. For the synthetic data, adding all samples to the pool of considered samples performs often significantly worse than other criteria. Especially, adding only misclassified samples performed astoundingly well. Here, balancing criteria were very important when the other criteria were not well chosen. For the transfer setups, the results show that the best strategy depends on the intensity of the drift during the transfer. Adding all and removing the oldest samples results in the best performance, whereas for smaller drifts, it can be sufficient to only add potential new support vectors of the SVM which reduces processing resources. Significance: For BCIs based on EEG models, trained on data from a calibration session, a previous recording session, or even from a recording session with one or several other subjects, are used. This transfer of the learned model usually decreases the performance and can therefore benefit from online learning which adapts the classifier like the established SVM. We show that by using the right combination of data selection criteria, it is possible to adapt the classifier and largely increase the performance. Furthermore, in some cases it is possible to speed up the processing and save computational by updating with a subset of special samples and keeping a small subset of samples for training the classifier. 目标：分类器传输通常伴随着数据集的变化。为了克服这些问题，必须采用在线策略。对于实际应用，必须考虑用于适应批量学习算法（如支持向量机）的计算资源的限制。方法：我们回顾并比较了使用 SVM 进行在线学习的几种策略。我们专注于限制存储的训练数据大小的数据选择策略[...]主要结果：对于不同的数据转移，不同的标准是合适的。对于合成数据，将所有样本添加到考虑样本池中的性能通常比其他标准要差得多。特别是，仅添加错误分类的样本表现得非常好。在这里，当其他标准没有很好选择时，平衡标准就非常重要。对于转移设置，结果表明最佳策略取决于转移期间漂移的强度。添加所有样本并删除最旧的样本可以获得最佳性能，而对于较小的漂移，仅添加 SVM 的潜在新支持向量就足够了，从而减少了处理资源。意义：对于基于脑电图模型的脑机接口，使用来自校准会话、先前记录会话、甚至来自与一个或多个其他受试者的记录会话的数据进行训练。这种学习模型的迁移通常会降低性能，因此可以从像已建立的 SVM 一样适应分类器的在线学习中受益。我们表明，通过使用数据选择标准的正确组合，可以调整分类器并大大提高性能。此外，在某些情况下，可以通过使用特殊样本的子集进行更新并保留一小部分样本来训练分类器来加速处理并节省计算量。 该论文研究了在线支持向量机（SVM）分类中通过数据选择策略应对类别不平衡和数据集偏移的分类器迁移方法。 Mario Michael Krell,Nils Wilshusen,Anett Seeland,Su Kyoung Kim cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Shichao Dong,Ruibo Li,Jiacheng Wei,Fayao Liu,Guosheng Lin
title: Collaborative Propagation on Multiple Instance Graphs for 3D Instance Segmentation with Single-point Supervision
title_zh: 具有单点监督的 3D 实例分割的多实例图协作传播
abstract: Instance segmentation on 3D point clouds has been attracting increasing attention due to its wide applications, especially in scene understanding areas. However, most existing methods operate on fully annotated data while manually preparing ground-truth labels at point-level is very cumbersome and labor-intensive. To address this issue, we propose a novel weakly supervised method RWSeg that only requires labeling one object with one point. With these sparse weak labels, we introduce a unified framework with two branches to propagate semantic and instance information respectively to unknown regions using self-attention and a cross-graph random walk method. Specifically, we propose a Cross-graph Competing Random Walks (CRW) algorithm that encourages competition among different instance graphs to resolve ambiguities in closely placed objects, improving instance assignment accuracy. RWSeg generates high-quality instance-level pseudo labels. Experimental results on ScanNet-v2 and S3DIS datasets show that our approach achieves comparable performance with fully-supervised methods and outperforms previous weakly-supervised methods by a substantial margin.
summary: Instance segmentation on 3D point clouds has been attracting increasing attention due to its wide applications, especially in scene understanding areas. However, most existing methods operate on fully annotated data while manually preparing ground-truth labels at point-level is very cumbersome and labor-intensive. To address this issue, we propose a novel weakly supervised method RWSeg that only requires labeling one object with one point. With these sparse weak labels, we introduce a unified framework with two branches to propagate semantic and instance information respectively to unknown regions using self-attention and a cross-graph random walk method. Specifically, we propose a Cross-graph Competing Random Walks (CRW) algorithm that encourages competition among different instance graphs to resolve ambiguities in closely placed objects, improving instance assignment accuracy. RWSeg generates high-quality instance-level pseudo labels. Experimental results on ScanNet-v2 and S3DIS datasets show that our approach achieves comparable performance with fully-supervised methods and outperforms previous weakly-supervised methods by a substantial margin.
abstract_zh: 3D点云上的实例分割因其广泛的应用而受到越来越多的关注，特别是在场景理解领域。然而，大多数现有方法都对完全注释的数据进行操作，而在点级别手动准备地面实况标签非常麻烦且劳动密集型。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的弱监督方法 RWSeg，它只需要用一个点标记一个对象。利用这些稀疏的弱标签，我们引入了一个具有两个分支的统一框架，使用自注意力和跨图随机游走方法分别将语义和实例信息传播到未知区域。具体来说，我们提出了一种跨图竞争随机游走（CRW）算法，该算法鼓励不同实例图之间的竞争，以解决紧密放置的对象中的歧义，从而提高实例分配的准确性。 RWSeg 生成高质量的实例级伪标签。 ScanNet-v2 和 S3DIS 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了与完全监督方法相当的性能，并且大大优于以前的弱监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督方法RWSeg，通过单点标注实现3D点云实例分割，解决传统方法依赖全标注数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D实例分割方法需大量人工标注的点级标签，耗时且成本高，亟需弱监督方案降低标注需求。
AI.method: 设计RWSeg框架，包含两个分支分别传播语义和实例信息，结合自注意力机制与跨图随机游走算法（CRW），通过实例图间竞争解决密集物体歧义问题。
AI.result: 在ScanNet-v2和S3DIS数据集上，RWSeg性能与全监督方法相当，显著优于现有弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用稀疏标注生成高质量伪标签，为3D实例分割提供高效弱监督解决方案。

authors_text: Robert Redmond,Nathan W. Weckwerth,Brian S. Xia,Qian Li,Peter Kraft,Deeptaanshu Kumar,Çağatay Demiralp,Michael Stonebraker
title: Machine Learning with DBOS
title_zh: 使用 DBOS 进行机器学习
abstract: We recently proposed a new cluster operating system stack, DBOS, centered on a DBMS. DBOS enables unique support for ML applications by encapsulating ML code within stored procedures, centralizing ancillary ML data, providing security built into the underlying DBMS, co-locating ML code and data, and tracking data and workflow provenance. Here we demonstrate a subset of these benefits around two ML applications. We first show that image classification and object detection models using GPUs can be served as DBOS stored procedures with performance competitive to existing systems. We then present a 1D CNN trained to detect anomalies in HTTP requests on DBOS-backed web services, achieving SOTA results. We use this model to develop an interactive anomaly detection system and evaluate it through qualitative user feedback, demonstrating its usefulness as a proof of concept for future work to develop learned real-time security services on top of DBOS.
summary: We recently proposed a new cluster operating system stack, DBOS, centered on a DBMS. DBOS enables unique support for ML applications by encapsulating ML code within stored procedures, centralizing ancillary ML data, providing security built into the underlying DBMS, co-locating ML code and data, and tracking data and workflow provenance. Here we demonstrate a subset of these benefits around two ML applications. We first show that image classification and object detection models using GPUs can be served as DBOS stored procedures with performance competitive to existing systems. We then present a 1D CNN trained to detect anomalies in HTTP requests on DBOS-backed web services, achieving SOTA results. We use this model to develop an interactive anomaly detection system and evaluate it through qualitative user feedback, demonstrating its usefulness as a proof of concept for future work to develop learned real-time security services on top of DBOS.
abstract_zh: 我们最近提出了一个新的集群操作系统堆栈，DBOS，以 DBMS 为中心。 DBOS 通过将 ML 代码封装在存储过程中、集中辅助 ML 数据、提供底层 DBMS 内置的安全性、共同定位 ML 代码和数据以及跟踪数据和工作流来源，为 ML 应用程序提供独特的支持。在这里，我们围绕两个机器学习应用程序展示了这些好处的一部分。我们首先证明，使用 GPU 的图像分类和对象检测模型可以作为 DBOS 存储过程，其性能与现有系统相媲美。然后，我们提出了一个经过训练的 1D CNN，用于检测 DBOS 支持的 Web 服务上的 HTTP 请求中的异常，从而实现 SOTA 结果。我们使用该模型开发交互式异常检测系统，并通过定性用户反馈对其进行评估，证明其作为未来工作在 DBOS 上开发学习型实时安全服务的概念证明的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于数据库的集群操作系统DBOS，通过封装机器学习代码、集中数据管理等方法，展示了其在图像分类、目标检测及HTTP异常检测中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在支持机器学习应用时存在性能、安全及数据管理不足的问题，需构建更高效的数据库原生机器学习支持环境。
AI.method: 将ML代码封装为DBMS存储过程，集中管理辅助数据，利用数据库内置安全机制，共置代码与数据，并追踪数据来源，应用于图像分类、目标检测及HTTP异常检测场景。
AI.result: 图像分类和目标检测模型性能与现有系统相当；1D CNN在HTTP异常检测中达到SOTA，交互式系统通过用户反馈验证了实用性。
AI.conclusion: DBOS有效支持机器学习应用，证明了其在实时安全服务等领域的潜力，为未来数据库与机器学习深度整合提供了可行方向。

We use this model to develop an interactive anomaly detection system and evaluate it through qualitative user feedback, demonstrating its usefulness as a proof of concept for future work to develop learned real-time security services on top of DBOS. 我们最近提出了一个新的集群操作系统堆栈，DBOS，以 DBMS 为中心。 DBOS 通过将 ML 代码封装在存储过程中、集中辅助 ML 数据、提供底层 DBMS 内置的安全性、共同定位 ML 代码和数据以及跟踪数据和工作流来源，为 ML 应用程序提供独特的支持。在这里，我们围绕两个机器学习应用程序展示了这些好处的一部分。我们首先证明，使用 GPU 的图像分类和对象检测模型可以作为 DBOS 存储过程，其性能与现有系统相媲美。然后，我们提出了一个经过训练的 1D CNN，用于检测 DBOS 支持的 Web 服务上的 HTTP 请求中的异常，从而实现 SOTA 结果。我们使用该模型开发交互式异常检测系统，并通过定性用户反馈对其进行评估，证明其作为未来工作在 DBOS 上开发学习型实时安全服务的概念证明的有用性。 本文提出基于数据库的集群操作系统DBOS，通过封装机器学习代码、集中数据管理等方法，展示了其在图像分类、目标检测及HTTP异常检测中的应用效果。 Robert Redmond,Nathan W. Weckwerth,Brian S. Xia,Qian Li,Peter Kraft,Deeptaanshu Kumar,Çağatay Demiralp,Michael Stonebraker cs.CR,cs.DB,cs.DC,cs.HC,cs.LG

title: Robotics in Snow and Ice
title_zh: 冰雪中的机器人
comment: Accepted for the Encyclopedia of Robotics
comments: Accepted for the Encyclopedia of Robotics
abstract: Definition: The terms "robotics in snow and ice" refers to robotic systems being studied, developed, and used in areas where water can be found in its solid state. This specialized branch of field robotics investigates the impact of extreme conditions related to cold environments on autonomous vehicles.
summary: Definition: The terms "robotics in snow and ice" refers to robotic systems being studied, developed, and used in areas where water can be found in its solid state. This specialized branch of field robotics investigates the impact of extreme conditions related to cold environments on autonomous vehicles.
abstract_zh: 定义：“冰雪中的机器人”一词是指在有固态水的地区研究、开发和使用的机器人系统。这一领域机器人学的专业分支研究与寒冷环境相关的极端条件对自动驾驶车辆的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究和开发适用于冰雪环境的机器人系统，探讨寒冷极端条件对自主车辆的影响。
AI.motivation: 在冰雪等极端寒冷环境中，自主车辆面临诸多挑战，需专门研究机器人系统的适应性与可靠性。
AI.method: 通过定义冰雪机器人学领域，分析冷环境对自主车辆的影响，并综述相关技术研究。
AI.result: 明确了冰雪机器人学的研究范围，总结了寒冷条件下的技术挑战及现有解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 冰雪环境下的机器人技术对自主车辆发展至关重要，需进一步探索适应性设计与控制方法。

authors_text: Angela Zavaleta-Bernuy,Qi Yin Zheng,Hammad Shaikh,Jacob Nogas,Anna Rafferty,Andrew Petersen,Joseph Jay Williams
title: Using Adaptive Experiments to Rapidly Help Students
title_zh: 使用适应性实验快速帮助学生
comment: International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education
comments: International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education
abstract: Adaptive experiments can increase the chance that current students obtain better outcomes from a field experiment of an instructional intervention. In such experiments, the probability of assigning students to conditions changes while more data is being collected, so students can be assigned to interventions that are likely to perform better. Digital educational environments lower the barrier to conducting such adaptive experiments, but they are rarely applied in education. One reason might be that researchers have access to few real-world case studies that illustrate the advantages and disadvantages of these experiments in a specific context. We evaluate the effect of homework email reminders in students by conducting an adaptive experiment using the Thompson Sampling algorithm and compare it to a traditional uniform random experiment. We present this as a case study on how to conduct such experiments, and we raise a range of open questions about the conditions under which adaptive randomized experiments may be more or less useful.
summary: Adaptive experiments can increase the chance that current students obtain better outcomes from a field experiment of an instructional intervention. In such experiments, the probability of assigning students to conditions changes while more data is being collected, so students can be assigned to interventions that are likely to perform better. Digital educational environments lower the barrier to conducting such adaptive experiments, but they are rarely applied in education. One reason might be that researchers have access to few real-world case studies that illustrate the advantages and disadvantages of these experiments in a specific context. We evaluate the effect of homework email reminders in students by conducting an adaptive experiment using the Thompson Sampling algorithm and compare it to a traditional uniform random experiment. We present this as a case study on how to conduct such experiments, and we raise a range of open questions about the conditions under which adaptive randomized experiments may be more or less useful.
abstract_zh: 适应性实验可以增加当前学生从教学干预的现场实验中获得更好结果的机会。在此类实验中，当收集更多数据时，将学生分配到条件的概率会发生变化，因此可以将学生分配到可能表现更好的干预措施。数字教育环境降低了进行此类适应性实验的障碍，但在教育中很少应用。原因之一可能是研究人员几乎无法获得现实世界的案例研究来说明这些实验在特定背景下的优点和缺点。我们通过使用汤普森采样算法进行自适应实验来评估家庭作业电子邮件提醒对学生的效果，并将其与传统的均匀随机实验进行比较。我们将其作为如何进行此类实验的案例研究，并提出了一系列关于适应性随机实验可能或多或少有用的条件的开放性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文通过自适应实验评估作业邮件提醒对学生的影响，并作为案例研究展示如何实施此类实验。
AI.motivation: 自适应实验在教育领域应用较少，缺乏实际案例说明其优缺点及适用条件。
AI.method: 采用汤普森采样算法进行自适应实验，与传统均匀随机实验对比，分析作业邮件提醒效果。
AI.result: 验证了自适应实验在动态调整干预分配中的可行性，并揭示了其潜在优势与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 自适应实验在特定条件下可能提升干预效果，但需结合实际场景权衡其适用性，未来需更多实证研究支持。

authors_text: Angela Zavaleta-Bernuy,Ziwen Han,Hammad Shaikh,Qi Yin Zheng,Lisa-Angelique Lim,Anna Rafferty,Andrew Petersen,Joseph Jay Williams
title: How can Email Interventions Increase Students' Completion of Online Homework? A Case Study Using A/B Comparisons
title_zh: 电子邮件干预如何提高学生在线作业的完成率？使用 A/B 比较的案例研究
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Conference: LAK22: 12th International Learning Analytics and Knowledge Conference (LAK22)
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Conference: LAK22: 12th International Learning Analytics and Knowledge Conference (LAK22)
abstract: Email communication between instructors and students is ubiquitous, and it could be valuable to explore ways of testing out how to make email messages more impactful. This paper explores the design space of using emails to get students to plan and reflect on starting weekly homework earlier. We deployed a series of email reminders using randomized A/B comparisons to test alternative factors in the design of these emails, providing examples of an experimental paradigm and metrics for a broader range of interventions. We also surveyed and interviewed instructors and students to compare their predictions about the effectiveness of the reminders with their actual impact. We present our results on which seemingly obvious predictions about effective emails are not borne out, despite there being evidence for further exploring these interventions, as they can sometimes motivate students to attempt their homework more often. We also present qualitative evidence about student opinions and behaviours after receiving the emails, to guide further interventions. These findings provide insight into how to use randomized A/B comparisons in everyday channels such as emails, to provide empirical evidence to test our beliefs about the effectiveness of alternative design choices.
summary: Email communication between instructors and students is ubiquitous, and it could be valuable to explore ways of testing out how to make email messages more impactful. This paper explores the design space of using emails to get students to plan and reflect on starting weekly homework earlier. We deployed a series of email reminders using randomized A/B comparisons to test alternative factors in the design of these emails, providing examples of an experimental paradigm and metrics for a broader range of interventions. We also surveyed and interviewed instructors and students to compare their predictions about the effectiveness of the reminders with their actual impact. We present our results on which seemingly obvious predictions about effective emails are not borne out, despite there being evidence for further exploring these interventions, as they can sometimes motivate students to attempt their homework more often. We also present qualitative evidence about student opinions and behaviours after receiving the emails, to guide further interventions. These findings provide insight into how to use randomized A/B comparisons in everyday channels such as emails, to provide empirical evidence to test our beliefs about the effectiveness of alternative design choices.
abstract_zh: 教师和学生之间的电子邮件通信无处不在，探索测试如何使电子邮件更具影响力的方法可能很有价值。本文探讨了使用电子邮件让学生提前计划和反思开始每周作业的设计空间。我们使用随机 A/B 比较部署了一系列电子邮件提醒，以测试这些电子邮件设计中的替代因素，为更广泛的干预措施提供实验范式和指标的示例。我们还对教师和学生进行了调查和采访，将他们对提醒有效性的预测与其实际影响进行比较。我们提出的结果表明，尽管有证据表明可以进一步探索这些干预措施，但关于有效电子邮件的看似明显的预测并未得到证实，因为它们有时可以激励学生更频繁地尝试做作业。我们还在收到电子邮件后提供有关学生意见和行为的定性证据，以指导进一步的干预。这些发现让我们深入了解如何在电子邮件等日常渠道中使用随机 A/B 比较，从而提供经验证据来测试我们对替代设计选择有效性的信念。

AI.tldr: 本文通过A/B测试研究电子邮件干预如何提高学生在线作业完成率，探索不同邮件设计对学习行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 电子邮件是师生沟通的常见渠道，但其在促进学生完成作业方面的有效性尚未明确，需通过实证研究验证设计假设。
AI.method: 采用随机A/B测试对比不同邮件设计（如提醒内容、发送时间等），结合问卷调查和访谈收集师生对邮件效果的预期与实际反馈。
AI.result: 部分看似有效的邮件设计未达预期效果，但某些干预措施仍能提升学生作业参与度；学生和教师的反馈揭示了行为与预期的差异。
AI.conclusion: 日常通信渠道（如邮件）可通过A/B测试提供实证依据，挑战传统假设并指导教育干预设计。

A Case Study Using A/B Comparisons 电子邮件干预如何提高学生在线作业的完成率？使用 A/B 比较的案例研究 Email communication between instructors and students is ubiquitous, and it could be valuable to explore ways of testing out how to make email messages more impactful. This paper explores the design space of using emails to get students to plan and reflect on starting weekly homework earlier. We deployed a series of email reminders using randomized A/B comparisons to test alternative factors in the design of these emails, providing examples of an experimental paradigm and metrics for a broader range of interventions. We also surveyed and interviewed instructors and students to compare their predictions about the effectiveness of the reminders with their actual impact. We present our results on which seemingly obvious predictions about effective emails are not borne out, despite there being evidence for further exploring these interventions, as they can sometimes motivate students to attempt their homework more often. We also present qualitative evidence about student opinions and behaviours after receiving the emails, to guide further interventions. These findings provide insight into how to use randomized A/B comparisons in everyday channels such as emails, to provide empirical evidence to test our beliefs about the effectiveness of alternative design choices. 教师和学生之间的电子邮件通信无处不在，探索测试如何使电子邮件更具影响力的方法可能很有价值。本文探讨了使用电子邮件让学生提前计划和反思开始每周作业的设计空间。我们使用随机 A/B 比较部署了一系列电子邮件提醒，以测试这些电子邮件设计中的替代因素，为更广泛的干预措施提供实验范式和指标的示例。我们还对教师和学生进行了调查和采访，将他们对提醒有效性的预测与其实际影响进行比较。我们提出的结果表明，尽管有证据表明可以进一步探索这些干预措施，但关于有效电子邮件的看似明显的预测并未得到证实，因为它们有时可以激励学生更频繁地尝试做作业。我们还在收到电子邮件后提供有关学生意见和行为的定性证据，以指导进一步的干预。这些发现让我们深入了解如何在电子邮件等日常渠道中使用随机 A/B 比较，从而提供经验证据来测试我们对替代设计选择有效性的信念。 本文通过A/B测试研究电子邮件干预如何提高学生在线作业完成率，探索不同邮件设计对学习行为的影响。 Angela Zavaleta-Bernuy,Ziwen Han,Hammad Shaikh,Qi Yin Zheng,Lisa-Angelique Lim,Anna Rafferty,Andrew Petersen,Joseph Jay Williams cs.HC

title: Reducing Exploitability with Population Based Training
title_zh: 通过基于人群的培训减少可剥削性
comment: Presented at New Frontiers in Adversarial Machine Learning Workshop, ICML 2022
comments: Presented at New Frontiers in Adversarial Machine Learning Workshop, ICML 2022
abstract: Self-play reinforcement learning has achieved state-of-the-art, and often superhuman, performance in a variety of zero-sum games. Yet prior work has found that policies that are highly capable against regular opponents can fail catastrophically against adversarial policies: an opponent trained explicitly against the victim. Prior defenses using adversarial training were able to make the victim robust to a specific adversary, but the victim remained vulnerable to new ones. We conjecture this limitation was due to insufficient diversity of adversaries seen during training. We analyze a defense using population based training to pit the victim against a diverse set of opponents. We evaluate this defense's robustness against new adversaries in two low-dimensional environments. This defense increases robustness against adversaries, as measured by the number of attacker training timesteps to exploit the victim. Furthermore, we show that robustness is correlated with the size of the opponent population.
summary: Self-play reinforcement learning has achieved state-of-the-art, and often superhuman, performance in a variety of zero-sum games. Yet prior work has found that policies that are highly capable against regular opponents can fail catastrophically against adversarial policies: an opponent trained explicitly against the victim. Prior defenses using adversarial training were able to make the victim robust to a specific adversary, but the victim remained vulnerable to new ones. We conjecture this limitation was due to insufficient diversity of adversaries seen during training. We analyze a defense using population based training to pit the victim against a diverse set of opponents. We evaluate this defense's robustness against new adversaries in two low-dimensional environments. This defense increases robustness against adversaries, as measured by the number of attacker training timesteps to exploit the victim. Furthermore, we show that robustness is correlated with the size of the opponent population.
abstract_zh: 自对弈强化学习在各种零和游戏中取得了最先进的、甚至是超人的表现。然而之前的研究发现，针对常规对手的强大政策可能会在对抗性政策（即专门针对受害者进行训练的对手）面前遭遇灾难性失败。之前使用对抗性训练的防御能够使受害者对特定的对手具有更强的抵抗力，但受害者仍然容易受到新的对手的攻击。我们推测这种限制是由于训练期间看到的对手多样性不足造成的。我们使用基于人群的训练来分析防御，让受害者与不同的对手进行对抗。我们评估了这种防御在两个低维环境中针对新对手的稳健性。这种防御提高了针对对手的鲁棒性，这是通过攻击者训练利用受害者的时间步数来衡量的。此外，我们表明鲁棒性与对手群体的规模相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于种群训练的方法，通过让策略在多样化的对手中训练，以减少其在对抗性策略下的可被利用性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法只能使策略对特定对手鲁棒，但无法防御新出现的对抗策略，原因在于训练过程中对手多样性不足。
AI.method: 采用基于种群的训练框架，让目标策略在多个不同对手的对抗中进行训练，提升其鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在两个低维环境中验证了该方法的有效性，结果显示对手训练步数与策略鲁棒性呈正相关，且种群规模越大越能提升防御能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过增加训练中对手的多样性，种群训练方法能有效提升策略的鲁棒性，减少被新对抗策略利用的可能性。

authors_text: Jiashu Wu,Hao Dai,Yang Wang,Shigen Shen,Chengzhong Xu
title: PECCO: A Profit and Cost-oriented Computation Offloading Scheme in Edge-Cloud Environment with Improved Moth-flame Optimisation
title_zh: PECCO：一种改进飞蛾扑火优化的边缘云环境中面向利润和成本的计算卸载方案
comment: Accepted by Concurrency and Computation: Practice and Experience
comments: Accepted by Concurrency and Computation: Practice and Experience
abstract: With the fast growing quantity of data generated by smart devices and the exponential surge of processing demand in the Internet of Things (IoT) era, the resource-rich cloud centres have been utilised to tackle these challenges. To relieve the burden on cloud centres, edge-cloud computation offloading becomes a promising solution since shortening the proximity between the data source and the computation by offloading computation tasks from the cloud to edge devices can improve performance and Quality of Service (QoS). Several optimisation models of edge-cloud computation offloading have been proposed that take computation costs and heterogeneous communication costs into account. However, several important factors are not jointly considered, such as heterogeneities of tasks, load balancing among nodes and the profit yielded by computation tasks, which lead to the profit and cost-oriented computation offloading optimisation model PECCO proposed in this paper. Considering that the model is hard in nature and the optimisation objective is not differentiable, we propose an improved Moth-flame optimiser PECCO-MFI which addresses some deficiencies of the original Moth-flame Optimiser and integrate it under the edge-cloud environment. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to verify the superior performance of the proposed method when optimising the proposed task offloading model under the edge-cloud environment.
summary: With the fast growing quantity of data generated by smart devices and the exponential surge of processing demand in the Internet of Things (IoT) era, the resource-rich cloud centres have been utilised to tackle these challenges. To relieve the burden on cloud centres, edge-cloud computation offloading becomes a promising solution since shortening the proximity between the data source and the computation by offloading computation tasks from the cloud to edge devices can improve performance and Quality of Service (QoS). Several optimisation models of edge-cloud computation offloading have been proposed that take computation costs and heterogeneous communication costs into account. However, several important factors are not jointly considered, such as heterogeneities of tasks, load balancing among nodes and the profit yielded by computation tasks, which lead to the profit and cost-oriented computation offloading optimisation model PECCO proposed in this paper. Considering that the model is hard in nature and the optimisation objective is not differentiable, we propose an improved Moth-flame optimiser PECCO-MFI which addresses some deficiencies of the original Moth-flame Optimiser and integrate it under the edge-cloud environment. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to verify the superior performance of the proposed method when optimising the proposed task offloading model under the edge-cloud environment.
abstract_zh: 随着智能设备产生的数据量快速增长以及物联网时代处理需求的指数级增长，资源丰富的云中心被用来应对这些挑战。为了减轻云中心的负担，边缘云计算卸载成为一种有前途的解决方案，因为通过将计算任务从云卸载到边缘设备来缩短数据源和计算之间的距离可以提高性能和服务质量（QoS）。人们提出了几种考虑计算成本和异构通信成本的边云计算卸载优化模型。然而，没有共同考虑任务的异构性、节点之间的负载均衡以及计算任务产生的利润等几个重要因素，这导致了本文提出的面向利润和成本的计算卸载优化模型PECCO。考虑到模型本质上是困难的且优化目标不可微，我们提出了一种改进的Moth-flame优化器PECCO-MFI，它解决了原始Moth-flame Optimiser的一些缺陷，并将其集成在边缘云环境下。通过综合实验验证了该方法在边云环境下优化所提出的任务卸载模型时的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进飞蛾火焰优化算法的利润和成本导向的边缘-云环境计算卸载方案PECCO。
AI.motivation: 现有计算卸载模型未综合考虑任务异构性、节点负载均衡及任务利润等因素，导致优化效果不足。
AI.method: 设计融合利润与成本的PECCO优化模型，并改进飞蛾火焰优化算法（PECCO-MFI）以解决模型非可微特性及复杂性问题。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，PECCO-MFI在边缘-云环境任务卸载优化中表现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: PECCO方案通过综合利润成本因素及改进优化算法，有效提升了边缘-云环境下的计算卸载效率与资源利用率。

title: Adversarial Machine Learning-Based Anticipation of Threats Against Vehicle-to-Microgrid Services
title_zh: 基于对抗性机器学习的车辆到微电网服务威胁预测
comment: IEEE Global Communications Conference (Globecom), 2022, 6 pages, 2 Figures, 4 Tables
comments: IEEE Global Communications Conference (Globecom), 2022, 6 pages, 2 Figures, 4 Tables
abstract: In this paper, we study the expanding attack surface of Adversarial Machine Learning (AML) and the potential attacks against Vehicle-to-Microgrid (V2M) services. We present an anticipatory study of a multi-stage gray-box attack that can achieve a comparable result to a white-box attack. Adversaries aim to deceive the targeted Machine Learning (ML) classifier at the network edge to misclassify the incoming energy requests from microgrids. With an inference attack, an adversary can collect real-time data from the communication between smart microgrids and a 5G gNodeB to train a surrogate (i.e., shadow) model of the targeted classifier at the edge. To anticipate the associated impact of an adversary's capability to collect real-time data instances, we study five different cases, each representing different amounts of real-time data instances collected by an adversary. Out of six ML models trained on the complete dataset, K-Nearest Neighbour (K-NN) is selected as the surrogate model, and through simulations, we demonstrate that the multi-stage gray-box attack is able to mislead the ML classifier and cause an Evasion Increase Rate (EIR) up to 73.2% using 40% less data than what a white-box attack needs to achieve a similar EIR.
summary: In this paper, we study the expanding attack surface of Adversarial Machine Learning (AML) and the potential attacks against Vehicle-to-Microgrid (V2M) services. We present an anticipatory study of a multi-stage gray-box attack that can achieve a comparable result to a white-box attack. Adversaries aim to deceive the targeted Machine Learning (ML) classifier at the network edge to misclassify the incoming energy requests from microgrids. With an inference attack, an adversary can collect real-time data from the communication between smart microgrids and a 5G gNodeB to train a surrogate (i.e., shadow) model of the targeted classifier at the edge. To anticipate the associated impact of an adversary's capability to collect real-time data instances, we study five different cases, each representing different amounts of real-time data instances collected by an adversary. Out of six ML models trained on the complete dataset, K-Nearest Neighbour (K-NN) is selected as the surrogate model, and through simulations, we demonstrate that the multi-stage gray-box attack is able to mislead the ML classifier and cause an Evasion Increase Rate (EIR) up to 73.2% using 40% less data than what a white-box attack needs to achieve a similar EIR.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了对抗性机器学习（AML）不断扩大的攻击面以及针对车辆到微电网（V2M）服务的潜在攻击。我们提出了一项多阶段灰盒攻击的预期研究，该攻击可以达到与白盒攻击相当的结果。攻击者旨在欺骗网络边缘的目标机器学习 (ML) 分类器，对来自微电网的传入能源请求进行错误分类。通过推理攻击，攻击者可以从智能微电网和 5G gNodeB 之间的通信中收集实时数据，以训练边缘目标分类器的代理（即影子）模型。为了预测对手收集实时数据实例的能力的相关影响，我们研究了五种不同的案例，每种案例代表对手收集的不同数量的实时数据实例。在完整数据集上训练的六个 ML 模型中，选择 K 最近邻 (K-NN) 作为代理模型，通过模拟，我们证明多阶段灰盒攻击能够误导 ML 分类器，并导致逃避增加率 (EIR) 高达 73.2%，而使用比白盒攻击实现类似 EIR 所需的数据少 40% 的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗机器学习对车辆到微电网服务的威胁，提出一种多阶段灰盒攻击方法，通过欺骗边缘分类器实现高规避率。
AI.motivation: 随着V2M服务普及，其面临对抗机器学习攻击的风险增加，需提前预测并防范潜在威胁以保障能源系统安全。
AI.method: 设计多阶段灰盒攻击框架，通过收集实时通信数据训练代理模型（K-NN），模拟攻击对边缘分类器的欺骗效果。
AI.result: 使用40%更少数据即可达到与白盒攻击相当的73.2%规避率，验证了灰盒攻击的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 灰盒攻击能有效威胁V2M服务安全，需加强边缘分类器的对抗防御机制以应对数据泄露风险。

search_text: Adversarial Machine Learning-Based Anticipation of Threats Against Vehicle-to-Microgrid Services 基于对抗性机器学习的车辆到微电网服务威胁预测 In this paper, we study the expanding attack surface of Adversarial Machine Learning (AML) and the potential attacks against Vehicle-to-Microgrid (V2M) services. We present an anticipatory study of a multi-stage gray-box attack that can achieve a comparable result to a white-box attack. Adversaries aim to deceive the targeted Machine Learning (ML) classifier at the network edge to misclassify the incoming energy requests from microgrids. With an inference attack, an adversary can collect real-time data from the communication between smart microgrids and a 5G gNodeB to train a surrogate (i.e., shadow) model of the targeted classifier at the edge. To anticipate the associated impact of an adversary's capability to collect real-time data instances, we study five different cases, each representing different amounts of real-time data instances collected by an adversary. Out of six ML models trained on the complete dataset, K-Nearest Neighbour (K-NN) is selected as the surrogate model, and through simulations, we demonstrate that the multi-stage gray-box attack is able to mislead the ML classifier and cause an Evasion Increase Rate (EIR) up to 73.2% using 40% less data than what a white-box attack needs to achieve a similar EIR. 在本文中，我们研究了对抗性机器学习（AML）不断扩大的攻击面以及针对车辆到微电网（V2M）服务的潜在攻击。我们提出了一项多阶段灰盒攻击的预期研究，该攻击可以达到与白盒攻击相当的结果。攻击者旨在欺骗网络边缘的目标机器学习 (ML) 分类器，对来自微电网的传入能源请求进行错误分类。通过推理攻击，攻击者可以从智能微电网和 5G gNodeB 之间的通信中收集实时数据，以训练边缘目标分类器的代理（即影子）模型。为了预测对手收集实时数据实例的能力的相关影响，我们研究了五种不同的案例，每种案例代表对手收集的不同数量的实时数据实例。在完整数据集上训练的六个 ML 模型中，选择 K 最近邻 (K-NN) 作为代理模型，通过模拟，我们证明多阶段灰盒攻击能够误导 ML 分类器，并导致逃避增加率 (EIR) 高达 73.2%，而使用比白盒攻击实现类似 EIR 所需的数据少 40% 的数据。 本文研究对抗机器学习对车辆到微电网服务的威胁，提出一种多阶段灰盒攻击方法，通过欺骗边缘分类器实现高规避率。 Ahmed Omara,Burak Kantarci cs.CR,cs.AI

title: Interpretable Polynomial Neural Ordinary Differential Equations
title_zh: 可解释的多项式神经常微分方程
abstract: Neural networks have the ability to serve as universal function approximators, but they are not interpretable and don't generalize well outside of their training region. Both of these issues are problematic when trying to apply standard neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs) to dynamical systems. We introduce the polynomial neural ODE, which is a deep polynomial neural network inside of the neural ODE framework. We demonstrate the capability of polynomial neural ODEs to predict outside of the training region, as well as perform direct symbolic regression without additional tools such as SINDy.
summary: Neural networks have the ability to serve as universal function approximators, but they are not interpretable and don't generalize well outside of their training region. Both of these issues are problematic when trying to apply standard neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs) to dynamical systems. We introduce the polynomial neural ODE, which is a deep polynomial neural network inside of the neural ODE framework. We demonstrate the capability of polynomial neural ODEs to predict outside of the training region, as well as perform direct symbolic regression without additional tools such as SINDy.
abstract_zh: 神经网络有能力充当通用函数逼近器，但它们不可解释，并且在训练区域之外不能很好地泛化。当尝试将标准神经常微分方程（神经 ODE）应用于动力系统时，这两个问题都是有问题的。我们介绍多项式神经 ODE，它是神经 ODE 框架内的深度多项式神经网络。我们展示了多项式神经常微分方程在训练区域之外进行预测的能力，以及无需 SINDy 等其他工具即可执行直接符号回归的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的多项式神经常微分方程（Polynomial Neural ODE），以解决传统神经ODE在动力系统应用中的可解释性和泛化能力不足问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络和神经ODE缺乏可解释性，且在训练区域外泛化能力差，难以有效应用于动力系统建模。
AI.method: 在神经ODE框架内嵌入深度多项式神经网络结构，通过多项式形式增强模型可解释性，并直接实现符号回归功能。
AI.result: 多项式神经ODE在训练区域外表现出优异的预测能力，且无需依赖SINDy等外部工具即可完成符号回归任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持模型性能的同时显著提升了可解释性和泛化能力，为动力系统建模提供了新的有效工具。

title: Ad Hoc Teamwork in the Presence of Adversaries
title_zh: 面对对手时的临时团队合作
comment: Blue Sky Ideas Acceptance at the New Frontiers in Adversarial Machine Learning Workshop @ ICML 2022
comments: Blue Sky Ideas Acceptance at the New Frontiers in Adversarial Machine Learning Workshop @ ICML 2022
abstract: Advances in ad hoc teamwork have the potential to create agents that collaborate robustly in real-world applications. Agents deployed in the real world, however, are vulnerable to adversaries with the intent to subvert them. There has been little research in ad hoc teamwork that assumes the presence of adversaries. We explain the importance of extending ad hoc teamwork to include the presence of adversaries and clarify why this problem is difficult. We then propose some directions for new research opportunities in ad hoc teamwork that leads to more robust multi-agent cyber-physical infrastructure systems.
summary: Advances in ad hoc teamwork have the potential to create agents that collaborate robustly in real-world applications. Agents deployed in the real world, however, are vulnerable to adversaries with the intent to subvert them. There has been little research in ad hoc teamwork that assumes the presence of adversaries. We explain the importance of extending ad hoc teamwork to include the presence of adversaries and clarify why this problem is difficult. We then propose some directions for new research opportunities in ad hoc teamwork that leads to more robust multi-agent cyber-physical infrastructure systems.
abstract_zh: 临时团队合作的进步有可能创建在现实应用程序中强有力协作的代理。然而，部署在现实世界中的特工很容易受到意图颠覆它们的对手的攻击。关于假设对手存在的临时团队合作的研究很少。我们解释了扩展临时团队合作以包括对手的存在的重要性，并阐明了为什么这个问题很困难。然后，我们为临时团队合作中的新研究机会提出一些方向，从而形成更强大的多智能体网络物理基础设施系统。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在存在对手的情况下如何扩展临时团队合作，并提出新的研究方向以增强多智能体系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对存在对抗环境的临时团队合作的考虑，而现实中的智能体容易受到对手的攻击，需增强其鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过分析对抗环境下临时团队合作的挑战，提出新的研究方向以构建更稳健的多智能体系统。
AI.result: 明确了对抗环境下临时团队合作的重要性，并提出了未来研究的关键方向。
AI.conclusion: 扩展临时团队合作以应对对手是必要的，未来的研究将推动更鲁棒的多智能体网络物理系统的发展。

authors_text: Mohi Reza,Akmar Chowdhury,Aidan Li,Mahathi Gandhamaneni,Joseph Jay Williams
title: Experimenting with Experimentation: Rethinking The Role of Experimentation in Educational Design
title_zh: 实验中的实验：重新思考实验在教育设计中的作用
comment: Presented at the 3rd annual workshop at Learning @ Scale 2022 on "A/B Testing and Platform-Enabled Learning Research"
comments: Presented at the 3rd annual workshop at Learning @ Scale 2022 on "A/B Testing and Platform-Enabled Learning Research"
abstract: What if we take a broader view of what it means to run an education experiment? In this paper, we explore opportunities that arise when we think beyond the commonly-held notion that the purpose of an experiment is to either accept or reject a pre-defined hypothesis and instead, reconsider experimentation as a means to explore the complex design space of creating and improving instructional content. This is an approach we call experiment-inspired design. Then, to operationalize these ideas in a real-world experimentation venue, we investigate the implications of running a sequence of interventions teaching first-year students "meta-skills": transferable skills applicable to multiple areas of their lives, such as planning, and managing stress. Finally, using two examples as case studies for meta-skills interventions (stress-reappraisal and mental contrasting with implementation intentions), we reflect on our experiences with experiment-inspired design and share six preliminary lessons on how to use experimentation for design.
summary: What if we take a broader view of what it means to run an education experiment? In this paper, we explore opportunities that arise when we think beyond the commonly-held notion that the purpose of an experiment is to either accept or reject a pre-defined hypothesis and instead, reconsider experimentation as a means to explore the complex design space of creating and improving instructional content. This is an approach we call experiment-inspired design. Then, to operationalize these ideas in a real-world experimentation venue, we investigate the implications of running a sequence of interventions teaching first-year students "meta-skills": transferable skills applicable to multiple areas of their lives, such as planning, and managing stress. Finally, using two examples as case studies for meta-skills interventions (stress-reappraisal and mental contrasting with implementation intentions), we reflect on our experiences with experiment-inspired design and share six preliminary lessons on how to use experimentation for design.
abstract_zh: 如果我们以更广泛的视角来看待开展教育实验的意义会怎样？在本文中，我们探讨了当我们超越普遍认为的实验目的是接受或拒绝预先定义的假设的观念时出现的机会，而是重新考虑实验作为探索创建和改进教学内容的复杂设计空间的手段。我们将这种方法称为实验启发设计。然后，为了在现实世界的实验场所中实施这些想法，我们研究了运行一系列干预措施的影响，这些干预措施教授一年级学生“元技能”：适用于他们生活的多个领域的可转移技能，例如规划和管理压力。最后，我们使用两个例子作为元技能干预的案例研究（压力重新评估和与实施意图的心理对比），反思我们在实验启发设计方面的经验，并分享关于如何使用实验进行设计的六个初步经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'实验启发式设计'的新方法，主张将教育实验从验证预设假设转变为探索教学内容设计的复杂空间，并通过两个元技能干预案例总结出六条设计经验。
AI.motivation: 传统教育实验局限于验证预设假设，难以应对教学设计的复杂性，需探索更灵活的实验方法以改进教育内容设计。
AI.method: 通过实施针对新生元技能（压力管理、计划能力）的干预序列，采用两个具体案例（压力再评估、心理对比与执行意向）进行实验启发式设计的实践与反思。
AI.result: 总结出六条实验启发式设计经验，证明该方法能有效探索教学设计空间并改进教育干预方案。
AI.conclusion: 实验启发式设计为教育创新提供了新视角，强调实验在探索复杂设计空间中的核心作用，建议进一步推广该方法论。

title: Learning to Complete Object Shapes for Object-level Mapping in Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: 学习完成动态场景中对象级映射的对象形状
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel object-level mapping system that can simultaneously segment, track, and reconstruct objects in dynamic scenes. It can further predict and complete their full geometries by conditioning on reconstructions from depth inputs and a category-level shape prior with the aim that completed object geometry leads to better object reconstruction and tracking accuracy. For each incoming RGB-D frame, we perform instance segmentation to detect objects and build data associations between the detection and the existing object maps. A new object map will be created for each unmatched detection. For each matched object, we jointly optimise its pose and latent geometry representations using geometric residual and differential rendering residual towards its shape prior and completed geometry. Our approach shows better tracking and reconstruction performance compared to methods using traditional volumetric mapping or learned shape prior approaches. We evaluate its effectiveness by quantitatively and qualitatively testing it in both synthetic and real-world sequences.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel object-level mapping system that can simultaneously segment, track, and reconstruct objects in dynamic scenes. It can further predict and complete their full geometries by conditioning on reconstructions from depth inputs and a category-level shape prior with the aim that completed object geometry leads to better object reconstruction and tracking accuracy. For each incoming RGB-D frame, we perform instance segmentation to detect objects and build data associations between the detection and the existing object maps. A new object map will be created for each unmatched detection. For each matched object, we jointly optimise its pose and latent geometry representations using geometric residual and differential rendering residual towards its shape prior and completed geometry. Our approach shows better tracking and reconstruction performance compared to methods using traditional volumetric mapping or learned shape prior approaches. We evaluate its effectiveness by quantitatively and qualitatively testing it in both synthetic and real-world sequences.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的对象级映射系统，可以同时分割、跟踪和重建动态场景中的对象。它可以通过根据深度输入和类别级形状先验进行重建来进一步预测和完成其完整的几何形状，目的是完成的对象几何形状可以带来更好的对象重建和跟踪精度。对于每个传入的 RGB-D 帧，我们执行实例分割来检测对象并在检测和现有对象图之间建立数据关联。将为每个不匹配的检测创建一个新的对象图。对于每个匹配的对象，我们使用几何残差和差分渲染残差对其先验形状和完整几何形状联合优化其姿态和潜在几何表示。与使用传统体积映射或学习形状先验方法的方法相比，我们的方法显示出更好的跟踪和重建性能。我们通过在合成序列和真实序列中进行定量和定性测试来评估其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态场景中对象级映射系统，通过深度输入和类别级形状先验完成对象形状，以提升对象重建和跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 传统体素映射或学习形状先验方法在动态场景中存在跟踪和重建精度不足的问题，需通过形状补全优化对象几何表示。
AI.method: 对每帧RGB-D数据进行实例分割与数据关联，为未匹配检测创建新对象图；对匹配对象联合优化位姿和潜在几何表示，结合几何残差与微分渲染残差约束形状先验与补全几何。
AI.result: 在合成与真实场景序列中，该方法在跟踪与重建性能上优于传统体素映射及学习形状先验方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合深度输入、形状先验与联合优化，所提系统有效提升了动态场景中对象级映射的准确性与鲁棒性。

title: The Relative Importance of Depth Cues and Semantic Edges for Indoor Mobility Using Simulated Prosthetic Vision in Immersive Virtual Reality
title_zh: 深度线索和语义边缘对于在沉浸式虚拟现实中使用模拟假肢视觉的室内移动的相对重要性
abstract: Visual neuroprostheses (bionic eyes) have the potential to treat degenerative eye diseases that often result in low vision or complete blindness. These devices rely on an external camera to capture the visual scene, which is then translated frame-by-frame into an electrical stimulation pattern that is sent to the implant in the eye. To highlight more meaningful information in the scene, recent studies have tested the effectiveness of deep-learning based computer vision techniques, such as depth estimation to highlight nearby obstacles (DepthOnly mode) and semantic edge detection to outline important objects in the scene (EdgesOnly mode). However, nobody has attempted to combine the two, either by presenting them together (EdgesAndDepth) or by giving the user the ability to flexibly switch between them (EdgesOrDepth). Here, we used a neurobiologically inspired model of simulated prosthetic vision (SPV) in an immersive virtual reality (VR) environment to test the relative importance of semantic edges and relative depth cues to support the ability to avoid obstacles and identify objects. We found that participants were significantly better at avoiding obstacles using depth-based cues as opposed to relying on edge information alone, and that roughly half the participants preferred the flexibility to switch between modes (EdgesOrDepth). This study highlights the relative importance of depth cues for SPV mobility and is an important first step towards a visual neuroprosthesis that uses computer vision to improve a user's scene understanding.
summary: Visual neuroprostheses (bionic eyes) have the potential to treat degenerative eye diseases that often result in low vision or complete blindness. These devices rely on an external camera to capture the visual scene, which is then translated frame-by-frame into an electrical stimulation pattern that is sent to the implant in the eye. To highlight more meaningful information in the scene, recent studies have tested the effectiveness of deep-learning based computer vision techniques, such as depth estimation to highlight nearby obstacles (DepthOnly mode) and semantic edge detection to outline important objects in the scene (EdgesOnly mode). However, nobody has attempted to combine the two, either by presenting them together (EdgesAndDepth) or by giving the user the ability to flexibly switch between them (EdgesOrDepth). Here, we used a neurobiologically inspired model of simulated prosthetic vision (SPV) in an immersive virtual reality (VR) environment to test the relative importance of semantic edges and relative depth cues to support the ability to avoid obstacles and identify objects. We found that participants were significantly better at avoiding obstacles using depth-based cues as opposed to relying on edge information alone, and that roughly half the participants preferred the flexibility to switch between modes (EdgesOrDepth). This study highlights the relative importance of depth cues for SPV mobility and is an important first step towards a visual neuroprosthesis that uses computer vision to improve a user's scene understanding.
abstract_zh: 视觉神经假体（仿生眼）有可能治疗经常导致视力低下或完全失明的退行性眼部疾病。这些设备依靠外部摄像头来捕捉视觉场景，然后将其逐帧转换为电刺激模式，发送到眼睛中的植入物。为了突出场景中更有意义的信息，最近的研究测试了基于深度学习的计算机视觉技术的有效性，例如用于突出显示附近障碍物的深度估计（DepthOnly 模式）和用于勾勒场景中重要对象的语义边缘检测（EdgesOnly 模式）。然而，没有人尝试将两者结合起来，要么将它们呈现在一起（EdgesAndDepth），要么让用户能够在它们之间灵活切换（EdgesOrDepth）。在这里，我们在沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）环境中使用受神经生物学启发的模拟假肢视觉（SPV）模型来测试语义边缘和相对深度线索的相对重要性，以支持避开障碍物和识别物体的能力。我们发现，与单独依赖边缘信息相比，参与者使用基于深度的线索能够更好地避开障碍物，并且大约一半的参与者更喜欢在模式之间切换的灵活性（EdgesOrDepth）。这项研究强调了深度线索对于 SPV 移动性的相对重要性，并且是迈向使用计算机视觉提高用户场景理解的视觉神经假体的重要的第一步。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在虚拟现实环境中，使用模拟假肢视觉系统时深度线索和语义边缘对室内移动能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 视觉神经假体需优化场景理解能力以提升盲人导航效率，但现有研究未明确深度信息与语义边缘的相对重要性。
AI.method: 通过神经生物学启发的模拟假肢视觉模型，在沉浸式VR环境中测试DepthOnly、EdgesOnly、EdgesAndDepth及EdgesOrDepth四种模式下的障碍物规避与物体识别表现。
AI.result: 参与者使用深度线索规避障碍物表现显著优于边缘信息，约半数用户偏好可切换模式（EdgesOrDepth）。
AI.conclusion: 深度线索对假肢视觉移动能力至关重要，未来需结合多模态信息提升场景理解的灵活性与实用性。

search_text: The Relative Importance of Depth Cues and Semantic Edges for Indoor Mobility Using Simulated Prosthetic Vision in Immersive Virtual Reality 深度线索和语义边缘对于在沉浸式虚拟现实中使用模拟假肢视觉的室内移动的相对重要性 Visual neuroprostheses (bionic eyes) have the potential to treat degenerative eye diseases that often result in low vision or complete blindness. These devices rely on an external camera to capture the visual scene, which is then translated frame-by-frame into an electrical stimulation pattern that is sent to the implant in the eye. To highlight more meaningful information in the scene, recent studies have tested the effectiveness of deep-learning based computer vision techniques, such as depth estimation to highlight nearby obstacles (DepthOnly mode) and semantic edge detection to outline important objects in the scene (EdgesOnly mode). However, nobody has attempted to combine the two, either by presenting them together (EdgesAndDepth) or by giving the user the ability to flexibly switch between them (EdgesOrDepth). Here, we used a neurobiologically inspired model of simulated prosthetic vision (SPV) in an immersive virtual reality (VR) environment to test the relative importance of semantic edges and relative depth cues to support the ability to avoid obstacles and identify objects. We found that participants were significantly better at avoiding obstacles using depth-based cues as opposed to relying on edge information alone, and that roughly half the participants preferred the flexibility to switch between modes (EdgesOrDepth). This study highlights the relative importance of depth cues for SPV mobility and is an important first step towards a visual neuroprosthesis that uses computer vision to improve a user's scene understanding. 视觉神经假体（仿生眼）有可能治疗经常导致视力低下或完全失明的退行性眼部疾病。这些设备依靠外部摄像头来捕捉视觉场景，然后将其逐帧转换为电刺激模式，发送到眼睛中的植入物。为了突出场景中更有意义的信息，最近的研究测试了基于深度学习的计算机视觉技术的有效性，例如用于突出显示附近障碍物的深度估计（DepthOnly 模式）和用于勾勒场景中重要对象的语义边缘检测（EdgesOnly 模式）。然而，没有人尝试将两者结合起来，要么将它们呈现在一起（EdgesAndDepth），要么让用户能够在它们之间灵活切换（EdgesOrDepth）。在这里，我们在沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）环境中使用受神经生物学启发的模拟假肢视觉（SPV）模型来测试语义边缘和相对深度线索的相对重要性，以支持避开障碍物和识别物体的能力。我们发现，与单独依赖边缘信息相比，参与者使用基于深度的线索能够更好地避开障碍物，并且大约一半的参与者更喜欢在模式之间切换的灵活性（EdgesOrDepth）。这项研究强调了深度线索对于 SPV 移动性的相对重要性，并且是迈向使用计算机视觉提高用户场景理解的视觉神经假体的重要的第一步。 该论文研究了在虚拟现实环境中，使用模拟假肢视觉系统时深度线索和语义边缘对室内移动能力的影响。 Alex Rasla,Michael Beyeler cs.HC

authors_text: Yuzhu Sun,Mien Van,Stephen McIlvanna,Sean McLoone,Dariusz Ceglarek
title: Fixed-time Integral Sliding Mode Control for Admittance Control of a Robot Manipulator
title_zh: 机器人机械臂导纳控制的固定时间积分滑模控制
abstract: This paper proposes a novel fixed-time integral sliding mode controller for admittance control to enhance physical human-robot collaboration. The proposed method combines the benefits of compliance to external forces of admittance control and high robustness to uncertainties of integral sliding mode control (ISMC), such that the system can collaborate with a human partner in an uncertain environment effectively. Firstly, a fixed-time sliding surface is applied in the ISMC to make the tracking error of the system converge within a fixed-time regardless of the initial condition. Then, a fixed-time backstepping controller (BSP) is integrated into the ISMC as the nominal controller to realize global fixed-time convergence. Furthermore, to overcome the singularity problem, a non-singular fixed-time sliding surface is designed and integrated into the controller, which is useful for practical application. Finally, the proposed controller is validated for a two-link robot manipulator with uncertainties and external human forces. The results show that the proposed controller is superior in the sense of both tracking error and convergence time, and at the same time, can comply with human motion in a shared workspace.
summary: This paper proposes a novel fixed-time integral sliding mode controller for admittance control to enhance physical human-robot collaboration. The proposed method combines the benefits of compliance to external forces of admittance control and high robustness to uncertainties of integral sliding mode control (ISMC), such that the system can collaborate with a human partner in an uncertain environment effectively. Firstly, a fixed-time sliding surface is applied in the ISMC to make the tracking error of the system converge within a fixed-time regardless of the initial condition. Then, a fixed-time backstepping controller (BSP) is integrated into the ISMC as the nominal controller to realize global fixed-time convergence. Furthermore, to overcome the singularity problem, a non-singular fixed-time sliding surface is designed and integrated into the controller, which is useful for practical application. Finally, the proposed controller is validated for a two-link robot manipulator with uncertainties and external human forces. The results show that the proposed controller is superior in the sense of both tracking error and convergence time, and at the same time, can comply with human motion in a shared workspace.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型固定时间积分滑模控制器用于准入控制，以增强物理人机协作。该方法结合了导纳控制对外力的顺应性和积分滑模控制（ISMC）对不确定性的高鲁棒性的优点，使得系统可以在不确定的环境中与人类伙伴有效地协作。首先，在ISMC中应用固定时间滑动面，使系统的跟踪误差在固定时间内收敛，而不管初始条件如何。然后，将固定时间反步控制器（BSP）集成到ISMC中作为标称控制器，以实现全局固定时间收敛。此外，为了克服奇异性问题，设计了非奇异固定时间滑动表面并将其集成到控制器中，这对于实际应用很有用。最后，所提出的控制器针对具有不确定性和外部人力的两连杆机器人操纵器进行了验证。结果表明，所提出的控制器在跟踪误差和收敛时间方面均具有优越性，同时能够遵循共享工作空间中的人体运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种固定时间积分滑模控制方法，用于提升机器人机械臂的阻抗控制性能，以增强人机协作能力。
AI.motivation: 传统阻抗控制在不确定环境下易受干扰，而积分滑模控制（ISMC）虽鲁棒性强但收敛时间依赖初始条件，需结合两者优势以实现高效人机协作。
AI.method: 设计固定时间滑模面使系统误差在固定时间内收敛；引入固定时间反步控制器（BSP）实现全局收敛；采用非奇异滑模面避免奇异性问题。
AI.result: 在含不确定性和外部人体力的双连杆机械臂实验中，所提控制器在跟踪误差和收敛时间上均优于传统方法，且能适应共享工作空间的人体运动。
AI.conclusion: 该控制器在不确定环境和人机协作场景中表现出优越的跟踪性能和固定时间收敛特性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yuzhu Sun,Mien Van,Stephen McIlvanna,Sean McLoone,Dariusz Ceglarek
title: Adaptive Admittance Control for Safety-Critical Physical Human Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 用于安全关键型物理人机协作的自适应准入控制
abstract: Physical human-robot collaboration requires strict safety guarantees since robots and humans work in a shared workspace. This letter presents a novel control framework to handle safety-critical position-based constraints for human-robot physical interaction. The proposed methodology is based on admittance control, exponential control barrier functions (ECBFs) and quadratic program (QP) to achieve compliance during the force interaction between human and robot, while simultaneously guaranteeing safety constraints. In particular, the formulation of admittance control is rewritten as a second-order nonlinear control system, and the interaction forces between humans and robots are regarded as the control input. A virtual force feedback for admittance control is provided in real-time by using the ECBFs-QP framework as a compensator of the external human forces. A safe trajectory is therefore derived from the proposed adaptive admittance control scheme for a low-level controller to track. The innovation of the proposed approach is that the proposed controller will enable the robot to comply with human forces with natural fluidity without violation of any safety constraints even in cases where human external forces incidentally force the robot to violate constraints. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated in simulation studies on a two-link planar robot manipulator.
summary: Physical human-robot collaboration requires strict safety guarantees since robots and humans work in a shared workspace. This letter presents a novel control framework to handle safety-critical position-based constraints for human-robot physical interaction. The proposed methodology is based on admittance control, exponential control barrier functions (ECBFs) and quadratic program (QP) to achieve compliance during the force interaction between human and robot, while simultaneously guaranteeing safety constraints. In particular, the formulation of admittance control is rewritten as a second-order nonlinear control system, and the interaction forces between humans and robots are regarded as the control input. A virtual force feedback for admittance control is provided in real-time by using the ECBFs-QP framework as a compensator of the external human forces. A safe trajectory is therefore derived from the proposed adaptive admittance control scheme for a low-level controller to track. The innovation of the proposed approach is that the proposed controller will enable the robot to comply with human forces with natural fluidity without violation of any safety constraints even in cases where human external forces incidentally force the robot to violate constraints. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated in simulation studies on a two-link planar robot manipulator.
abstract_zh: 由于机器人和人类在共享工作空间中工作，因此物理人机协作需要严格的安全保证。这封信提出了一种新颖的控制框架，用于处理人机物理交互中基于位置的安全关键约束。所提出的方法基于导纳控制、指数控制障碍函数（ECBF）和二次规划（QP），以在人与机器人之间的力相互作用过程中实现合规性，同时保证安全约束。特别是，将导纳控制的公式重写为二阶非线性控制系统，并将人与机器人之间的相互作用力视为控制输入。通过使用 ECBFs-QP 框架作为外部人力的补偿器，实时提供用于导纳控制的虚拟力反馈。因此，从所提出的自适应导纳控制方案中导出安全轨迹，供低级控制器跟踪。该方法的创新之处在于，即使在人类外力偶然迫使机器人违反约束的情况下，所提出的控制器也将使机器人能够以自然流动性服从人类的力量，而不违反任何安全约束。我们的方法的有效性在二连杆平面机器人操纵器的仿真研究中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应导纳控制框架，用于确保物理人机协作中的安全关键约束。
AI.motivation: 在共享工作空间中，人机物理交互需要严格的安全保障，现有方法难以兼顾安全约束与自然交互。
AI.method: 结合导纳控制、指数控制屏障函数（ECBFs）和二次规划（QP），将导纳控制重构为二阶非线性系统，利用ECBFs-QP框架实时生成虚拟力反馈以补偿外部人体力。
AI.result: 在双连杆平面机械臂仿真中验证了该方法的有效性，能够安全跟踪轨迹且不违反约束。
AI.conclusion: 该方法创新性地实现了机器人在意外受力时仍能保持自然流畅的顺从性，同时确保安全约束不被违反。
