tldr: 本文提出一种自适应导纳控制框架，用于确保物理人机协作中的安全关键约束。
motivation: 在共享工作空间中，人机物理交互需要严格的安全保障，现有方法难以兼顾安全约束与自然交互。
method: 结合导纳控制、指数控制屏障函数（ECBFs）和二次规划（QP），将导纳控制重构为二阶非线性系统，利用ECBFs-QP框架实时生成虚拟力反馈以补偿外部人体力。
result: 在双连杆平面机械臂仿真中验证了该方法的有效性，能够安全跟踪轨迹且不违反约束。
conclusion: 该方法创新性地实现了机器人在意外受力时仍能保持自然流畅的顺从性，同时确保安全约束不被违反。
search_text: Adaptive Admittance Control for Safety-Critical Physical Human Robot Collaboration 用于安全关键型物理人机协作的自适应准入控制 Physical human-robot collaboration requires strict safety guarantees since robots and humans work in a shared workspace. This letter presents a novel control framework to handle safety-critical position-based constraints for human-robot physical interaction. The proposed methodology is based on admittance control, exponential control barrier functions (ECBFs) and quadratic program (QP) to achieve compliance during the force interaction between human and robot, while simultaneously guaranteeing safety constraints. In particular, the formulation of admittance control is rewritten as a second-order nonlinear control system, and the interaction forces between humans and robots are regarded as the control input. A virtual force feedback for admittance control is provided in real-time by using the ECBFs-QP framework as a compensator of the external human forces. A safe trajectory is therefore derived from the proposed adaptive admittance control scheme for a low-level controller to track. The innovation of the proposed approach is that the proposed controller will enable the robot to comply with human forces with natural fluidity without violation of any safety constraints even in cases where human external forces incidentally force the robot to violate constraints. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated in simulation studies on a two-link planar robot manipulator. 由于机器人和人类在共享工作空间中工作，因此物理人机协作需要严格的安全保证。这封信提出了一种新颖的控制框架，用于处理人机物理交互中基于位置的安全关键约束。所提出的方法基于导纳控制、指数控制障碍函数（ECBF）和二次规划（QP），以在人与机器人之间的力相互作用过程中实现合规性，同时保证安全约束。特别是，将导纳控制的公式重写为二阶非线性控制系统，并将人与机器人之间的相互作用力视为控制输入。通过使用 ECBFs-QP 框架作为外部人力的补偿器，实时提供用于导纳控制的虚拟力反馈。因此，从所提出的自适应导纳控制方案中导出安全轨迹，供低级控制器跟踪。该方法的创新之处在于，即使在人类外力偶然迫使机器人违反约束的情况下，所提出的控制器也将使机器人能够以自然流动性服从人类的力量，而不违反任何安全约束。我们的方法的有效性在二连杆平面机器人操纵器的仿真研究中得到了证明。 本文提出一种自适应导纳控制框架，用于确保物理人机协作中的安全关键约束。 Yuzhu Sun,Mien Van,Stephen McIlvanna,Sean McLoone,Dariusz Ceglarek cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Gaurav Naithani,Kirsi Pietilä,Riitta Niemistö,Erkki Paajanen,Tero Takala,Tuomas Virtanen
title: Subjective Evaluation of Deep Neural Network Based Speech Enhancement Systems in Real-World Conditions
title_zh: 现实条件下基于深度神经网络的语音增强系统的主观评估
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE MMSP 2022
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE MMSP 2022
abstract: Subjective evaluation results for two low-latency deep neural networks (DNN) are compared to a matured version of a traditional Wiener-filter based noise suppressor. The target use-case is real-world single-channel speech enhancement applications, e.g., communications. Real-world recordings consisting of additive stationary and non-stationary noise types are included. The evaluation is divided into four outcomes: speech quality, noise transparency, speech intelligibility or listening effort, and noise level w.r.t. speech. It is shown that DNNs improve noise suppression in all conditions in comparison to the traditional Wiener-filter baseline without major degradation in speech quality and noise transparency while maintaining speech intelligibility better than the baseline.
summary: Subjective evaluation results for two low-latency deep neural networks (DNN) are compared to a matured version of a traditional Wiener-filter based noise suppressor. The target use-case is real-world single-channel speech enhancement applications, e.g., communications. Real-world recordings consisting of additive stationary and non-stationary noise types are included. The evaluation is divided into four outcomes: speech quality, noise transparency, speech intelligibility or listening effort, and noise level w.r.t. speech. It is shown that DNNs improve noise suppression in all conditions in comparison to the traditional Wiener-filter baseline without major degradation in speech quality and noise transparency while maintaining speech intelligibility better than the baseline.
abstract_zh: 将两个低延迟深度神经网络 (DNN) 的主观评估结果与基于传统维纳滤波器的噪声抑制器的成熟版本进行了比较。目标用例是现实世界的单通道语音增强应用，例如通信。包括由加性平稳和非平稳噪声类型组成的真实世界录音。评估分为四个结果：语音质量、噪声透明度、语音清晰度或听力效果以及噪声水平。演讲。结果表明，与传统的维纳滤波器基线相比，DNN 在所有条件下都改善了噪声抑制，并且语音质量和噪声透明度没有大幅下降，同时保持了优于基线的语音清晰度。

AI.tldr: 本文在真实环境下对两种低延迟深度神经网络（DNN）语音增强系统与传统维纳滤波降噪器进行主观评估，比较其在语音质量、噪声透明度、可懂度等指标上的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统噪声抑制方法在复杂真实场景中效果有限，而DNN在语音增强领域展现出潜力，需验证其在实际通信等场景中的有效性。
AI.method: 使用包含稳态与非稳态噪声的真实录音数据，通过主观测试评估四个维度：语音质量、噪声透明度、语音可懂度及噪声相对水平，并与传统维纳滤波基线对比。
AI.result: DNN在所有噪声条件下均显著提升噪声抑制效果，语音质量与透明度无明显下降，且语音可懂度优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于DNN的语音增强系统在真实场景中优于传统方法，适合实际通信等应用。

authors_text: Zachary Daniels,Aswin Raghavan,Jesse Hostetler,Abrar Rahman,Indranil Sur,Michael Piacentino,Ajay Divakaran
title: Model-Free Generative Replay for Lifelong Reinforcement Learning: Application to Starcraft-2
title_zh: 用于终身强化学习的无模型生成重放：在 Starcraft-2 中的应用
comment: Accepted to the First Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs 2022)
comments: Accepted to the First Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs 2022)
abstract: One approach to meet the challenges of deep lifelong reinforcement learning (LRL) is careful management of the agent's learning experiences, to learn (without forgetting) and build internal meta-models (of the tasks, environments, agents, and world). Generative replay (GR) is a biologically inspired replay mechanism that augments learning experiences with self-labelled examples drawn from an internal generative model that is updated over time. We present a version of GR for LRL that satisfies two desiderata: (a) Introspective density modelling of the latent representations of policies learned using deep RL, and (b) Model-free end-to-end learning. In this paper, we study three deep learning architectures for model-free GR, starting from a naïve GR and adding ingredients to achieve (a) and (b). We evaluate our proposed algorithms on three different scenarios comprising tasks from the Starcraft-2 and Minigrid domains. We report several key findings showing the impact of the design choices on quantitative metrics that include transfer learning, generalization to unseen tasks, fast adaptation after task change, performance wrt task expert, and catastrophic forgetting. We observe that our GR prevents drift in the features-to-action mapping from the latent vector space of a deep RL agent. We also show improvements in established lifelong learning metrics. We find that a small random replay buffer significantly increases the stability of training. Overall, we find that "hidden replay" (a well-known architecture for class-incremental classification) is the most promising approach that pushes the state-of-the-art in GR for LRL and observe that the architecture of the sleep model might be more important for improving performance than the types of replay used. Our experiments required only 6% of training samples to achieve 80-90% of expert performance in most Starcraft-2 scenarios.
summary: One approach to meet the challenges of deep lifelong reinforcement learning (LRL) is careful management of the agent's learning experiences, to learn (without forgetting) and build internal meta-models (of the tasks, environments, agents, and world). Generative replay (GR) is a biologically inspired replay mechanism that augments learning experiences with self-labelled examples drawn from an internal generative model that is updated over time. We present a version of GR for LRL that satisfies two desiderata: (a) Introspective density modelling of the latent representations of policies learned using deep RL, and (b) Model-free end-to-end learning. In this paper, we study three deep learning architectures for model-free GR, starting from a naïve GR and adding ingredients to achieve (a) and (b). We evaluate our proposed algorithms on three different scenarios comprising tasks from the Starcraft-2 and Minigrid domains. We report several key findings showing the impact of the design choices on quantitative metrics that include transfer learning, generalization to unseen tasks, fast adaptation after task change, performance wrt task expert, and catastrophic forgetting. We observe that our GR prevents drift in the features-to-action mapping from the latent vector space of a deep RL agent. We also show improvements in established lifelong learning metrics. We find that a small random replay buffer significantly increases the stability of training. Overall, we find that "hidden replay" (a well-known architecture for class-incremental classification) is the most promising approach that pushes the state-of-the-art in GR for LRL and observe that the architecture of the sleep model might be more important for improving performance than the types of replay used. Our experiments required only 6% of training samples to achieve 80-90% of expert performance in most Starcraft-2 scenarios.
abstract_zh: 应对深度终身强化学习 (LRL) 挑战的一种方法是仔细管理智能体的学习经验，学习（不会忘记）并构建内部元模型（任务、环境、智能体和世界的）。生成重播 (GR) 是一种受生物学启发的重播机制，它通过从随时间更新的内部生成模型中提取的自标记示例来增强学习体验。我们提出了 LRL 的 GR 版本，它满足两个需求：（a）使用深度 RL 学习的策略的潜在表示的内省密度建模，以及（b）无模型的端到端学习。在本文中，我们研究了三种无模型 GR 的深度学习架构，从朴素的 GR 开始，添加成分以实现 (a) 和 (b)。我们在三种不同的场景（包括 Starcraft-2 和 Minigrid 领域的任务）上评估我们提出的算法。我们报告了几项关键发现，显示了设计选择对定量指标的影响，包括迁移学习、对未见过的任务的泛化、任务更改后的快速适应、任务专家的性能和灾难性遗忘。我们观察到，我们的 GR 可以防止特征到动作映射与深度 RL 代理的潜在向量空间发生漂移。我们还展示了已建立的终身学习指标的改进。我们发现小的随机重放缓冲区显着提高了训练的稳定性。总的来说，我们发现“隐藏重放”（一种众所周知的类增量分类架构）是最有前途的方法，它推动了 LRL GR 最先进的技术，并观察到睡眠模型的架构对于提高性能可能比所使用的重放类型更重要。我们的实验只需要 6% 的训练样本即可在大多数 Starcraft-2 场景中达到 80-90% 的专家性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无模型生成重放缓冲方法，用于终身强化学习，并在Starcraft-2中应用。
AI.motivation: 解决深度终身强化学习中避免遗忘和构建元模型的挑战，通过生成重放缓冲机制提升学习效率。
AI.method: 设计三种深度学习架构实现无模型生成重放缓冲，结合内省密度建模与端到端学习，并在多个场景中验证。
AI.result: 实验显示方法有效防止特征漂移，提升学习指标，隐藏重放架构表现最佳，6%样本达80-90%专家水平。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏重放架构在LRL中效果最佳，睡眠模型设计对性能提升更为关键。

We find that a small random replay buffer significantly increases the stability of training. Overall, we find that "hidden replay" (a well-known architecture for class-incremental classification) is the most promising approach that pushes the state-of-the-art in GR for LRL and observe that the architecture of the sleep model might be more important for improving performance than the types of replay used. Our experiments required only 6% of training samples to achieve 80-90% of expert performance in most Starcraft-2 scenarios. 应对深度终身强化学习 (LRL) 挑战的一种方法是仔细管理智能体的学习经验，学习（不会忘记）并构建内部元模型（任务、环境、智能体和世界的）。生成重播 (GR) 是一种受生物学启发的重播机制，它通过从随时间更新的内部生成模型中提取的自标记示例来增强学习体验。我们提出了 LRL 的 GR 版本，它满足两个需求：（a）使用深度 RL 学习的策略的潜在表示的内省密度建模，以及（b）无模型的端到端学习。在本文中，我们研究了三种无模型 GR 的深度学习架构，从朴素的 GR 开始，添加成分以实现 (a) 和 (b)。我们在三种不同的场景（包括 Starcraft-2 和 Minigrid 领域的任务）上评估我们提出的算法。我们报告了几项关键发现，显示了设计选择对定量指标的影响，包括迁移学习、对未见过的任务的泛化、任务更改后的快速适应、任务专家的性能和灾难性遗忘。我们观察到，我们的 GR 可以防止特征到动作映射与深度 RL 代理的潜在向量空间发生漂移。我们还展示了已建立的终身学习指标的改进。我们发现小的随机重放缓冲区显着提高了训练的稳定性。总的来说，我们发现“隐藏重放”（一种众所周知的类增量分类架构）是最有前途的方法，它推动了 LRL GR 最先进的技术，并观察到睡眠模型的架构对于提高性能可能比所使用的重放类型更重要。我们的实验只需要 6% 的训练样本即可在大多数 Starcraft-2 场景中达到 80-90% 的专家性能。 提出一种无模型生成重放缓冲方法，用于终身强化学习，并在Starcraft-2中应用。 Zachary Daniels,Aswin Raghavan,Jesse Hostetler,Abrar Rahman,Indranil Sur,Michael Piacentino,Ajay Divakaran cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mizuki Miyatake,Subhash Nerella,David Simpson,Natalia Pawlowicz,Sarah Stern,Patrick Tighe,Parisa Rashidi
title: Automatic Ultrasound Image Segmentation of Supraclavicular Nerve Using Dilated U-Net Deep Learning Architecture
title_zh: 使用扩张 U-Net 深度学习架构自动分割锁骨上神经超声图像
abstract: Automated object recognition in medical images can facilitate medical diagnosis and treatment. In this paper, we automatically segmented supraclavicular nerves in ultrasound images to assist in injecting peripheral nerve blocks. Nerve blocks are generally used for pain treatment after surgery, where ultrasound guidance is used to inject local anesthetics next to target nerves. This treatment blocks the transmission of pain signals to the brain, which can help improve the rate of recovery from surgery and significantly decrease the requirement for postoperative opioids. However, Ultrasound Guided Regional Anesthesia (UGRA) requires anesthesiologists to visually recognize the actual nerve position in the ultrasound images. This is a complex task given the myriad visual presentations of nerves in ultrasound images, and their visual similarity to many neighboring tissues. In this study, we used an automated nerve detection system for the UGRA Nerve Block treatment. The system can recognize the position of the nerve in ultrasound images using Deep Learning techniques. We developed a model to capture features of nerves by training two deep neural networks with skip connections: two extended U-Net architectures with and without dilated convolutions. This solution could potentially lead to an improved blockade of targeted nerves in regional anesthesia.
summary: Automated object recognition in medical images can facilitate medical diagnosis and treatment. In this paper, we automatically segmented supraclavicular nerves in ultrasound images to assist in injecting peripheral nerve blocks. Nerve blocks are generally used for pain treatment after surgery, where ultrasound guidance is used to inject local anesthetics next to target nerves. This treatment blocks the transmission of pain signals to the brain, which can help improve the rate of recovery from surgery and significantly decrease the requirement for postoperative opioids. However, Ultrasound Guided Regional Anesthesia (UGRA) requires anesthesiologists to visually recognize the actual nerve position in the ultrasound images. This is a complex task given the myriad visual presentations of nerves in ultrasound images, and their visual similarity to many neighboring tissues. In this study, we used an automated nerve detection system for the UGRA Nerve Block treatment. The system can recognize the position of the nerve in ultrasound images using Deep Learning techniques. We developed a model to capture features of nerves by training two deep neural networks with skip connections: two extended U-Net architectures with and without dilated convolutions. This solution could potentially lead to an improved blockade of targeted nerves in regional anesthesia.
abstract_zh: 医学图像中的自动对象识别可以促进医学诊断和治疗。在本文中，我们自动分割超声图像中的锁骨上神经，以辅助注射周围神经阻滞。神经阻滞通常用于手术后的疼痛治疗，其中使用超声引导在目标神经旁边注射局部麻醉剂。这种治疗方法可以阻止疼痛信号向大脑的传输，有助于提高手术恢复率，并显着减少术后阿片类药物的需求。然而，超声引导区域麻醉 (UGRA) 要求麻醉师通过视觉识别超声图像中的实际神经位置。考虑到超声图像中神经的无数视觉呈现，以及它们与许多邻近组织的视觉相似性，这是一项复杂的任务。在这项研究中，我们使用自动神经检测系统进行 UGRA 神经阻滞治疗。该系统可以使用深度学习技术识别超声图像中神经的位置。我们开发了一个模型，通过训练两个具有跳跃连接的深度神经网络来捕获神经特征：两个带有和不带有扩张卷积的扩展 U-Net 架构。该解决方案可能会改善区域麻醉中目标神经的封锁。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩张U-Net深度学习架构的自动分割方法，用于超声图像中锁骨上神经的识别，以辅助神经阻滞麻醉。
AI.motivation: 传统超声引导神经阻滞需人工识别神经位置，存在视觉辨识困难、效率低等问题，而自动分割可提升准确性并减少术后阿片类药物依赖。
AI.method: 构建两种改进的U-Net模型：包含扩张卷积的版本与常规版本，通过跳接连接增强特征提取能力，训练模型实现超声图像中神经的自动分割。
AI.result: 模型有效识别了超声图像中的锁骨上神经，为精准神经阻滞提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可提升区域麻醉中神经定位的准确性，有望改善术后恢复效果并降低阿片类药物使用需求。

authors_text: Zi Qin Liew,Hongyang Du,Wei Yang Bryan Lim,Zehui Xiong,Dusit Niyato,Chunyan Miao,Dong In Kim
title: Economics of Semantic Communication System: An Auction Approach
title_zh: 语义通信系统的经济学：拍卖方法
abstract: Semantic communication technologies enable wireless edge devices to communicate effectively by transmitting semantic meaning of data. Edge components, such as vehicles in next-generation intelligent transport systems, use well-trained semantic models to encode and decode semantic information extracted from raw and sensor data. However, the limitation in computing resources makes it difficult to support the training process of accurate semantic models on edge devices. As such, edge devices can buy the pretrained semantic models from semantic model providers, which is called "semantic model trading". Upon collecting semantic information with the semantic models, the edge devices can then sell the extracted semantic information, e.g., information about urban road conditions or traffic signs, to the interested buyers for profit, which is called "semantic information trading". To facilitate both types of the trades, effective incentive mechanisms should be designed. Thus, in this paper, we propose a hierarchical trading system to support both semantic model trading and semantic information trading jointly. The proposed incentive mechanism helps to maximize the revenue of semantic model providers in the semantic model trading, and effectively incentivizes model providers to participate in the development of semantic communication systems. For semantic information trading, our designed auction approach can support the trading between multiple semantic information sellers and buyers, while ensuring individual rationality, incentive compatibility, and budget balance, and moreover, allowing them achieve higher utilities than the baseline method.
summary: Semantic communication technologies enable wireless edge devices to communicate effectively by transmitting semantic meaning of data. Edge components, such as vehicles in next-generation intelligent transport systems, use well-trained semantic models to encode and decode semantic information extracted from raw and sensor data. However, the limitation in computing resources makes it difficult to support the training process of accurate semantic models on edge devices. As such, edge devices can buy the pretrained semantic models from semantic model providers, which is called "semantic model trading". Upon collecting semantic information with the semantic models, the edge devices can then sell the extracted semantic information, e.g., information about urban road conditions or traffic signs, to the interested buyers for profit, which is called "semantic information trading". To facilitate both types of the trades, effective incentive mechanisms should be designed. Thus, in this paper, we propose a hierarchical trading system to support both semantic model trading and semantic information trading jointly. The proposed incentive mechanism helps to maximize the revenue of semantic model providers in the semantic model trading, and effectively incentivizes model providers to participate in the development of semantic communication systems. For semantic information trading, our designed auction approach can support the trading between multiple semantic information sellers and buyers, while ensuring individual rationality, incentive compatibility, and budget balance, and moreover, allowing them achieve higher utilities than the baseline method.
abstract_zh: 语义通信技术使无线边缘设备能够通过传输数据的语义进行有效的通信。边缘组件（例如下一代智能交通系统中的车辆）使用训练有素的语义模型来编码和解码从原始数据和传感器数据中提取的语义信息。然而，计算资源的限制使得难以支持边缘设备上精确语义模型的训练过程。这样，边缘设备可以从语义模型提供商那里购买预训练的语义模型，这被称为“语义模型交易”。通过语义模型收集语义信息后，边缘设备可以将提取的语义信息（例如有关城市道路状况或交通标志的信息）出售给感兴趣的买家以获取利润，这称为“语义信息交易”。为了促进这两种类型的交易，应该设计有效的激励机制。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种分层交易系统来共同支持语义模型交易和语义信息交易。所提出的激励机制有助于最大化语义模型提供者在语义模型交易中的收益，有效激励模型提供者参与语义通信系统的开发。对于语义信息交易，我们设计的拍卖方法可以支持多个语义信息卖家和买家之间的交易，同时保证个体理性、激励兼容性和预算平衡，并且允许他们获得比基线方法更高的效用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层交易系统，结合拍卖机制解决语义通信中的模型交易与信息交易激励问题。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备计算资源有限无法训练精准语义模型，需通过交易获取模型和信息，但缺乏有效激励机制保障交易效率与公平性。
AI.method: 设计分层交易架构，针对语义模型交易优化提供商收益，采用拍卖机制处理多卖家多买家的信息交易，满足个体理性、激励相容和预算平衡。
AI.result: 机制可最大化模型提供商收益并提升其参与意愿，拍卖方法使信息交易参与者效用优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为语义通信系统构建了经济可行的激励框架，有效协调了模型与信息交易的多方利益。

For semantic information trading, our designed auction approach can support the trading between multiple semantic information sellers and buyers, while ensuring individual rationality, incentive compatibility, and budget balance, and moreover, allowing them achieve higher utilities than the baseline method. 语义通信技术使无线边缘设备能够通过传输数据的语义进行有效的通信。边缘组件（例如下一代智能交通系统中的车辆）使用训练有素的语义模型来编码和解码从原始数据和传感器数据中提取的语义信息。然而，计算资源的限制使得难以支持边缘设备上精确语义模型的训练过程。这样，边缘设备可以从语义模型提供商那里购买预训练的语义模型，这被称为“语义模型交易”。通过语义模型收集语义信息后，边缘设备可以将提取的语义信息（例如有关城市道路状况或交通标志的信息）出售给感兴趣的买家以获取利润，这称为“语义信息交易”。为了促进这两种类型的交易，应该设计有效的激励机制。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种分层交易系统来共同支持语义模型交易和语义信息交易。所提出的激励机制有助于最大化语义模型提供者在语义模型交易中的收益，有效激励模型提供者参与语义通信系统的开发。对于语义信息交易，我们设计的拍卖方法可以支持多个语义信息卖家和买家之间的交易，同时保证个体理性、激励兼容性和预算平衡，并且允许他们获得比基线方法更高的效用。 本文提出一种分层交易系统，结合拍卖机制解决语义通信中的模型交易与信息交易激励问题。 Zi Qin Liew,Hongyang Du,Wei Yang Bryan Lim,Zehui Xiong,Dusit Niyato,Chunyan Miao,Dong In Kim cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.GT

title: Human Activity Recognition Using Cascaded Dual Attention CNN and Bi-Directional GRU Framework
title_zh: 使用级联双重注意力 CNN 和双向 GRU 框架进行人类活动识别
abstract: Vision-based human activity recognition has emerged as one of the essential research areas in video analytics domain. Over the last decade, numerous advanced deep learning algorithms have been introduced to recognize complex human actions from video streams. These deep learning algorithms have shown impressive performance for the human activity recognition task. However, these newly introduced methods either exclusively focus on model performance or the effectiveness of these models in terms of computational efficiency and robustness, resulting in a biased tradeoff in their proposals to deal with challenging human activity recognition problem. To overcome the limitations of contemporary deep learning models for human activity recognition, this paper presents a computationally efficient yet generic spatial-temporal cascaded framework that exploits the deep discriminative spatial and temporal features for human activity recognition. For efficient representation of human actions, we have proposed an efficient dual attentional convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture that leverages a unified channel-spatial attention mechanism to extract human-centric salient features in video frames. The dual channel-spatial attention layers together with the convolutional layers learn to be more attentive in the spatial receptive fields having objects over the number of feature maps. The extracted discriminative salient features are then forwarded to stacked bi-directional gated recurrent unit (Bi-GRU) for long-term temporal modeling and recognition of human actions using both forward and backward pass gradient learning. Extensive experiments are conducted, where the obtained results show that the proposed framework attains an improvement in execution time up to 167 times in terms of frames per second as compared to most of the contemporary action recognition methods.
summary: Vision-based human activity recognition has emerged as one of the essential research areas in video analytics domain. Over the last decade, numerous advanced deep learning algorithms have been introduced to recognize complex human actions from video streams. These deep learning algorithms have shown impressive performance for the human activity recognition task. However, these newly introduced methods either exclusively focus on model performance or the effectiveness of these models in terms of computational efficiency and robustness, resulting in a biased tradeoff in their proposals to deal with challenging human activity recognition problem. To overcome the limitations of contemporary deep learning models for human activity recognition, this paper presents a computationally efficient yet generic spatial-temporal cascaded framework that exploits the deep discriminative spatial and temporal features for human activity recognition. For efficient representation of human actions, we have proposed an efficient dual attentional convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture that leverages a unified channel-spatial attention mechanism to extract human-centric salient features in video frames. The dual channel-spatial attention layers together with the convolutional layers learn to be more attentive in the spatial receptive fields having objects over the number of feature maps. The extracted discriminative salient features are then forwarded to stacked bi-directional gated recurrent unit (Bi-GRU) for long-term temporal modeling and recognition of human actions using both forward and backward pass gradient learning. Extensive experiments are conducted, where the obtained results show that the proposed framework attains an improvement in execution time up to 167 times in terms of frames per second as compared to most of the contemporary action recognition methods.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的人类活动识别已成为视频分析领域的重要研究领域之一。在过去的十年中，引入了许多先进的深度学习算法来从视频流中识别复杂的人类动作。这些深度学习算法在人类活动识别任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，这些新引入的方法要么只关注模型性能，要么只关注这些模型在计算效率和鲁棒性方面的有效性，导致它们在处理具有挑战性的人类活动识别问题的建议中存在偏见。为了克服当代深度学习模型在人类活动识别方面的局限性，本文提出了一种计算高效且通用的时空级联框架，该框架利用人类活动识别的深层判别性空间和时间特征。为了有效地表示人类行为，我们提出了一种高效的双注意力卷积神经网络（CNN）架构，该架构利用统一的通道空间注意力机制来提取视频帧中以人为中心的显着特征。双通道空间注意力层与卷积层一起学习在具有超过特征图数量的对象的空间感受野中更加关注。然后，提取的判别显着特征被转发到堆叠式双向门控循环单元（Bi-GRU），以使用前向和后向传递梯度学习进行长期时间建模和人类行为识别。进行了大量的实验，获得的结果表明，与大多数当代动作识别方法相比，所提出的框架以每秒帧数计算的执行时间提高了 167 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合双注意力CNN和双向GRU的级联框架，用于高效识别视频中的人类活动。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在人类活动识别任务中存在模型性能与计算效率、鲁棒性之间的权衡问题，需设计兼顾效率与泛化的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出级联双注意力CNN提取空间特征，通过通道-空间注意力机制增强人体相关特征；随后使用双向GRU进行时序建模，结合前向与反向梯度学习实现动作识别。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在帧率方面较主流方法提升最高达167倍，保持较高识别精度的同时显著优化计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过空间-时序特征联合建模，在保证识别性能的前提下实现了人类活动识别的高效计算，为复杂场景下的视频分析提供新思路。

title: An Integrated Actuation-Perception Framework for Robotic Leaf Retrieval: Detection, Localization, and Cutting
title_zh: 机器人树叶检索的集成驱动感知框架：检测、定位和切割
abstract: Contemporary robots in precision agriculture focus primarily on automated harvesting or remote sensing to monitor crop health. Comparatively less work has been performed with respect to collecting physical leaf samples in the field and retaining them for further analysis. Typically, orchard growers manually collect sample leaves and utilize them for stem water potential measurements to analyze tree health and determine irrigation routines. While this technique benefits orchard management, the process of collecting, assessing, and interpreting measurements requires significant human labor and often leads to infrequent sampling. Automated sampling can provide highly accurate and timely information to growers. The first step in such automated in-situ leaf analysis is identifying and cutting a leaf from a tree. This retrieval process requires new methods for actuation and perception. We present a technique for detecting and localizing candidate leaves using point cloud data from a depth camera. This technique is tested on both indoor and outdoor point clouds from avocado trees. We then use a custom-built leaf-cutting end-effector on a 6-DOF robotic arm to test the proposed detection and localization technique by cutting leaves from an avocado tree. Experimental testing with a real avocado tree demonstrates our proposed approach can enable our mobile manipulator and custom end-effector system to successfully detect, localize, and cut leaves.
summary: Contemporary robots in precision agriculture focus primarily on automated harvesting or remote sensing to monitor crop health. Comparatively less work has been performed with respect to collecting physical leaf samples in the field and retaining them for further analysis. Typically, orchard growers manually collect sample leaves and utilize them for stem water potential measurements to analyze tree health and determine irrigation routines. While this technique benefits orchard management, the process of collecting, assessing, and interpreting measurements requires significant human labor and often leads to infrequent sampling. Automated sampling can provide highly accurate and timely information to growers. The first step in such automated in-situ leaf analysis is identifying and cutting a leaf from a tree. This retrieval process requires new methods for actuation and perception. We present a technique for detecting and localizing candidate leaves using point cloud data from a depth camera. This technique is tested on both indoor and outdoor point clouds from avocado trees. We then use a custom-built leaf-cutting end-effector on a 6-DOF robotic arm to test the proposed detection and localization technique by cutting leaves from an avocado tree. Experimental testing with a real avocado tree demonstrates our proposed approach can enable our mobile manipulator and custom end-effector system to successfully detect, localize, and cut leaves.
abstract_zh: 精准农业中的当代机器人主要关注自动收获或遥感以监测作物健康。在现场收集物理叶子样本并将其保留以供进一步分析方面进行的工作相对较少。通常，果园种植者手动收集叶子样本，并利用它们进行茎水势测量，以分析树木健康状况并确定灌溉程序。虽然这种技术有利于果园管理，但收集、评估和解释测量结果的过程需要大量的人力，并且常常导致采样不频繁。自动采样可以为种植者提供高度准确和及时的信息。这种自动化原位叶子分析的第一步是识别并从树上切下叶子。这个检索过程需要新的驱动和感知方法。我们提出了一种使用深度相机的点云数据来检测和定位候选叶子的技术。该技术在室内和室外鳄梨树点云上进行了测试。然后，我们在 6 自由度机械臂上使用定制的切叶末端执行器，通过切下牛油果树的叶子来测试所提出的检测和定位技术。对真实牛油果树的实验测试表明，我们提出的方法可以使我们的移动操纵器和定制末端执行器系统成功检测、定位和切割叶子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成执行器-感知框架，用于机器人采摘叶片的检测、定位与切割，以实现农业中的自动化叶片采样分析。
AI.motivation: 传统农业中叶片采样依赖人工操作，耗时耗力且采样频率低，自动化采样可提供精准及时的数据以优化果园管理。
AI.method: 利用深度相机点云数据检测并定位候选叶片，结合6自由度机械臂与定制切割末端执行器进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在室内和室外的鳄梨树环境中均能成功实现叶片的检测、定位与切割。
AI.conclusion: 提出的集成框架验证了自动化叶片采样的可行性，为农业机器人提供了高效的解决方案。

Experimental testing with a real avocado tree demonstrates our proposed approach can enable our mobile manipulator and custom end-effector system to successfully detect, localize, and cut leaves. 精准农业中的当代机器人主要关注自动收获或遥感以监测作物健康。在现场收集物理叶子样本并将其保留以供进一步分析方面进行的工作相对较少。通常，果园种植者手动收集叶子样本，并利用它们进行茎水势测量，以分析树木健康状况并确定灌溉程序。虽然这种技术有利于果园管理，但收集、评估和解释测量结果的过程需要大量的人力，并且常常导致采样不频繁。自动采样可以为种植者提供高度准确和及时的信息。这种自动化原位叶子分析的第一步是识别并从树上切下叶子。这个检索过程需要新的驱动和感知方法。我们提出了一种使用深度相机的点云数据来检测和定位候选叶子的技术。该技术在室内和室外鳄梨树点云上进行了测试。然后，我们在 6 自由度机械臂上使用定制的切叶末端执行器，通过切下牛油果树的叶子来测试所提出的检测和定位技术。对真实牛油果树的实验测试表明，我们提出的方法可以使我们的移动操纵器和定制末端执行器系统成功检测、定位和切割叶子。 本文提出了一种集成执行器-感知框架，用于机器人采摘叶片的检测、定位与切割，以实现农业中的自动化叶片采样分析。 Merrick Campbell,Amel Dechemi,Konstantinos Karydis cs.RO,eess.SY

title: A Unified Comparison of User Modeling Techniques for Predicting Data Interaction and Detecting Exploration Bias
title_zh: 用于预测数据交互和检测探索偏差的用户建模技术的统一比较
abstract: The visual analytics community has proposed several user modeling algorithms to capture and analyze users' interaction behavior in order to assist users in data exploration and insight generation. For example, some can detect exploration biases while others can predict data points that the user will interact with before that interaction occurs. Researchers believe this collection of algorithms can help create more intelligent visual analytics tools. However, the community lacks a rigorous evaluation and comparison of these existing techniques. As a result, there is limited guidance on which method to use and when. Our paper seeks to fill in this missing gap by comparing and ranking eight user modeling algorithms based on their performance on a diverse set of four user study datasets. We analyze exploration bias detection, data interaction prediction, and algorithmic complexity, among other measures. Based on our findings, we highlight open challenges and new directions for analyzing user interactions and visualization provenance.
summary: The visual analytics community has proposed several user modeling algorithms to capture and analyze users' interaction behavior in order to assist users in data exploration and insight generation. For example, some can detect exploration biases while others can predict data points that the user will interact with before that interaction occurs. Researchers believe this collection of algorithms can help create more intelligent visual analytics tools. However, the community lacks a rigorous evaluation and comparison of these existing techniques. As a result, there is limited guidance on which method to use and when. Our paper seeks to fill in this missing gap by comparing and ranking eight user modeling algorithms based on their performance on a diverse set of four user study datasets. We analyze exploration bias detection, data interaction prediction, and algorithmic complexity, among other measures. Based on our findings, we highlight open challenges and new directions for analyzing user interactions and visualization provenance.
abstract_zh: 可视化分析社区提出了多种用户建模算法来捕获和分析用户的交互行为，以帮助用户进行数据探索和洞察生成。例如，有些可以检测探索偏差，而另一些可以预测用户在交互发生之前将与之交互的数据点。研究人员认为，这组算法可以帮助创建更智能的视觉分析工具。然而，社区缺乏对这些现有技术的严格评估和比较。因此，对于使用哪种方法以及何时使用的指导有限。我们的论文试图通过根据八种用户建模算法在四个不同用户研究数据集上的性能进行比较和排名来填补这一缺失的空白。我们分析探索偏差检测、数据交互预测和算法复杂性等指标。根据我们的发现，我们强调了分析用户交互和可视化来源的开放挑战和新方向。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过比较八种用户建模算法在四个用户研究数据集上的表现，评估其在预测数据交互和检测探索偏差方面的效果。
AI.motivation: 可视化分析领域虽提出了多种用户建模算法，但缺乏对现有技术的系统性评估，导致难以确定适用场景和方法。
AI.method: 基于四个用户研究数据集，从探索偏差检测、数据交互预测及算法复杂度等维度对八种算法进行性能对比分析。
AI.result: 确定了不同算法在各项指标中的优劣排名，揭示了当前方法在处理探索偏差和预测准确性上的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 填补了用户建模技术评估的空白，为工具开发提供方法选择依据，并指出了可视化用户交互分析的未来研究方向。

title: Aesthetic Bot: Interactively Evolving Game Maps on Twitter
title_zh: Aesthetic Bot：Twitter 上的交互式进化游戏地图
abstract: This paper describes the implementation of the Aesthetic Bot, an automated Twitter account that posts images of small game maps that are either user-made or generated from an evolutionary system. The bot then prompts users to vote via a poll posted in the image's thread for the most aesthetically pleasing map. This creates a rating system that allows for direct interaction with the bot in a way that is integrated seamlessly into a user's regularly updated Twitter content feed. Upon conclusion of the each voting round, the bot learns from the distribution of votes for each map to emulate user preferences for design and visual aesthetic in order to generate maps that would win future vote pairings. We discuss the ongoing results and emerging behaviors that have occurred since the release of this system from both the bot's generation of game maps and the participating Twitter users.
summary: This paper describes the implementation of the Aesthetic Bot, an automated Twitter account that posts images of small game maps that are either user-made or generated from an evolutionary system. The bot then prompts users to vote via a poll posted in the image's thread for the most aesthetically pleasing map. This creates a rating system that allows for direct interaction with the bot in a way that is integrated seamlessly into a user's regularly updated Twitter content feed. Upon conclusion of the each voting round, the bot learns from the distribution of votes for each map to emulate user preferences for design and visual aesthetic in order to generate maps that would win future vote pairings. We discuss the ongoing results and emerging behaviors that have occurred since the release of this system from both the bot's generation of game maps and the participating Twitter users.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了 Aesthetic Bot 的实现，这是一个自动 Twitter 帐户，用于发布用户制作的或由进化系统生成的小型游戏地图的图像。然后，机器人会提示用户通过图像线程中发布的民意调查来投票选出最美观的地图。这创建了一个评级系统，允许以无缝集成到用户定期更新的 Twitter 内容源中的方式与机器人直接交互。每轮投票结束后，机器人会从每张地图的投票分布中学习，以模拟用户对设计和视觉美感的偏好，从而生成能够赢得未来投票配对的地图。我们从机器人生成的游戏地图和参与的 Twitter 用户讨论了自该系统发布以来所发生的持续结果和新出现的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Aesthetic Bot系统，通过Twitter实现游戏地图的交互式演化，结合用户投票反馈优化地图生成。
AI.motivation: 探索社交媒体中用户实时反馈对自动化内容生成的影响，提升游戏地图设计的审美契合度。
AI.method: 基于进化算法生成地图，通过Twitter投票收集用户偏好数据，迭代优化生成模型参数。
AI.result: 系统持续生成更符合用户审美的地图，用户参与度高，形成动态演化机制。
AI.conclusion: 社交平台实时反馈可有效指导生成式AI的审美学习，为交互式内容创作提供新范式。

authors_text: S. Sandra Bae,Rishi Vanukuru,Ruhan Yang,Peter Gyory,Ran Zhou,Ellen Yi-Luen Do,Danielle Albers Szafir
title: Cultivating Visualization Literacy for Children Through Curiosity and Play
title_zh: 通过好奇心和游戏培养孩子的可视化素养
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, accepted to IEEE Transaction on Visualization and Graphics (also appearing in the proceedings of IEEE VIS 2022)
comments: 11 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, accepted to IEEE Transaction on Visualization and Graphics (also appearing in the proceedings of IEEE VIS 2022)
abstract: Fostering data visualization literacy (DVL) as part of childhood education could lead to a more data literate society. However, most work in DVL for children relies on a more formal educational context (i.e., a teacher-led approach) that limits children's engagement with data to classroom-based environments and, consequently, children's ability to ask questions about and explore data on topics they find personally meaningful. We explore how a curiosity-driven, child-led approach can provide more agency to children when they are authoring data visualizations. This paper explores how informal learning with crafting physicalizations through play and curiosity may foster increased literacy and engagement with data. Employing a constructionist approach, we designed a do-it-yourself toolkit made out of everyday materials (e.g., paper, cardboard, mirrors) that enables children to create, customize, and personalize three different interactive visualizations (bar, line, pie). We used the toolkit as a design probe in a series of in-person workshops with 5 children (6 to 11-year-olds) and interviews with 5 educators. Our observations reveal that the toolkit helped children creatively engage and interact with visualizations. Children with prior knowledge of data visualization reported the toolkit serving as more of an authoring tool that they envision using in their daily lives, while children with little to no experience found the toolkit as an engaging introduction to data visualization. Our study demonstrates the potential of using the constructionist approach to cultivate children's DVL through curiosity and play.
summary: Fostering data visualization literacy (DVL) as part of childhood education could lead to a more data literate society. However, most work in DVL for children relies on a more formal educational context (i.e., a teacher-led approach) that limits children's engagement with data to classroom-based environments and, consequently, children's ability to ask questions about and explore data on topics they find personally meaningful. We explore how a curiosity-driven, child-led approach can provide more agency to children when they are authoring data visualizations. This paper explores how informal learning with crafting physicalizations through play and curiosity may foster increased literacy and engagement with data. Employing a constructionist approach, we designed a do-it-yourself toolkit made out of everyday materials (e.g., paper, cardboard, mirrors) that enables children to create, customize, and personalize three different interactive visualizations (bar, line, pie). We used the toolkit as a design probe in a series of in-person workshops with 5 children (6 to 11-year-olds) and interviews with 5 educators. Our observations reveal that the toolkit helped children creatively engage and interact with visualizations. Children with prior knowledge of data visualization reported the toolkit serving as more of an authoring tool that they envision using in their daily lives, while children with little to no experience found the toolkit as an engaging introduction to data visualization. Our study demonstrates the potential of using the constructionist approach to cultivate children's DVL through curiosity and play.
abstract_zh: 将培养数据可视化素养（DVL）作为儿童教育的一部分可能会导致一个更加具有数据素养的社会。然而，大多数针对儿童的 DVL 工作都依赖于更正式的教育环境（即教师主导的方法），这将儿童对数据的参与限制在基于课堂的环境中，因此限制了儿童就他们认为个人有意义的主题提出问题和探索数据的能力。我们探索好奇心驱动、儿童主导的方法如何在儿童创作数据可视化时为他们提供更多的代理权。本文探讨了通过游戏和好奇心打造实体化的非正式学习如何促进提高读写能力和对数据的参与。采用建构主义方法，我们设计了一个由日常材料（例如纸张、纸板、镜子）制成的DIY工具包，使孩子们能够创建、定制和个性化三种不同的交互式可视化（条形图、线条图、饼图）。我们在与 5 名儿童（6 至 11 岁）举行的一系列现场研讨会以及对 5 名教育工作者的采访中使用该工具包作为设计探索。我们的观察表明，该工具包帮助孩子们创造性地参与可视化并与之互动。具有数据可视化先验知识的儿童报告说，该工具包更多地充当了他们设想在日常生活中使用的创作工具，而几乎没有经验的儿童则发现该工具包是对数据可视化的引人入胜的介绍。我们的研究证明了使用建构主义方法通过好奇心和游戏培养儿童 DVL 的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文通过好奇心和游戏培养儿童的数据可视化素养，设计了一种基于建构主义的DIY工具包，让儿童在非正式学习环境中创作互动可视化图表。
AI.motivation: 传统数据可视化教育多依赖正式课堂，限制了儿童在感兴趣主题上的自主探索与提问能力，需探索更符合儿童自主性的教学方法。
AI.method: 采用建构主义方法，开发包含纸张、纸板等日常材料的DIY工具包，支持儿童制作条形图、折线图和饼图，并通过5场工作坊及5名教育者的访谈进行验证。
AI.result: 工具包提升了儿童的创造性参与度，有数据可视化经验的儿童视其为日常工具，而初学者则将其作为入门途径，验证了非正式学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过游戏和好奇心驱动的建构主义方法，能有效提升儿童的数据可视化素养，为未来教育提供了一种更具自主性和趣味性的路径。

search_text: Cultivating Visualization Literacy for Children Through Curiosity and Play 通过好奇心和游戏培养孩子的可视化素养 Fostering data visualization literacy (DVL) as part of childhood education could lead to a more data literate society. However, most work in DVL for children relies on a more formal educational context (i.e., a teacher-led approach) that limits children's engagement with data to classroom-based environments and, consequently, children's ability to ask questions about and explore data on topics they find personally meaningful. We explore how a curiosity-driven, child-led approach can provide more agency to children when they are authoring data visualizations. This paper explores how informal learning with crafting physicalizations through play and curiosity may foster increased literacy and engagement with data. Employing a constructionist approach, we designed a do-it-yourself toolkit made out of everyday materials (e.g., paper, cardboard, mirrors) that enables children to create, customize, and personalize three different interactive visualizations (bar, line, pie). We used the toolkit as a design probe in a series of in-person workshops with 5 children (6 to 11-year-olds) and interviews with 5 educators. Our observations reveal that the toolkit helped children creatively engage and interact with visualizations. Children with prior knowledge of data visualization reported the toolkit serving as more of an authoring tool that they envision using in their daily lives, while children with little to no experience found the toolkit as an engaging introduction to data visualization. Our study demonstrates the potential of using the constructionist approach to cultivate children's DVL through curiosity and play. 将培养数据可视化素养（DVL）作为儿童教育的一部分可能会导致一个更加具有数据素养的社会。然而，大多数针对儿童的 DVL 工作都依赖于更正式的教育环境（即教师主导的方法），这将儿童对数据的参与限制在基于课堂的环境中，因此限制了儿童就他们认为个人有意义的主题提出问题和探索数据的能力。我们探索好奇心驱动、儿童主导的方法如何在儿童创作数据可视化时为他们提供更多的代理权。本文探讨了通过游戏和好奇心打造实体化的非正式学习如何促进提高读写能力和对数据的参与。采用建构主义方法，我们设计了一个由日常材料（例如纸张、纸板、镜子）制成的DIY工具包，使孩子们能够创建、定制和个性化三种不同的交互式可视化（条形图、线条图、饼图）。我们在与 5 名儿童（6 至 11 岁）举行的一系列现场研讨会以及对 5 名教育工作者的采访中使用该工具包作为设计探索。我们的观察表明，该工具包帮助孩子们创造性地参与可视化并与之互动。具有数据可视化先验知识的儿童报告说，该工具包更多地充当了他们设想在日常生活中使用的创作工具，而几乎没有经验的儿童则发现该工具包是对数据可视化的引人入胜的介绍。我们的研究证明了使用建构主义方法通过好奇心和游戏培养儿童 DVL 的潜力。 本文通过好奇心和游戏培养儿童的数据可视化素养，设计了一种基于建构主义的DIY工具包，让儿童在非正式学习环境中创作互动可视化图表。 S. Sandra Bae,Rishi Vanukuru,Ruhan Yang,Peter Gyory,Ran Zhou,Ellen Yi-Luen Do,Danielle Albers Szafir cs.HC

title: Computing Brascamp-Lieb Constants through the lens of Thompson Geometry
title_zh: 通过汤普森几何的镜头计算 Brascamp-Lieb 常数
abstract: This paper studies algorithms for efficiently computing Brascamp-Lieb constants, a task that has recently received much interest. In particular, we reduce the computation to a nonlinear matrix-valued iteration, whose convergence we analyze through the lens of fixed-point methods under the well-known Thompson metric. This approach permits us to obtain (weakly) polynomial time guarantees, and it offers an efficient and transparent alternative to previous state-of-the-art approaches based on Riemannian optimization and geodesic convexity.
summary: This paper studies algorithms for efficiently computing Brascamp-Lieb constants, a task that has recently received much interest. In particular, we reduce the computation to a nonlinear matrix-valued iteration, whose convergence we analyze through the lens of fixed-point methods under the well-known Thompson metric. This approach permits us to obtain (weakly) polynomial time guarantees, and it offers an efficient and transparent alternative to previous state-of-the-art approaches based on Riemannian optimization and geodesic convexity.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了有效计算 Brascamp-Lieb 常数的算法，这是一项最近引起广泛关注的任务。特别是，我们将计算简化为非线性矩阵值迭代，我们通过著名的汤普森度量下的定点方法来分析其收敛性。这种方法使我们能够获得（弱）多项式时间保证，并且它为之前基于黎曼优化和测地凸性的最先进方法提供了高效且透明的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过非线性矩阵迭代高效计算Brascamp-Lieb常数的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法基于Riemannian优化和测地凸性，但效率和透明度不足，需更高效算法。
AI.method: 通过Thompson度量下的非线性矩阵迭代和不动点分析方法。
AI.result: 实现了弱多项式时间复杂度，并提供了比现有方法更高效的计算方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为计算Brascamp-Lieb常数提供了高效且透明的新途径。

authors_text: Florentin Guth,Simon Coste,Valentin De Bortoli,Stephane Mallat
title: Wavelet Score-Based Generative Modeling
title_zh: 基于小波评分的生成建模
abstract: Score-based generative models (SGMs) synthesize new data samples from Gaussian white noise by running a time-reversed Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE) whose drift coefficient depends on some probabilistic score. The discretization of such SDEs typically requires a large number of time steps and hence a high computational cost. This is because of ill-conditioning properties of the score that we analyze mathematically. We show that SGMs can be considerably accelerated, by factorizing the data distribution into a product of conditional probabilities of wavelet coefficients across scales. The resulting Wavelet Score-based Generative Model (WSGM) synthesizes wavelet coefficients with the same number of time steps at all scales, and its time complexity therefore grows linearly with the image size. This is proved mathematically over Gaussian distributions, and shown numerically over physical processes at phase transition and natural image datasets.
summary: Score-based generative models (SGMs) synthesize new data samples from Gaussian white noise by running a time-reversed Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE) whose drift coefficient depends on some probabilistic score. The discretization of such SDEs typically requires a large number of time steps and hence a high computational cost. This is because of ill-conditioning properties of the score that we analyze mathematically. We show that SGMs can be considerably accelerated, by factorizing the data distribution into a product of conditional probabilities of wavelet coefficients across scales. The resulting Wavelet Score-based Generative Model (WSGM) synthesizes wavelet coefficients with the same number of time steps at all scales, and its time complexity therefore grows linearly with the image size. This is proved mathematically over Gaussian distributions, and shown numerically over physical processes at phase transition and natural image datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于分数的生成模型 (SGM) 通过运行时间反转随机微分方程 (SDE)，从高斯白噪声中合成新的数据样本，该方程的漂移系数取决于某些概率分数。这种 SDE 的离散化通常需要大量的时间步长，因此计算成本很高。这是因为我们数学分析的分数存在病态特性。我们表明，通过将数据分布分解为跨尺度的小波系数的条件概率的乘积，可以大大加速 SGM。由此产生的基于小波评分的生成模型（WSGM）在所有尺度上以相同数量的时间步合成小波系数，因此其时间复杂度随着图像大小线性增长。这在高斯分布上得到了数学证明，并在相变和自然图像数据集的物理过程上得到了数值显示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于小波变换的分数生成模型（WSGM），通过分解数据分布为多尺度小波系数的条件概率乘积，解决传统分数生成模型计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统分数生成模型（SGMs）因需大量时间步进行SDE离散化而计算成本高昂，且分数的病态条件特性加剧了这一问题。
AI.method: 将数据分布分解为跨尺度小波系数的条件概率乘积，在各尺度上使用相同时间步数生成小波系数，使时间复杂度线性增长。
AI.result: 数学上证明高斯分布下WSGM的正确性，并在相变物理过程和自然图像数据集上验证其计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: WSGM通过小波分解实现计算复杂度的线性增长，为大规模数据生成提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: Towards Enabling Next Generation Societal Virtual Reality Applications for Virtual Human Teleportation
title_zh: 致力于实现虚拟人隐形传态的下一代社会虚拟现实应用
comment: This is an extended version (with more details) of a tutorial feature article that will appear in the IEEE Signal Processing Magazine in September 2022
comments: This is an extended version (with more details) of a tutorial feature article that will appear in the IEEE Signal Processing Magazine in September 2022
abstract: Virtual reality (VR) is an emerging technology of great societal potential. Some of its most exciting and promising use cases include remote scene content and untethered lifelike navigation. This article first highlights the relevance of such future societal applications and the challenges ahead towards enabling them. It then provides a broad and contextual high-level perspective of several emerging technologies and unconventional techniques and argues that only by their synergistic integration can the fundamental performance bottlenecks of hyper-intensive computation, ultra-high data rate, and ultra-low latency be overcome to enable untethered and lifelike VR-based remote scene immersion. A novel future system concept is introduced that embodies this holistic integration, unified with a rigorous analysis, to capture the fundamental synergies and interplay between communications, computation, and signal scalability that arise in this context, and advance its performance at the same time. Several representative results highlighting these trade-offs and the benefits of the envisioned system are presented at the end.
summary: Virtual reality (VR) is an emerging technology of great societal potential. Some of its most exciting and promising use cases include remote scene content and untethered lifelike navigation. This article first highlights the relevance of such future societal applications and the challenges ahead towards enabling them. It then provides a broad and contextual high-level perspective of several emerging technologies and unconventional techniques and argues that only by their synergistic integration can the fundamental performance bottlenecks of hyper-intensive computation, ultra-high data rate, and ultra-low latency be overcome to enable untethered and lifelike VR-based remote scene immersion. A novel future system concept is introduced that embodies this holistic integration, unified with a rigorous analysis, to capture the fundamental synergies and interplay between communications, computation, and signal scalability that arise in this context, and advance its performance at the same time. Several representative results highlighting these trade-offs and the benefits of the envisioned system are presented at the end.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实（VR）是一项具有巨大社会潜力的新兴技术。它的一些最令人兴奋和最有前途的用例包括远程场景内容和不受限制的逼真导航。本文首先强调了此类未来社会应用的相关性以及实现它们所面临的挑战。然后，它提供了几种新兴技术和非常规技术的广泛和上下文的高层次视角，并认为只有通过它们的协同集成，才能克服超密集计算、超高数据速率和超低延迟的基本性能瓶颈，从而实现不受束缚、逼真的基于 VR 的远程场景沉浸。引入了一种新颖的未来系统概念，体现了这种整体集成，与严格的分析相结合，以捕获在此背景下出现的通信、计算和信号可扩展性之间的基本协同作用和相互作用，并同时提高其性能。最后提出了一些代表性的结果，强调了这些权衡和设想系统的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过整合新兴技术解决虚拟现实（VR）在远程场景沉浸和无绳导航中的关键技术瓶颈，推动下一代社会虚拟现实应用的发展。
AI.motivation: VR技术具有巨大的社会潜力，但当前面临计算强度高、数据传输速率和延迟等核心性能瓶颈，限制了其在远程场景沉浸和无绳导航等应用中的发展。
AI.method: 提出一种新型系统概念，通过协同整合通信、计算和信号可扩展性等技术，分析其相互作用与协同效应，以突破现有技术限制。
AI.result: 展示了系统设计中关键权衡关系及性能优势，验证了整合方案在提升VR沉浸感和实时性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 只有通过多技术协同整合，才能克服VR应用中的核心瓶颈，实现真正无绳、高保真度的远程场景沉浸体验。

search_text: Towards Enabling Next Generation Societal Virtual Reality Applications for Virtual Human Teleportation 致力于实现虚拟人隐形传态的下一代社会虚拟现实应用 Virtual reality (VR) is an emerging technology of great societal potential. Some of its most exciting and promising use cases include remote scene content and untethered lifelike navigation. This article first highlights the relevance of such future societal applications and the challenges ahead towards enabling them. It then provides a broad and contextual high-level perspective of several emerging technologies and unconventional techniques and argues that only by their synergistic integration can the fundamental performance bottlenecks of hyper-intensive computation, ultra-high data rate, and ultra-low latency be overcome to enable untethered and lifelike VR-based remote scene immersion. A novel future system concept is introduced that embodies this holistic integration, unified with a rigorous analysis, to capture the fundamental synergies and interplay between communications, computation, and signal scalability that arise in this context, and advance its performance at the same time. Several representative results highlighting these trade-offs and the benefits of the envisioned system are presented at the end. 虚拟现实（VR）是一项具有巨大社会潜力的新兴技术。它的一些最令人兴奋和最有前途的用例包括远程场景内容和不受限制的逼真导航。本文首先强调了此类未来社会应用的相关性以及实现它们所面临的挑战。然后，它提供了几种新兴技术和非常规技术的广泛和上下文的高层次视角，并认为只有通过它们的协同集成，才能克服超密集计算、超高数据速率和超低延迟的基本性能瓶颈，从而实现不受束缚、逼真的基于 VR 的远程场景沉浸。引入了一种新颖的未来系统概念，体现了这种整体集成，与严格的分析相结合，以捕获在此背景下出现的通信、计算和信号可扩展性之间的基本协同作用和相互作用，并同时提高其性能。最后提出了一些代表性的结果，强调了这些权衡和设想系统的好处。 本文旨在通过整合新兴技术解决虚拟现实（VR）在远程场景沉浸和无绳导航中的关键技术瓶颈，推动下一代社会虚拟现实应用的发展。 Jacob Chakareski,Mahmudur Khan,Murat Yuksel cs.NI,cs.MM,eess.IV,eess.SY,stat.AP

title: Generative Data Augmentation Guided by Triplet Loss for Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音情感识别的三重态损失引导的生成数据增强
abstract: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) is crucial for human-computer interaction but still remains a challenging problem because of two major obstacles: data scarcity and imbalance. Many datasets for SER are substantially imbalanced, where data utterances of one class (most often Neutral) are much more frequent than those of other classes. Furthermore, only a few data resources are available for many existing spoken languages. To address these problems, we exploit a GAN-based augmentation model guided by a triplet network, to improve SER performance given imbalanced and insufficient training data. We conduct experiments and demonstrate: 1) With a highly imbalanced dataset, our augmentation strategy significantly improves the SER performance (+8% recall score compared with the baseline). 2) Moreover, in a cross-lingual benchmark, where we train a model with enough source language utterances but very few target language utterances (around 50 in our experiments), our augmentation strategy brings benefits for the SER performance of all three target languages.
summary: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) is crucial for human-computer interaction but still remains a challenging problem because of two major obstacles: data scarcity and imbalance. Many datasets for SER are substantially imbalanced, where data utterances of one class (most often Neutral) are much more frequent than those of other classes. Furthermore, only a few data resources are available for many existing spoken languages. To address these problems, we exploit a GAN-based augmentation model guided by a triplet network, to improve SER performance given imbalanced and insufficient training data. We conduct experiments and demonstrate: 1) With a highly imbalanced dataset, our augmentation strategy significantly improves the SER performance (+8% recall score compared with the baseline). 2) Moreover, in a cross-lingual benchmark, where we train a model with enough source language utterances but very few target language utterances (around 50 in our experiments), our augmentation strategy brings benefits for the SER performance of all three target languages.
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）对于人机交互至关重要，但由于两个主要障碍：数据稀缺和不平衡，仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。许多 SER 数据集都严重不平衡，其中一类（通常是中性）的数据表达比其他类的数据表达要频繁得多。此外，对于许多现有的口语来说，只有很少的数据资源可用。为了解决这些问题，我们利用三元组网络引导的基于 GAN 的增强模型，在训练数据不平衡和不足的情况下提高 SER 性能。我们进行实验并证明：1）对于高度不平衡的数据集，我们的增强策略显着提高了 SER 性能（与基线相比，召回分数提高了 8%）。 2）此外，在跨语言基准测试中，我们训练一个具有足够源语言话语但目标语言话语很少（在我们的实验中约为 50 个）的模型，我们的增强策略为所有三种目标语言的 SER 性能带来了好处。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过生成式数据增强方法解决语音情感识别中的数据不平衡和稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 由于SER数据集存在严重不平衡及多语言数据稀缺，导致模型性能受限，需有效数据增强方法。
AI.method: 提出基于GAN的数据增强模型，结合三元组网络指导生成，以平衡数据分布并增加多样性。
AI.result: 在高度不平衡数据集上召回率提升8%；跨语言实验中，目标语言数据仅50条时，三种语言SER性能均提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解数据不平衡与稀缺问题，在跨语言场景下表现稳定，提升SER性能。

title: Understanding User Awareness and Behaviors Concerning Encrypted DNS Settings
title_zh: 了解有关加密 DNS 设置的用户意识和行为
abstract: Recent developments to encrypt the Domain Name System (DNS) have resulted in major browser and operating system vendors deploying encrypted DNS functionality, often enabling various configurations and settings by default. In many cases, default encrypted DNS settings have implications for performance and privacy; for example, Firefox's default DNS setting sends all of a user's DNS queries to Cloudflare, potentially introducing new privacy vulnerabilities. In this paper, we confirm that most users are unaware of these developments -- with respect to the rollout of these new technologies, the changes in default settings, and the ability to customize encrypted DNS configuration to balance user preferences between privacy and performance. Our findings suggest several important implications for the designers of interfaces for encrypted DNS functionality in both browsers and operating systems, to help improve user awareness concerning these settings, and to ensure that users retain the ability to make choices that allow them to balance tradeoffs concerning DNS privacy and performance.
summary: Recent developments to encrypt the Domain Name System (DNS) have resulted in major browser and operating system vendors deploying encrypted DNS functionality, often enabling various configurations and settings by default. In many cases, default encrypted DNS settings have implications for performance and privacy; for example, Firefox's default DNS setting sends all of a user's DNS queries to Cloudflare, potentially introducing new privacy vulnerabilities. In this paper, we confirm that most users are unaware of these developments -- with respect to the rollout of these new technologies, the changes in default settings, and the ability to customize encrypted DNS configuration to balance user preferences between privacy and performance. Our findings suggest several important implications for the designers of interfaces for encrypted DNS functionality in both browsers and operating systems, to help improve user awareness concerning these settings, and to ensure that users retain the ability to make choices that allow them to balance tradeoffs concerning DNS privacy and performance.
abstract_zh: 加密域名系统 (DNS) 的最新发展导致主要浏览器和操作系统供应商部署加密 DNS 功能，通常默认启用各种配置和设置。在许多情况下，默认的加密 DNS 设置会对性能和隐私产生影响；例如，Firefox 的默认 DNS 设置将用户的所有 DNS 查询发送到 Cloudflare，这可能会引入新的隐私漏洞。在本文中，我们确认大多数用户并不知道这些进展——涉及这些新技术的推出、默认设置的更改以及自定义加密 DNS 配置以平衡隐私和性能之间的用户偏好的能力。我们的研究结果对浏览器和操作系统中加密 DNS 功能的界面设计者提出了一些重要的影响，以帮助提高用户对这些设置的认识，并确保用户保留做出选择的能力，使他们能够在 DNS 隐私和性能方面进行权衡。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究用户对加密DNS设置的认知和行为，探讨默认设置对隐私和性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 浏览器和操作系统默认启用加密DNS功能，但用户可能不了解其隐私和性能影响，导致潜在风险。
AI.method: 通过调查和实验分析用户对加密DNS技术、默认设置及自定义配置的认知程度和实际行为。
AI.result: 大多数用户未意识到加密DNS的部署、默认设置变化及自定义配置的重要性，缺乏隐私与性能平衡的意识。
AI.conclusion: 需优化浏览器和操作系统界面设计，提升用户对加密DNS设置的知情权和自主选择能力。

Our findings suggest several important implications for the designers of interfaces for encrypted DNS functionality in both browsers and operating systems, to help improve user awareness concerning these settings, and to ensure that users retain the ability to make choices that allow them to balance tradeoffs concerning DNS privacy and performance. 加密域名系统 (DNS) 的最新发展导致主要浏览器和操作系统供应商部署加密 DNS 功能，通常默认启用各种配置和设置。在许多情况下，默认的加密 DNS 设置会对性能和隐私产生影响；例如，Firefox 的默认 DNS 设置将用户的所有 DNS 查询发送到 Cloudflare，这可能会引入新的隐私漏洞。在本文中，我们确认大多数用户并不知道这些进展——涉及这些新技术的推出、默认设置的更改以及自定义加密 DNS 配置以平衡隐私和性能之间的用户偏好的能力。我们的研究结果对浏览器和操作系统中加密 DNS 功能的界面设计者提出了一些重要的影响，以帮助提高用户对这些设置的认识，并确保用户保留做出选择的能力，使他们能够在 DNS 隐私和性能方面进行权衡。 该论文研究用户对加密DNS设置的认知和行为，探讨默认设置对隐私和性能的影响。 Alexandra Nisenoff,Ranya Sharma,Nick Feamster cs.CR,cs.HC,cs.NI

authors_text: Daniel Guijo,Victor Onofre,Gianni Del Bimbo,Samuel Mugel,Daniel Estepa,Xabier De Carlos,Ana Adell,Aizea Lojo,Josu Bilbao,Roman Orus
title: Quantum artificial vision for defect detection in manufacturing
title_zh: 用于制造缺陷检测的量子人工视觉
abstract: In this paper we consider several algorithms for quantum computer vision using Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices, and benchmark them for a real problem against their classical counterparts. Specifically, we consider two approaches: a quantum Support Vector Machine (QSVM) on a universal gate-based quantum computer, and QBoost on a quantum annealer. The quantum vision systems are benchmarked for an unbalanced dataset of images where the aim is to detect defects in manufactured car pieces. We see that the quantum algorithms outperform their classical counterparts in several ways, with QBoost allowing for larger problems to be analyzed with present-day quantum annealers. Data preprocessing, including dimensionality reduction and contrast enhancement, is also discussed, as well as hyperparameter tuning in QBoost. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first implementation of quantum computer vision systems for a problem of industrial relevance in a manufacturing production line.
summary: In this paper we consider several algorithms for quantum computer vision using Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices, and benchmark them for a real problem against their classical counterparts. Specifically, we consider two approaches: a quantum Support Vector Machine (QSVM) on a universal gate-based quantum computer, and QBoost on a quantum annealer. The quantum vision systems are benchmarked for an unbalanced dataset of images where the aim is to detect defects in manufactured car pieces. We see that the quantum algorithms outperform their classical counterparts in several ways, with QBoost allowing for larger problems to be analyzed with present-day quantum annealers. Data preprocessing, including dimensionality reduction and contrast enhancement, is also discussed, as well as hyperparameter tuning in QBoost. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first implementation of quantum computer vision systems for a problem of industrial relevance in a manufacturing production line.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑了几种使用噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）设备的量子计算机视觉算法，并将它们与经典算法针对实际问题进行了基准测试。具体来说，我们考虑两种方法：基于通用门的量子计算机上的量子支持向量机（QSVM）和量子退火器上的 QBoost。量子视觉系统以不平衡图像数据集为基准，其目的是检测制造的汽车部件中的缺陷。我们看到量子算法在很多方面都优于经典算法，QBoost 允许使用当今的量子退火器来分析更大的问题。还讨论了数据预处理，包括降维和对比度增强，以及 QBoost 中的超参数调整。据我们所知，这是首次针对制造生产线中的工业相关问题实施量子计算机视觉系统。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是利用量子计算算法（如QSVM和QBoost）进行制造业中的缺陷检测，并与经典方法进行基准测试。
AI.motivation: 传统缺陷检测方法在处理不平衡数据集和大规模问题时存在局限，量子计算有望提供更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用量子支持向量机（QSVM）和量子提升（QBoost）两种量子算法，分别在通用量子计算机和量子退火器上实现，并结合数据预处理与超参数优化。
AI.result: 量子算法在多个指标上优于经典方法，QBoost能利用现有量子退火器处理更大规模问题。
AI.conclusion: 首次在工业生产线上实现量子计算机视觉系统，验证了量子算法在缺陷检测中的潜力。

authors_text: Yunpeng Liu,Jonathan Wilder Lavington,Adam Scibior,Frank Wood
title: Vehicle Type Specific Waypoint Generation
title_zh: 车辆类型特定航点生成
comment: ef:2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: We develop a generic mechanism for generating vehicle-type specific sequences of waypoints from a probabilistic foundation model of driving behavior. Many foundation behavior models are trained on data that does not include vehicle information, which limits their utility in downstream applications such as planning. Our novel methodology conditionally specializes such a behavior predictive model to a vehicle-type by utilizing byproducts of the reinforcement learning algorithms used to produce vehicle specific controllers. We show how to compose a vehicle specific value function estimate with a generic probabilistic behavior model to generate vehicle-type specific waypoint sequences that are more likely to be physically plausible then their vehicle-agnostic counterparts.
summary: We develop a generic mechanism for generating vehicle-type specific sequences of waypoints from a probabilistic foundation model of driving behavior. Many foundation behavior models are trained on data that does not include vehicle information, which limits their utility in downstream applications such as planning. Our novel methodology conditionally specializes such a behavior predictive model to a vehicle-type by utilizing byproducts of the reinforcement learning algorithms used to produce vehicle specific controllers. We show how to compose a vehicle specific value function estimate with a generic probabilistic behavior model to generate vehicle-type specific waypoint sequences that are more likely to be physically plausible then their vehicle-agnostic counterparts.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种通用机制，用于从驾驶行为的概率基础模型生成车辆类型特定的路径点序列。许多基础行为模型都是根据不包含车辆信息的数据进行训练的，这限制了它们在规划等下游应用中的效用。我们的新颖方法通过利用用于生成车辆特定控制器的强化学习算法的副产品，有条件地将这种行为预测模型专门用于车辆类型。我们展示了如何将车辆特定价值函数估计与通用概率行为模型组合起来，以生成车辆类型特定的航路点序列，这些航路点序列比与车辆无关的对应物更可能在物理上合理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率驾驶行为模型的通用机制，用于生成特定车型的航路点序列。
AI.motivation: 现有基础行为模型因缺乏车辆信息，难以满足下游规划任务中对不同车型的物理合理性需求。
AI.method: 利用强化学习生成的车辆特定控制器副产品，将价值函数估计与通用概率行为模型结合进行条件化适配。
AI.result: 生成的车型特定航路点序列相比通用模型方案具有更高的物理可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合强化学习副产品与概率模型，有效提升了航路点生成的车型适应性与物理合理性。

title: Mathematical Foundations of Complex Tonality
title_zh: 复杂调性的数学基础
comment: 35 pages, to appear in Journal of Mathematics and Music
comments: 35 pages, to appear in Journal of Mathematics and Music
abstract: Equal temperament, in which semitones are tuned in the irrational ratio of $2^{1/12} : 1$, is best seen as a serviceable compromise, sacrificing purity for flexibility. Just intonation, in which intervals are given by products of powers of $2$, $3$, and $5$, is more natural, but of limited flexibility. We propose a new scheme in which ratios of Gaussian integers form the basis of an abstract tonal system. The tritone, so problematic in just temperament, given ambiguously by the ratios $\tfrac{45}{32}$, $\tfrac{64}{45}$, $\tfrac{36}{25}$, $\tfrac{25}{18}$, none satisfactory, is in our scheme represented by the complex ratio $1 + \rm{i} : 1$. The major and minor whole tones, given by intervals of $\tfrac{9}{8}$ and $\tfrac{10}{9}$, can each be factorized into products of complex semitones, giving us a major complex semitone $\tfrac{3}{4}(1 + \rm{i})$ and a minor complex semitone $\tfrac{1}{3}(3 + \rm{i})$. The perfect third, given by the interval $\tfrac{5}{4}$, factorizes into the product of a complex whole tone $\tfrac{1}{2}(1 + 2\rm{i})$ and its complex conjugate. Augmented with these supplementary tones, the resulting scheme of complex intervals based on products of low powers of Gaussian primes leads to the construction of a complete system of major and minor scales in all keys.
summary: Equal temperament, in which semitones are tuned in the irrational ratio of $2^{1/12} : 1$, is best seen as a serviceable compromise, sacrificing purity for flexibility. Just intonation, in which intervals are given by products of powers of $2$, $3$, and $5$, is more natural, but of limited flexibility. We propose a new scheme in which ratios of Gaussian integers form the basis of an abstract tonal system. The tritone, so problematic in just temperament, given ambiguously by the ratios $\tfrac{45}{32}$, $\tfrac{64}{45}$, $\tfrac{36}{25}$, $\tfrac{25}{18}$, none satisfactory, is in our scheme represented by the complex ratio $1 + \rm{i} : 1$. The major and minor whole tones, given by intervals of $\tfrac{9}{8}$ and $\tfrac{10}{9}$, can each be factorized into products of complex semitones, giving us a major complex semitone $\tfrac{3}{4}(1 + \rm{i})$ and a minor complex semitone $\tfrac{1}{3}(3 + \rm{i})$. The perfect third, given by the interval $\tfrac{5}{4}$, factorizes into the product of a complex whole tone $\tfrac{1}{2}(1 + 2\rm{i})$ and its complex conjugate. Augmented with these supplementary tones, the resulting scheme of complex intervals based on products of low powers of Gaussian primes leads to the construction of a complete system of major and minor scales in all keys.
abstract_zh: 等律，其中半音以 $2^{1/12} : 1$ 的非理性比例调音，最好被视为一种有用的折衷方案，为了灵活性而牺牲了纯度。纯音调（其中音程由 $2$、$3$ 和 $5$ 的乘积给出）更自然，但灵活性有限。我们提出了一种新方案，其中高斯整数的比率构成了抽象色调系统的基础。三全音在纯律中存在问题，由比率 $\tfrac{45}{32}$、$\tfrac{64}{45}$、$\tfrac{36}{25}$、$\tfrac{25}{18}$ 模糊地给出，不令人满意，在我们的方案中由复数比率 $1 + \rm{i} : 1$ 表示。大调和小调全音由 $\tfrac{9}{8}$ 和 $\tfrac{10}{9}$ 的音程给出，可以分别分解为复半音的乘积，从而得到大复半音 $\tfrac{3}{4}(1 + \rm{i})$ 和小复半音 $\tfrac{1}{3}(3 + \rm{i})$。完美的三分之一，由音程 $\tfrac{5}{4}$ 给出，分解为复数全音 $\tfrac{1}{2}(1 + 2\rm{i})$ 及其复共轭的乘积。通过这些补充音调的增强，基于高斯素数低幂乘积的复杂音程方案得到了构建所有调中的大调和小调音阶的完整系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于高斯整数比的复音调系统，解决传统等 temperament 和 just intonation 的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统等 temperament 舍弃纯度换取灵活性，just intonation 则因灵活性不足难以应用，需寻找兼顾纯度与灵活性的调音方案。
AI.method: 以高斯整数比构建抽象音调体系，将三全音表示为复数比 1+i:1，分解大/小二度为复数半音乘积，完美三度由复数全音及其共轭乘积构成。
AI.result: 基于低次高斯素数幂的复音程体系，成功构建出所有调式的完整大小调系统。
AI.conclusion: 复音调系统通过复数因子分解，兼顾了音程纯度与调式灵活性，为音乐理论提供新数学基础。

tldr: 本文提出基于高斯整数比的复音调系统，解决传统等 temperament 和 just intonation 的局限性。
motivation: 传统等 temperament 舍弃纯度换取灵活性，just intonation 则因灵活性不足难以应用，需寻找兼顾纯度与灵活性的调音方案。
method: 以高斯整数比构建抽象音调体系，将三全音表示为复数比 1+i:1，分解大/小二度为复数半音乘积，完美三度由复数全音及其共轭乘积构成。
result: 基于低次高斯素数幂的复音程体系，成功构建出所有调式的完整大小调系统。
conclusion: 复音调系统通过复数因子分解，兼顾了音程纯度与调式灵活性，为音乐理论提供新数学基础。
search_text: Mathematical Foundations of Complex Tonality 复杂调性的数学基础 Equal temperament, in which semitones are tuned in the irrational ratio of $2^{1/12} : 1$, is best seen as a serviceable compromise, sacrificing purity for flexibility. Just intonation, in which intervals are given by products of powers of $2$, $3$, and $5$, is more natural, but of limited flexibility. We propose a new scheme in which ratios of Gaussian integers form the basis of an abstract tonal system. The tritone, so problematic in just temperament, given ambiguously by the ratios $\tfrac{45}{32}$, $\tfrac{64}{45}$, $\tfrac{36}{25}$, $\tfrac{25}{18}$, none satisfactory, is in our scheme represented by the complex ratio $1 + \rm{i} : 1$. The major and minor whole tones, given by intervals of $\tfrac{9}{8}$ and $\tfrac{10}{9}$, can each be factorized into products of complex semitones, giving us a major complex semitone $\tfrac{3}{4}(1 + \rm{i})$ and a minor complex semitone $\tfrac{1}{3}(3 + \rm{i})$. The perfect third, given by the interval $\tfrac{5}{4}$, factorizes into the product of a complex whole tone $\tfrac{1}{2}(1 + 2\rm{i})$ and its complex conjugate. Augmented with these supplementary tones, the resulting scheme of complex intervals based on products of low powers of Gaussian primes leads to the construction of a complete system of major and minor scales in all keys. 等律，其中半音以 $2^{1/12} : 1$ 的非理性比例调音，最好被视为一种有用的折衷方案，为了灵活性而牺牲了纯度。纯音调（其中音程由 $2$、$3$ 和 $5$ 的乘积给出）更自然，但灵活性有限。我们提出了一种新方案，其中高斯整数的比率构成了抽象色调系统的基础。三全音在纯律中存在问题，由比率 $\tfrac{45}{32}$、$\tfrac{64}{45}$、$\tfrac{36}{25}$、$\tfrac{25}{18}$ 模糊地给出，不令人满意，在我们的方案中由复数比率 $1 + \rm{i} : 1$ 表示。大调和小调全音由 $\tfrac{9}{8}$ 和 $\tfrac{10}{9}$ 的音程给出，可以分别分解为复半音的乘积，从而得到大复半音 $\tfrac{3}{4}(1 + \rm{i})$ 和小复半音 $\tfrac{1}{3}(3 + \rm{i})$。完美的三分之一，由音程 $\tfrac{5}{4}$ 给出，分解为复数全音 $\tfrac{1}{2}(1 + 2\rm{i})$ 及其复共轭的乘积。通过这些补充音调的增强，基于高斯素数低幂乘积的复杂音程方案得到了构建所有调中的大调和小调音阶的完整系统。 本文提出基于高斯整数比的复音调系统，解决传统等 temperament 和 just intonation 的局限性。 Jeffrey R. Boland,Lane P. Hughston cs.SD,eess.AS,math.NT

authors_text: Ke Xue,Yutong Wang,Cong Guan,Lei Yuan,Haobo Fu,Qiang Fu,Chao Qian,Yang Yu
title: Heterogeneous Multi-agent Zero-Shot Coordination by Coevolution
title_zh: 协同进化的异构多智能体零样本协调
abstract: Generating agents that can achieve zero-shot coordination (ZSC) with unseen partners is a new challenge in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). Recently, some studies have made progress in ZSC by exposing the agents to diverse partners during the training process. They usually involve self-play when training the partners, implicitly assuming that the tasks are homogeneous. However, many real-world tasks are heterogeneous, and hence previous methods may be inefficient. In this paper, we study the heterogeneous ZSC problem for the first time and propose a general method based on coevolution, which coevolves two populations of agents and partners through three sub-processes: pairing, updating and selection. Experimental results on various heterogeneous tasks highlight the necessity of considering the heterogeneous setting and demonstrate that our proposed method is a promising solution for heterogeneous ZSC tasks.
summary: Generating agents that can achieve zero-shot coordination (ZSC) with unseen partners is a new challenge in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). Recently, some studies have made progress in ZSC by exposing the agents to diverse partners during the training process. They usually involve self-play when training the partners, implicitly assuming that the tasks are homogeneous. However, many real-world tasks are heterogeneous, and hence previous methods may be inefficient. In this paper, we study the heterogeneous ZSC problem for the first time and propose a general method based on coevolution, which coevolves two populations of agents and partners through three sub-processes: pairing, updating and selection. Experimental results on various heterogeneous tasks highlight the necessity of considering the heterogeneous setting and demonstrate that our proposed method is a promising solution for heterogeneous ZSC tasks.
abstract_zh: 生成能够与看不见的伙伴实现零样本协调（ZSC）的智能体是协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的一个新挑战。最近，一些研究通过在训练过程中将智能体暴露给不同的合作伙伴，在 ZSC 方面取得了进展。他们在训练合作伙伴时通常会进行自我游戏，隐含地假设任务是同质的。然而，许多现实世界的任务是异构的，因此以前的方法可能效率低下。在本文中，我们首次研究了异构 ZSC 问题，并提出了一种基于协同进化的通用方法，该方法通过三个子过程：配对、更新和选择来共同进化两个智能体和伙伴群体。各种异构任务的实验结果强调了考虑异构设置的必要性，并证明我们提出的方法是异构 ZSC 任务的有前途的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究异质多智能体环境下的零样本协调问题，提出基于协同进化的方法实现智能体与未见过合作伙伴的高效协作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设任务同质，但现实任务多为异质，导致传统方法效率低下，需针对异质场景设计新方案。
AI.method: 提出基于协同进化的方法，通过配对、更新和选择三个子过程，同时进化智能体与合作伙伴的两个种群。
AI.result: 实验验证了异质设置的重要性，并表明该方法在多种异质任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统研究异质ZSC问题，提出的协同进化方法为解决该类任务提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Krunal Kishor Patel,Guy Desaulniers,Andrea Lodi,Freddy Lecue
title: Explainable prediction of Qcodes for NOTAMs using column generation
title_zh: 使用列生成对 NOTAM 的 Qcode 进行可解释的预测
abstract: A NOtice To AirMen (NOTAM) contains important flight route related information. To search and filter them, NOTAMs are grouped into categories called QCodes. In this paper, we develop a tool to predict, with some explanations, a Qcode for a NOTAM. We present a way to extend the interpretable binary classification using column generation proposed in Dash, Gunluk, and Wei (2018) to a multiclass text classification method. We describe the techniques used to tackle the issues related to one vs-rest classification, such as multiple outputs and class imbalances. Furthermore, we introduce some heuristics, including the use of a CP-SAT solver for the subproblems, to reduce the training time. Finally, we show that our approach compares favorably with state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms like Linear SVM and small neural networks while adding the needed interpretability component.
summary: A NOtice To AirMen (NOTAM) contains important flight route related information. To search and filter them, NOTAMs are grouped into categories called QCodes. In this paper, we develop a tool to predict, with some explanations, a Qcode for a NOTAM. We present a way to extend the interpretable binary classification using column generation proposed in Dash, Gunluk, and Wei (2018) to a multiclass text classification method. We describe the techniques used to tackle the issues related to one vs-rest classification, such as multiple outputs and class imbalances. Furthermore, we introduce some heuristics, including the use of a CP-SAT solver for the subproblems, to reduce the training time. Finally, we show that our approach compares favorably with state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms like Linear SVM and small neural networks while adding the needed interpretability component.
abstract_zh: 飞行员通知 (NOTAM) 包含重要的飞行路线相关信息。为了搜索和过滤它们，NOTAM 被分为称为 QCode 的类别。在本文中，我们开发了一种工具来预测 NOTAM 的 Qcode，并提供一些解释。我们提出了一种将 Dash、Gunluk 和 Wei（2018）中提出的使用列生成的可解释二元分类扩展到多类文本分类方法的方法。我们描述了用于解决与单分类和其余分类相关的问题的技术，例如多个输出和类别不平衡。此外，我们引入了一些启发式方法，包括使用 CP-SAT 求解器来解决子问题，以减少训练时间。最后，我们表明，我们的方法在添加所需的可解释性组件的同时，与线性 SVM 和小型神经网络等最先进的机器学习算法相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于列生成的可解释方法，用于预测NOTAM的Qcode分类代码。
AI.motivation: NOTAM分类依赖Qcode人工分组效率低，需开发可解释的自动预测工具以提高准确性与透明度。
AI.method: 扩展二分类列生成框架至多分类文本分类，解决多输出与类别不平衡问题，并引入CP-SAT求解器优化子问题。
AI.result: 方法在准确率上优于线性SVM和小型神经网络，同时保持模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为需要可解释性的航空文本分类任务提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Aleksandr Dekhovich,David M. J. Tax,Marcel H. F. Sluiter,Miguel A. Bessa
title: Continual Prune-and-Select: Class-incremental learning with specialized subnetworks
title_zh: 持续修剪和选择：具有专门子网络的类增量学习
abstract: The human brain is capable of learning tasks sequentially mostly without forgetting. However, deep neural networks (DNNs) suffer from catastrophic forgetting when learning one task after another. We address this challenge considering a class-incremental learning scenario where the DNN sees test data without knowing the task from which this data originates. During training, Continual-Prune-and-Select (CP&S) finds a subnetwork within the DNN that is responsible for solving a given task. Then, during inference, CP&S selects the correct subnetwork to make predictions for that task. A new task is learned by training available neuronal connections of the DNN (previously untrained) to create a new subnetwork by pruning, which can include previously trained connections belonging to other subnetwork(s) because it does not update shared connections. This enables to eliminate catastrophic forgetting by creating specialized regions in the DNN that do not conflict with each other while still allowing knowledge transfer across them. The CP&S strategy is implemented with different subnetwork selection strategies, revealing superior performance to state-of-the-art continual learning methods tested on various datasets (CIFAR-100, CUB-200-2011, ImageNet-100 and ImageNet-1000). In particular, CP&S is capable of sequentially learning 10 tasks from ImageNet-1000 keeping an accuracy around 94% with negligible forgetting, a first-of-its-kind result in class-incremental learning. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this represents an improvement in accuracy above 10% when compared to the best alternative method.
summary: The human brain is capable of learning tasks sequentially mostly without forgetting. However, deep neural networks (DNNs) suffer from catastrophic forgetting when learning one task after another. We address this challenge considering a class-incremental learning scenario where the DNN sees test data without knowing the task from which this data originates. During training, Continual-Prune-and-Select (CP&S) finds a subnetwork within the DNN that is responsible for solving a given task. Then, during inference, CP&S selects the correct subnetwork to make predictions for that task. A new task is learned by training available neuronal connections of the DNN (previously untrained) to create a new subnetwork by pruning, which can include previously trained connections belonging to other subnetwork(s) because it does not update shared connections. This enables to eliminate catastrophic forgetting by creating specialized regions in the DNN that do not conflict with each other while still allowing knowledge transfer across them. The CP&S strategy is implemented with different subnetwork selection strategies, revealing superior performance to state-of-the-art continual learning methods tested on various datasets (CIFAR-100, CUB-200-2011, ImageNet-100 and ImageNet-1000). In particular, CP&S is capable of sequentially learning 10 tasks from ImageNet-1000 keeping an accuracy around 94% with negligible forgetting, a first-of-its-kind result in class-incremental learning. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this represents an improvement in accuracy above 10% when compared to the best alternative method.
abstract_zh: 人脑能够连续学习任务而不会忘记。然而，深度神经网络 (DNN) 在学习一项又一项任务时会遭受灾难性遗忘。我们考虑了类增量学习场景来应对这一挑战，其中 DNN 在不知道该数据源自哪个任务的情况下查看测试数据。在训练期间，连续修剪和选择 (CP&S) 在 DNN 中找到一个负责解决给定任务的子网络。然后，在推理过程中，CP&S 选择正确的子网络来对该任务进行预测。通过训练 DNN 的可用神经元连接（以前未经训练）来学习新任务，以通过修剪创建新的子网络，其中可以包括属于其他子网络的先前训练的连接，因为它不会更新共享连接。这可以通过在 DNN 中创建彼此不冲突的专门区域来消除灾难性遗忘，同时仍然允许知识在它们之间转移。 CP&S 策略通过不同的子网选择策略来实现，在各种数据集（CIFAR-100、CUB-200-2011、ImageNet-100 和 ImageNet-1000）上测试的最先进的持续学习方法中显示出优越的性能。特别是，CP&S 能够从 ImageNet-1000 中顺序学习 10 个任务，保持准确率在 94% 左右，遗忘可以忽略不计，这是类增量学习中的首创。据作者所知，与最佳替代方法相比，这意味着准确率提高了 10% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Continual Prune-and-Select（CP&S）的方法，通过在深度神经网络中创建专门的子网络来解决类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 人类大脑能够顺序学习任务而不会遗忘，但深度神经网络在连续学习新任务时容易出现灾难性遗忘。传统方法难以在类增量学习场景中保持高准确率并避免遗忘。
AI.method: CP&S在训练时为每个任务找到负责的子网络，推理时选择对应子网络进行预测。新任务通过训练未使用的神经连接生成新子网络，且不更新共享连接，从而避免冲突并实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、ImageNet-1000等数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在ImageNet-1000上连续学习10个任务时保持约94%的准确率，遗忘率极低，准确率提升超过10%。
AI.conclusion: CP&S通过构建非冲突的专用子网络有效缓解灾难性遗忘，为类增量学习提供了高效且准确的解决方案。
