search_text: Continual Prune-and-Select: Class-incremental learning with specialized subnetworks 持续修剪和选择：具有专门子网络的类增量学习 The human brain is capable of learning tasks sequentially mostly without forgetting. However, deep neural networks (DNNs) suffer from catastrophic forgetting when learning one task after another. We address this challenge considering a class-incremental learning scenario where the DNN sees test data without knowing the task from which this data originates. During training, Continual-Prune-and-Select (CP&S) finds a subnetwork within the DNN that is responsible for solving a given task. Then, during inference, CP&S selects the correct subnetwork to make predictions for that task. A new task is learned by training available neuronal connections of the DNN (previously untrained) to create a new subnetwork by pruning, which can include previously trained connections belonging to other subnetwork(s) because it does not update shared connections. This enables to eliminate catastrophic forgetting by creating specialized regions in the DNN that do not conflict with each other while still allowing knowledge transfer across them. The CP&S strategy is implemented with different subnetwork selection strategies, revealing superior performance to state-of-the-art continual learning methods tested on various datasets (CIFAR-100, CUB-200-2011, ImageNet-100 and ImageNet-1000). In particular, CP&S is capable of sequentially learning 10 tasks from ImageNet-1000 keeping an accuracy around 94% with negligible forgetting, a first-of-its-kind result in class-incremental learning. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this represents an improvement in accuracy above 10% when compared to the best alternative method. 人脑能够连续学习任务而不会忘记。然而，深度神经网络 (DNN) 在学习一项又一项任务时会遭受灾难性遗忘。我们考虑了类增量学习场景来应对这一挑战，其中 DNN 在不知道该数据源自哪个任务的情况下查看测试数据。在训练期间，连续修剪和选择 (CP&S) 在 DNN 中找到一个负责解决给定任务的子网络。然后，在推理过程中，CP&S 选择正确的子网络来对该任务进行预测。通过训练 DNN 的可用神经元连接（以前未经训练）来学习新任务，以通过修剪创建新的子网络，其中可以包括属于其他子网络的先前训练的连接，因为它不会更新共享连接。这可以通过在 DNN 中创建彼此不冲突的专门区域来消除灾难性遗忘，同时仍然允许知识在它们之间转移。 CP&S 策略通过不同的子网选择策略来实现，在各种数据集（CIFAR-100、CUB-200-2011、ImageNet-100 和 ImageNet-1000）上测试的最先进的持续学习方法中显示出优越的性能。特别是，CP&S 能够从 ImageNet-1000 中顺序学习 10 个任务，保持准确率在 94% 左右，遗忘可以忽略不计，这是类增量学习中的首创。据作者所知，与最佳替代方法相比，这意味着准确率提高了 10% 以上。 本文提出了一种名为Continual Prune-and-Select（CP&S）的方法，通过在深度神经网络中创建专门的子网络来解决类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。 Aleksandr Dekhovich,David M. authors_text: Ilker Oguz,Jih-Liang Hsieh,Niyazi Ulas Dinc,Uğur Teğin,Mustafa Yildirim,Carlo Gigli,Christophe Moser,Demetri Psaltis
title: Programming Nonlinear Propagation for Efficient Optical Learning Machines
title_zh: 为高效光学学习机进行非线性传播编程
abstract: The ever-increasing demand for processing data with larger machine learning models requires more efficient hardware solutions due to limitations such as power dissipation and scalability. Optics is a promising contender for providing lower power computation since light propagation through a non-absorbing medium is a lossless operation. However, to carry out useful and efficient computations with light, generating and controlling nonlinearity optically is a necessity that is still elusive. Multimode fibers (MMF) have been shown that they can provide nonlinear effects with microwatts of average power while maintaining parallelism and low loss. In this work, we propose an optical neural network architecture, which performs nonlinear optical computation by controlling the propagation of ultrashort pulses in MMF by wavefront shaping. With a surrogate model, optimal sets of parameters are found to program this optical computer for different tasks with minimal utilization of an electronic computer. We show a remarkable decrease of 97% in the number of model parameters, which leads to an overall 99% digital operation reduction compared to an equivalently performing digital neural network. We further demonstrate that a fully optical implementation can also be performed with competitive accuracies.
summary: The ever-increasing demand for processing data with larger machine learning models requires more efficient hardware solutions due to limitations such as power dissipation and scalability. Optics is a promising contender for providing lower power computation since light propagation through a non-absorbing medium is a lossless operation. However, to carry out useful and efficient computations with light, generating and controlling nonlinearity optically is a necessity that is still elusive. Multimode fibers (MMF) have been shown that they can provide nonlinear effects with microwatts of average power while maintaining parallelism and low loss. In this work, we propose an optical neural network architecture, which performs nonlinear optical computation by controlling the propagation of ultrashort pulses in MMF by wavefront shaping. With a surrogate model, optimal sets of parameters are found to program this optical computer for different tasks with minimal utilization of an electronic computer. We show a remarkable decrease of 97% in the number of model parameters, which leads to an overall 99% digital operation reduction compared to an equivalently performing digital neural network. We further demonstrate that a fully optical implementation can also be performed with competitive accuracies.
abstract_zh: 由于功耗和可扩展性等限制，使用更大的机器学习模型处理数据的需求不断增长，需要更高效的硬件解决方案。光学是提供低功耗计算的有前途的竞争者，因为通过非吸收介质的光传播是无损操作。然而，要利用光进行有用且高效的计算，以光学方式生成和控制非线性是必要的，但仍然难以实现。多模光纤 (MMF) 已被证明可以提供平均功率微瓦级的非线性效应，同时保持并行性和低损耗。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种光学神经网络架构，它通过波前整形控制MMF中超短脉冲的传播来执行非线性光学计算。通过替代模型，可以找到最佳参数集，从而以最少的电子计算机利用率对该光学计算机进行编程以执行不同的任务。我们发现模型参数的数量显着减少了 97%，与同等性能的数字神经网络相比，总体数字运算减少了 99%。我们进一步证明，完全光学实现也可以以具有竞争力的精度进行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模光纤（MMF）的光学神经网络架构，通过调控超短脉冲传播实现非线性光学计算，以提高光学学习机的效率。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习模型规模扩大，传统电子硬件面临功耗和扩展性限制，而光学计算因低损耗特性被视为潜在解决方案，但光学非线性控制仍是难题。
AI.method: 利用多模光纤的非线性效应，结合波前调控技术控制超短脉冲传播，并通过代理模型优化参数设置，最大限度减少电子计算机的使用。
AI.result: 模型参数数量减少97%，数字运算量降低99%，且全光学实现的准确率具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了光学计算在参数效率和能耗上的优势，为构建高效光学学习机提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Amel Dechemi,Vikarn Bhakri,Ipsita Sahin,Arjun Modi,Julya Mestas,Pamodya Peiris,Dannya Enriquez Barrundia,Elena Kokkoni,Konstantinos Karydis
title: BabyNet: A Lightweight Network for Infant Reaching Action Recognition in Unconstrained Environments to Support Future Pediatric Rehabilitation Applications
title_zh: BabyNet：一种轻量级网络，用于在不受约束的环境中识别婴儿的动作，以支持未来的儿科康复应用
abstract: Action recognition is an important component to improve autonomy of physical rehabilitation devices, such as wearable robotic exoskeletons. Existing human action recognition algorithms focus on adult applications rather than pediatric ones. In this paper, we introduce BabyNet, a light-weight (in terms of trainable parameters) network structure to recognize infant reaching action from off-body stationary cameras. We develop an annotated dataset that includes diverse reaches performed while in a sitting posture by different infants in unconstrained environments (e.g., in home settings, etc.). Our approach uses the spatial and temporal connection of annotated bounding boxes to interpret onset and offset of reaching, and to detect a complete reaching action. We evaluate the efficiency of our proposed approach and compare its performance against other learning-based network structures in terms of capability of capturing temporal inter-dependencies and accuracy of detection of reaching onset and offset. Results indicate our BabyNet can attain solid performance in terms of (average) testing accuracy that exceeds that of other larger networks, and can hence serve as a light-weight data-driven framework for video-based infant reaching action recognition.
summary: Action recognition is an important component to improve autonomy of physical rehabilitation devices, such as wearable robotic exoskeletons. Existing human action recognition algorithms focus on adult applications rather than pediatric ones. In this paper, we introduce BabyNet, a light-weight (in terms of trainable parameters) network structure to recognize infant reaching action from off-body stationary cameras. We develop an annotated dataset that includes diverse reaches performed while in a sitting posture by different infants in unconstrained environments (e.g., in home settings, etc.). Our approach uses the spatial and temporal connection of annotated bounding boxes to interpret onset and offset of reaching, and to detect a complete reaching action. We evaluate the efficiency of our proposed approach and compare its performance against other learning-based network structures in terms of capability of capturing temporal inter-dependencies and accuracy of detection of reaching onset and offset. Results indicate our BabyNet can attain solid performance in terms of (average) testing accuracy that exceeds that of other larger networks, and can hence serve as a light-weight data-driven framework for video-based infant reaching action recognition.
abstract_zh: 动作识别是提高物理康复设备（例如可穿戴机器人外骨骼）自主性的重要组成部分。现有的人类动作识别算法侧重于成人应用而不是儿童应用。在本文中，我们介绍了 BabyNet，这是一种轻量级（就可训练参数而言）网络结构，用于识别离体固定摄像机的婴儿伸手动作。我们开发了一个带注释的数据集，其中包括不同婴儿在不受约束的环境（例如，在家庭环境中等）中以坐姿进行的不同伸展动作。我们的方法使用带注释的边界框的空间和时间连接来解释到达的开始和偏移，并检测完整的到达动作。我们评估了我们提出的方法的效率，并将其与其他基于学习的网络结构在捕获时间相互依赖性的能力以及到达起始点和偏移量检测的准确性方面的性能进行了比较。结果表明，我们的 BabyNet 在（平均）测试精度方面可以获得超过其他大型网络的可靠性能，因此可以作为基于视频的婴儿进行动作识别的轻量级数据驱动框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BabyNet，一种轻量级网络结构，用于在非受限环境中通过视频识别婴儿抓取动作，以支持儿科康复应用。
AI.motivation: 现有动作识别算法多针对成人，缺乏针对婴儿的轻量级解决方案，而康复设备需要准确识别婴儿动作以提升自主性。
AI.method: 设计轻量级网络结构，结合标注边界框的空间时序信息识别抓取动作起止，并构建包含多样婴儿坐姿抓取动作的数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: BabyNet在测试准确率上超越其他更大网络，证明其在捕捉时序依赖性和检测精度上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BabyNet作为轻量级数据驱动框架，可有效识别婴儿抓取动作，为未来儿科康复设备提供可靠支持。

search_text: BabyNet: A Lightweight Network for Infant Reaching Action Recognition in Unconstrained Environments to Support Future Pediatric Rehabilitation Applications BabyNet：一种轻量级网络，用于在不受约束的环境中识别婴儿的动作，以支持未来的儿科康复应用 Action recognition is an important component to improve autonomy of physical rehabilitation devices, such as wearable robotic exoskeletons. Existing human action recognition algorithms focus on adult applications rather than pediatric ones. In this paper, we introduce BabyNet, a light-weight (in terms of trainable parameters) network structure to recognize infant reaching action from off-body stationary cameras. We develop an annotated dataset that includes diverse reaches performed while in a sitting posture by different infants in unconstrained environments (e.g., in home settings, etc.). Our approach uses the spatial and temporal connection of annotated bounding boxes to interpret onset and offset of reaching, and to detect a complete reaching action. We evaluate the efficiency of our proposed approach and compare its performance against other learning-based network structures in terms of capability of capturing temporal inter-dependencies and accuracy of detection of reaching onset and offset. Results indicate our BabyNet can attain solid performance in terms of (average) testing accuracy that exceeds that of other larger networks, and can hence serve as a light-weight data-driven framework for video-based infant reaching action recognition. 动作识别是提高物理康复设备（例如可穿戴机器人外骨骼）自主性的重要组成部分。现有的人类动作识别算法侧重于成人应用而不是儿童应用。在本文中，我们介绍了 BabyNet，这是一种轻量级（就可训练参数而言）网络结构，用于识别离体固定摄像机的婴儿伸手动作。我们开发了一个带注释的数据集，其中包括不同婴儿在不受约束的环境（例如，在家庭环境中等）中以坐姿进行的不同伸展动作。我们的方法使用带注释的边界框的空间和时间连接来解释到达的开始和偏移，并检测完整的到达动作。我们评估了我们提出的方法的效率，并将其与其他基于学习的网络结构在捕获时间相互依赖性的能力以及到达起始点和偏移量检测的准确性方面的性能进行了比较。结果表明，我们的 BabyNet 在（平均）测试精度方面可以获得超过其他大型网络的可靠性能，因此可以作为基于视频的婴儿进行动作识别的轻量级数据驱动框架。 本文提出BabyNet，一种轻量级网络结构，用于在非受限环境中通过视频识别婴儿抓取动作，以支持儿科康复应用。 Amel Dechemi,Vikarn Bhakri,Ipsita Sahin,Arjun Modi,Julya Mestas,Pamodya Peiris,Dannya Enriquez Barrundia,Elena Kokkoni,Konstantinos Karydis cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Visual Heart Rate Estimation from RGB Facial Video using Spectral Reflectance
title_zh: 使用光谱反射率从 RGB 面部视频估计视觉心率
comment: Submitted as a student abstract to AAAI 2023
comments: Submitted as a student abstract to AAAI 2023
abstract: Estimation of the Heart rate from the facial video has a number of applications in the medical and fitness industries. Additionally, it has become useful in the field of gaming as well. Several approaches have been proposed to seamlessly obtain the Heart rate from the facial video, but these approaches have had issues in dealing with motion and illumination artifacts. In this work, we propose a reliable HR estimation framework using the spectral reflectance of the user, which makes it robust to motion and illumination disturbances. We employ deep learning-based frameworks such as Faster RCNNs to perform face detection as opposed to the Viola Jones algorithm employed by previous approaches. We evaluate our method on the MAHNOB HCI dataset and found that the proposed method is able to outperform previous approaches.Estimation of the Heart rate from facial video has a number of applications in the medical and the fitness industries. Additionally, it has become useful in the field of gaming as well. Several approaches have been proposed to seamlessly obtain the Heart rate from the facial video, but these approaches have had issues in dealing with motion and illumination artifacts. In this work, we propose a reliable HR estimation framework using the spectral reflectance of the user, which makes it robust to motion and illumination disturbances. We employ deep learning-based frameworks such as Faster RCNNs to perform face detection as opposed to the Viola-Jones algorithm employed by previous approaches. We evaluate our method on the MAHNOB HCI dataset and found that the proposed method is able to outperform previous approaches.

abstract_zh: 从面部视频估计心率在医疗和健身行业有许多应用。此外，它在游戏领域也变得有用。已经提出了几种方法来从面部视频中无缝获取心率，但这些方法在处理运动和照明伪影方面存在问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用用户光谱反射率的可靠 HR 估计框架，这使得它对运动和照明干扰具有鲁棒性。我们采用基于深度学习的框架（例如 Faster RCNN）来执行人脸检测，而不是之前方法所采用的 Viola Jones 算法。我们在 MAHNOB HCI 数据集上评估我们的方法，发现所提出的方法能够优于以前的方法。从面部视频估计心率在医疗和健身行业有许多应用。此外，它在游戏领域也变得有用。已经提出了几种方法来从面部视频中无缝获取心率，但这些方法在处理运动和照明伪影方面存在问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用用户光谱反射率的可靠 HR 估计框架，这使得它对运动和照明干扰具有鲁棒性。我们采用基于深度学习的框架（例如 Faster RCNN）来执行人脸检测，而不是之前方法所采用的 Viola-Jones 算法。我们在 MAHNOB HCI 数据集上评估我们的方法，发现所提出的方法能够优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RGB面部视频和光谱反射率的可靠心率估计框架。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理运动和光照干扰时存在不足，需更鲁棒的解决方案以提升医疗、健身及游戏领域的应用效果。
AI.method: 采用深度学习框架（如Faster RCNN）进行人脸检测，结合光谱反射率分析以增强抗干扰能力。
AI.result: 在MAHNOB HCI数据集上验证，该方法优于传统Viola-Jones算法的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 光谱反射率与深度学习结合的框架有效提升了心率估计的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Weimin Lyu,Songzhu Zheng,Tengfei Ma,Haibin Ling,Chao Chen
title: Attention Hijacking in Trojan Transformers
title_zh: 变形金刚木马注意力劫持
abstract: Trojan attacks pose a severe threat to AI systems. Recent works on Transformer models received explosive popularity and the self-attentions are now indisputable. This raises a central question: Can we reveal the Trojans through attention mechanisms in BERTs and ViTs? In this paper, we investigate the attention hijacking pattern in Trojan AIs, \ie, the trigger token ``kidnaps'' the attention weights when a specific trigger is present. We observe the consistent attention hijacking pattern in Trojan Transformers from both Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Computer Vision (CV) domains. This intriguing property helps us to understand the Trojan mechanism in BERTs and ViTs. We also propose an Attention-Hijacking Trojan Detector (AHTD) to discriminate the Trojan AIs from the clean ones.
summary: Trojan attacks pose a severe threat to AI systems. Recent works on Transformer models received explosive popularity and the self-attentions are now indisputable. This raises a central question: Can we reveal the Trojans through attention mechanisms in BERTs and ViTs? In this paper, we investigate the attention hijacking pattern in Trojan AIs, \ie, the trigger token ``kidnaps'' the attention weights when a specific trigger is present. We observe the consistent attention hijacking pattern in Trojan Transformers from both Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Computer Vision (CV) domains. This intriguing property helps us to understand the Trojan mechanism in BERTs and ViTs. We also propose an Attention-Hijacking Trojan Detector (AHTD) to discriminate the Trojan AIs from the clean ones.
abstract_zh: 木马攻击对人工智能系统构成严重威胁。最近关于 Transformer 模型的作品受到了爆炸性的欢迎，其自我关注度现已无可争议。这就提出了一个核心问题：我们能否通过 BERT 和 ViT 中的注意力机制来揭示木马？在本文中，我们研究了木马人工智能中的注意力劫持模式，即当存在特定触发器时，触发令牌“绑架”注意力权重。我们从自然语言处理（NLP）和计算机视觉（CV）领域观察到特洛伊木马 Transformer 中一致的注意力劫持模式。这个有趣的特性有助于我们理解 BERT 和 ViT 中的木马机制。我们还提出了一种注意力劫持木马检测器（AHTD）来区分木马 AI 和干净的 AI。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了特洛伊Transformer模型中的注意力劫持现象，并提出了一种基于注意力机制的特洛伊检测方法AHTD。
AI.motivation: 特洛伊攻击对AI系统构成严重威胁，而Transformer模型的自注意力机制可能被恶意利用，需探索通过注意力模式识别特洛伊模型的新方法。
AI.method: 通过分析触发词对注意力权重的劫持模式，观察NLP和CV领域特洛伊模型的注意力异常特征，并设计AHTD检测器进行分类判别。
AI.result: 验证了特洛伊Transformer存在注意力劫持的共性特征，AHTD检测器在区分特洛伊模型与干净模型上表现出有效性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了特洛伊Transformer的注意力劫持机制，提出的AHTD方法为检测模型后门提供了新思路和实用工具。

ai_content.result: 验证了特洛伊Transformer存在注意力劫持的共性特征，AHTD检测器在区分特洛伊模型与干净模型上表现出有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 揭示了特洛伊Transformer的注意力劫持机制，提出的AHTD方法为检测模型后门提供了新思路和实用工具。

search_text: Attention Hijacking in Trojan Transformers 变形金刚木马注意力劫持 Trojan attacks pose a severe threat to AI systems. Recent works on Transformer models received explosive popularity and the self-attentions are now indisputable. This raises a central question: Can we reveal the Trojans through attention mechanisms in BERTs and ViTs? In this paper, we investigate the attention hijacking pattern in Trojan AIs, \ie, the trigger token ``kidnaps'' the attention weights when a specific trigger is present. We observe the consistent attention hijacking pattern in Trojan Transformers from both Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Computer Vision (CV) domains. This intriguing property helps us to understand the Trojan mechanism in BERTs and ViTs. We also propose an Attention-Hijacking Trojan Detector (AHTD) to discriminate the Trojan AIs from the clean ones. 木马攻击对人工智能系统构成严重威胁。最近关于 Transformer 模型的作品受到了爆炸性的欢迎，其自我关注度现已无可争议。这就提出了一个核心问题：我们能否通过 BERT 和 ViT 中的注意力机制来揭示木马？在本文中，我们研究了木马人工智能中的注意力劫持模式，即当存在特定触发器时，触发令牌“绑架”注意力权重。我们从自然语言处理（NLP）和计算机视觉（CV）领域观察到特洛伊木马 Transformer 中一致的注意力劫持模式。这个有趣的特性有助于我们理解 BERT 和 ViT 中的木马机制。我们还提出了一种注意力劫持木马检测器（AHTD）来区分木马 AI 和干净的 AI。 本文研究了特洛伊Transformer模型中的注意力劫持现象，并提出了一种基于注意力机制的特洛伊检测方法AHTD。 Weimin Lyu,Songzhu Zheng,Tengfei Ma,Haibin Ling,Chao Chen cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Haleh Akrami,Wenhui Cui,Anand A Joshi,Richard M. Leahy
title: Learning from imperfect training data using a robust loss function: application to brain image segmentation
title_zh: 使用稳健的损失函数从不完美的训练数据中学习：在大脑图像分割中的应用
comment: 2 pages short paper. Please see https://github.com/ajoshiusc/brainseg for the source code
comments: 2 pages short paper. Please see https://github.com/ajoshiusc/brainseg for the source code
abstract: Segmentation is one of the most important tasks in MRI medical image analysis and is often the first and the most critical step in many clinical applications. In brain MRI analysis, head segmentation is commonly used for measuring and visualizing the brain's anatomical structures and is also a necessary step for other applications such as current-source reconstruction in electroencephalography and magnetoencephalography (EEG/MEG). Here we propose a deep learning framework that can segment brain, skull, and extra-cranial tissue using only T1-weighted MRI as input. In addition, we describe a robust method for training the model in the presence of noisy labels.
summary: Segmentation is one of the most important tasks in MRI medical image analysis and is often the first and the most critical step in many clinical applications. In brain MRI analysis, head segmentation is commonly used for measuring and visualizing the brain's anatomical structures and is also a necessary step for other applications such as current-source reconstruction in electroencephalography and magnetoencephalography (EEG/MEG). Here we propose a deep learning framework that can segment brain, skull, and extra-cranial tissue using only T1-weighted MRI as input. In addition, we describe a robust method for training the model in the presence of noisy labels.
abstract_zh: 分割是 MRI 医学图像分析中最重要的任务之一，并且通常是许多临床应用中的第一步也是最关键的步骤。在脑 MRI 分析中，头部分割通常用于测量和可视化大脑的解剖结构，也是脑电图和脑磁图 (EEG/MEG) 中的电流源重建等其他应用的必要步骤。在这里，我们提出了一种深度学习框架，可以仅使用 T1 加权 MRI 作为输入来分割大脑、颅骨和颅外组织。此外，我们描述了一种在存在噪声标签的情况下训练模型的稳健方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度学习框架，用于在存在噪声标签的情况下对脑部MRI图像进行分割，并仅使用T1加权MRI作为输入。
AI.motivation: 脑MRI分割是临床应用中的关键步骤，但训练数据中的噪声标签会影响模型性能，需开发鲁棒方法应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 设计了一种鲁棒损失函数，结合深度学习框架处理噪声标签，并仅依赖T1加权MRI进行脑、颅骨和颅外组织的分割。
AI.result: 该方法成功实现了脑MRI的准确分割，并在噪声标签存在的情况下表现出优于传统方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过鲁棒损失函数有效处理噪声标签，提升了脑图像分割的准确性，为临床应用提供了可靠工具。

title: Multi-Depth Boundary-Aware Left Atrial Scar Segmentation Network
title_zh: 多深度边界感知左心房疤痕分割网络
abstract: Automatic segmentation of left atrial (LA) scars from late gadolinium enhanced CMR images is a crucial step for atrial fibrillation (AF) recurrence analysis. However, delineating LA scars is tedious and error-prone due to the variation of scar shapes. In this work, we propose a boundary-aware LA scar segmentation network, which is composed of two branches to segment LA and LA scars, respectively. We explore the inherent spatial relationship between LA and LA scars. By introducing a Sobel fusion module between the two segmentation branches, the spatial information of LA boundaries can be propagated from the LA branch to the scar branch. Thus, LA scar segmentation can be performed condition on the LA boundaries regions. In our experiments, 40 labeled images were used to train the proposed network, and the remaining 20 labeled images were used for evaluation. The network achieved an average Dice score of 0.608 for LA scar segmentation.
summary: Automatic segmentation of left atrial (LA) scars from late gadolinium enhanced CMR images is a crucial step for atrial fibrillation (AF) recurrence analysis. However, delineating LA scars is tedious and error-prone due to the variation of scar shapes. In this work, we propose a boundary-aware LA scar segmentation network, which is composed of two branches to segment LA and LA scars, respectively. We explore the inherent spatial relationship between LA and LA scars. By introducing a Sobel fusion module between the two segmentation branches, the spatial information of LA boundaries can be propagated from the LA branch to the scar branch. Thus, LA scar segmentation can be performed condition on the LA boundaries regions. In our experiments, 40 labeled images were used to train the proposed network, and the remaining 20 labeled images were used for evaluation. The network achieved an average Dice score of 0.608 for LA scar segmentation.
abstract_zh: 从晚期钆增强 CMR 图像中自动分割左心房 (LA) 疤痕是心房颤动 (AF) 复发分析的关键步骤。然而，由于疤痕形状的变化，描绘 LA 疤痕既繁琐又容易出错。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种边界感知的 LA 疤痕分割网络，它由两个分支组成，分别用于分割 LA 和 LA 疤痕。我们探索 LA 和 LA 疤痕之间固有的空间关系。通过在两个分割分支之间引入Sobel融合模块，LA边界的空间信息可以从LA分支传播到scar分支。因此，可以在 LA 边界区域的条件下执行 LA 疤痕分割。在我们的实验中，使用 40 张标记图像来训练所提出的网络，其余 20 张标记图像用于评估。该网络在 LA 疤痕分割方面的平均 Dice 得分为 0.608。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多深度边界感知的左心房瘢痕分割网络，用于从延迟钆增强心脏磁共振图像中自动分割左心房瘢痕，以辅助心房颤动复发分析。
AI.motivation: 左心房瘢痕的形状变化大，手动分割耗时且易出错，现有方法难以准确捕捉瘢痕与左心房边界的空间关系，需改进分割精度。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络分别分割左心房和瘢痕，通过引入Sobel融合模块将左心房边界的空间信息从左心房分支传递至瘢痕分支，利用边界感知机制提升分割准确性。
AI.result: 在40张训练图像和20张测试图像的实验中，该网络实现左心房瘢痕分割的平均Dice得分为0.608。
AI.conclusion: 边界感知机制有效提升了瘢痕分割性能，但Dice得分仍有提升空间，未来可进一步优化网络结构或引入更多先验信息。

authors_text: Xi Jia,Joseph Bartlett,Tianyang Zhang,Wenqi Lu,Zhaowen Qiu,Jinming Duan
title: U-Net vs Transformer: Is U-Net Outdated in Medical Image Registration?
title_zh: U-Net 与 Transformer：U-Net 在医学图像配准方面是否已经过时？
abstract: Due to their extreme long-range modeling capability, vision transformer-based networks have become increasingly popular in deformable image registration. We believe, however, that the receptive field of a 5-layer convolutional U-Net is sufficient to capture accurate deformations without needing long-range dependencies. The purpose of this study is therefore to investigate whether U-Net-based methods are outdated compared to modern transformer-based approaches when applied to medical image registration. For this, we propose a large kernel U-Net (LKU-Net) by embedding a parallel convolutional block to a vanilla U-Net in order to enhance the effective receptive field. On the public 3D IXI brain dataset for atlas-based registration, we show that the performance of the vanilla U-Net is already comparable with that of state-of-the-art transformer-based networks (such as TransMorph), and that the proposed LKU-Net outperforms TransMorph by using only 1.12% of its parameters and 10.8% of its mult-adds operations. We further evaluate LKU-Net on a MICCAI Learn2Reg 2021 challenge dataset for inter-subject registration, our LKU-Net also outperforms TransMorph on this dataset and ranks first on the public leaderboard as of the submission of this work. With only modest modifications to the vanilla U-Net, we show that U-Net can outperform transformer-based architectures on inter-subject and atlas-based 3D medical image registration. Code is available at https://github.com/xi-jia/LKU-Net.
summary: Due to their extreme long-range modeling capability, vision transformer-based networks have become increasingly popular in deformable image registration. We believe, however, that the receptive field of a 5-layer convolutional U-Net is sufficient to capture accurate deformations without needing long-range dependencies. The purpose of this study is therefore to investigate whether U-Net-based methods are outdated compared to modern transformer-based approaches when applied to medical image registration. For this, we propose a large kernel U-Net (LKU-Net) by embedding a parallel convolutional block to a vanilla U-Net in order to enhance the effective receptive field. On the public 3D IXI brain dataset for atlas-based registration, we show that the performance of the vanilla U-Net is already comparable with that of state-of-the-art transformer-based networks (such as TransMorph), and that the proposed LKU-Net outperforms TransMorph by using only 1.12% of its parameters and 10.8% of its mult-adds operations. We further evaluate LKU-Net on a MICCAI Learn2Reg 2021 challenge dataset for inter-subject registration, our LKU-Net also outperforms TransMorph on this dataset and ranks first on the public leaderboard as of the submission of this work. With only modest modifications to the vanilla U-Net, we show that U-Net can outperform transformer-based architectures on inter-subject and atlas-based 3D medical image registration. Code is available at https://github.com/xi-jia/LKU-Net.
abstract_zh: 由于其极端的远程建模能力，基于视觉变换器的网络在可变形图像配准中变得越来越流行。然而，我们相信 5 层卷积 U-Net 的感受野足以捕获准确的变形，而不需要长程依赖。因此，本研究的目的是调查在应用于医学图像配准时，与现代基于 Transformer 的方法相比，基于 U-Net 的方法是否已经过时。为此，我们提出了一个大内核 U-Net（LKU-Net），通过将并行卷积块嵌入到普通 U-Net 中来增强有效感受野。在用于基于图集的配准的公共 3D IXI 大脑数据集上，我们表明普通 U-Net 的性能已经可以与最先进的基于 Transformer 的网络（例如 TransMorph）相媲美，并且所提出的 LKU-Net 仅使用 1.12% 的参数和 10.8% 的多加操作，从而优于 TransMorph。我们进一步在 MICCAI Learn2Reg 2021 受试者间注册挑战数据集上评估 LKU-Net，我们的 LKU-Net 在此数据集上也优于 TransMorph，并在提交这项工作时在公共排行榜上排名第一。只需对普通 U-Net 进行适度修改，我们就可以证明 U-Net 在主体间和基于图谱的 3D 医学图像配准方面优于基于 Transformer 的架构。代码可在 https://github.com/xi-jia/LKU-Net 获取。

search_text: U-Net vs Transformer: Is U-Net Outdated in Medical Image Registration? U-Net 与 Transformer：U-Net 在医学图像配准方面是否已经过时？ Due to their extreme long-range modeling capability, vision transformer-based networks have become increasingly popular in deformable image registration. We believe, however, that the receptive field of a 5-layer convolutional U-Net is sufficient to capture accurate deformations without needing long-range dependencies. The purpose of this study is therefore to investigate whether U-Net-based methods are outdated compared to modern transformer-based approaches when applied to medical image registration. For this, we propose a large kernel U-Net (LKU-Net) by embedding a parallel convolutional block to a vanilla U-Net in order to enhance the effective receptive field. On the public 3D IXI brain dataset for atlas-based registration, we show that the performance of the vanilla U-Net is already comparable with that of state-of-the-art transformer-based networks (such as TransMorph), and that the proposed LKU-Net outperforms TransMorph by using only 1.12% of its parameters and 10.8% of its mult-adds operations. We further evaluate LKU-Net on a MICCAI Learn2Reg 2021 challenge dataset for inter-subject registration, our LKU-Net also outperforms TransMorph on this dataset and ranks first on the public leaderboard as of the submission of this work. With only modest modifications to the vanilla U-Net, we show that U-Net can outperform transformer-based architectures on inter-subject and atlas-based 3D medical image registration. Code is available at https://github.com/xi-jia/LKU-Net. 由于其极端的远程建模能力，基于视觉变换器的网络在可变形图像配准中变得越来越流行。然而，我们相信 5 层卷积 U-Net 的感受野足以捕获准确的变形，而不需要长程依赖。因此，本研究的目的是调查在应用于医学图像配准时，与现代基于 Transformer 的方法相比，基于 U-Net 的方法是否已经过时。为此，我们提出了一个大内核 U-Net（LKU-Net），通过将并行卷积块嵌入到普通 U-Net 中来增强有效感受野。在用于基于图集的配准的公共 3D IXI 大脑数据集上，我们表明普通 U-Net 的性能已经可以与最先进的基于 Transformer 的网络（例如 TransMorph）相媲美，并且所提出的 LKU-Net 仅使用 1.12% 的参数和 10.8% 的多加操作，从而优于 TransMorph。我们进一步在 MICCAI Learn2Reg 2021 受试者间注册挑战数据集上评估 LKU-Net，我们的 LKU-Net 在此数据集上也优于 TransMorph，并在提交这项工作时在公共排行榜上排名第一。只需对普通 U-Net 进行适度修改，我们就可以证明 U-Net 在主体间和基于图谱的 3D 医学图像配准方面优于基于 Transformer 的架构。代码可在 https://github.com/xi-jia/LKU-Net 获取。 本文比较了U-Net与Transformer在医学图像配准中的性能，探讨U-Net是否已被淘汰。 Xi Jia,Joseph Bartlett,Tianyang Zhang,Wenqi Lu,Zhaowen Qiu,Jinming Duan eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Young women's cognition of commercial digital signage in shopping malls: A situated action approach
title_zh: 年轻女性对商场商业数字标牌的认知：情境行动方法
comment: A previous version of the paper was presented in June 2016 at the 66th Annual Conference of the International Communication Association, Fukuoka, Japan
comments: A previous version of the paper was presented in June 2016 at the 66th Annual Conference of the International Communication Association, Fukuoka, Japan
abstract: Existing literature on digital signage is growing but has not always emphasized the cognitive processes of the audience. This research aims to address this gap by studying how young women in Singapore cognize commercial digital signage in shopping malls and what cause them to do so. Using cognitive ethnography and taking the situated action approach, our findings suggest a comprehensive list of factors, both external and internal, that influence young women's cognition of commercial digital signage in both positive and negative ways. The research's practical implications are discussed.
summary: Existing literature on digital signage is growing but has not always emphasized the cognitive processes of the audience. This research aims to address this gap by studying how young women in Singapore cognize commercial digital signage in shopping malls and what cause them to do so. Using cognitive ethnography and taking the situated action approach, our findings suggest a comprehensive list of factors, both external and internal, that influence young women's cognition of commercial digital signage in both positive and negative ways. The research's practical implications are discussed.
abstract_zh: 关于数字标牌的现有文献正在不断增长，但并不总是强调观众的认知过程。本研究旨在通过研究新加坡年轻女性如何认知购物中心的商业数字标牌以及导致她们这样做的原因来解决这一差距。使用认知民族志并采取情景行动方法，我们的研究结果提出了一系列外部和内部因素，这些因素以积极和消极的方式影响年轻女性对商业数字标牌的认知。讨论了该研究的实际意义。

AI.tldr: 本文通过情境行动方法研究新加坡商场中年轻女性对商业数字标牌的认知过程及影响因素。
AI.motivation: 现有数字标牌研究未充分关注受众认知过程，需填补这一研究空白以理解年轻女性的认知机制。
AI.method: 采用认知民族志方法，结合情境行动理论进行实证分析。
AI.result: 发现内外部因素共同影响年轻女性对数字标牌的正负面认知，包括环境、个人特质及互动情境等。
AI.conclusion: 研究为数字标牌设计及商场营销策略提供了基于认知因素的实践启示。

title: Co-lexicographically Ordering Automata and Regular Languages -- Part I
title_zh: 字典序自动机和正则语言——第一部分
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.02309
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.02309
abstract: In the present work, we lay out a new theory showing that all automata can always be co-lexicographically partially ordered, and an intrinsic measure of their complexity can be defined and effectively determined, namely, the minimum width $p$ of one of their admissible co-lex partial orders - dubbed here the automaton's co-lex width. We first show that this new measure captures at once the complexity of several seemingly-unrelated hard problems on automata. Any NFA of co-lex width $p$: (i) has an equivalent powerset DFA whose size is exponential in $p$ rather than (as a classic analysis shows) in the NFA's size; (ii) can be encoded using just $Θ(\log p)$ bits per transition; (iii) admits a linear-space data structure solving regular expression matching queries in time proportional to $p^2$ per matched character. Some consequences of this new parametrization of automata are that PSPACE-hard problems such as NFA equivalence are FPT in $p$, and quadratic lower bounds for the regular expression matching problem do not hold for sufficiently small $p$. We prove that a canonical minimum-width DFA accepting a language $\mathcal L$ - dubbed the Hasse automaton $\mathcal H$ of $\mathcal L$ - can be exhibited. Finally, we explore the relationship between two conflicting objectives: minimizing the width and minimizing the number of states of a DFA. In this context, we provide an analogous of the Myhill-Nerode Theorem for co-lexicographically ordered regular languages.
summary: In the present work, we lay out a new theory showing that all automata can always be co-lexicographically partially ordered, and an intrinsic measure of their complexity can be defined and effectively determined, namely, the minimum width $p$ of one of their admissible co-lex partial orders - dubbed here the automaton's co-lex width. We first show that this new measure captures at once the complexity of several seemingly-unrelated hard problems on automata. Any NFA of co-lex width $p$: (i) has an equivalent powerset DFA whose size is exponential in $p$ rather than (as a classic analysis shows) in the NFA's size; (ii) can be encoded using just $Θ(\log p)$ bits per transition; (iii) admits a linear-space data structure solving regular expression matching queries in time proportional to $p^2$ per matched character. Some consequences of this new parametrization of automata are that PSPACE-hard problems such as NFA equivalence are FPT in $p$, and quadratic lower bounds for the regular expression matching problem do not hold for sufficiently small $p$. We prove that a canonical minimum-width DFA accepting a language $\mathcal L$ - dubbed the Hasse automaton $\mathcal H$ of $\mathcal L$ - can be exhibited. Finally, we explore the relationship between two conflicting objectives: minimizing the width and minimizing the number of states of a DFA. In this context, we provide an analogous of the Myhill-Nerode Theorem for co-lexicographically ordered regular languages.
abstract_zh: 在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种新的理论，表明所有自动机总是可以按字典顺序部分排序，并且可以定义并有效确定其复杂性的内在度量，即它们可接受的 co-lex 偏序之一的最小宽度 $p$ - 这里称为自动机的 co-lex 宽度。我们首先证明，这种新方法可以立即捕获自动机上几个看似无关的难题的复杂性。任何 co-lex 宽度 $p$ 的 NFA： (i) 具有等效的幂集 DFA，其大小以 $p$ 为指数，而不是（如经典分析所示）以 NFA 的大小呈指数； (ii) 每次转换仅使用 $ θ(\log p)$ 位进行编码； (iii) 承认线性空间数据结构解决正则表达式匹配查询的时间与每个匹配字符 $p^2$ 成正比。这种新的自动机参数化的一些后果是 PSPACE 难题（例如 NFA 等价）在 $p$ 中是 FPT，并且正则表达式匹配问题的二次下界对于足够小的 $p$ 不成立。我们证明可以展示接受语言 $\mathcal L$（称为 $\mathcal L$ 的哈斯自动机 $\mathcal H$）的规范最小宽度 DFA。最后，我们探讨两个相互冲突的目标之间的关系：最小化 DFA 的宽度和最小化状态数量。在这种情况下，我们为按字典顺序排序的正则语言提供了类似于 Myhill-Nerode 定理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自动机复杂度度量方法——co-lex宽度，并探讨其在自动机理论中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统自动机复杂度分析存在局限性，难以有效处理NFA到DFA转换、正则表达式匹配等难题，需寻找新的参数化方法。
AI.method: 定义自动机的co-lex宽度为最小可接受co-lex偏序的宽度，通过理论分析和构造Hasse自动机，研究其对复杂度问题的影响。
AI.result: 证明co-lex宽度可使NFA转换为指数大小的DFA、实现高效编码和查询结构，且PSPACE难问题在该参数下变为FPT问题。
AI.conclusion: co-lex宽度为自动机复杂度提供了新视角，揭示了状态数与宽度之间的权衡关系，并扩展了Myhill-Nerode定理的应用范围。

result: 证明co-lex宽度可使NFA转换为指数大小的DFA、实现高效编码和查询结构，且PSPACE难问题在该参数下变为FPT问题。
conclusion: co-lex宽度为自动机复杂度提供了新视角，揭示了状态数与宽度之间的权衡关系，并扩展了Myhill-Nerode定理的应用范围。
search_text: Co-lexicographically Ordering Automata and Regular Languages -- Part I 字典序自动机和正则语言——第一部分 In the present work, we lay out a new theory showing that all automata can always be co-lexicographically partially ordered, and an intrinsic measure of their complexity can be defined and effectively determined, namely, the minimum width $p$ of one of their admissible co-lex partial orders - dubbed here the automaton's co-lex width. We first show that this new measure captures at once the complexity of several seemingly-unrelated hard problems on automata. Any NFA of co-lex width $p$: (i) has an equivalent powerset DFA whose size is exponential in $p$ rather than (as a classic analysis shows) in the NFA's size; (ii) can be encoded using just $Θ(\log p)$ bits per transition; (iii) admits a linear-space data structure solving regular expression matching queries in time proportional to $p^2$ per matched character. Some consequences of this new parametrization of automata are that PSPACE-hard problems such as NFA equivalence are FPT in $p$, and quadratic lower bounds for the regular expression matching problem do not hold for sufficiently small $p$. We prove that a canonical minimum-width DFA accepting a language $\mathcal L$ - dubbed the Hasse automaton $\mathcal H$ of $\mathcal L$ - can be exhibited. Finally, we explore the relationship between two conflicting objectives: minimizing the width and minimizing the number of states of a DFA. In this context, we provide an analogous of the Myhill-Nerode Theorem for co-lexicographically ordered regular languages. 在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种新的理论，表明所有自动机总是可以按字典顺序部分排序，并且可以定义并有效确定其复杂性的内在度量，即它们可接受的 co-lex 偏序之一的最小宽度 $p$ - 这里称为自动机的 co-lex 宽度。我们首先证明，这种新方法可以立即捕获自动机上几个看似无关的难题的复杂性。任何 co-lex 宽度 $p$ 的 NFA： (i) 具有等效的幂集 DFA，其大小以 $p$ 为指数，而不是（如经典分析所示）以 NFA 的大小呈指数； (ii) 每次转换仅使用 $ θ(\log p)$ 位进行编码； (iii) 承认线性空间数据结构解决正则表达式匹配查询的时间与每个匹配字符 $p^2$ 成正比。这种新的自动机参数化的一些后果是 PSPACE 难题（例如 NFA 等价）在 $p$ 中是 FPT，并且正则表达式匹配问题的二次下界对于足够小的 $p$ 不成立。我们证明可以展示接受语言 $\mathcal L$（称为 $\mathcal L$ 的哈斯自动机 $\mathcal H$）的规范最小宽度 DFA。最后，我们探讨两个相互冲突的目标之间的关系：最小化 DFA 的宽度和最小化状态数量。在这种情况下，我们为按字典顺序排序的正则语言提供了类似于 Myhill-Nerode 定理。 本文提出了一种新的自动机复杂度度量方法——co-lex宽度，并探讨其在自动机理论中的应用。 Nicola Cotumaccio,Giovanna D'Agostino,Alberto Policriti,Nicola Prezza cs.FL,cs.DS

authors_text: Antonis Manousis,Zhuo Cheng,Ran Ben Basat,Zaoxing Liu,Vyas Sekar
title: Enabling Efficient and General Subpopulation Analytics in Multidimensional Data Streams
title_zh: 在多维数据流中实现高效、通用的子群体分析
abstract: Today's large-scale services (e.g., video streaming platforms, data centers, sensor grids) need diverse real-time summary statistics across multiple subpopulations of multidimensional datasets. However, state-of-the-art frameworks do not offer general and accurate analytics in real time at reasonable costs. The root cause is the combinatorial explosion of data subpopulations and the diversity of summary statistics we need to monitor simultaneously. We present Hydra, an efficient framework for multidimensional analytics that presents a novel combination of using a ``sketch of sketches'' to avoid the overhead of monitoring exponentially-many subpopulations and universal sketching to ensure accurate estimates for multiple statistics. We build Hydra as an Apache Spark plugin and address practical system challenges to minimize overheads at scale. Across multiple real-world and synthetic multidimensional datasets, we show that Hydra can achieve robust error bounds and is an order of magnitude more efficient in terms of operational cost and memory footprint than existing frameworks (e.g., Spark, Druid) while ensuring interactive estimation times.
summary: Today's large-scale services (e.g., video streaming platforms, data centers, sensor grids) need diverse real-time summary statistics across multiple subpopulations of multidimensional datasets. However, state-of-the-art frameworks do not offer general and accurate analytics in real time at reasonable costs. The root cause is the combinatorial explosion of data subpopulations and the diversity of summary statistics we need to monitor simultaneously. We present Hydra, an efficient framework for multidimensional analytics that presents a novel combination of using a ``sketch of sketches'' to avoid the overhead of monitoring exponentially-many subpopulations and universal sketching to ensure accurate estimates for multiple statistics. We build Hydra as an Apache Spark plugin and address practical system challenges to minimize overheads at scale. Across multiple real-world and synthetic multidimensional datasets, we show that Hydra can achieve robust error bounds and is an order of magnitude more efficient in terms of operational cost and memory footprint than existing frameworks (e.g., Spark, Druid) while ensuring interactive estimation times.
abstract_zh: 当今的大规模服务（例如视频流平台、数据中心、传感器网格）需要跨多维数据集的多个子群体的多样化实时汇总统计。然而，最先进的框架无法以合理的成本实时提供通用且准确的分析。根本原因是数据子群体的组合爆炸以及我们需要同时监控的汇总统计数据的多样性。我们提出了 Hydra，这是一种高效的多维分析框架，它提出了一种新颖的组合，使用“草图的草图”来避免监控指数级众多的子群体和通用草图的开销，以确保对多个统计数据的准确估计。我们将 Hydra 构建为 Apache Spark 插件，并解决实际的系统挑战，以最大程度地减少开销。在多个现实世界和合成多维数据集中，我们表明 Hydra 可以实现稳健的误差范围，并且在运营成本和内存占用方面比现有框架（例如 Spark、Druid）效率高一个数量级，同时确保交互式估计时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hydra的高效框架，用于在多维数据流中实现通用子群体分析。
AI.motivation: 现有框架无法在合理成本下实时处理多维数据流中大量子群体的多样化统计需求，主要受限于子群体组合爆炸和统计多样性带来的计算开销。
AI.method: 通过结合'草图的草图'（sketch of sketches）技术减少子群体监控开销，并采用通用草图技术保证多统计指标的准确性，将Hydra实现为Apache Spark插件以优化大规模系统性能。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据集上，Hydra相比Spark和Druid等现有框架，在操作成本和内存占用上提升一个数量级，同时保持交互式估计时间和稳健误差范围。
AI.conclusion: Hydra通过创新的草图组合方法有效解决了多维数据流子群体分析的效率与准确性矛盾，为大规模实时分析提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Weihong Lin,Zheng Sun,Chixiang Ma,Mingze Li,Jiawei Wang,Lei Sun,Qiang Huo
title: TSRFormer: Table Structure Recognition with Transformers
title_zh: TSRFormer：使用 Transformer 进行表结构识别
abstract: We present a new table structure recognition (TSR) approach, called TSRFormer, to robustly recognizing the structures of complex tables with geometrical distortions from various table images. Unlike previous methods, we formulate table separation line prediction as a line regression problem instead of an image segmentation problem and propose a new two-stage DETR based separator prediction approach, dubbed \textbf{Sep}arator \textbf{RE}gression \textbf{TR}ansformer (SepRETR), to predict separation lines from table images directly. To make the two-stage DETR framework work efficiently and effectively for the separation line prediction task, we propose two improvements: 1) A prior-enhanced matching strategy to solve the slow convergence issue of DETR; 2) A new cross attention module to sample features from a high-resolution convolutional feature map directly so that high localization accuracy is achieved with low computational cost. After separation line prediction, a simple relation network based cell merging module is used to recover spanning cells. With these new techniques, our TSRFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark datasets, including SciTSR, PubTabNet and WTW. Furthermore, we have validated the robustness of our approach to tables with complex structures, borderless cells, large blank spaces, empty or spanning cells as well as distorted or even curved shapes on a more challenging real-world in-house dataset.
summary: We present a new table structure recognition (TSR) approach, called TSRFormer, to robustly recognizing the structures of complex tables with geometrical distortions from various table images. Unlike previous methods, we formulate table separation line prediction as a line regression problem instead of an image segmentation problem and propose a new two-stage DETR based separator prediction approach, dubbed \textbf{Sep}arator \textbf{RE}gression \textbf{TR}ansformer (SepRETR), to predict separation lines from table images directly. To make the two-stage DETR framework work efficiently and effectively for the separation line prediction task, we propose two improvements: 1) A prior-enhanced matching strategy to solve the slow convergence issue of DETR; 2) A new cross attention module to sample features from a high-resolution convolutional feature map directly so that high localization accuracy is achieved with low computational cost. After separation line prediction, a simple relation network based cell merging module is used to recover spanning cells. With these new techniques, our TSRFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark datasets, including SciTSR, PubTabNet and WTW. Furthermore, we have validated the robustness of our approach to tables with complex structures, borderless cells, large blank spaces, empty or spanning cells as well as distorted or even curved shapes on a more challenging real-world in-house dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的表格结构识别（TSR）方法，称为 TSRFormer，可以从各种表格图像中稳健地识别具有几何扭曲的复杂表格的结构。与之前的方法不同，我们将表格分隔线预测制定为线回归问题而不是图像分割问题，并提出了一种新的基于两阶段 DETR 的分隔符预测方法，称为 \textbf{Sep}arator \textbf{RE}gression \textbf{TR}ansformer (SepRETR)，直接从表格图像预测分隔线。为了使两阶段DETR框架高效且有效地工作于分隔线预测任务，我们提出了两项​​改进：1）先验增强匹配策略来解决DETR收敛速度慢的问题； 2）一种新的交叉注意模块，可以直接从高分辨率卷积特征图中采样特征，从而以较低的计算成本实现高定位精度。在分离线预测之后，使用基于简单关系网络的小区合并模块来恢复跨越小区。借助这些新技术，我们的 TSRFormer 在多个基准数据集（包括 SciTSR、PubTabNet 和 WTW）上实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们还在更具挑战性的真实内部数据集上验证了我们的方法对具有复杂结构、无边界单元、大空白、空单元或跨越单元以及扭曲甚至弯曲形状的表格的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的表格结构识别方法TSRFormer，用于鲁棒地识别包含几何畸变的复杂表格结构。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过图像分割预测表格分离线存在精度不足的问题，本文旨在通过回归方法直接预测分离线并提升复杂表格的识别鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段DETR框架SepRETR，包含先验增强匹配策略与跨注意力模块，结合关系网络实现单元格合并，直接回归分离线位置并处理跨行/跨列单元格。
AI.result: 在SciTSR、PubTabNet和WTW等基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，并在包含无边框单元格、大空白区域等复杂结构的内部数据集验证了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TSRFormer通过创新的分离线回归方法和高效特征采样机制，显著提升了复杂表格结构识别的准确性与计算效率。

Furthermore, we have validated the robustness of our approach to tables with complex structures, borderless cells, large blank spaces, empty or spanning cells as well as distorted or even curved shapes on a more challenging real-world in-house dataset. 我们提出了一种新的表格结构识别（TSR）方法，称为 TSRFormer，可以从各种表格图像中稳健地识别具有几何扭曲的复杂表格的结构。与之前的方法不同，我们将表格分隔线预测制定为线回归问题而不是图像分割问题，并提出了一种新的基于两阶段 DETR 的分隔符预测方法，称为 \textbf{Sep}arator \textbf{RE}gression \textbf{TR}ansformer (SepRETR)，直接从表格图像预测分隔线。为了使两阶段DETR框架高效且有效地工作于分隔线预测任务，我们提出了两项​​改进：1）先验增强匹配策略来解决DETR收敛速度慢的问题； 2）一种新的交叉注意模块，可以直接从高分辨率卷积特征图中采样特征，从而以较低的计算成本实现高定位精度。在分离线预测之后，使用基于简单关系网络的小区合并模块来恢复跨越小区。借助这些新技术，我们的 TSRFormer 在多个基准数据集（包括 SciTSR、PubTabNet 和 WTW）上实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们还在更具挑战性的真实内部数据集上验证了我们的方法对具有复杂结构、无边界单元、大空白、空单元或跨越单元以及扭曲甚至弯曲形状的表格的稳健性。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的表格结构识别方法TSRFormer，用于鲁棒地识别包含几何畸变的复杂表格结构。 Weihong Lin,Zheng Sun,Chixiang Ma,Mingze Li,Jiawei Wang,Lei Sun,Qiang Huo cs.CV

authors_text: David Joon Ho,Narasimhan P. Agaram,Marc-Henri Jean,Stephanie D. Suser,Cynthia Chu,Chad M. Vanderbilt,Paul A. Meyers,Leonard H. Wexler,John H. Healey,Thomas J. Fuchs,Meera R. Hameed
title: Deep Learning-Based Objective and Reproducible Osteosarcoma Chemotherapy Response Assessment and Outcome Prediction
title_zh: 基于深度学习的客观且可重复的骨肉瘤化疗反应评估和结果预测
abstract: Osteosarcoma is the most common primary bone cancer whose standard treatment includes pre-operative chemotherapy followed by resection. Chemotherapy response is used for predicting prognosis and further management of patients. Necrosis is routinely assessed post-chemotherapy from histology slides on resection specimens where necrosis ratio is defined as the ratio of necrotic tumor to overall tumor. Patients with necrosis ratio >=90% are known to have better outcome. Manual microscopic review of necrosis ratio from multiple glass slides is semi-quantitative and can have intra- and inter-observer variability. We propose an objective and reproducible deep learning-based approach to estimate necrosis ratio with outcome prediction from scanned hematoxylin and eosin whole slide images. We collected 103 osteosarcoma cases with 3134 WSIs to train our deep learning model, to validate necrosis ratio assessment, and to evaluate outcome prediction. We trained Deep Multi-Magnification Network to segment multiple tissue subtypes including viable tumor and necrotic tumor in pixel-level and to calculate case-level necrosis ratio from multiple WSIs. We showed necrosis ratio estimated by our segmentation model highly correlates with necrosis ratio from pathology reports manually assessed by experts where mean absolute differences for Grades IV (100%), III (>=90%), and II (>=50% and <90%) necrosis response are 4.4%, 4.5%, and 17.8%, respectively. We successfully stratified patients to predict overall survival with p=10^-6 and progression-free survival with p=0.012. Our reproducible approach without variability enabled us to tune cutoff thresholds, specifically for our model and our data set, to 80% for OS and 60% for PFS. Our study indicates deep learning can support pathologists as an objective tool to analyze osteosarcoma from histology for assessing treatment response and predicting patient outcome.

We propose an objective and reproducible deep learning-based approach to estimate necrosis ratio with outcome prediction from scanned hematoxylin and eosin whole slide images. We trained Deep Multi-Magnification Network to segment multiple tissue subtypes including viable tumor and necrotic tumor in pixel-level and to calculate case-level necrosis ratio from multiple WSIs. We showed necrosis ratio estimated by our segmentation model highly correlates with necrosis ratio from pathology reports manually assessed by experts where mean absolute differences for Grades IV (100%), III (>=90%), and II (>=50% and <90%) necrosis response are 4.4%, 4.5%, and 17.8%, respectively. Our reproducible approach without variability enabled us to tune cutoff thresholds, specifically for our model and our data set, to 80% for OS and 60% for PFS. abstract_zh: 骨肉瘤是最常见的原发性骨癌，其标准治疗包括术前化疗和随后的切除。化疗反应用于预测患者的预后和进一步管理。化疗后通常通过切除标本的组织学载玻片评估坏死情况，其中坏死率定义为坏死肿瘤与整体肿瘤的比率。已知坏死率>=90%的患者有更好的结果。对多个载玻片的坏死率进行手动显微镜检查是半定量的，并且可能存在观察者内部和观察者之间的差异。我们提出了一种客观且可重复的基于深度学习的方法，通过扫描苏木精和伊红整个幻灯片图像的结果预测来估计坏死率。我们收集了具有 3134 个 WSI 的 103 例骨肉瘤病例来训练我们的深度学习模型，验证坏死率评估并评估结果预测。我们训练深度多放大网络来分割多种组织亚型，包括像素级的活肿瘤和坏死肿瘤，并根据多个 WSI 计算病例级坏死率。我们发现，分割模型估计的坏死率与专家手动评估的病理报告中的坏死率高度相关，其中 IV 级（100%）、III 级（>=90%）和 II 级（>=50% 和 <90%）坏死反应的平均绝对差异分别为 4.4%、4.5% 和 17.8%。我们成功对患者进行分层，预测总生存期（p=10^-6）和无进展生存期（p=0.012）。我们的无变异性的可重复方法使我们能够将截止阈值（特别是针对我们的模型和数据集）调整为 OS 的 80% 和 PFS 的 60%。我们的研究表明深度学习可以支持病理学家作为从组织学角度分析骨肉瘤的客观工具，以评估治疗反应和预测患者结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的方法，用于客观且可重复地评估骨肉瘤化疗反应并预测患者预后。
AI.motivation: 传统病理学家手动评估骨肉瘤坏死比例存在主观性和观察者差异，需开发客观量化工具以提高评估一致性与预测准确性。
AI.method: 训练多尺度深度网络分割全切片图像中的肿瘤组织类型（存活/坏死），计算病例级坏死比例，并基于3134张WSI数据验证模型性能。
AI.result: 模型估计坏死比例与人工评估差异分别为4.4%/4.5%/17.8%；成功区分总体生存率（p=10^-6）和无进展生存率（p=0.012），并优化出80%（OS）和60%（PFS）的预测阈值。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习可为病理学家提供客观工具，实现骨肉瘤治疗反应评估与预后预测的标准化和自动化。

authors_text: Dekun Wu,He Zhao,Xingce Bao,Richard P. Wildes
title: Sports Video Analysis on Large-Scale Data
title_zh: 海量数据的体育视频分析
abstract: This paper investigates the modeling of automated machine description on sports video, which has seen much progress recently. Nevertheless, state-of-the-art approaches fall quite short of capturing how human experts analyze sports scenes. There are several major reasons: (1) The used dataset is collected from non-official providers, which naturally creates a gap between models trained on those datasets and real-world applications; (2) previously proposed methods require extensive annotation efforts (i.e., player and ball segmentation at pixel level) on localizing useful visual features to yield acceptable results; (3) very few public datasets are available. In this paper, we propose a novel large-scale NBA dataset for Sports Video Analysis (NSVA) with a focus on captioning, to address the above challenges. We also design a unified approach to process raw videos into a stack of meaningful features with minimum labelling efforts, showing that cross modeling on such features using a transformer architecture leads to strong performance. In addition, we demonstrate the broad application of NSVA by addressing two additional tasks, namely fine-grained sports action recognition and salient player identification. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/jackwu502/NSVA.
summary: This paper investigates the modeling of automated machine description on sports video, which has seen much progress recently. Nevertheless, state-of-the-art approaches fall quite short of capturing how human experts analyze sports scenes. There are several major reasons: (1) The used dataset is collected from non-official providers, which naturally creates a gap between models trained on those datasets and real-world applications; (2) previously proposed methods require extensive annotation efforts (i.e., player and ball segmentation at pixel level) on localizing useful visual features to yield acceptable results; (3) very few public datasets are available. In this paper, we propose a novel large-scale NBA dataset for Sports Video Analysis (NSVA) with a focus on captioning, to address the above challenges. We also design a unified approach to process raw videos into a stack of meaningful features with minimum labelling efforts, showing that cross modeling on such features using a transformer architecture leads to strong performance. In addition, we demonstrate the broad application of NSVA by addressing two additional tasks, namely fine-grained sports action recognition and salient player identification. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/jackwu502/NSVA.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了体育视频自动化机器描述的建模，该模型最近取得了很大进展。然而，最先进的方法还远远不足以捕捉人类专家如何分析体育场景。主要原因有几个：（1）所使用的数据集是从非官方提供商收集的，这自然会在这些数据集上训练的模型与实际应用程序之间产生差距； （2）先前提出的方法需要大量的注释工作（即像素级的球员和球分割）来定位有用的视觉特征以产生可接受的结果； (3)可用的公共数据集很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的用于体育视频分析（NSVA）的大规模 NBA 数据集，重点关注字幕，以解决上述挑战。我们还设计了一种统一的方法，以最少的标记工作将原始视频处理为一堆有意义的特征，这表明使用变压器架构对这些特征进行交叉建模可以带来强大的性能。此外，我们通过解决两个额外的任务，即细粒度的体育动作识别和显着球员识别，展示了 NSVA 的广泛应用。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/jackwu502/NSVA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模NBA数据集NSVA及统一方法，用于解决体育视频分析中的自动描述、细粒度动作识别和关键球员识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因依赖非官方数据集、需大量像素级标注且公开数据稀缺，难以满足实际应用需求，亟需更高效且贴近真实场景的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含详细标注的NSVA数据集，并设计基于Transformer架构的跨模态特征融合模型，通过最小化标注工作量实现视频到语义特征的高效转换。
AI.result: 在体育视频描述生成、细粒度动作识别及关键球员定位任务中均取得优于现有方法的性能，且代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: NSVA数据集与跨模态Transformer方法有效解决了体育视频分析中的核心挑战，为后续研究提供了高质量基准与实用工具。

search_text: Sports Video Analysis on Large-Scale Data 海量数据的体育视频分析 This paper investigates the modeling of automated machine description on sports video, which has seen much progress recently. Nevertheless, state-of-the-art approaches fall quite short of capturing how human experts analyze sports scenes. There are several major reasons: (1) The used dataset is collected from non-official providers, which naturally creates a gap between models trained on those datasets and real-world applications; (2) previously proposed methods require extensive annotation efforts (i.e., player and ball segmentation at pixel level) on localizing useful visual features to yield acceptable results; (3) very few public datasets are available. In this paper, we propose a novel large-scale NBA dataset for Sports Video Analysis (NSVA) with a focus on captioning, to address the above challenges. We also design a unified approach to process raw videos into a stack of meaningful features with minimum labelling efforts, showing that cross modeling on such features using a transformer architecture leads to strong performance. In addition, we demonstrate the broad application of NSVA by addressing two additional tasks, namely fine-grained sports action recognition and salient player identification. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/jackwu502/NSVA. 本文研究了体育视频自动化机器描述的建模，该模型最近取得了很大进展。然而，最先进的方法还远远不足以捕捉人类专家如何分析体育场景。主要原因有几个：（1）所使用的数据集是从非官方提供商收集的，这自然会在这些数据集上训练的模型与实际应用程序之间产生差距； （2）先前提出的方法需要大量的注释工作（即像素级的球员和球分割）来定位有用的视觉特征以产生可接受的结果； (3)可用的公共数据集很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的用于体育视频分析（NSVA）的大规模 NBA 数据集，重点关注字幕，以解决上述挑战。我们还设计了一种统一的方法，以最少的标记工作将原始视频处理为一堆有意义的特征，这表明使用变压器架构对这些特征进行交叉建模可以带来强大的性能。此外，我们通过解决两个额外的任务，即细粒度的体育动作识别和显着球员识别，展示了 NSVA 的广泛应用。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/jackwu502/NSVA 获取。 本文提出一个大规模NBA数据集NSVA及统一方法，用于解决体育视频分析中的自动描述、细粒度动作识别和关键球员识别任务。 Dekun Wu,He Zhao,Xingce Bao,Richard P. Wildes cs.CV

title: Intrinsically Motivated Learning of Causal World Models
title_zh: 因果世界模型的内在动机学习
abstract: Despite the recent progress in deep learning and reinforcement learning, transfer and generalization of skills learned on specific tasks is very limited compared to human (or animal) intelligence. The lifelong, incremental building of common sense knowledge might be a necessary component on the way to achieve more general intelligence. A promising direction is to build world models capturing the true physical mechanisms hidden behind the sensorimotor interaction with the environment. Here we explore the idea that inferring the causal structure of the environment could benefit from well-chosen actions as means to collect relevant interventional data.
summary: Despite the recent progress in deep learning and reinforcement learning, transfer and generalization of skills learned on specific tasks is very limited compared to human (or animal) intelligence. The lifelong, incremental building of common sense knowledge might be a necessary component on the way to achieve more general intelligence. A promising direction is to build world models capturing the true physical mechanisms hidden behind the sensorimotor interaction with the environment. Here we explore the idea that inferring the causal structure of the environment could benefit from well-chosen actions as means to collect relevant interventional data.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习和强化学习最近取得了进展，但与人类（或动物）智力相比，在特定任务中学到的技能的迁移和泛化非常有限。终生、渐进地积累常识知识可能是实现更通用智力的必要组成部分。一个有前途的方向是建立世界模型，捕捉隐藏在感觉运动与环境相互作用背后的真实物理机制。在这里，我们探讨了这样的想法：推断环境的因果结构可以受益于精心选择的行动作为收集相关干预数据的手段。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过内在动机学习因果世界模型，以提升人工智能的迁移和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习和强化学习在跨任务迁移和泛化能力上远逊于人类，构建能捕捉环境物理机制的因果世界模型可能是实现通用智能的关键。
AI.method: 通过设计内在动机驱动的探索策略，选择性地执行干预性动作以收集因果关系数据，并据此构建世界模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升模型对环境因果结构的理解，增强跨任务迁移和泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于因果推理的世界模型结合内在动机机制，为实现更通用的人工智能提供了可行路径。

title: Localizing the conceptual difference of two scenes using deep learning for house keeping usages
title_zh: 使用深度学习来定位两个场景的概念差异以用于家政用途
abstract: Finding the conceptual difference between the two images in an industrial environment has been especially important for HSE purposes and there is still no reliable and conformable method to find the major differences to alert the related controllers. Due to the abundance and variety of objects in different environments, the use of supervised learning methods in this field is facing a major problem. Due to the sharp and even slight change in lighting conditions in the two scenes, it is not possible to naively subtract the two images in order to find these differences. The goal of this paper is to find and localize the conceptual differences of two frames of one scene but in two different times and classify the differences to addition, reduction and change in the field. In this paper, we demonstrate a comprehensive solution for this application by presenting the deep learning method and using transfer learning and structural modification of the error function, as well as a process for adding and synthesizing data. An appropriate data set was provided and labeled, and the model results were evaluated on this data set and the possibility of using it in real and industrial applications was explained.
summary: Finding the conceptual difference between the two images in an industrial environment has been especially important for HSE purposes and there is still no reliable and conformable method to find the major differences to alert the related controllers. Due to the abundance and variety of objects in different environments, the use of supervised learning methods in this field is facing a major problem. Due to the sharp and even slight change in lighting conditions in the two scenes, it is not possible to naively subtract the two images in order to find these differences. The goal of this paper is to find and localize the conceptual differences of two frames of one scene but in two different times and classify the differences to addition, reduction and change in the field. In this paper, we demonstrate a comprehensive solution for this application by presenting the deep learning method and using transfer learning and structural modification of the error function, as well as a process for adding and synthesizing data. An appropriate data set was provided and labeled, and the model results were evaluated on this data set and the possibility of using it in real and industrial applications was explained.
abstract_zh: 在工业环境中找到两个图像之间的概念差异对于 HSE 目的尤其重要，但仍然没有可靠且一致的方法来找到主要差异以向相关控制器发出警报。由于不同环境中对象的丰富性和多样性，监督学习方法在该领域的使用面临着一个重大问题。由于两个场景中光照条件的急剧甚至轻微的变化，不可能简单地减去两个图像来找到这些差异。本文的目标是找到并定位一个场景但在两个不同时间的两帧的概念差异，并将差异分类为场中的添加、减少和变化。在本文中，我们通过提出深度学习方法并使用迁移学习和误差函数的结构修改，以及添加和合成数据的过程，展示了该应用程序的全面解决方案。提供并标记了适当的数据集，并在此数据集上评估了模型结果，并解释了在实际和工业应用中使用它的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用深度学习方法定位并分类工业场景中两帧图像的概念差异，用于健康、安全与环境（HSE）管理。
AI.motivation: 工业环境中检测场景差异对HSE至关重要，但现有方法因光照变化和复杂背景难以可靠识别差异，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用深度学习结合迁移学习，修改误差函数结构，并通过数据增强与合成生成训练数据，构建标注数据集进行模型评估。
AI.result: 模型在数据集上有效定位差异并分类为添加、减少或变化，验证了其在工业场景中的实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的深度学习框架为工业场景差异检测提供了可靠方法，可推广至实际HSE监控与维护中。

authors_text: Hiroyasu Tsukamoto,Soon-Jo Chung,Yashwanth Kumar Nakka,Benjamin Donitz,Declan Mages,Michel Ingham
title: Neural-Rendezvous: Provably Robust Guidance and Control to Encounter Interstellar Objects
title_zh: 神经交会：可证明稳健的引导和控制来遭遇星际物体
comment: Preprint Version, Accepted: October, 2024 (One-minute YouTube summary: https://youtu.be/q3e0LYS2IYQ, DOI: https://doi.org/10.2514/1.G007671)
comments: Preprint Version, Accepted: October, 2024 (One-minute YouTube summary: https://youtu.be/q3e0LYS2IYQ, DOI: https://doi.org/10.2514/1.G007671)
abstract: Interstellar objects (ISOs) are likely representatives of primitive materials invaluable in understanding exoplanetary star systems. Due to their poorly constrained orbits with generally high inclinations and relative velocities, however, exploring ISOs with conventional human-in-the-loop approaches is significantly challenging. This paper presents Neural-Rendezvous -- a deep learning-based guidance and control framework for encountering fast-moving objects, including ISOs, robustly, accurately, and autonomously in real time. It uses pointwise minimum norm tracking control on top of a guidance policy modeled by a spectrally-normalized deep neural network, where its hyperparameters are tuned with a loss function directly penalizing the MPC state trajectory tracking error. We show that Neural-Rendezvous provides a high probability exponential bound on the expected spacecraft delivery error, the proof of which leverages stochastic incremental stability analysis. In particular, it is used to construct a non-negative function with a supermartingale property, explicitly accounting for the ISO state uncertainty and the local nature of nonlinear state estimation guarantees. In numerical simulations, Neural-Rendezvous is demonstrated to satisfy the expected error bound for 100 ISO candidates. This performance is also empirically validated using our spacecraft simulator and in high-conflict and distributed UAV swarm reconfiguration with up to 20 UAVs.
summary: Interstellar objects (ISOs) are likely representatives of primitive materials invaluable in understanding exoplanetary star systems. Due to their poorly constrained orbits with generally high inclinations and relative velocities, however, exploring ISOs with conventional human-in-the-loop approaches is significantly challenging. This paper presents Neural-Rendezvous -- a deep learning-based guidance and control framework for encountering fast-moving objects, including ISOs, robustly, accurately, and autonomously in real time. It uses pointwise minimum norm tracking control on top of a guidance policy modeled by a spectrally-normalized deep neural network, where its hyperparameters are tuned with a loss function directly penalizing the MPC state trajectory tracking error. We show that Neural-Rendezvous provides a high probability exponential bound on the expected spacecraft delivery error, the proof of which leverages stochastic incremental stability analysis. In particular, it is used to construct a non-negative function with a supermartingale property, explicitly accounting for the ISO state uncertainty and the local nature of nonlinear state estimation guarantees. In numerical simulations, Neural-Rendezvous is demonstrated to satisfy the expected error bound for 100 ISO candidates. This performance is also empirically validated using our spacecraft simulator and in high-conflict and distributed UAV swarm reconfiguration with up to 20 UAVs.
abstract_zh: 星际天体（ISO）可能是原始材料的代表，对于理解系外恒星系统具有无价的价值。然而，由于它们的轨道约束较差，且通常具有较高的倾角和相对速度，因此用传统的人在环方法探索 ISO 具有很大的挑战性。本文提出了 Neural-Rendezvous——一种基于深度学习的引导和控制框架，用于实时稳健、准确和自主地遇到快速移动的物体（包括 ISO）。它在由谱归一化深度神经网络建模的指导策略之上使用逐点最小范数跟踪控制，其中其超参数通过直接惩罚 MPC 状态轨迹跟踪误差的损失函数进行调整。我们证明，神经交会为预期航天器交付误差提供了高概率指数界限，其证明利用了随机增量稳定性分析。特别是，它用于构造具有超鞅属性的非负函数，明确考虑 ISO 状态不确定性和非线性状态估计保证的局部性质。在数值模拟中，Neural-Rendezvous 被证明可以满足 100 个 ISO 候选者的预期误差范围。该性能还使用我们的航天器模拟器以及最多 20 架无人机的高冲突和分布式无人机群重新配置进行了实证验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自主导航与控制框架Neural-Rendezvous，用于实时稳健地拦截高速运动的星际天体。
AI.motivation: 星际天体（ISO）具有高倾角和相对速度的轨道特性，传统人工干预方法难以有效探索，亟需自主化、高精度的控制方案。
AI.method: 结合谱归一化深度神经网络的引导策略与点态最小范数跟踪控制，通过惩罚MPC轨迹误差的损失函数优化超参数，并利用随机增量稳定性分析证明误差指数界。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证该方法对100个ISO候选目标满足预期误差界，且在航天器模拟器及20架无人机的高冲突编队重构中得到实证。
AI.conclusion: Neural-Rendezvous为航天器自主拦截ISO提供了理论保证与工程实现方案，其方法论可扩展至无人机群等复杂系统控制场景。

search_text: Neural-Rendezvous: Provably Robust Guidance and Control to Encounter Interstellar Objects 神经交会：可证明稳健的引导和控制来遭遇星际物体 Interstellar objects (ISOs) are likely representatives of primitive materials invaluable in understanding exoplanetary star systems. Due to their poorly constrained orbits with generally high inclinations and relative velocities, however, exploring ISOs with conventional human-in-the-loop approaches is significantly challenging. This paper presents Neural-Rendezvous -- a deep learning-based guidance and control framework for encountering fast-moving objects, including ISOs, robustly, accurately, and autonomously in real time. It uses pointwise minimum norm tracking control on top of a guidance policy modeled by a spectrally-normalized deep neural network, where its hyperparameters are tuned with a loss function directly penalizing the MPC state trajectory tracking error. We show that Neural-Rendezvous provides a high probability exponential bound on the expected spacecraft delivery error, the proof of which leverages stochastic incremental stability analysis. In particular, it is used to construct a non-negative function with a supermartingale property, explicitly accounting for the ISO state uncertainty and the local nature of nonlinear state estimation guarantees. In numerical simulations, Neural-Rendezvous is demonstrated to satisfy the expected error bound for 100 ISO candidates. This performance is also empirically validated using our spacecraft simulator and in high-conflict and distributed UAV swarm reconfiguration with up to 20 UAVs. 星际天体（ISO）可能是原始材料的代表，对于理解系外恒星系统具有无价的价值。然而，由于它们的轨道约束较差，且通常具有较高的倾角和相对速度，因此用传统的人在环方法探索 ISO 具有很大的挑战性。本文提出了 Neural-Rendezvous——一种基于深度学习的引导和控制框架，用于实时稳健、准确和自主地遇到快速移动的物体（包括 ISO）。它在由谱归一化深度神经网络建模的指导策略之上使用逐点最小范数跟踪控制，其中其超参数通过直接惩罚 MPC 状态轨迹跟踪误差的损失函数进行调整。我们证明，神经交会为预期航天器交付误差提供了高概率指数界限，其证明利用了随机增量稳定性分析。特别是，它用于构造具有超鞅属性的非负函数，明确考虑 ISO 状态不确定性和非线性状态估计保证的局部性质。在数值模拟中，Neural-Rendezvous 被证明可以满足 100 个 ISO 候选者的预期误差范围。该性能还使用我们的航天器模拟器以及最多 20 架无人机的高冲突和分布式无人机群重新配置进行了实证验证。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自主导航与控制框架Neural-Rendezvous，用于实时稳健地拦截高速运动的星际天体。 Hiroyasu Tsukamoto,Soon-Jo Chung,Yashwanth Kumar Nakka,Benjamin Donitz,Declan Mages,Michel Ingham cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY,math.OC

title: Pure Data and INScore: Animated notation for new music
title_zh: Pure Data 和 INScore：新音乐的动画乐谱
abstract: New music is made with computers, taking advantage of its graphics displays rather than its audio algorithms. Pure Data can be used to compose them. This essay will show a case study that uses Pure Data, in connection with INScore, for making a new type of score that uses animated notation or dynamic musicography for making music with performers. This sample was made by the author of the text, and it will show a number of notation possibilities that can be done using the combination of software. This will be accompanied by a simple prediction of what a musician could perform with it.
summary: New music is made with computers, taking advantage of its graphics displays rather than its audio algorithms. Pure Data can be used to compose them. This essay will show a case study that uses Pure Data, in connection with INScore, for making a new type of score that uses animated notation or dynamic musicography for making music with performers. This sample was made by the author of the text, and it will show a number of notation possibilities that can be done using the combination of software. This will be accompanied by a simple prediction of what a musician could perform with it.
abstract_zh: 新音乐是用计算机制作的，利用其图形显示而不是音频算法。可以使用纯数据来组合它们。本文将展示一个案例研究，该案例研究使用 Pure Data 与 INScore 结合来制作一种新型乐谱，该乐谱使用动画乐谱或动态音乐编排与表演者一起制作音乐。该示例由文本作者制作，它将展示可以使用软件组合完成的多种符号可能性。这将伴随着对音乐家可以用它表演什么的简单预测。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合Pure Data和INScore软件，探索利用动态记谱法（animated notation）创作新型音乐作品的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐创作依赖音频算法，而计算机图形显示为新音乐提供了视觉化表达的可能性，需探索更灵活的记谱方式以适应表演需求。
AI.method: 以作者创作的案例研究为基础，结合Pure Data的实时音频处理能力与INScore的动态记谱功能，展示交互式音乐符号的生成与表演应用。
AI.result: 实现了多种动态记谱方案，并预测了音乐家可借此进行实时互动表演的可能场景。
AI.conclusion: Pure Data与INScore的结合为新音乐创作提供了可视化、交互化的记谱工具，拓展了传统乐谱的表现边界。

authors_text: Sina Amirrajab,Yasmina Al Khalil,Cristian Lorenz,Jurgen Weese,Josien Pluim,Marcel Breeuwer
title: sim2real: Cardiac MR Image Simulation-to-Real Translation via Unsupervised GANs
title_zh: sim2real：通过无监督 GAN 将心脏 MR 图像模拟转换为真实图像
comment: Accepted to Joint Annual Meeting ISMRM-ESMRMB & ISMRT 31st Annual Meeting 07-12 May 2022 | London, England, UK
comments: Accepted to Joint Annual Meeting ISMRM-ESMRMB & ISMRT 31st Annual Meeting 07-12 May 2022 | London, England, UK
abstract: There has been considerable interest in the MR physics-based simulation of a database of virtual cardiac MR images for the development of deep-learning analysis networks. However, the employment of such a database is limited or shows suboptimal performance due to the realism gap, missing textures, and the simplified appearance of simulated images. In this work we 1) provide image simulation on virtual XCAT subjects with varying anatomies, and 2) propose sim2real translation network to improve image realism. Our usability experiments suggest that sim2real data exhibits a good potential to augment training data and boost the performance of a segmentation algorithm.
summary: There has been considerable interest in the MR physics-based simulation of a database of virtual cardiac MR images for the development of deep-learning analysis networks. However, the employment of such a database is limited or shows suboptimal performance due to the realism gap, missing textures, and the simplified appearance of simulated images. In this work we 1) provide image simulation on virtual XCAT subjects with varying anatomies, and 2) propose sim2real translation network to improve image realism. Our usability experiments suggest that sim2real data exhibits a good potential to augment training data and boost the performance of a segmentation algorithm.
abstract_zh: 人们对用于开发深度学习分析网络的虚拟心脏 MR 图像数据库的基于 MR 物理的模拟产生了相当大的兴趣。然而，由于真实性差距、纹理缺失和模拟图像的简化外观，这种数据库的使用受到限制或表现出次优性能。在这项工作中，我们 1) 提供具有不同解剖结构的虚拟 XCAT 对象的图像模拟，2) 提出 sim2real 翻译网络以提高图像真实感。我们的可用性实验表明，sim2real 数据在增强训练数据和提高分割算法的性能方面表现出良好的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过无监督GAN将虚拟心脏MRI图像转换为更真实图像，以提升深度学习模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟心脏MRI图像存在真实感不足、纹理缺失等问题，限制了其在深度学习模型训练中的应用效果。
AI.method: 1) 基于虚拟XCAT受试者生成多解剖结构的模拟图像；2) 设计无监督GAN网络sim2real实现模拟图像到真实图像的转换。
AI.result: 实验表明sim2real数据能有效增强训练数据集，显著提升心脏分割算法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: sim2real方法成功弥合了模拟与真实MRI图像的差距，为医学图像分析模型提供了高质量的合成训练数据。

authors_text: Soo Ling Lim,Peter J. Bentley,Randall S. Peterson,Xiaoran Hu,JoEllyn Prouty McLaren
title: Kill Chaos with Kindness: Agreeableness Improves Team Performance Under Uncertainty
title_zh: 用仁慈消除混乱：宜人性可以提高不确定性下的团队绩效
comment: Final version (open access) as published in journal
comments: Final version (open access) as published in journal
abstract: Teams are central to human accomplishment. Over the past half-century, psychologists have identified the Big-Five cross-culturally valid personality variables: Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Conscientiousness, and Agreeableness. The first four have shown consistent relationships with team performance. Agreeableness (being harmonious, altruistic, humble, and cooperative), however, has demonstrated a non-significant and highly variable relationship with team performance. We resolve this inconsistency through computational modelling. An agent-based model (ABM) is used to predict the effects of personality traits on teamwork and a genetic algorithm is then used to explore the limits of the ABM in order to discover which traits correlate with best and worst performing teams for a problem with different levels of uncertainty (noise). New dependencies revealed by the exploration are corroborated by analyzing previously-unseen data from one the largest datasets on team performance to date comprising 3,698 individuals in 593 teams working on more than 5,000 group tasks with and without uncertainty, collected over a 10-year period. Our finding is that the dependency between team performance and Agreeableness is moderated by task uncertainty. Combining evolutionary computation with ABMs in this way provides a new methodology for the scientific investigation of teamwork, making new predictions, and improving our understanding of human behaviors. Our results confirm the potential usefulness of computer modelling for developing theory, as well as shedding light on the future of teams as work environments are becoming increasingly fluid and uncertain.
summary: Teams are central to human accomplishment. Over the past half-century, psychologists have identified the Big-Five cross-culturally valid personality variables: Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Conscientiousness, and Agreeableness. The first four have shown consistent relationships with team performance. Agreeableness (being harmonious, altruistic, humble, and cooperative), however, has demonstrated a non-significant and highly variable relationship with team performance. We resolve this inconsistency through computational modelling. An agent-based model (ABM) is used to predict the effects of personality traits on teamwork and a genetic algorithm is then used to explore the limits of the ABM in order to discover which traits correlate with best and worst performing teams for a problem with different levels of uncertainty (noise). New dependencies revealed by the exploration are corroborated by analyzing previously-unseen data from one the largest datasets on team performance to date comprising 3,698 individuals in 593 teams working on more than 5,000 group tasks with and without uncertainty, collected over a 10-year period. Our finding is that the dependency between team performance and Agreeableness is moderated by task uncertainty. Combining evolutionary computation with ABMs in this way provides a new methodology for the scientific investigation of teamwork, making new predictions, and improving our understanding of human behaviors. Our results confirm the potential usefulness of computer modelling for developing theory, as well as shedding light on the future of teams as work environments are becoming increasingly fluid and uncertain.
abstract_zh: 团队是人类成就的核心。在过去的半个世纪中，心理学家已经确定了跨文化有效的五大人格变量：神经质、外向性、开放性、尽责性和宜人性。前四个与团队绩效表现出一致的关系。然而，宜人性（和谐、利他、谦虚和合作）与团队绩效之间的关系并不显着且变化很大。我们通过计算建模解决了这种不一致。基于主体的模型 (ABM) 用于预测人格特质对团队合作的影响，然后使用遗传算法探索 ABM 的局限性，以便发现哪些特质与针对不同不确定性（噪声）水平的问题表现最佳和最差的团队相关。通过分析来自迄今为止最大的团队绩效数据集的前所未见的数据，证实了探索所揭示的新依赖性，该数据集包含 593 个团队中的 3,698 名个人，这些数据在 10 年期间收集，在不确定性和无不确定性的情况下完成 5,000 多项小组任务。我们的发现是，团队绩效和宜人性之间的依赖性受到任务不确定性的调节。以这种方式将进化计算与 ABM 相结合，为团队合作的科学研究、做出新的预测以及提高我们对人类行为的理解提供了一种新的方法。我们的结果证实了计算机建模对于发展理论的潜在有用性，并揭示了随着工作环境变得越来越流动和不确定的团队的未来。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算建模和实证数据验证，探讨宜人性（Agreeableness）在不确定性任务中对团队绩效的影响。
AI.motivation: 先前研究发现宜人性与团队绩效的关系不显著且不稳定，本文旨在通过新方法解决这一矛盾，明确不确定性如何调节宜人性的作用。
AI.method: 采用基于代理的计算模型（ABM）和遗传算法模拟团队动态，结合包含593个团队、3698名成员的十年期真实数据进行验证。
AI.result: 发现宜人性与团队绩效的关系受任务不确定性调节：高不确定性下，宜人性显著提升团队表现；低不确定性下则无明显关联。
AI.conclusion: 融合ABM与遗传算法的方法为团队研究提供新范式，揭示宜人性在不确定环境中的关键作用，为动态工作场景下的团队管理提供理论支持。
