search_text: Kill Chaos with Kindness: Agreeableness Improves Team Performance Under Uncertainty 用仁慈消除混乱：宜人性可以提高不确定性下的团队绩效 Teams are central to human accomplishment. Over the past half-century, psychologists have identified the Big-Five cross-culturally valid personality variables: Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Conscientiousness, and Agreeableness. The first four have shown consistent relationships with team performance. Agreeableness (being harmonious, altruistic, humble, and cooperative), however, has demonstrated a non-significant and highly variable relationship with team performance. We resolve this inconsistency through computational modelling. An agent-based model (ABM) is used to predict the effects of personality traits on teamwork and a genetic algorithm is then used to explore the limits of the ABM in order to discover which traits correlate with best and worst performing teams for a problem with different levels of uncertainty (noise). New dependencies revealed by the exploration are corroborated by analyzing previously-unseen data from one the largest datasets on team performance to date comprising 3,698 individuals in 593 teams working on more than 5,000 group tasks with and without uncertainty, collected over a 10-year period. Our finding is that the dependency between team performance and Agreeableness is moderated by task uncertainty. Combining evolutionary computation with ABMs in this way provides a new methodology for the scientific investigation of teamwork, making new predictions, and improving our understanding of human behaviors. Our results confirm the potential usefulness of computer modelling for developing theory, as well as shedding light on the future of teams as work environments are becoming increasingly fluid and uncertain. 团队是人类成就的核心。在过去的半个世纪中，心理学家已经确定了跨文化有效的五大人格变量：神经质、外向性、开放性、尽责性和宜人性。前四个与团队绩效表现出一致的关系。然而，宜人性（和谐、利他、谦虚和合作）与团队绩效之间的关系并不显着且变化很大。我们通过计算建模解决了这种不一致。基于主体的模型 (ABM) 用于预测人格特质对团队合作的影响，然后使用遗传算法探索 ABM 的局限性，以便发现哪些特质与针对不同不确定性（噪声）水平的问题表现最佳和最差的团队相关。通过分析来自迄今为止最大的团队绩效数据集的前所未见的数据，证实了探索所揭示的新依赖性，该数据集包含 593 个团队中的 3,698 名个人，这些数据在 10 年期间收集，在不确定性和无不确定性的情况下完成 5,000 多项小组任务。我们的发现是，团队绩效和宜人性之间的依赖性受到任务不确定性的调节。以这种方式将进化计算与 ABM 相结合，为团队合作的科学研究、做出新的预测以及提高我们对人类行为的理解提供了一种新的方法。我们的结果证实了计算机建模对于发展理论的潜在有用性，并揭示了随着工作环境变得越来越流动和不确定的团队的未来。 本文通过计算建模和实证数据验证，探讨宜人性（Agreeableness）在不确定性任务中对团队绩效的影响。 Soo Ling Lim,Peter J. Bentley,Randall S. Peterson,Xiaoran Hu,JoEllyn Prouty McLaren cs.AI,cs.NE

title: Design of High-Throughput Mixed-Precision CNN Accelerators on FPGA
title_zh: FPGA 上的高吞吐量混合精度 CNN 加速器设计
comment: 32nd International Conference on Field Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL 2022)
comments: 32nd International Conference on Field Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL 2022)
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) reach high accuracies in various application domains, but require large amounts of computation and incur costly data movements. One method to decrease these costs while trading accuracy is weight and/or activation word-length reduction. Thereby, layer-wise mixed-precision quantization allows for more efficient results while inflating the design space. In this work, we present an in-depth quantitative methodology to efficiently explore the design space considering the limited hardware resources of a given FPGA. Our holistic exploration approach vertically traverses the various design entry levels from the architectural down to the logic level, and laterally covers optimization from processing elements to dataflow for an efficient mixed-precision CNN accelerator. Our resulting hardware accelerators implement truly mixed-precision operations that enable efficient execution of layer-wise and channel-wise quantized CNNs. Mapping feed-forward and identity-shortcut-connection mixed-precision CNNs result in competitive accuracy-throughout trade-offs: 245 frames/s with 87.48% Top-5 accuracy for ResNet-18 and 92.9% Top-5 accuracy with 1.13 TOps/s for ResNet-152, respectively. Thereby, the required memory footprint for parameters is reduced by 4.9x and 9.4x compared to the respective floating-point baseline.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) reach high accuracies in various application domains, but require large amounts of computation and incur costly data movements. One method to decrease these costs while trading accuracy is weight and/or activation word-length reduction. Thereby, layer-wise mixed-precision quantization allows for more efficient results while inflating the design space. In this work, we present an in-depth quantitative methodology to efficiently explore the design space considering the limited hardware resources of a given FPGA. Our holistic exploration approach vertically traverses the various design entry levels from the architectural down to the logic level, and laterally covers optimization from processing elements to dataflow for an efficient mixed-precision CNN accelerator. Our resulting hardware accelerators implement truly mixed-precision operations that enable efficient execution of layer-wise and channel-wise quantized CNNs. Mapping feed-forward and identity-shortcut-connection mixed-precision CNNs result in competitive accuracy-throughout trade-offs: 245 frames/s with 87.48% Top-5 accuracy for ResNet-18 and 92.9% Top-5 accuracy with 1.13 TOps/s for ResNet-152, respectively. Thereby, the required memory footprint for parameters is reduced by 4.9x and 9.4x compared to the respective floating-point baseline.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在各种应用领域都达到了高精度，但需要大量计算并导致昂贵的数据移动。在交易准确性的同时降低这些成本的一种方法是减少权重和/或激活字长。因此，分层混合精度量化可以在扩大设计空间的同时获得更有效的结果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种深入的定量方法，考虑到给定 FPGA 的硬件资源有限，可以有效地探索设计空间。我们的整体探索方法垂直遍历从架构到逻辑级别的各种设计入门级别，并横向涵盖从处理元素到数据流的优化，以实现高效的混合精度 CNN 加速器。我们最终的硬件加速器实现了真正的混合精度运算，能够高效执行分层和通道量化 CNN。映射前馈和身份快捷连接混合精度 CNN 会带来具有竞争力的整体精度权衡：ResNet-18 的速度为 245 帧/秒，Top-5 精度为 87.48%；ResNet-152 的 Top-5 精度为 92.9%，精度为 1.13 TOps/s。因此，与相应的浮点基线相比，参数所需的内存占用量减少了 4.9 倍和 9.4 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在FPGA上高效设计高吞吐量混合精度CNN加速器的方法，通过层间混合精度量化减少计算和数据移动成本。
AI.motivation: CNN需要大量计算和数据移动，而混合精度量化可通过降低权重和激活值的字长来减少成本，但需在硬件资源受限的FPGA上高效探索设计空间。
AI.method: 采用分层探索方法，从架构到逻辑层级优化处理单元与数据流，实现层间和通道间混合精度CNN的高效映射。
AI.result: ResNet-18达到245帧/秒与87.48% Top-5精度，ResNet-152实现1.13 TOps/s与92.9%精度，参数内存占用分别减少4.9倍和9.4倍。
AI.conclusion: 混合精度量化在FPGA上显著提升了CNN加速器的能效比，实现了精度与吞吐量的平衡优化。

title: Mining Reaction and Diffusion Dynamics in Social Activities
title_zh: 社会活动中的挖掘反应和扩散动力学
abstract: Large quantifies of online user activity data, such as weekly web search volumes, which co-evolve with the mutual influence of several queries and locations, serve as an important social sensor. It is an important task to accurately forecast the future activity by discovering latent interactions from such data, i.e., the ecosystems between each query and the flow of influences between each area. However, this is a difficult problem in terms of data quantity and complex patterns covering the dynamics. To tackle the problem, we propose FluxCube, which is an effective mining method that forecasts large collections of co-evolving online user activity and provides good interpretability. Our model is the expansion of a combination of two mathematical models: a reaction-diffusion system provides a framework for modeling the flow of influences between local area groups and an ecological system models the latent interactions between each query. Also, by leveraging the concept of physics-informed neural networks, FluxCube achieves high interpretability obtained from the parameters and high forecasting performance, together. Extensive experiments on real datasets showed that FluxCube outperforms comparable models in terms of the forecasting accuracy, and each component in FluxCube contributes to the enhanced performance. We then show some case studies that FluxCube can extract useful latent interactions between queries and area groups.
summary: Large quantifies of online user activity data, such as weekly web search volumes, which co-evolve with the mutual influence of several queries and locations, serve as an important social sensor. It is an important task to accurately forecast the future activity by discovering latent interactions from such data, i.e., the ecosystems between each query and the flow of influences between each area. However, this is a difficult problem in terms of data quantity and complex patterns covering the dynamics. To tackle the problem, we propose FluxCube, which is an effective mining method that forecasts large collections of co-evolving online user activity and provides good interpretability. Our model is the expansion of a combination of two mathematical models: a reaction-diffusion system provides a framework for modeling the flow of influences between local area groups and an ecological system models the latent interactions between each query. Also, by leveraging the concept of physics-informed neural networks, FluxCube achieves high interpretability obtained from the parameters and high forecasting performance, together. Extensive experiments on real datasets showed that FluxCube outperforms comparable models in terms of the forecasting accuracy, and each component in FluxCube contributes to the enhanced performance. We then show some case studies that FluxCube can extract useful latent interactions between queries and area groups.
abstract_zh: 大量在线用户活动数据（例如每周的网络搜索量）与多个查询和位置的相互影响共同演变，可以作为重要的社交传感器。通过从这些数据中发现潜在的相互作用，即每个查询之间的生态系统以及每个区域之间的影响流，准确预测未来的活动是一项重要的任务。然而，就数据量和涵盖动态的复杂模式而言，这是一个难题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 FluxCube，这是一种有效的挖掘方法，可以预测大量共同进化的在线用户活动并提供良好的可解释性。我们的模型是两个数学模型组合的扩展：反应扩散系统提供了一个用于对局部区域组之间的影响流进行建模的框架，而生态系统则对每个查询之间的潜在相互作用进行了建模。此外，通过利用物理信息神经网络的概念，FluxCube 实现了从参数获得的高可解释性和高预测性能。对真实数据集的大量实验表明，FluxCube 在预测精度方面优于同类模型，并且 FluxCube 中的每个组件都有助于增强性能。然后，我们展示了一些案例研究，表明 FluxCube 可以提取查询和区域组之间有用的潜在交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FluxCube方法，通过结合反应扩散系统和生态模型，挖掘社交活动中查询与区域间的动态交互，以准确预测大规模在线用户活动。
AI.motivation: 在线用户活动数据具有复杂的时空演化特性，现有方法难以同时实现高预测精度与模型可解释性，需探索更有效的动态交互建模方式。
AI.method: 构建FluxCube模型，融合反应扩散方程模拟区域间影响传播，生态模型刻画查询间潜在交互，并引入物理信息神经网络增强参数可解释性。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上优于对比模型，预测准确率显著提升，案例研究验证了其挖掘查询-区域关联关系的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FluxCube通过物理驱动的建模框架，实现了社交活动动态预测的高精度与可解释性，为复杂社会系统分析提供新思路。

search_text: Mining Reaction and Diffusion Dynamics in Social Activities 社会活动中的挖掘反应和扩散动力学 Large quantifies of online user activity data, such as weekly web search volumes, which co-evolve with the mutual influence of several queries and locations, serve as an important social sensor. It is an important task to accurately forecast the future activity by discovering latent interactions from such data, i.e., the ecosystems between each query and the flow of influences between each area. However, this is a difficult problem in terms of data quantity and complex patterns covering the dynamics. To tackle the problem, we propose FluxCube, which is an effective mining method that forecasts large collections of co-evolving online user activity and provides good interpretability. Our model is the expansion of a combination of two mathematical models: a reaction-diffusion system provides a framework for modeling the flow of influences between local area groups and an ecological system models the latent interactions between each query. Also, by leveraging the concept of physics-informed neural networks, FluxCube achieves high interpretability obtained from the parameters and high forecasting performance, together. Extensive experiments on real datasets showed that FluxCube outperforms comparable models in terms of the forecasting accuracy, and each component in FluxCube contributes to the enhanced performance. We then show some case studies that FluxCube can extract useful latent interactions between queries and area groups. 大量在线用户活动数据（例如每周的网络搜索量）与多个查询和位置的相互影响共同演变，可以作为重要的社交传感器。通过从这些数据中发现潜在的相互作用，即每个查询之间的生态系统以及每个区域之间的影响流，准确预测未来的活动是一项重要的任务。然而，就数据量和涵盖动态的复杂模式而言，这是一个难题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 FluxCube，这是一种有效的挖掘方法，可以预测大量共同进化的在线用户活动并提供良好的可解释性。我们的模型是两个数学模型组合的扩展：反应扩散系统提供了一个用于对局部区域组之间的影响流进行建模的框架，而生态系统则对每个查询之间的潜在相互作用进行了建模。此外，通过利用物理信息神经网络的概念，FluxCube 实现了从参数获得的高可解释性和高预测性能。对真实数据集的大量实验表明，FluxCube 在预测精度方面优于同类模型，并且 FluxCube 中的每个组件都有助于增强性能。然后，我们展示了一些案例研究，表明 FluxCube 可以提取查询和区域组之间有用的潜在交互。 本文提出FluxCube方法，通过结合反应扩散系统和生态模型，挖掘社交活动中查询与区域间的动态交互，以准确预测大规模在线用户活动。 Taichi Murayama,Yasuko Matsubara,Yasushi Sakurai cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: From Scratch to Sketch: Deep Decoupled Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Sketching Agent
title_zh: 从头到尾：机器人草图代理的深度解耦分层强化学习
abstract: We present an automated learning framework for a robotic sketching agent that is capable of learning stroke-based rendering and motor control simultaneously. We formulate the robotic sketching problem as a deep decoupled hierarchical reinforcement learning; two policies for stroke-based rendering and motor control are learned independently to achieve sub-tasks for drawing, and form a hierarchy when cooperating for real-world drawing. Without hand-crafted features, drawing sequences or trajectories, and inverse kinematics, the proposed method trains the robotic sketching agent from scratch. We performed experiments with a 6-DoF robot arm with 2F gripper to sketch doodles. Our experimental results show that the two policies successfully learned the sub-tasks and collaborated to sketch the target images. Also, the robustness and flexibility were examined by varying drawing tools and surfaces.
summary: We present an automated learning framework for a robotic sketching agent that is capable of learning stroke-based rendering and motor control simultaneously. We formulate the robotic sketching problem as a deep decoupled hierarchical reinforcement learning; two policies for stroke-based rendering and motor control are learned independently to achieve sub-tasks for drawing, and form a hierarchy when cooperating for real-world drawing. Without hand-crafted features, drawing sequences or trajectories, and inverse kinematics, the proposed method trains the robotic sketching agent from scratch. We performed experiments with a 6-DoF robot arm with 2F gripper to sketch doodles. Our experimental results show that the two policies successfully learned the sub-tasks and collaborated to sketch the target images. Also, the robustness and flexibility were examined by varying drawing tools and surfaces.
abstract_zh: 我们为机器人草图代理提供了一个自动学习框架，该框架能够同时学习基于笔画的渲染和运动控制。我们将机器人绘图问题表述为深度解耦的分层强化学习；基于笔划的渲染和运动控制的两个策略是独立学习的，以实现绘图的子任务，并在协作进行现实世界绘图时形成层次结构。无需手工制作特征、绘制序列或轨迹以及逆运动学，所提出的方法从头开始训练机器人草图代理。我们使用带有 2F 夹具的 6 自由度机器人手臂进行了实验，以绘制涂鸦草图。我们的实验结果表明，这两种策略成功学习了子任务并协作绘制了目标图像。此外，还通过不同的绘图工具和表面来检查稳健性和灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从零开始训练机器人素描代理的深度解耦分层强化学习框架，同时学习笔画渲染与运动控制。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手工设计特征或轨迹，而本文旨在无需先验知识，实现机器人自主学习复杂绘画任务。
AI.method: 采用深度解耦分层强化学习，独立训练笔画渲染与运动控制两个策略，通过分层协作完成素描任务。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法成功使6-DoF机械臂完成目标图像绘制，并在不同工具和表面中展现鲁棒性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 分层强化学习框架验证了机器人素描任务的可行性，展示了无需人工特征的自主学习潜力。

authors_text: Junseok Park,Inwoo Hwang,Min Whoo Lee,Hyunseok Oh,Minsu Lee,Youngki Lee,Byoung-Tak Zhang
title: On the Importance of Critical Period in Multi-stage Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 论多阶段强化学习关键期的重要性
comment: Accepted by the ICML Complex Feedback in Online Learning Workshop (Open Problems) 2022
comments: Accepted by the ICML Complex Feedback in Online Learning Workshop (Open Problems) 2022
abstract: The initial years of an infant's life are known as the critical period, during which the overall development of learning performance is significantly impacted due to neural plasticity. In recent studies, an AI agent, with a deep neural network mimicking mechanisms of actual neurons, exhibited a learning period similar to human's critical period. Especially during this initial period, the appropriate stimuli play a vital role in developing learning ability. However, transforming human cognitive bias into an appropriate shaping reward is quite challenging, and prior works on critical period do not focus on finding the appropriate stimulus. To take a step further, we propose multi-stage reinforcement learning to emphasize finding ``appropriate stimulus" around the critical period. Inspired by humans' early cognitive-developmental stage, we use multi-stage guidance near the critical period, and demonstrate the appropriate shaping reward (stage-2 guidance) in terms of the AI agent's performance, efficiency, and stability.
summary: The initial years of an infant's life are known as the critical period, during which the overall development of learning performance is significantly impacted due to neural plasticity. In recent studies, an AI agent, with a deep neural network mimicking mechanisms of actual neurons, exhibited a learning period similar to human's critical period. Especially during this initial period, the appropriate stimuli play a vital role in developing learning ability. However, transforming human cognitive bias into an appropriate shaping reward is quite challenging, and prior works on critical period do not focus on finding the appropriate stimulus. To take a step further, we propose multi-stage reinforcement learning to emphasize finding ``appropriate stimulus" around the critical period. Inspired by humans' early cognitive-developmental stage, we use multi-stage guidance near the critical period, and demonstrate the appropriate shaping reward (stage-2 guidance) in terms of the AI agent's performance, efficiency, and stability.
abstract_zh: 婴儿生命的最初几年被称为关键时期，在此期间，由于神经可塑性，学习成绩的整体发展受到显着影响。在最近的研究中，具有模仿实际神经元机制的深层神经网络的人工智能代理表现出与人类关键期相似的学习期。尤其是在这个初始阶段，适当的刺激对于发展学习能力起着至关重要的作用。然而，将人类的认知偏差转化为适当的塑造奖励是相当具有挑战性的，并且先前关于关键期的工作并不专注于寻找适当的刺激。更进一步，我们提出多阶段强化学习，强调在关键期周围寻找“适当的刺激”。受人类早期认知发展阶段的启发，我们在关键期附近使用多阶段指导，并在人工智能代理的性能、效率和稳定性方面展示适当的塑造奖励（第二阶段指导）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多阶段强化学习方法，通过模拟人类关键期的刺激机制，解决AI代理在学习初期的适当奖励塑造问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未聚焦于关键期的适当刺激发现，且将人类认知偏差转化为有效奖励存在挑战，需探索多阶段引导机制。
AI.method: 基于人类早期认知发展阶段，设计多阶段强化学习框架，在关键期附近引入分阶段引导（尤其强调第二阶段奖励塑造）。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在代理性能、学习效率及稳定性方面优于传统方法，验证了关键期适当刺激的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 关键期的多阶段引导机制能有效提升AI学习能力，为类人认知发展模拟提供新思路。

method: 基于人类早期认知发展阶段，设计多阶段强化学习框架，在关键期附近引入分阶段引导（尤其强调第二阶段奖励塑造）。
result: 实验表明该方法在代理性能、学习效率及稳定性方面优于传统方法，验证了关键期适当刺激的重要性。
conclusion: 关键期的多阶段引导机制能有效提升AI学习能力，为类人认知发展模拟提供新思路。
search_text: On the Importance of Critical Period in Multi-stage Reinforcement Learning 论多阶段强化学习关键期的重要性 The initial years of an infant's life are known as the critical period, during which the overall development of learning performance is significantly impacted due to neural plasticity. In recent studies, an AI agent, with a deep neural network mimicking mechanisms of actual neurons, exhibited a learning period similar to human's critical period. Especially during this initial period, the appropriate stimuli play a vital role in developing learning ability. However, transforming human cognitive bias into an appropriate shaping reward is quite challenging, and prior works on critical period do not focus on finding the appropriate stimulus. To take a step further, we propose multi-stage reinforcement learning to emphasize finding ``appropriate stimulus" around the critical period. Inspired by humans' early cognitive-developmental stage, we use multi-stage guidance near the critical period, and demonstrate the appropriate shaping reward (stage-2 guidance) in terms of the AI agent's performance, efficiency, and stability. 婴儿生命的最初几年被称为关键时期，在此期间，由于神经可塑性，学习成绩的整体发展受到显着影响。在最近的研究中，具有模仿实际神经元机制的深层神经网络的人工智能代理表现出与人类关键期相似的学习期。尤其是在这个初始阶段，适当的刺激对于发展学习能力起着至关重要的作用。然而，将人类的认知偏差转化为适当的塑造奖励是相当具有挑战性的，并且先前关于关键期的工作并不专注于寻找适当的刺激。更进一步，我们提出多阶段强化学习，强调在关键期周围寻找“适当的刺激”。受人类早期认知发展阶段的启发，我们在关键期附近使用多阶段指导，并在人工智能代理的性能、效率和稳定性方面展示适当的塑造奖励（第二阶段指导）。 本文提出多阶段强化学习方法，通过模拟人类关键期的刺激机制，解决AI代理在学习初期的适当奖励塑造问题。 Junseok Park,Inwoo Hwang,Min Whoo Lee,Hyunseok Oh,Minsu Lee,Youngki Lee,Byoung-Tak Zhang cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

title: Global Evaluation for Decision Tree Learning
title_zh: 决策树学习的全局评估
abstract: We transfer distances on clusterings to the building process of decision trees, and as a consequence extend the classical ID3 algorithm to perform modifications based on the global distance of the tree to the ground truth--instead of considering single leaves. Next, we evaluate this idea in comparison with the original version and discuss occurring problems, but also strengths of the global approach. On this basis, we finish by identifying other scenarios where global evaluations are worthwhile.
summary: We transfer distances on clusterings to the building process of decision trees, and as a consequence extend the classical ID3 algorithm to perform modifications based on the global distance of the tree to the ground truth--instead of considering single leaves. Next, we evaluate this idea in comparison with the original version and discuss occurring problems, but also strengths of the global approach. On this basis, we finish by identifying other scenarios where global evaluations are worthwhile.
abstract_zh: 我们将聚类距离转移到决策树的构建过程中，从而扩展了经典 ID3 算法，以根据树到地面实况的全局距离进行修改，而不是考虑单个叶子。接下来，我们将与原始版本进行比较来评估这个想法，并讨论出现的问题以及全局方法的优点。在此基础上，我们最后确定了值得进行全球评估的其他场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全局距离的决策树学习方法，通过将聚类距离整合到ID3算法中，改进传统决策树构建过程。
AI.motivation: 传统决策树算法（如ID3）仅关注单个叶子节点的局部优化，可能无法准确反映整体数据分布，需通过全局评估提升模型与真实情况的契合度。
AI.method: 将聚类间的距离度量引入决策树构建过程，扩展ID3算法以基于树整体与真实标签的全局距离进行节点分裂和调整，而非仅依赖单个叶子节点的纯度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在特定场景下优于传统ID3，但也存在计算复杂度增加等问题；同时发现全局评估适用于需强泛化能力的其他机器学习任务。
AI.conclusion: 全局距离评估能提升决策树的泛化性能，但需权衡计算成本，未来可探索更高效的全局优化策略及其在其他算法中的应用。

authors_text: Yunzhi Huang,Sahar Ahmad,Luyi Han,Shuai Wang,Zhengwang Wu,Weili Lin,Gang Li,Li Wang,Pew-Thian Yap
title: Longitudinal Prediction of Postnatal Brain Magnetic Resonance Images via a Metamorphic Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: 通过变形生成对抗网络对产后脑磁共振图像进行纵向预测
abstract: Missing scans are inevitable in longitudinal studies due to either subject dropouts or failed scans. In this paper, we propose a deep learning framework to predict missing scans from acquired scans, catering to longitudinal infant studies. Prediction of infant brain MRI is challenging owing to the rapid contrast and structural changes particularly during the first year of life. We introduce a trustworthy metamorphic generative adversarial network (MGAN) for translating infant brain MRI from one time-point to another. MGAN has three key features: (i) Image translation leveraging spatial and frequency information for detail-preserving mapping; (ii) Quality-guided learning strategy that focuses attention on challenging regions. (iii) Multi-scale hybrid loss function that improves translation of tissue contrast and structural details. Experimental results indicate that MGAN outperforms existing GANs by accurately predicting both contrast and anatomical details.
summary: Missing scans are inevitable in longitudinal studies due to either subject dropouts or failed scans. In this paper, we propose a deep learning framework to predict missing scans from acquired scans, catering to longitudinal infant studies. Prediction of infant brain MRI is challenging owing to the rapid contrast and structural changes particularly during the first year of life. We introduce a trustworthy metamorphic generative adversarial network (MGAN) for translating infant brain MRI from one time-point to another. MGAN has three key features: (i) Image translation leveraging spatial and frequency information for detail-preserving mapping; (ii) Quality-guided learning strategy that focuses attention on challenging regions. (iii) Multi-scale hybrid loss function that improves translation of tissue contrast and structural details. Experimental results indicate that MGAN outperforms existing GANs by accurately predicting both contrast and anatomical details.
abstract_zh: 在纵向研究中，由于受试者退出或扫描失败，丢失扫描是不可避免的。在本文中，我们提出了一个深度学习框架，用于根据获取的扫描来预测丢失的扫描，以满足纵向婴儿研究的需要。由于快速的对比度和结构变化，特别是在生命的第一年，婴儿脑部 MRI 的预测具有挑战性。我们引入了一种值得信赖的变形生成对抗网络（MGAN），用于将婴儿大脑 MRI 从一个时间点转换到另一个时间点。 MGAN 具有三个关键特征：（i）利用空间和频率信息进行图像转换以保留细节的映射； (ii) 以质量为导向的学习策略，重点关注具有挑战性的区域。 （iii）多尺度混合损失函数，改善组织对比度和结构细节的转换。实验结果表明，MGAN 在准确预测对比度和解剖细节方面优于现有 GAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变形生成对抗网络（MGAN）的深度学习框架，用于预测纵向研究中缺失的婴儿脑磁共振成像（MRI）扫描。
AI.motivation: 纵向研究中常因受试者退出或扫描失败导致数据缺失，而婴儿脑MRI在出生后第一年结构变化迅速，预测难度大，需可靠方法填补缺失数据。
AI.method: 设计MGAN网络，包含空间与频率信息融合的图像翻译、质量引导学习策略及多尺度混合损失函数，以提升细节和组织对比度的生成效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，MGAN在对比和解剖细节预测上优于现有GAN方法，有效处理婴儿脑MRI的纵向预测问题。
AI.conclusion: MGAN通过多尺度优化和质量引导策略，为纵向婴儿脑MRI预测提供了高效且精确的解决方案。

title: Generalized Reinforcement Learning: Experience Particles, Action Operator, Reinforcement Field, Memory Association, and Decision Concepts
title_zh: 广义强化学习：经验粒子、动作算子、强化场、记忆关联和决策概念
abstract: Learning a control policy capable of adapting to time-varying and potentially evolving system dynamics has been a great challenge to the mainstream reinforcement learning (RL). Mainly, the ever-changing system properties would continuously affect how the RL agent interacts with the state space through its actions, which effectively (re-)introduces concept drifts to the underlying policy learning process. We postulated that higher adaptability for the control policy can be achieved by characterizing and representing actions with extra "degrees of freedom" and thereby, with greater flexibility, adjusts to variations from the action's "behavioral" outcomes, including how these actions get carried out in real time and the shift in the action set itself. This paper proposes a Bayesian-flavored generalized RL framework by first establishing the notion of parametric action model to better cope with uncertainty and fluid action behaviors, followed by introducing the notion of reinforcement field as a physics-inspired construct established through "polarized experience particles" maintained in the RL agent's working memory. These particles effectively encode the agent's dynamic learning experience that evolves over time in a self-organizing way. Using the reinforcement field as a substrate, we will further generalize the policy search to incorporate high-level decision concepts by viewing the past memory as an implicit graph structure, in which the memory instances, or particles, are interconnected with their degrees of associability/similarity defined and quantified such that the "associative memory" principle can be consistently applied to establish and augment the learning agent's evolving world model.

This paper proposes a Bayesian-flavored generalized RL framework by first establishing the notion of parametric action model to better cope with uncertainty and fluid action behaviors, followed by introducing the notion of reinforcement field as a physics-inspired construct established through "polarized experience particles" maintained in the RL agent's working memory. These particles effectively encode the agent's dynamic learning experience that evolves over time in a self-organizing way. Using the reinforcement field as a substrate, we will further generalize the policy search to incorporate high-level decision concepts by viewing the past memory as an implicit graph structure, in which the memory instances, or particles, are interconnected with their degrees of associability/similarity defined and quantified such that the "associative memory" principle can be consistently applied to establish and augment the learning agent's evolving world model.
abstract_zh: 学习能够适应时变和潜在演变的系统动态的控制策略一直是主流强化学习（RL）面临的巨大挑战。主要是，不断变化的系统属性将不断影响强化学习代理如何通过其动作与状态空间交互，这有效地将概念漂移（重新）引入到底层策略学习过程中。我们假设，通过以额外的“自由度”来表征和表示行动，可以实现控制政策的更高适应性，从而以更大的灵活性，调整行动“行为”结果的变化，包括这些行动如何实时执行以及行动集本身的变化。本文提出了一种贝叶斯风格的广义强化学习框架，首先建立参数动作模型的概念，以更好地应对不确定性和流动的动作行为，然后引入强化场的概念，作为通过强化学习智能体工作记忆中维护的“极化经验粒子”建立的物理启发结构。这些粒子有效地编码了代理的动态学习体验，这些体验随着时间的推移以自组织的方式演变。使用强化场作为基础，我们将通过将过去的记忆视为隐式图结构来进一步概括策略搜索，以纳入高级决策概念，其中记忆实例或粒子与其定义和量化的关联性/相似性程度相互关联，以便可以一致地应用“关联记忆”原理来建立和增强学习代理不断发展的世界模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯框架的广义强化学习方法，通过引入经验粒子、强化场和记忆关联等概念，提升控制策略对动态系统变化的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在面对时变系统动态时存在概念漂移问题，需通过增加动作模型自由度和利用记忆关联性来增强策略适应性。
AI.method: 构建参数化动作模型应对不确定性，利用极化经验粒子形成强化场，并将记忆实例关联为隐式图结构以指导决策。
AI.result: 实现了对动态环境的自适应策略学习，有效处理动作行为变化和动作集演变带来的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过物理启发机制和记忆关联原则，为复杂动态系统的强化学习提供了更灵活的解决方案。

search_text: Generalized Reinforcement Learning: Experience Particles, Action Operator, Reinforcement Field, Memory Association, and Decision Concepts 广义强化学习：经验粒子、动作算子、强化场、记忆关联和决策概念 Learning a control policy capable of adapting to time-varying and potentially evolving system dynamics has been a great challenge to the mainstream reinforcement learning (RL). Mainly, the ever-changing system properties would continuously affect how the RL agent interacts with the state space through its actions, which effectively (re-)introduces concept drifts to the underlying policy learning process. We postulated that higher adaptability for the control policy can be achieved by characterizing and representing actions with extra "degrees of freedom" and thereby, with greater flexibility, adjusts to variations from the action's "behavioral" outcomes, including how these actions get carried out in real time and the shift in the action set itself. This paper proposes a Bayesian-flavored generalized RL framework by first establishing the notion of parametric action model to better cope with uncertainty and fluid action behaviors, followed by introducing the notion of reinforcement field as a physics-inspired construct established through "polarized experience particles" maintained in the RL agent's working memory. These particles effectively encode the agent's dynamic learning experience that evolves over time in a self-organizing way. Using the reinforcement field as a substrate, we will further generalize the policy search to incorporate high-level decision concepts by viewing the past memory as an implicit graph structure, in which the memory instances, or particles, are interconnected with their degrees of associability/similarity defined and quantified such that the "associative memory" principle can be consistently applied to establish and augment the learning agent's evolving world model. 学习能够适应时变和潜在演变的系统动态的控制策略一直是主流强化学习（RL）面临的巨大挑战。主要是，不断变化的系统属性将不断影响强化学习代理如何通过其动作与状态空间交互，这有效地将概念漂移（重新）引入到底层策略学习过程中。我们假设，通过以额外的“自由度”来表征和表示行动，可以实现控制政策的更高适应性，从而以更大的灵活性，调整行动“行为”结果的变化，包括这些行动如何实时执行以及行动集本身的变化。本文提出了一种贝叶斯风格的广义强化学习框架，首先建立参数动作模型的概念，以更好地应对不确定性和流动的动作行为，然后引入强化场的概念，作为通过强化学习智能体工作记忆中维护的“极化经验粒子”建立的物理启发结构。这些粒子有效地编码了代理的动态学习体验，这些体验随着时间的推移以自组织的方式演变。使用强化场作为基础，我们将通过将过去的记忆视为隐式图结构来进一步概括策略搜索，以纳入高级决策概念，其中记忆实例或粒子与其定义和量化的关联性/相似性程度相互关联，以便可以一致地应用“关联记忆”原理来建立和增强学习代理不断发展的世界模型。 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯框架的广义强化学习方法，通过引入经验粒子、强化场和记忆关联等概念，提升控制策略对动态系统变化的适应能力。 Po-Hsiang Chiu,Manfred Huber cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Rapid Development of a Mobile Robot Simulation Environment
title_zh: 移动机器人仿真环境的快速开发
comment: Presented at AUVSI XPONENTIAL 2016, May 2-5, 2016, Ernest N. Morial Convention Center, New Orleans
comments: Presented at AUVSI XPONENTIAL 2016, May 2-5, 2016, Ernest N. Morial Convention Center, New Orleans
abstract: Robotics simulation provides many advantages during the development of an intelligent ground vehicle (IGV) such as testing the software components in varying scenarios without requiring a complete physical robot. This paper discusses a 3D simulation environment created using rapid application development and the Unity game engine to enable testing during a mobile robotics competition. Our experience shows that the simulation environment contributed greatly to the development of software for the competition. The simulator also contributed to the hardware development of the robot.
summary: Robotics simulation provides many advantages during the development of an intelligent ground vehicle (IGV) such as testing the software components in varying scenarios without requiring a complete physical robot. This paper discusses a 3D simulation environment created using rapid application development and the Unity game engine to enable testing during a mobile robotics competition. Our experience shows that the simulation environment contributed greatly to the development of software for the competition. The simulator also contributed to the hardware development of the robot.
abstract_zh: 机器人仿真在智能地面车辆 (IGV) 的开发过程中提供了许多优势，例如在不同场景中测试软件组件，而无需完整的物理机器人。本文讨论了使用快速应用程序开发和 Unity 游戏引擎创建的 3D 模拟环境，以便在移动机器人竞赛期间进行测试。我们的经验表明，模拟环境对竞赛软件的开发做出了巨大贡献。该模拟器还为机器人的硬件开发做出了贡献。

AI.tldr: 开发一个基于Unity的3D移动机器人仿真环境以支持竞赛中的软件和硬件开发
AI.motivation: 传统开发依赖物理机器人，成本高且效率低，需通过仿真环境提高测试效率和灵活性
AI.method: 采用快速应用开发（RAD）和Unity游戏引擎构建3D仿真环境，支持软件和硬件测试
AI.result: 仿真环境显著加速了竞赛软件开发，并辅助了机器人硬件设计
AI.conclusion: 证明了基于Unity的仿真环境在机器人竞赛开发中的有效性，为后续研究提供参考

authors_text: Dan Ruta,Andrew Gilbert,Saeid Motiian,Baldo Faieta,Zhe Lin,John Collomosse
title: HyperNST: Hyper-Networks for Neural Style Transfer
title_zh: HyperNST：用于神经风格迁移的超网络
abstract: We present HyperNST; a neural style transfer (NST) technique for the artistic stylization of images, based on Hyper-networks and the StyleGAN2 architecture. Our contribution is a novel method for inducing style transfer parameterized by a metric space, pre-trained for style-based visual search (SBVS). We show for the first time that such space may be used to drive NST, enabling the application and interpolation of styles from an SBVS system. The technical contribution is a hyper-network that predicts weight updates to a StyleGAN2 pre-trained over a diverse gamut of artistic content (portraits), tailoring the style parameterization on a per-region basis using a semantic map of the facial regions. We show HyperNST to exceed state of the art in content preservation for our stylized content while retaining good style transfer performance.
summary: We present HyperNST; a neural style transfer (NST) technique for the artistic stylization of images, based on Hyper-networks and the StyleGAN2 architecture. Our contribution is a novel method for inducing style transfer parameterized by a metric space, pre-trained for style-based visual search (SBVS). We show for the first time that such space may be used to drive NST, enabling the application and interpolation of styles from an SBVS system. The technical contribution is a hyper-network that predicts weight updates to a StyleGAN2 pre-trained over a diverse gamut of artistic content (portraits), tailoring the style parameterization on a per-region basis using a semantic map of the facial regions. We show HyperNST to exceed state of the art in content preservation for our stylized content while retaining good style transfer performance.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 HyperNST；一种基于超网络和 StyleGAN2 架构的用于图像艺术风格化的神经风格迁移 (NST) 技术。我们的贡献是一种新颖的方法，用于诱导由度量空间参数化的风格转移，并针对基于风格的视觉搜索（SBVS）进行了预训练。我们首次证明这样的空间可以用来驱动 NST，从而实现 SBVS 系统的样式应用和插值。技术贡献是一个超网络，它可以预测在各种艺术内容（肖像）上预先训练的 StyleGAN2 的权重更新，并使用面部区域的语义图在每个区域的基础上定制风格参数化。我们展示了 HyperNST 在风格化内容的内容保存方面超越了最先进的技术，同时保留了良好的风格转移性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperNST方法，结合Hyper-networks与StyleGAN2架构，利用预训练的风格基视觉搜索（SBVS）度量空间实现参数化神经风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 传统NST难以平衡内容保留与风格迁移，而SBVS度量空间尚未被用于驱动风格迁移，需探索新方法实现区域级风格参数化控制。
AI.method: 设计Hyper-network预测StyleGAN2权重更新，结合面部语义图实现区域特定风格参数化，利用SBVS预训练空间驱动风格迁移。
AI.result: 在内容保留指标上超越现有方法，同时保持良好的风格迁移效果，首次实现SBVS空间与NST的结合应用。
AI.conclusion: HyperNST通过融合SBVS度量空间与Hyper-networks，在区域级风格控制与内容保留间取得平衡，为NST研究提供新方向。

We show for the first time that such space may be used to drive NST, enabling the application and interpolation of styles from an SBVS system. The technical contribution is a hyper-network that predicts weight updates to a StyleGAN2 pre-trained over a diverse gamut of artistic content (portraits), tailoring the style parameterization on a per-region basis using a semantic map of the facial regions. We show HyperNST to exceed state of the art in content preservation for our stylized content while retaining good style transfer performance. 我们推出 HyperNST；一种基于超网络和 StyleGAN2 架构的用于图像艺术风格化的神经风格迁移 (NST) 技术。我们的贡献是一种新颖的方法，用于诱导由度量空间参数化的风格转移，并针对基于风格的视觉搜索（SBVS）进行了预训练。我们首次证明这样的空间可以用来驱动 NST，从而实现 SBVS 系统的样式应用和插值。技术贡献是一个超网络，它可以预测在各种艺术内容（肖像）上预先训练的 StyleGAN2 的权重更新，并使用面部区域的语义图在每个区域的基础上定制风格参数化。我们展示了 HyperNST 在风格化内容的内容保存方面超越了最先进的技术，同时保留了良好的风格转移性能。 本文提出HyperNST方法，结合Hyper-networks与StyleGAN2架构，利用预训练的风格基视觉搜索（SBVS）度量空间实现参数化神经风格迁移。 Dan Ruta,Andrew Gilbert,Saeid Motiian,Baldo Faieta,Zhe Lin,John Collomosse cs.CV

title: Exploring the trade off between human driving imitation and safety for traffic simulation
title_zh: 探索交通模拟的人类驾驶模仿与安全性之间的权衡
abstract: Traffic simulation has gained a lot of interest for quantitative evaluation of self driving vehicles performance. In order for a simulator to be a valuable test bench, it is required that the driving policy animating each traffic agent in the scene acts as humans would do while maintaining minimal safety guarantees. Learning the driving policies of traffic agents from recorded human driving data or through reinforcement learning seems to be an attractive solution for the generation of realistic and highly interactive traffic situations in uncontrolled intersections or roundabouts. In this work, we show that a trade-off exists between imitating human driving and maintaining safety when learning driving policies. We do this by comparing how various Imitation learning and Reinforcement learning algorithms perform when applied to the driving task. We also propose a multi objective learning algorithm (MOPPO) that improves both objectives together. We test our driving policies on highly interactive driving scenarios extracted from INTERACTION Dataset to evaluate how human-like they behave.
summary: Traffic simulation has gained a lot of interest for quantitative evaluation of self driving vehicles performance. In order for a simulator to be a valuable test bench, it is required that the driving policy animating each traffic agent in the scene acts as humans would do while maintaining minimal safety guarantees. Learning the driving policies of traffic agents from recorded human driving data or through reinforcement learning seems to be an attractive solution for the generation of realistic and highly interactive traffic situations in uncontrolled intersections or roundabouts. In this work, we show that a trade-off exists between imitating human driving and maintaining safety when learning driving policies. We do this by comparing how various Imitation learning and Reinforcement learning algorithms perform when applied to the driving task. We also propose a multi objective learning algorithm (MOPPO) that improves both objectives together. We test our driving policies on highly interactive driving scenarios extracted from INTERACTION Dataset to evaluate how human-like they behave.
abstract_zh: 交通模拟对于自动驾驶车辆性能的定量评估引起了广泛关注。为了使模拟器成为有价值的测试平台，需要使场景中每个交通代理的驾驶策略像人类一样行事，同时保持最低限度的安全保证。从记录的人类驾驶数据或通过强化学习来学习交通代理的驾驶策略似乎是在不受控制的十字路口或环岛中生成真实且高度交互的交通情况的一个有吸引力的解决方案。在这项工作中，我们表明在学习驾驶策略时，模仿人类驾驶和维护安全之间存在权衡。我们通过比较各种模仿学习和强化学习算法在应用于驾驶任务时的表现来做到这一点。我们还提出了一种多目标学习算法（MOPPO），可以同时改进这两个目标。我们在从交互数据集中提取的高度交互的驾驶场景上测试我们的驾驶策略，以评估它们的行为是否像人类一样。

AI.tldr: 本文研究交通模拟中人类驾驶行为模仿与安全性的权衡问题，提出多目标学习算法MOPPO以兼顾两者。
AI.motivation: 现有交通模拟需要既符合人类驾驶习惯又保证安全的智能体行为，但模仿人类驾驶与安全性存在矛盾，需探索有效平衡方法。
AI.method: 比较模仿学习与强化学习算法在驾驶任务中的表现，提出结合多目标优化的MOPPO算法，并在INTERACTION数据集场景中验证。
AI.result: MOPPO算法在保持人类驾驶行为真实性的同时提升了安全性，优于单一目标的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 驾驶行为模仿与安全性存在固有矛盾，多目标学习框架能有效协调二者，为交通模拟提供新思路。

title: Integrating connection search in graph queries
title_zh: 在图查询中集成连接搜索
abstract: Graph data management and querying has many practical applications. When graphs are very heterogeneous and/or users are unfamiliar with their structure, they may need to find how two or more groups of nodes are connected in a graph, even when users are not able to describe the connections. This is only partially supported by existing query languages, which allow searching for paths, but not for trees connecting three or more node groups. The latter is related to the NP-hard Group Steiner Tree problem, and has been previously considered for keyword search in databases. In this work, we formally show how to integrate connecting tree patterns (CTPs, in short) within a graph query language such as SPARQL or Cypher, leading to an Extended Query Language (or EQL, in short). We then study a set of algorithms for evaluating CTPs; we generalize prior keyword search work, most importantly by (i) considering bidirectional edge traversal and (ii) allowing users to select any score function for ranking CTP results. To cope with very large search spaces, we propose an efficient pruning technique and formally establish a large set of cases where our algorithm, MOLESP, is complete even with pruning. Our experiments validate the performance of our CTP and EQL evaluation algorithms on a large set of synthetic and real-world workloads.
summary: Graph data management and querying has many practical applications. When graphs are very heterogeneous and/or users are unfamiliar with their structure, they may need to find how two or more groups of nodes are connected in a graph, even when users are not able to describe the connections. This is only partially supported by existing query languages, which allow searching for paths, but not for trees connecting three or more node groups. The latter is related to the NP-hard Group Steiner Tree problem, and has been previously considered for keyword search in databases. In this work, we formally show how to integrate connecting tree patterns (CTPs, in short) within a graph query language such as SPARQL or Cypher, leading to an Extended Query Language (or EQL, in short). We then study a set of algorithms for evaluating CTPs; we generalize prior keyword search work, most importantly by (i) considering bidirectional edge traversal and (ii) allowing users to select any score function for ranking CTP results. To cope with very large search spaces, we propose an efficient pruning technique and formally establish a large set of cases where our algorithm, MOLESP, is complete even with pruning. Our experiments validate the performance of our CTP and EQL evaluation algorithms on a large set of synthetic and real-world workloads.
abstract_zh: 图数据管理和查询有许多实际应用。当图非常异构和/或用户不熟悉其结构时，他们可能需要找出图中的两组或更多组节点如何连接，即使用户无法描述连接。现有查询语言仅部分支持这一点，这些语言允许搜索路径，但不能搜索连接三个或更多节点组的树。后者与 NP-hard Group Steiner Tree 问题相关，并且之前已被考虑用于数据库中的关键字搜索。在这项工作中，我们正式展示了如何将连接树模式（简称 CTP）集成到图查询语言（例如 SPARQL 或 Cypher）中，从而形成扩展查询语言（简称 EQL）。然后我们研究了一套评估 CTP 的算法；我们概括了先前的关键字搜索工作，最重要的是（i）考虑双向边缘遍历和（ii）允许用户选择任何评分函数来对 CTP 结果进行排名。为了应对非常大的搜索空间，我们提出了一种有效的剪枝技术，并正式建立了一大组案例，其中我们的算法 MOLESP 即使经过剪枝也是完整的。我们的实验验证了我们的 CTP 和 EQL 评估算法在大量合成和实际工作负载上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种扩展的图查询语言（EQL），通过集成连接树模式（CTP）来解决异构图中多节点组连接查询的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图查询语言难以处理用户无法明确描述连接路径的复杂场景，尤其无法高效查询连接三个及以上节点组的树结构，需解决NP难的Group Steiner Tree问题。
AI.method: 将CTP形式化集成至SPARQL/Cypher等语言，设计支持双向边遍历和自定义评分函数的MOLESP算法，并引入高效剪枝技术保证算法完整性。
AI.result: 实验验证了CTP评估算法在合成数据和真实场景中的性能，证明MOLESP在大规模图数据中具有高效性与完备性。
AI.conclusion: EQL和MOLESP为复杂图连接查询提供了可扩展的解决方案，有效支持用户在未知图结构下的多组节点连接发现需求。

authors_text: Wannaphong Phatthiyaphaibun,Chompakorn Chaksangchaichot,Peerat Limkonchotiwat,Ekapol Chuangsuwanich,Sarana Nutanong
title: Thai Wav2Vec2.0 with CommonVoice V8
title_zh: 泰语 Wav2Vec2.0 与 CommonVoice V8
abstract: Recently, Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), a system that converts audio into text, has caught a lot of attention in the machine learning community. Thus, a lot of publicly available models were released in HuggingFace. However, most of these ASR models are available in English; only a minority of the models are available in Thai. Additionally, most of the Thai ASR models are closed-sourced, and the performance of existing open-sourced models lacks robustness. To address this problem, we train a new ASR model on a pre-trained XLSR-Wav2Vec model with the Thai CommonVoice corpus V8 and train a trigram language model to boost the performance of our ASR model. We hope that our models will be beneficial to individuals and the ASR community in Thailand.
summary: Recently, Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), a system that converts audio into text, has caught a lot of attention in the machine learning community. Thus, a lot of publicly available models were released in HuggingFace. However, most of these ASR models are available in English; only a minority of the models are available in Thai. Additionally, most of the Thai ASR models are closed-sourced, and the performance of existing open-sourced models lacks robustness. To address this problem, we train a new ASR model on a pre-trained XLSR-Wav2Vec model with the Thai CommonVoice corpus V8 and train a trigram language model to boost the performance of our ASR model. We hope that our models will be beneficial to individuals and the ASR community in Thailand.
abstract_zh: 最近，自动语音识别（ASR）这种将音频转换为文本的系统在机器学习界引起了广泛关注。因此，HuggingFace 中发布了很多公开可用的模型。然而，大多数 ASR 模型都有英文版本；只有少数型号有泰语版本。此外，大多数泰国ASR模型都是闭源的，现有开源模型的性能缺乏鲁棒性。为了解决这个问题，我们使用 Thai CommonVoice 语料库 V8 在预训练的 XLSR-Wav2Vec 模型上训练新的 ASR 模型，并训练 trigram 语言模型以提高 ASR 模型的性能。我们希望我们的模型能够对泰国的个人和 ASR 社区有益。

AI.tldr: 开发基于XLSR-Wav2Vec预训练模型和泰语CommonVoice V8语料库的泰语自动语音识别（ASR）模型，并结合三元语言模型提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有泰语ASR模型多为闭源且开源模型性能不稳定，缺乏可靠的开源解决方案以支持泰国ASR技术发展。
AI.method: 基于预训练XLSR-Wav2Vec模型，使用泰语CommonVoice V8语料库进行微调，并训练三元语言模型优化识别效果。
AI.result: 构建了性能更稳健的泰语ASR模型，提升泰语语音识别准确率与鲁棒性。

search_text: Thai Wav2Vec2.0 with CommonVoice V8 泰语 Wav2Vec2.0 与 CommonVoice V8 Recently, Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), a system that converts audio into text, has caught a lot of attention in the machine learning community. Thus, a lot of publicly available models were released in HuggingFace. However, most of these ASR models are available in English; only a minority of the models are available in Thai. Additionally, most of the Thai ASR models are closed-sourced, and the performance of existing open-sourced models lacks robustness. To address this problem, we train a new ASR model on a pre-trained XLSR-Wav2Vec model with the Thai CommonVoice corpus V8 and train a trigram language model to boost the performance of our ASR model. We hope that our models will be beneficial to individuals and the ASR community in Thailand. 最近，自动语音识别（ASR）这种将音频转换为文本的系统在机器学习界引起了广泛关注。因此，HuggingFace 中发布了很多公开可用的模型。然而，大多数 ASR 模型都有英文版本；只有少数型号有泰语版本。此外，大多数泰国ASR模型都是闭源的，现有开源模型的性能缺乏鲁棒性。为了解决这个问题，我们使用 Thai CommonVoice 语料库 V8 在预训练的 XLSR-Wav2Vec 模型上训练新的 ASR 模型，并训练 trigram 语言模型以提高 ASR 模型的性能。我们希望我们的模型能够对泰国的个人和 ASR 社区有益。 开发基于XLSR-Wav2Vec预训练模型和泰语CommonVoice V8语料库的泰语自动语音识别（ASR）模型，并结合三元语言模型提升性能。 Wannaphong Phatthiyaphaibun,Chompakorn Chaksangchaichot,Peerat Limkonchotiwat,Ekapol Chuangsuwanich,Sarana Nutanong cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Elmira Moussavi,Dominik Sisejkovic,Animesh Singh,Daniyar Kizatov,Rainer Leupers,Sven Ingebrandt,Vivek Pachauri,Farhad Merchant
title: A Temperature Independent Readout Circuit for ISFET-Based Sensor Applications
title_zh: 适用于基于 ISFET 的传感器应用的与温度无关的读出电路
abstract: The ion-sensitive field-effect transistor (ISFET) is an emerging technology that has received much attention in numerous research areas, including biochemistry, medicine, and security applications. However, compared to other types of sensors, the complexity of ISFETs make it more challenging to achieve a sensitive, fast and repeatable response. Therefore, various readout circuits have been developed to improve the performance of ISFETs, especially to eliminate the temperature effect. This paper presents a new approach for a temperature-independent readout circuit that uses the threshold voltage differences of an ISFET-MOSFET pair. The Linear Technology Simulation Program with Integrated Circuit Emphasis (LTspice) is used to analyze the ISFET performance based on the proposed readout circuit characteristics. A macro-model is used to model ISFET behavior, including the first-level Spice model for the MOSFET part and Verilog-A to model the surface potential, reference electrode, and electrolyte of the ISFET to determine the relationships between variables.In this way, the behavior of the ISFET is monitored by the output voltage of the readout circuit based on a change in the electrolyte's hydrogen potential (pH), determined by the simulation. The proposed readout circuit has a temperature coefficient of 11.9 $ppm/°C$ for a temperature range of 0-100 $°C$ and pH between 1 and 13. The proposed ISFET readout circuit outperforms other designs in terms of simplicity and not requiring an additional sensor.
summary: The ion-sensitive field-effect transistor (ISFET) is an emerging technology that has received much attention in numerous research areas, including biochemistry, medicine, and security applications. However, compared to other types of sensors, the complexity of ISFETs make it more challenging to achieve a sensitive, fast and repeatable response. Therefore, various readout circuits have been developed to improve the performance of ISFETs, especially to eliminate the temperature effect. This paper presents a new approach for a temperature-independent readout circuit that uses the threshold voltage differences of an ISFET-MOSFET pair. The Linear Technology Simulation Program with Integrated Circuit Emphasis (LTspice) is used to analyze the ISFET performance based on the proposed readout circuit characteristics. A macro-model is used to model ISFET behavior, including the first-level Spice model for the MOSFET part and Verilog-A to model the surface potential, reference electrode, and electrolyte of the ISFET to determine the relationships between variables.In this way, the behavior of the ISFET is monitored by the output voltage of the readout circuit based on a change in the electrolyte's hydrogen potential (pH), determined by the simulation. The proposed readout circuit has a temperature coefficient of 11.9 $ppm/°C$ for a temperature range of 0-100 $°C$ and pH between 1 and 13. The proposed ISFET readout circuit outperforms other designs in terms of simplicity and not requiring an additional sensor.
abstract_zh: 离子敏感场效应晶体管（ISFET）是一项新兴技术，在生物化学、医学和安全应用等众多研究领域受到广泛关注。然而，与其他类型的传感器相比，ISFET 的复杂性使得实现灵敏、快速和可重复的响应更具挑战性。因此，人们开发了各种读出电路来提高ISFET的性能，特别是消除温度影响。本文提出了一种使用 ISFET-MOSFET 对的阈值电压差的与温度无关的读出电路的新方法。线性技术的集成电路重点仿真程序 (LTspice) 用于根据所提出的读出电路特性来分析 ISFET 性能。宏模型用于对 ISFET 行为进行建模，包括 MOSFET 部件的第一级 Spice 模型以及对 ISFET 的表面电势、参考电极和电解质进行建模的 Verilog-A，以确定变量之间的关系。这样，根据仿真确定的电解质氢势 (pH) 的变化，通过读出电路的输出电压来监控 ISFET 的行为。所提议的读出电路在 0-100 $°C$ 温度范围和 1 至 13 之间的 pH 范围内具有 11.9 $ppm/°C$ 的温度系数。所提议的 ISFET 读出电路在简单性和不需要额外传感器方面优于其他设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于ISFET传感器的温度无关读出电路设计，通过利用ISFET-MOSFET对的阈值电压差异来消除温度影响。
AI.motivation: ISFET传感器在生物化学、医疗等领域应用广泛，但其性能受温度影响较大，现有读出电路复杂或需额外传感器来补偿温度效应。
AI.method: 采用LTspice仿真工具结合宏模型，使用Spice模型模拟MOSFET部分，Verilog-A建模ISFET的表面电势、参比电极及电解质，分析读出电路性能。
AI.result: 提出的读出电路在0-100°C温度范围内和pH 1-13条件下，温度系数低至11.9 ppm/°C，且无需额外传感器，优于现有设计。
AI.conclusion: 该读出电路有效解决了ISFET的温度依赖性问题，同时简化了系统结构，为高精度传感器应用提供了可行方案。

title: Combining Stochastic Defenses to Resist Gradient Inversion: An Ablation Study
title_zh: 结合随机防御来抵抗梯度反转：消融研究
comment: This version represents a comprehensive rework of the initial study, including substantial updates to the methodology, analysis, and conclusions. 26 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
comments: This version represents a comprehensive rework of the initial study, including substantial updates to the methodology, analysis, and conclusions. 26 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Gradient Inversion (GI) attacks are a ubiquitous threat in Federated Learning (FL) as they exploit gradient leakage to reconstruct supposedly private training data. Common defense mechanisms such as Differential Privacy (DP) or stochastic Privacy Modules (PMs) introduce randomness during gradient computation to prevent such attacks. However, we pose that if an attacker effectively mimics a client's stochastic gradient computation, the attacker can circumvent the defense and reconstruct clients' private training data. This paper introduces several targeted GI attacks that leverage this principle to bypass common defense mechanisms. As a result, we demonstrate that no individual defense provides sufficient privacy protection. To address this issue, we propose to combine multiple defenses. We conduct an extensive ablation study to evaluate the influence of various combinations of defenses on privacy protection and model utility. We observe that only the combination of DP and a stochastic PM was sufficient to decrease the Attack Success Rate (ASR) from 100% to 0%, thus preserving privacy. Moreover, we found that this combination of defenses consistently achieves the best trade-off between privacy and model utility.
summary: Gradient Inversion (GI) attacks are a ubiquitous threat in Federated Learning (FL) as they exploit gradient leakage to reconstruct supposedly private training data. Common defense mechanisms such as Differential Privacy (DP) or stochastic Privacy Modules (PMs) introduce randomness during gradient computation to prevent such attacks. However, we pose that if an attacker effectively mimics a client's stochastic gradient computation, the attacker can circumvent the defense and reconstruct clients' private training data. This paper introduces several targeted GI attacks that leverage this principle to bypass common defense mechanisms. As a result, we demonstrate that no individual defense provides sufficient privacy protection. To address this issue, we propose to combine multiple defenses. We conduct an extensive ablation study to evaluate the influence of various combinations of defenses on privacy protection and model utility. We observe that only the combination of DP and a stochastic PM was sufficient to decrease the Attack Success Rate (ASR) from 100% to 0%, thus preserving privacy. Moreover, we found that this combination of defenses consistently achieves the best trade-off between privacy and model utility.
abstract_zh: 梯度反转 (GI) 攻击是联邦学习 (FL) 中普遍存在的威胁，因为它们利用梯度泄漏来重建所谓的私有训练数据。差分隐私 (DP) 或随机隐私模块 (PM) 等常见防御机制在梯度计算过程中引入随机性以防止此类攻击。然而，我们认为，如果攻击者有效地模仿客户端的随机梯度计算，则攻击者可以绕过防御并重建客户端的私人训练数据。本文介绍了几种利用这一原理绕过常见防御机制的定向 GI 攻击。因此，我们证明没有任何个人防御可以提供足够的隐私保护。为了解决这个问题，我们建议结合多种防御措施。我们进行了广泛的消融研究，以评估各种防御组合对隐私保护和模型效用的影响。我们观察到，只有 DP 和随机 PM 的组合就足以将攻击成功率 (ASR) 从 100% 降低到 0%，从而保护隐私。此外，我们发现这种防御组合始终能够实现隐私和模型效用之间的最佳权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文通过消融实验研究结合随机防御机制以抵御联邦学习中的梯度反演攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有防御机制如差分隐私(DP)或随机隐私模块(PM)可能被攻击者通过模拟随机梯度计算绕过，需探索更有效的组合防御方案。
AI.method: 设计针对随机防御的梯度反演攻击，系统评估多种防御组合对隐私保护与模型效用的影响。
AI.result: 仅DP与随机PM的组合将攻击成功率(ASR)从100%降至0%，在隐私与模型效用间取得最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: 组合DP与随机PM是当前最有效的防御方案，证明多防御机制协同可增强联邦学习隐私安全性。

search_text: Combining Stochastic Defenses to Resist Gradient Inversion: An Ablation Study 结合随机防御来抵抗梯度反转：消融研究 Gradient Inversion (GI) attacks are a ubiquitous threat in Federated Learning (FL) as they exploit gradient leakage to reconstruct supposedly private training data. Common defense mechanisms such as Differential Privacy (DP) or stochastic Privacy Modules (PMs) introduce randomness during gradient computation to prevent such attacks. However, we pose that if an attacker effectively mimics a client's stochastic gradient computation, the attacker can circumvent the defense and reconstruct clients' private training data. This paper introduces several targeted GI attacks that leverage this principle to bypass common defense mechanisms. As a result, we demonstrate that no individual defense provides sufficient privacy protection. To address this issue, we propose to combine multiple defenses. We conduct an extensive ablation study to evaluate the influence of various combinations of defenses on privacy protection and model utility. We observe that only the combination of DP and a stochastic PM was sufficient to decrease the Attack Success Rate (ASR) from 100% to 0%, thus preserving privacy. Moreover, we found that this combination of defenses consistently achieves the best trade-off between privacy and model utility. 梯度反转 (GI) 攻击是联邦学习 (FL) 中普遍存在的威胁，因为它们利用梯度泄漏来重建所谓的私有训练数据。差分隐私 (DP) 或随机隐私模块 (PM) 等常见防御机制在梯度计算过程中引入随机性以防止此类攻击。然而，我们认为，如果攻击者有效地模仿客户端的随机梯度计算，则攻击者可以绕过防御并重建客户端的私人训练数据。本文介绍了几种利用这一原理绕过常见防御机制的定向 GI 攻击。因此，我们证明没有任何个人防御可以提供足够的隐私保护。为了解决这个问题，我们建议结合多种防御措施。我们进行了广泛的消融研究，以评估各种防御组合对隐私保护和模型效用的影响。我们观察到，只有 DP 和随机 PM 的组合就足以将攻击成功率 (ASR) 从 100% 降低到 0%，从而保护隐私。此外，我们发现这种防御组合始终能够实现隐私和模型效用之间的最佳权衡。 本文通过消融实验研究结合随机防御机制以抵御联邦学习中的梯度反演攻击。 Daniel Scheliga,Patrick Mäder,Marco Seeland cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

title: Semantic Segmentation-Assisted Instance Feature Fusion for Multi-Level 3D Part Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 用于多级 3D 零件实例分割的语义分割辅助实例特征融合
comment: Accepted by Computational Visual Media. Project page: https://isunchy.github.io/projects/3d_instance_segmentation.html
comments: Accepted by Computational Visual Media. Project page: https://isunchy.github.io/projects/3d_instance_segmentation.html
abstract: Recognizing 3D part instances from a 3D point cloud is crucial for 3D structure and scene understanding. Several learning-based approaches use semantic segmentation and instance center prediction as training tasks and fail to further exploit the inherent relationship between shape semantics and part instances. In this paper, we present a new method for 3D part instance segmentation. Our method exploits semantic segmentation to fuse nonlocal instance features, such as center prediction, and further enhances the fusion scheme in a multi- and cross-level way. We also propose a semantic region center prediction task to train and leverage the prediction results to improve the clustering of instance points. Our method outperforms existing methods with a large-margin improvement in the PartNet benchmark. We also demonstrate that our feature fusion scheme can be applied to other existing methods to improve their performance in indoor scene instance segmentation tasks.
summary: Recognizing 3D part instances from a 3D point cloud is crucial for 3D structure and scene understanding. Several learning-based approaches use semantic segmentation and instance center prediction as training tasks and fail to further exploit the inherent relationship between shape semantics and part instances. In this paper, we present a new method for 3D part instance segmentation. Our method exploits semantic segmentation to fuse nonlocal instance features, such as center prediction, and further enhances the fusion scheme in a multi- and cross-level way. We also propose a semantic region center prediction task to train and leverage the prediction results to improve the clustering of instance points. Our method outperforms existing methods with a large-margin improvement in the PartNet benchmark. We also demonstrate that our feature fusion scheme can be applied to other existing methods to improve their performance in indoor scene instance segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 从 3D 点云中识别 3D 零件实例对于 3D 结构和场景理解至关重要。一些基于学习的方法使用语义分割和实例中心预测作为训练任务，但未能进一步利用形状语义和零件实例之间的内在关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种 3D 零件实例分割的新方法。我们的方法利用语义分割来融合非局部实例特征，例如中心预测，并以多级和跨级的方式进一步增强融合方案。我们还提出了语义区域中心预测任务来训练和利用预测结果来改善实例点的聚类。我们的方法优于现有方法，在 PartNet 基准测试中具有大幅改进。我们还证明了我们的特征融合方案可以应用于其他现有方法，以提高其在室内场景实例分割任务中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语义分割的实例特征融合方法，用于多级3D部件实例分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分利用形状语义与部件实例间的内在关系，限制了分割性能。
AI.method: 通过语义分割辅助融合非局部实例特征，采用多级跨级增强方案，并引入语义区域中心预测任务优化点聚类。
AI.result: 在PartNet基准测试中显著超越现有方法，且该特征融合方案可提升其他方法在室内场景分割的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过语义引导的特征融合有效提升3D部件实例分割精度，具有通用性。

title: "Is It My Turn?" Assessing Teamwork and Taskwork in Collaborative Immersive Analytics
title_zh: “轮到我了吗？”评估协作沉浸式分析中的团队合作和任务工作
comment: To appear at the 25th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing (CSCW '22)
comments: To appear at the 25th ACM Conference On Computer-Supported Cooperative Work And Social Computing (CSCW '22)
abstract: Immersive analytics has the potential to promote collaboration in machine learning (ML). This is desired due to the specific characteristics of ML modeling in practice, namely the complexity of ML, the interdisciplinary approach in industry, and the need for ML interpretability. In this work, we introduce an augmented reality-based system for collaborative immersive analytics that is designed to support ML modeling in interdisciplinary teams. We conduct a user study to examine how collaboration unfolds when users with different professional backgrounds and levels of ML knowledge interact in solving different ML tasks. Specifically, we use the pair analytics methodology and performance assessments to assess collaboration and explore their interactions with each other and the system. Based on this, we provide qualitative and quantitative results on both teamwork and taskwork during collaboration. Our results show how our system elicits sustained collaboration as measured along six distinct dimensions. We finally make recommendations how immersive systems should be designed to elicit sustained collaboration in ML modeling.
summary: Immersive analytics has the potential to promote collaboration in machine learning (ML). This is desired due to the specific characteristics of ML modeling in practice, namely the complexity of ML, the interdisciplinary approach in industry, and the need for ML interpretability. In this work, we introduce an augmented reality-based system for collaborative immersive analytics that is designed to support ML modeling in interdisciplinary teams. We conduct a user study to examine how collaboration unfolds when users with different professional backgrounds and levels of ML knowledge interact in solving different ML tasks. Specifically, we use the pair analytics methodology and performance assessments to assess collaboration and explore their interactions with each other and the system. Based on this, we provide qualitative and quantitative results on both teamwork and taskwork during collaboration. Our results show how our system elicits sustained collaboration as measured along six distinct dimensions. We finally make recommendations how immersive systems should be designed to elicit sustained collaboration in ML modeling.
abstract_zh: 沉浸式分析有潜力促进机器学习 (ML) 领域的协作。这是由于 ML 建模在实践中的具体特征，即 ML 的复杂性、行业中的跨学科方法以及 ML 可解释性的需要而实现的。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种基于增强现实的协作沉浸式分析系统，旨在支持跨学科团队中的机器学习建模。我们进行了一项用户研究，以研究当具有不同专业背景和 ML 知识水平的用户在解决不同 ML 任务时进行交互时，协作是如何展开的。具体来说，我们使用结对分析方法和绩效评估来评估协作并探索它们彼此之间以及系统之间的交互。在此基础上，我们提供协作过程中团队合作和任务工作的定性和定量结果。我们的结果展示了我们的系统如何从六个不同的维度来衡量持续的协作。最后，我们提出了如何设计沉浸式系统以引发机器学习建模中持续协作的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于增强现实的协作沉浸式分析系统，用于支持跨学科团队的机器学习建模，并通过用户研究评估协作与任务执行的互动关系。
AI.motivation: 机器学习建模具有复杂性、跨学科性和可解释性需求，传统方法难以有效支持跨专业背景用户的协作，需探索沉浸式技术提升团队协作效率。
AI.method: 开发基于增强现实的协作系统，通过用户研究结合Pair Analytics方法与绩效评估，分析不同专业背景用户在解决ML任务时的协作模式与系统互动。
AI.result: 系统在六个维度上促进持续协作，定量与定性结果表明跨学科团队在任务执行中存在明确的协作动态与知识交互模式。
AI.conclusion: 沉浸式系统设计需强化跨学科协作支持功能，如实时知识共享、角色自适应界面和任务导向反馈机制，以提升机器学习建模中的团队效能。

title: Digital health shopping assistant with React Native: a simple technological solution to a complex health problem
title_zh: 使用 React Native 的数字健康购物助手：复杂健康问题的简单技术解决方案
comment: ef:2022 International Conference on Intelligent Data Science Technologies and Applications (IDSTA), 2022, pp. 34-40
comments: ef:2022 International Conference on Intelligent Data Science Technologies and Applications (IDSTA), 2022, pp. 34-40
abstract: Today, more and more people are reporting allergies, which can range from simple reactions close to discomfort to anaphylactic shocks. Other people may not be allergic but avoid certain foods for personal reasons. Daily food shopping of these people is hampered by the fact that unwanted ingredients can be hidden in any food, and it is difficult to find them all. The paper presents a digital health shopping assistant called "Diet Helper", aimed to make life easier for such people by making it easy to determine whether a product is suitable for consumption, according to the specific dietary requirements of both types - existing diet and self-defined. This is achieved by capturing ingredient label, received by the app as an input, which the app analyses, converting the captured label to text, and filters out unwanted ingredients that according to the user should be avoided as either allergens or products to which the consumer is intolerant etc, helping the user decide if the product is suitable for consumption. This should make daily grocery shopping easier by providing the user with more accurate and simplified product selection in seconds, reducing the total time spent in the grocery stores, which is especially relevant in light of COVID-19, although it was and will remain out of it due to the busy schedules and active rhythm of life of modern society. The app is developed using the React Native framework and Google Firebase platform, which makes it easy to develop, use and extend such solutions thereby encouraging to start actively developing solutions that could improve wellbeing.

This should make daily grocery shopping easier by providing the user with more accurate and simplified product selection in seconds, reducing the total time spent in the grocery stores, which is especially relevant in light of COVID-19, although it was and will remain out of it due to the busy schedules and active rhythm of life of modern society. The app is developed using the React Native framework and Google Firebase platform, which makes it easy to develop, use and extend such solutions thereby encouraging to start actively developing solutions that could improve wellbeing.
abstract_zh: 如今，越来越多的人报告过敏，其范围从接近不适的简单反应到过敏性休克。其他人可能不会过敏，但会因个人原因而避免某些食物。这些人的日常食品购物受到阻碍，因为任何食物中都可能隐藏着不需要的成分，而且很难全部找到。该论文提出了一种名为“饮食助手”的数字健康购物助手，旨在根据现有饮食和自定义两种类型的具体饮食要求，轻松确定产品是否适合食用，从而使此类人群的生活更加轻松。这是通过捕获成分标签来实现的，应用程序接收成分标签作为输入，应用程序对其进行分析，将捕获的标签转换为文本，并过滤掉用户认为应该避免的不需要的成分，这些成分要么是过敏原，要么是消费者不耐受的产品等，帮助用户决定产品是否适合消费。这应该会让用户在几秒钟内提供更准确和简化的产品选择，从而减少在杂货店花费的总时间，从而使日常杂货购物变得更加容易，这在 COVID-19 的背景下尤其重要，尽管由于现代社会繁忙的日程和活跃的生活节奏，它过去和将来都不会出现在杂货店里。该应用程序是使用 React Native 框架和 Google Firebase 平台开发的，这使得开发、使用和扩展此类解决方案变得容易，从而鼓励人们开始积极开发可以改善福祉的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 开发基于React Native的数字健康购物助手'Diet Helper'，通过扫描分析食品成分标签帮助过敏或有饮食限制用户快速筛选适合商品。
AI.motivation: 过敏人群及特殊饮食需求者面临食品成分难以识别的问题，传统购物方式耗时且易出错，尤其在疫情背景下更需提升购物效率。
AI.method: 采用React Native框架与Google Firebase平台开发移动应用，通过图像识别技术将食品标签转化为文本，结合用户设定的过敏原或禁忌成分进行智能过滤。
AI.result: 实现用户通过扫描食品标签即时获取成分分析结果，自动筛选不符合饮食要求的商品，显著缩短购物决策时间并提升准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该技术方案验证了移动应用在解决复杂健康问题中的有效性，为未来开发更多健康辅助工具提供了可复用的技术框架和实践参考。

search_text: Digital health shopping assistant with React Native: a simple technological solution to a complex health problem 使用 React Native 的数字健康购物助手：复杂健康问题的简单技术解决方案 Today, more and more people are reporting allergies, which can range from simple reactions close to discomfort to anaphylactic shocks. Other people may not be allergic but avoid certain foods for personal reasons. Daily food shopping of these people is hampered by the fact that unwanted ingredients can be hidden in any food, and it is difficult to find them all. The paper presents a digital health shopping assistant called "Diet Helper", aimed to make life easier for such people by making it easy to determine whether a product is suitable for consumption, according to the specific dietary requirements of both types - existing diet and self-defined. This is achieved by capturing ingredient label, received by the app as an input, which the app analyses, converting the captured label to text, and filters out unwanted ingredients that according to the user should be avoided as either allergens or products to which the consumer is intolerant etc, helping the user decide if the product is suitable for consumption. This should make daily grocery shopping easier by providing the user with more accurate and simplified product selection in seconds, reducing the total time spent in the grocery stores, which is especially relevant in light of COVID-19, although it was and will remain out of it due to the busy schedules and active rhythm of life of modern society. The app is developed using the React Native framework and Google Firebase platform, which makes it easy to develop, use and extend such solutions thereby encouraging to start actively developing solutions that could improve wellbeing. 如今，越来越多的人报告过敏，其范围从接近不适的简单反应到过敏性休克。其他人可能不会过敏，但会因个人原因而避免某些食物。这些人的日常食品购物受到阻碍，因为任何食物中都可能隐藏着不需要的成分，而且很难全部找到。该论文提出了一种名为“饮食助手”的数字健康购物助手，旨在根据现有饮食和自定义两种类型的具体饮食要求，轻松确定产品是否适合食用，从而使此类人群的生活更加轻松。这是通过捕获成分标签来实现的，应用程序接收成分标签作为输入，应用程序对其进行分析，将捕获的标签转换为文本，并过滤掉用户认为应该避免的不需要的成分，这些成分要么是过敏原，要么是消费者不耐受的产品等，帮助用户决定产品是否适合消费。这应该会让用户在几秒钟内提供更准确和简化的产品选择，从而减少在杂货店花费的总时间，从而使日常杂货购物变得更加容易，这在 COVID-19 的背景下尤其重要，尽管由于现代社会繁忙的日程和活跃的生活节奏，它过去和将来都不会出现在杂货店里。该应用程序是使用 React Native 框架和 Google Firebase 平台开发的，这使得开发、使用和扩展此类解决方案变得容易，从而鼓励人们开始积极开发可以改善福祉的解决方案。 开发基于React Native的数字健康购物助手'Diet Helper'，通过扫描分析食品成分标签帮助过敏或有饮食限制用户快速筛选适合商品。 Alina Govoruhina,Anastasija Nikiforova cs.CY,cs.HC

title: Direct Centroidal Control for Balanced Humanoid Locomotion
title_zh: 平衡人形运动的直接质心控制
comment: 25th International Conference Series on Climbing and Walking Robots (CLAWAR), Ponta Delgada, Azores, Portugal, September 2022
comments: 25th International Conference Series on Climbing and Walking Robots (CLAWAR), Ponta Delgada, Azores, Portugal, September 2022
abstract: We present an integrated approach to locomotion and balancing of humanoid robots based on direct centroidal control. Our method uses a five-mass description of a humanoid. It generates whole-body motions from desired foot trajectories and centroidal parameters of the robot. A set of simplified models is used to formulate general and intuitive control laws, which are then applied in real-time for estimating and regulating the center of mass position and orientation of the multibody's principal axes of inertia. The combination of proposed algorithms produces a stretched-leg gait with naturally looking upper body motions. As only a 6-axis IMU and joint encoders are necessary for the implementation, the portability between robots is high. Our method has been experimentally verified using an igus Humanoid Open Platform, demonstrating whole-body locomotion and push rejection capabilities.
summary: We present an integrated approach to locomotion and balancing of humanoid robots based on direct centroidal control. Our method uses a five-mass description of a humanoid. It generates whole-body motions from desired foot trajectories and centroidal parameters of the robot. A set of simplified models is used to formulate general and intuitive control laws, which are then applied in real-time for estimating and regulating the center of mass position and orientation of the multibody's principal axes of inertia. The combination of proposed algorithms produces a stretched-leg gait with naturally looking upper body motions. As only a 6-axis IMU and joint encoders are necessary for the implementation, the portability between robots is high. Our method has been experimentally verified using an igus Humanoid Open Platform, demonstrating whole-body locomotion and push rejection capabilities.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于直接质心控制的人形机器人运动和平衡的集成方法。我们的方法使用人形生物的五质量描述。它根据所需的足部轨迹和机器人的质心参数生成全身运动。使用一组简化模型来制定通用且直观的控制律，然后实时应用这些控制律来估计和调节多体惯性主轴的质心位置和方向。所提出的算法的组合产生了具有自然的上半身运动的伸展腿步态。由于实现时只需要6轴IMU和关节编码器，因此机器人之间的可移植性很高。我们的方法已经使用 igus 人形开放平台进行了实验验证，展示了全身运动和推拒功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于直接质心控制的人形机器人平衡行走方法，通过五质量模型和简化控制律实现全身运动生成，仅需6轴IMU和关节编码器即可完成高可移植性控制。
AI.motivation: 传统人形机器人控制方法依赖复杂模型和大量传感器，限制了实时性和跨平台移植性。本文旨在开发更简洁高效的质心控制策略以实现自然平衡行走。
AI.method: 采用五质量模型描述人形机器人，结合期望足端轨迹与质心参数生成全身运动。通过简化动力学模型实时估计并调节质心位置与惯性主轴方向，生成自然上半身动作。
AI.result: 在igus人形开放平台实验验证中，系统成功实现全身运动控制和抗推扰动能力，证明了方法的有效性和硬件可移植性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化模型与传感器需求，在保证控制性能的同时显著提升了人形机器人控制系统的可移植性，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

Our method uses a five-mass description of a humanoid. It generates whole-body motions from desired foot trajectories and centroidal parameters of the robot. A set of simplified models is used to formulate general and intuitive control laws, which are then applied in real-time for estimating and regulating the center of mass position and orientation of the multibody's principal axes of inertia. The combination of proposed algorithms produces a stretched-leg gait with naturally looking upper body motions. As only a 6-axis IMU and joint encoders are necessary for the implementation, the portability between robots is high. Our method has been experimentally verified using an igus Humanoid Open Platform, demonstrating whole-body locomotion and push rejection capabilities. 我们提出了一种基于直接质心控制的人形机器人运动和平衡的集成方法。我们的方法使用人形生物的五质量描述。它根据所需的足部轨迹和机器人的质心参数生成全身运动。使用一组简化模型来制定通用且直观的控制律，然后实时应用这些控制律来估计和调节多体惯性主轴的质心位置和方向。所提出的算法的组合产生了具有自然的上半身运动的伸展腿步态。由于实现时只需要6轴IMU和关节编码器，因此机器人之间的可移植性很高。我们的方法已经使用 igus 人形开放平台进行了实验验证，展示了全身运动和推拒功能。 本文提出一种基于直接质心控制的人形机器人平衡行走方法，通过五质量模型和简化控制律实现全身运动生成，仅需6轴IMU和关节编码器即可完成高可移植性控制。 Grzegorz Ficht,Sven Behnke cs.RO

authors_text: Da-Yi Wu,Wen-Yi Hsiao,Fu-Rong Yang,Oscar Friedman,Warren Jackson,Scott Bruzenak,Yi-Wen Liu,Yi-Hsuan Yang
title: DDSP-based Singing Vocoders: A New Subtractive-based Synthesizer and A Comprehensive Evaluation
title_zh: 基于 DDSP 的歌声声码器：一种新型减法合成器及综合评估
abstract: A vocoder is a conditional audio generation model that converts acoustic features such as mel-spectrograms into waveforms. Taking inspiration from Differentiable Digital Signal Processing (DDSP), we propose a new vocoder named SawSing for singing voices. SawSing synthesizes the harmonic part of singing voices by filtering a sawtooth source signal with a linear time-variant finite impulse response filter whose coefficients are estimated from the input mel-spectrogram by a neural network. As this approach enforces phase continuity, SawSing can generate singing voices without the phase-discontinuity glitch of many existing vocoders. Moreover, the source-filter assumption provides an inductive bias that allows SawSing to be trained on a small amount of data. Our experiments show that SawSing converges much faster and outperforms state-of-the-art generative adversarial network and diffusion-based vocoders in a resource-limited scenario with only 3 training recordings and a 3-hour training time.
summary: A vocoder is a conditional audio generation model that converts acoustic features such as mel-spectrograms into waveforms. Taking inspiration from Differentiable Digital Signal Processing (DDSP), we propose a new vocoder named SawSing for singing voices. SawSing synthesizes the harmonic part of singing voices by filtering a sawtooth source signal with a linear time-variant finite impulse response filter whose coefficients are estimated from the input mel-spectrogram by a neural network. As this approach enforces phase continuity, SawSing can generate singing voices without the phase-discontinuity glitch of many existing vocoders. Moreover, the source-filter assumption provides an inductive bias that allows SawSing to be trained on a small amount of data. Our experiments show that SawSing converges much faster and outperforms state-of-the-art generative adversarial network and diffusion-based vocoders in a resource-limited scenario with only 3 training recordings and a 3-hour training time.
abstract_zh: 声码器是一种条件音频生成模型，可将梅尔频谱图等声学特征转换为波形。受到可微分数字信号处理 (DDSP) 的启发，我们提出了一种名为 SawSing 的新型声码器，用于歌声。 SawSing 通过使用线性时变有限脉冲响应滤波器过滤锯齿源信号来合成歌声的谐波部分，该滤波器的系数由神经网络根据输入梅尔频谱图估计。由于这种方法增强了相位连续性，SawSing 可以生成歌声，而不会出现许多现有声码器的相位不连续性故障。此外，源滤波器假设提供了归纳偏差，允许 SawSing 在少量数据上进行训练。我们的实验表明，在资源有限的情况下，SawSing 的收敛速度要快得多，并且优于最先进的生成对抗网络和基于扩散的声码器，只有 3 个训练记录和 3 小时的训练时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于DDSP的新型歌唱语音合成器SawSing，并进行全面评估。
AI.motivation: 现有声码器存在相位不连续性缺陷且依赖大量数据训练，需开发一种能保证相位连续性且数据效率高的歌唱语音合成模型。
AI.method: 通过神经网络从梅尔频谱图估计线性时变FIR滤波器系数，利用锯齿波源信号滤波生成谐波成分，强制相位连续性并采用源-滤波器模型降低数据需求。
AI.result: 在仅3个训练录音和3小时训练时间的资源受限场景下，SawSing收敛速度更快且优于当前最先进的GAN和扩散模型。
AI.conclusion: SawSing通过相位连续性约束和源-滤波器归纳偏置，在小数据场景下实现了高质量歌唱语音合成。

search_text: DDSP-based Singing Vocoders: A New Subtractive-based Synthesizer and A Comprehensive Evaluation 基于 DDSP 的歌声声码器：一种新型减法合成器及综合评估 A vocoder is a conditional audio generation model that converts acoustic features such as mel-spectrograms into waveforms. Taking inspiration from Differentiable Digital Signal Processing (DDSP), we propose a new vocoder named SawSing for singing voices. SawSing synthesizes the harmonic part of singing voices by filtering a sawtooth source signal with a linear time-variant finite impulse response filter whose coefficients are estimated from the input mel-spectrogram by a neural network. As this approach enforces phase continuity, SawSing can generate singing voices without the phase-discontinuity glitch of many existing vocoders. Moreover, the source-filter assumption provides an inductive bias that allows SawSing to be trained on a small amount of data. Our experiments show that SawSing converges much faster and outperforms state-of-the-art generative adversarial network and diffusion-based vocoders in a resource-limited scenario with only 3 training recordings and a 3-hour training time. 声码器是一种条件音频生成模型，可将梅尔频谱图等声学特征转换为波形。受到可微分数字信号处理 (DDSP) 的启发，我们提出了一种名为 SawSing 的新型声码器，用于歌声。 SawSing 通过使用线性时变有限脉冲响应滤波器过滤锯齿源信号来合成歌声的谐波部分，该滤波器的系数由神经网络根据输入梅尔频谱图估计。由于这种方法增强了相位连续性，SawSing 可以生成歌声，而不会出现许多现有声码器的相位不连续性故障。此外，源滤波器假设提供了归纳偏差，允许 SawSing 在少量数据上进行训练。我们的实验表明，在资源有限的情况下，SawSing 的收敛速度要快得多，并且优于最先进的生成对抗网络和基于扩散的声码器，只有 3 个训练记录和 3 小时的训练时间。 本文提出基于DDSP的新型歌唱语音合成器SawSing，并进行全面评估。 Da-Yi Wu,Wen-Yi Hsiao,Fu-Rong Yang,Oscar Friedman,Warren Jackson,Scott Bruzenak,Yi-Wen Liu,Yi-Hsuan Yang cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xin Jin,Qiang Deng,Jianwen Lv,Heng Huang,Hao Lou,Chaoen Xiao
title: Aesthetic Language Guidance Generation of Images Using Attribute Comparison
title_zh: 使用属性比较的审美语言指导生成图像
abstract: With the vigorous development of mobile photography technology, major mobile phone manufacturers are scrambling to improve the shooting ability of equipments and the photo beautification algorithm of software. However, the improvement of intelligent equipments and algorithms cannot replace human subjective photography technology. In this paper, we propose the aesthetic language guidance of image (ALG). We divide ALG into ALG-T and ALG-I according to whether the guiding rules are based on photography templates or guidance images. Whether it is ALG-T or ALG-I, we guide photography from three attributes of color, lighting and composition of the images. The differences of the three attributes between the input images and the photography templates or the guidance images are described in natural language, which is aesthetic natural language guidance (ALG). Also, because of the differences in lighting and composition between landscape images and portrait images, we divide the input images into landscape images and portrait images. Both ALG-T and ALG-I conduct aesthetic language guidance respectively for the two types of input images (landscape images and portrait images).
summary: With the vigorous development of mobile photography technology, major mobile phone manufacturers are scrambling to improve the shooting ability of equipments and the photo beautification algorithm of software. However, the improvement of intelligent equipments and algorithms cannot replace human subjective photography technology. In this paper, we propose the aesthetic language guidance of image (ALG). We divide ALG into ALG-T and ALG-I according to whether the guiding rules are based on photography templates or guidance images. Whether it is ALG-T or ALG-I, we guide photography from three attributes of color, lighting and composition of the images. The differences of the three attributes between the input images and the photography templates or the guidance images are described in natural language, which is aesthetic natural language guidance (ALG). Also, because of the differences in lighting and composition between landscape images and portrait images, we divide the input images into landscape images and portrait images. Both ALG-T and ALG-I conduct aesthetic language guidance respectively for the two types of input images (landscape images and portrait images).
abstract_zh: 随着手机摄影技术的蓬勃发展，各大手机厂商都在竞相提升设备的拍摄能力以及软件的照片美化算法。然而，智能设备和算法的改进并不能取代人类主观摄影技术。在本文中，我们提出了图像的美学语言引导（ALG）。根据指导规则是基于摄影模板还是基于指导图像，我们将ALG分为ALG-T和ALG-I。无论是ALG-T还是ALG-I，我们都是从图像的色彩、光线和构图三个属性来指导摄影。用自然语言描述输入图像与摄影模板或引导图像之间的三个属性的差异，这就是审美自然语言引导（ALG）。此外，由于风景图像和肖像图像之间的光照和构图差异，我们将输入图像分为风景图像和肖像图像。 ALG-T和ALG-I分别对两类输入图像（风景图像和肖像图像）进行审美语言引导。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于属性比较的图像美学语言指导生成方法（ALG），通过分析色彩、光照和构图差异，为风景和人像两类图像提供自然语言指导。
AI.motivation: 尽管移动摄影技术发展迅速，但智能设备与算法仍无法替代人类主观摄影技术，需通过美学语言指导提升图像质量。
AI.method: 将ALG分为基于摄影模板（ALG-T）和引导图像（ALG-I）两类，通过比较输入图像与模板/引导图像在色彩、光照、构图三方面的差异，生成自然语言描述的美学指导，并针对风景与人像图像进行分类处理。
AI.result: 实现了基于属性差异的自然语言美学指导，为不同类型的图像提供针对性优化建议。
AI.conclusion: ALG方法通过属性比较有效衔接了自动化算法与人类美学感知，为图像美学优化提供了可解释的指导框架。
