search_text: OL-DN: Online learning based dual-domain network for HEVC intra frame quality enhancement OL-DN：基于在线学习的双域网络，用于 HEVC 帧内质量增强 Convolution neural network (CNN) based methods offer effective solutions for enhancing the quality of compressed image and video. However, these methods ignore using the raw data to enhance the quality. In this paper, we adopt the raw data in the quality enhancement for the HEVC intra-coded image by proposing an online learning-based method. When quality enhancement is demanded, we online train our proposed model at encoder side and then use the parameters to update the model of decoder side. This method not only improves model performance, but also makes one model adoptable to multiple coding scenarios. Besides, quantization error in discrete cosine transform (DCT) coefficients is the root cause of various HEVC compression artifacts. Thus, we combine frequency domain priors to assist image reconstruction. We design a DCT based convolution layer, to produce DCT coefficients that are suitable for CNN learning. Experimental results show that our proposed online learning based dual-domain network (OL-DN) has achieved superior performance, compared with the state-of-the-art methods. 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法为提高压缩图像和视频的质量提供了有效的解决方案。然而，这些方法忽略了使用原始数据来提高质量。在本文中，我们通过提出一种基于在线学习的方法，采用原始数据对 HEVC 帧内编码图像进行质量增强。当需要增强质量时，我们在编码器端在线训练我们提出的模型，然后使用参数来更新解码器端的模型。该方法不仅提高了模型性能，而且使一个模型适用于多种编码场景。此外，离散余弦变换 (DCT) 系数中的量化误差是各种 HEVC 压缩伪影的根本原因。因此，我们结合频域先验来辅助图像重建。我们设计了一个基于 DCT 的卷积层，以产生适合 CNN 学习的 DCT 系数。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的基于在线学习的双域网络（OL-DN）取得了优异的性能。 本文提出OL-DN方法，通过在线学习和双域网络提升HEVC帧内编码图像质量。 Renwei Yang,Shuyuan Zhu,Xiaozhen Zheng,Bing Zeng eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Choose qualified instructor for university based on rule-based weighted expert system
title_zh: 基于规则加权专家系统为大学选择合格导师
abstract: Near the entire university faculty directors must select some qualified professors for respected courses in each academic semester. In this sense, factors such as teaching experience, academic training, competition, etc. are considered. This work is usually done by experts, such as faculty directors, which is time consuming. Up to now, several semi-automatic systems have been proposed to assist heads. In this article, a fully automatic rule-based expert system is developed. The proposed expert system consists of three main stages. First, the knowledge of human experts is entered and designed as a decision tree. In the second step, an expert system is designed based on the provided rules of the generated decision tree. In the third step, an algorithm is proposed to weight the results of the tree based on the quality of the experts. To improve the performance of the expert system, a majority voting algorithm is developed as a post-process step to select the qualified trainer who satisfies the most expert decision tree for each course. The quality of the proposed expert system is evaluated using real data from Iranian universities. The calculated accuracy rate is 85.55, demonstrating the robustness and accuracy of the proposed system. The proposed system has little computational complexity compared to related efficient works. Also, simple implementation and transparent box are other features of the proposed system.
summary: Near the entire university faculty directors must select some qualified professors for respected courses in each academic semester. In this sense, factors such as teaching experience, academic training, competition, etc. are considered. This work is usually done by experts, such as faculty directors, which is time consuming. Up to now, several semi-automatic systems have been proposed to assist heads. In this article, a fully automatic rule-based expert system is developed. The proposed expert system consists of three main stages. First, the knowledge of human experts is entered and designed as a decision tree. In the second step, an expert system is designed based on the provided rules of the generated decision tree. In the third step, an algorithm is proposed to weight the results of the tree based on the quality of the experts. To improve the performance of the expert system, a majority voting algorithm is developed as a post-process step to select the qualified trainer who satisfies the most expert decision tree for each course. The quality of the proposed expert system is evaluated using real data from Iranian universities. The calculated accuracy rate is 85.55, demonstrating the robustness and accuracy of the proposed system. The proposed system has little computational complexity compared to related efficient works. Also, simple implementation and transparent box are other features of the proposed system.
abstract_zh: 几乎整个大学的教职主任必须在每个学期挑选一些合格的教授教授受人尊敬的课程。从这个意义上讲，要考虑教学经验、学术训练、竞赛等因素。这项工作通常由专家（例如教务主任）完成，这非常耗时。到目前为止，已经提出了几种半自动系统来辅助头部。在本文中，开发了一个全自动的基于规则的专家系统。所提出的专家系统由三个主要阶段组成。首先，输入人类专家的知识并将其设计为决策树。第二步，根据生成的决策树提供的规则设计专家系统。第三步，提出一种算法，根据专家的质量对树的结果进行加权。为了提高专家系统的性能，开发了多数投票算法作为后处理步骤，以选择满足每门课程最专家决策树的合格培训师。所提出的专家系统的质量是使用伊朗大学的真实数据进行评估的。计算出的准确率为 85.55，证明了所提出系统的鲁棒性和准确性。与相关的高效工作相比，所提出的系统的计算复杂度很小。此外，简单的实现和透明的盒子是该系统的其他特点。

AI.tldr: 开发基于规则的加权专家系统，用于大学课程合格教师的自动筛选。
AI.motivation: 传统教师选拔依赖专家人工判断，耗时且效率低，需更自动化且精准的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建三阶段系统：1) 专家知识转化为决策树；2) 基于决策树设计专家系统；3) 结合专家质量加权结果，并采用多数投票算法优化。
AI.result: 在伊朗大学真实数据中准确率达85.55%，计算复杂度低且实现简单透明。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效提升教师选拔效率，兼具准确性与可解释性，适合实际部署。

title: Extending GCC-PHAT using Shift Equivariant Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用移位等变神经网络扩展 GCC-PHAT
abstract: Speaker localization using microphone arrays depends on accurate time delay estimation techniques. For decades, methods based on the generalized cross correlation with phase transform (GCC-PHAT) have been widely adopted for this purpose. Recently, the GCC-PHAT has also been used to provide input features to neural networks in order to remove the effects of noise and reverberation, but at the cost of losing theoretical guarantees in noise-free conditions. We propose a novel approach to extending the GCC-PHAT, where the received signals are filtered using a shift equivariant neural network that preserves the timing information contained in the signals. By extensive experiments we show that our model consistently reduces the error of the GCC-PHAT in adverse environments, with guarantees of exact time delay recovery in ideal conditions.
summary: Speaker localization using microphone arrays depends on accurate time delay estimation techniques. For decades, methods based on the generalized cross correlation with phase transform (GCC-PHAT) have been widely adopted for this purpose. Recently, the GCC-PHAT has also been used to provide input features to neural networks in order to remove the effects of noise and reverberation, but at the cost of losing theoretical guarantees in noise-free conditions. We propose a novel approach to extending the GCC-PHAT, where the received signals are filtered using a shift equivariant neural network that preserves the timing information contained in the signals. By extensive experiments we show that our model consistently reduces the error of the GCC-PHAT in adverse environments, with guarantees of exact time delay recovery in ideal conditions.
abstract_zh: 使用麦克风阵列的说话者定位取决于准确的时间延迟估计技术。几十年来，基于广义互相关相位变换（GCC-PHAT）的方法已被广泛采用于此目的。最近，GCC-PHAT 也被用来为神经网络提供输入特征，以消除噪声和混响的影响，但代价是失去无噪声条件下的理论保证。我们提出了一种扩展 GCC-PHAT 的新方法，其中使用移位等变神经网络对接收到的信号进行过滤，保留信号中包含的定时信息。通过大量的实验，我们表明我们的模型能够持续降低 GCC-PHAT 在恶劣环境下的误差，并保证在理想条件下精确的时延恢复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用移位等变神经网络扩展GCC-PHAT方法，以提升麦克风阵列在恶劣环境下的说话人定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统GCC-PHAT方法在噪声和混响环境下性能下降，而结合神经网络虽能改善但丢失了无噪声条件下的理论保证，需寻找兼顾鲁棒性与理论性的新方案。
AI.method: 设计移位等变神经网络对信号进行滤波处理，保留时间信息并扩展GCC-PHAT，确保在理想条件下精确恢复时间延迟。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在恶劣环境下显著降低GCC-PHAT误差，且在理想条件下保持时间延迟估计的精确性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经网络扩展方法有效提升了GCC-PHAT的环境适应性，同时维持理论保证，为鲁棒的说话人定位提供新思路。

title: ENAGRAM: An App to Evaluate Preventative Nudges for Instagram
title_zh: ENAGRAM：一款评估 Instagram 预防性推动的应用程序

abstract: Online self-disclosure is perhaps one of the last decade's most studied communication processes, thanks to the introduction of Online Social Networks (OSNs) like Facebook. Self-disclosure research has contributed significantly to the design of preventative nudges seeking to support and guide users when revealing private information in OSNs. Still, assessing the effectiveness of these solutions is often challenging since changing or modifying the choice architecture of OSN platforms is practically unfeasible. In turn, the effectiveness of numerous nudging designs is supported primarily by self-reported data instead of actual behavioral information. This work presents ENAGRAM, an app for evaluating preventative nudges, and reports the first results of an empirical study conducted with it. Such a study aims to showcase how the app (and the data collected with it) can be leveraged to assess the effectiveness of a particular nudging approach. We used ENAGRAM as a vehicle to test a risk-based strategy for nudging the self-disclosure decisions of Instagram users. For this, we created two variations of the same nudge and tested it in a between-subjects experimental setting. Study participants (N=22) were recruited via Prolific and asked to use the app regularly for 7 days. An online survey was distributed at the end of the experiment to measure some privacy-related constructs. From the data collected with ENAGRAM, we observed lower (though non-significant) self-disclosure levels when applying risk-based interventions. The constructs measured with the survey were not significant either, except for participants' External Information Privacy Concerns. Our results suggest that (i) ENAGRAM is a suitable alternative for conducting longitudinal experiments in a privacy-friendly way, and (ii) it provides a flexible framework for the evaluation of a broad spectrum of nudging solutions.

abstract_zh: 由于 Facebook 等在线社交网络 (OSN) 的引入，在线自我表露可能是过去十年中研究最多的沟通过程之一。自我披露研究对预防性推动的设计做出了重大贡献，旨在支持和指导用户在 OSN 中披露私人信息。尽管如此，评估这些解决方案的有效性通常具有挑战性，因为改变或修改 OSN 平台的选择架构实际上是不可行的。反过来，众多助推设计的有效性主要由自我报告的数据而不是实际的行为信息来支持。这项工作提出了 ENAGRAM，一个用于评估预防性推动的应用程序，并报告了用它进行的实证研究的第一个结果。此类研究旨在展示如何利用应用程序（及其收集的数据）来评估特定助推方法的有效性。我们使用 ENAGRAM 作为工具来测试基于风险的策略，以推动 Instagram 用户做出自我披露的决定。为此，我们创建了同一推动的两种变体，并在受试者间实验环境中对其进行了测试。研究参与者 (N=22) 是通过 Prolific 招募的，并要求定期使用该应用程序 7 天。实验结束时分发了一份在线调查，以衡量一些与隐私相关的结构。根据 ENAGRAM 收集的数据，我们观察到在应用基于风险的干预措施时自我披露水平较低（尽管不显着）。除了参与者的外部信息隐私问题之外，调查测量的结构也不重要。我们的结果表明，(i) ENAGRAM 是以隐私友好的方式进行纵向实验的合适替代方案，(ii) 它为评估广泛的助推解决方案提供了灵活的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一款名为ENAGRAM的应用程序，用于评估预防性提示（nudges）在Instagram中的效果，并通过实证研究测试了基于风险的提示策略。
AI.motivation: 由于直接修改社交网络平台的选择架构不现实，现有研究多依赖自我报告数据评估提示效果，难以获取真实行为数据。因此需要一种隐私友好的替代方法进行长期实验。
AI.method: 开发ENAGRAM应用，设计两种基于风险的提示变体，在22名参与者中进行为期7天的组间实验，结合应用数据和隐私相关问卷调查进行分析。
AI.result: 基于风险的干预使自我披露水平略有下降（但无统计学意义），仅外部信息隐私担忧显著。ENAGRAM验证了其作为隐私友好型纵向实验工具的可行性。
AI.conclusion: ENAGRAM为评估广泛提示方案提供了灵活框架，是传统社交平台实验的有效替代方案。

title: ASR Error Correction with Constrained Decoding on Operation Prediction
title_zh: 基于操作预测的约束解码的 ASR 纠错
abstract: Error correction techniques remain effective to refine outputs from automatic speech recognition (ASR) models. Existing end-to-end error correction methods based on an encoder-decoder architecture process all tokens in the decoding phase, creating undesirable latency. In this paper, we propose an ASR error correction method utilizing the predictions of correction operations. More specifically, we construct a predictor between the encoder and the decoder to learn if a token should be kept ("K"), deleted ("D"), or changed ("C") to restrict decoding to only part of the input sequence embeddings (the "C" tokens) for fast inference. Experiments on three public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in reducing the latency of the decoding process in ASR correction. It enhances the inference speed by at least three times (3.4 and 5.7 times) while maintaining the same level of accuracy (with WER reductions of 0.53% and 1.69% respectively) for our two proposed models compared to a solid encoder-decoder baseline. In the meantime, we produce and release a benchmark dataset contributing to the ASR error correction community to foster research along this line.
summary: Error correction techniques remain effective to refine outputs from automatic speech recognition (ASR) models. Existing end-to-end error correction methods based on an encoder-decoder architecture process all tokens in the decoding phase, creating undesirable latency. In this paper, we propose an ASR error correction method utilizing the predictions of correction operations. More specifically, we construct a predictor between the encoder and the decoder to learn if a token should be kept ("K"), deleted ("D"), or changed ("C") to restrict decoding to only part of the input sequence embeddings (the "C" tokens) for fast inference. Experiments on three public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in reducing the latency of the decoding process in ASR correction. It enhances the inference speed by at least three times (3.4 and 5.7 times) while maintaining the same level of accuracy (with WER reductions of 0.53% and 1.69% respectively) for our two proposed models compared to a solid encoder-decoder baseline. In the meantime, we produce and release a benchmark dataset contributing to the ASR error correction community to foster research along this line.
abstract_zh: 纠错技术对于细化自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型的输出仍然有效。现有的基于编码器-解码器架构的端到端纠错方法在解码阶段处理所有令牌，从而产生不期望的延迟。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用校正操作预测的 ASR 纠错方法。更具体地说，我们在编码器和解码器之间构建一个预测器，以了解是否应保留令牌（“K”）、删除令牌（“D”）或更改令牌（“C”），以将解码限制为仅部分输入序列嵌入（“C”令牌）以进行快速推理。对三个公共数据集的实验证明了所提出的方法在减少 ASR 校正中解码过程延迟方面的有效性。与可靠的编码器-解码器基线相比，它将我们提出的两个模型的推理速度提高了至少三倍（3.4 倍和 5.7 倍），同时保持相同水平的精度（WER 分别降低了 0.53% 和 1.69%）。与此同时，我们制作并发布了一个基准数据集，为 ASR 纠错社区做出贡献，以促进这方面的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于操作预测的ASR错误校正方法，以减少解码过程中的延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端错误校正方法在解码阶段处理所有标记，导致延迟较高，因此需要一种更高效的校正方法。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个预测器，在编码器和解码器之间学习标记是否应保留、删除或更改，以限制解码过程只处理部分输入序列嵌入。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在三个公共数据集上显著提高了推理速度（至少3倍），同时保持了相同的准确性，并且减少了词错误率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少了ASR校正的延迟，同时提高了准确性，并为ASR错误校正领域提供了新的基准数据集。

authors_text: M. M. Amaan Valiuddin,Christiaan G. A. Viviers,Ruud J. G. van Sloun,Peter H. N. de With,Fons van der Sommen
title: Efficient Out-of-Distribution Detection of Melanoma with Wavelet-based Normalizing Flows
title_zh: 利用基于小波的归一化流对黑色素瘤进行高效的分布外检测
comment: Published at 1st Workshop on Cancer Prevention through early detecTion (MICCAI 2022)
comments: Published at 1st Workshop on Cancer Prevention through early detecTion (MICCAI 2022)
abstract: Melanoma is a serious form of skin cancer with high mortality rate at later stages. Fortunately, when detected early, the prognosis of melanoma is promising and malignant melanoma incidence rates are relatively low. As a result, datasets are heavily imbalanced which complicates training current state-of-the-art supervised classification AI models. We propose to use generative models to learn the benign data distribution and detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) malignant images through density estimation. Normalizing Flows (NFs) are ideal candidates for OOD detection due to their ability to compute exact likelihoods. Nevertheless, their inductive biases towards apparent graphical features rather than semantic context hamper accurate OOD detection. In this work, we aim at using these biases with domain-level knowledge of melanoma, to improve likelihood-based OOD detection of malignant images. Our encouraging results demonstrate potential for OOD detection of melanoma using NFs. We achieve a 9% increase in Area Under Curve of the Receiver Operating Characteristics by using wavelet-based NFs. This model requires significantly less parameters for inference making it more applicable on edge devices. The proposed methodology can aid medical experts with diagnosis of skin-cancer patients and continuously increase survival rates. Furthermore, this research paves the way for other areas in oncology with similar data imbalance issues.
summary: Melanoma is a serious form of skin cancer with high mortality rate at later stages. Fortunately, when detected early, the prognosis of melanoma is promising and malignant melanoma incidence rates are relatively low. As a result, datasets are heavily imbalanced which complicates training current state-of-the-art supervised classification AI models. We propose to use generative models to learn the benign data distribution and detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) malignant images through density estimation. Normalizing Flows (NFs) are ideal candidates for OOD detection due to their ability to compute exact likelihoods. Nevertheless, their inductive biases towards apparent graphical features rather than semantic context hamper accurate OOD detection. In this work, we aim at using these biases with domain-level knowledge of melanoma, to improve likelihood-based OOD detection of malignant images. Our encouraging results demonstrate potential for OOD detection of melanoma using NFs. We achieve a 9% increase in Area Under Curve of the Receiver Operating Characteristics by using wavelet-based NFs. This model requires significantly less parameters for inference making it more applicable on edge devices. The proposed methodology can aid medical experts with diagnosis of skin-cancer patients and continuously increase survival rates. Furthermore, this research paves the way for other areas in oncology with similar data imbalance issues.
abstract_zh: 黑色素瘤是一种严重的皮肤癌，晚期死亡率很高。幸运的是，如果早期发现，黑色素瘤的预后是有希望的，恶性黑色素瘤的发病率相对较低。因此，数据集严重不平衡，这使得当前最先进的监督分类人工智能模型的训练变得复杂。我们建议使用生成模型来学习良性数据分布，并通过密度估计来检测分布外（OOD）恶性图像。归一化流 (NF) 是 OOD 检测的理想候选者，因为它们能够计算精确的可能性。然而，它们对明显图形特征而不是语义上下文的归纳偏差阻碍了准确的 OOD 检测。在这项工作中，我们的目标是将这些偏差与黑色素瘤的领域级知识结合起来，以改进基于可能性的恶性图像 OOD 检测。我们令人鼓舞的结果证明了使用 NF 进行 OOD 检测黑色素瘤的潜力。通过使用基于小波的 NF，我们将接收器工作特性曲线下面积增加了 9%。该模型需要的推理参数明显减少，使其更适用于边缘设备。所提出的方法可以帮助医学专家诊断皮肤癌患者并不断提高生存率。此外，这项研究为具有类似数据不平衡问题的肿瘤学其他领域铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用小波变换的归一化流模型，通过密度估计实现黑色素瘤图像的出分布检测，以解决数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 黑色素瘤数据集存在严重不平衡，传统分类模型难以有效检测恶性病例，而归一化流虽可计算精确似然，但其对图形特征的偏向性影响检测精度，需结合领域知识优化。
AI.method: 基于归一化流的生成模型，结合小波变换提取多尺度特征，并利用黑色素瘤领域知识改进密度估计，实现高效参数化且适用于边缘设备的OOD检测。
AI.result: 在AUC-ROC指标上提升9%，模型参数显著减少，可辅助医疗诊断并提升生存率，为其他肿瘤学领域提供数据不平衡问题的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 小波归一化流有效提升黑色素瘤OOD检测性能，参数效率高，为医疗AI诊断及类似数据不平衡的肿瘤研究提供新思路。

search_text: Efficient Out-of-Distribution Detection of Melanoma with Wavelet-based Normalizing Flows 利用基于小波的归一化流对黑色素瘤进行高效的分布外检测 Melanoma is a serious form of skin cancer with high mortality rate at later stages. Fortunately, when detected early, the prognosis of melanoma is promising and malignant melanoma incidence rates are relatively low. As a result, datasets are heavily imbalanced which complicates training current state-of-the-art supervised classification AI models. We propose to use generative models to learn the benign data distribution and detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) malignant images through density estimation. Normalizing Flows (NFs) are ideal candidates for OOD detection due to their ability to compute exact likelihoods. Nevertheless, their inductive biases towards apparent graphical features rather than semantic context hamper accurate OOD detection. In this work, we aim at using these biases with domain-level knowledge of melanoma, to improve likelihood-based OOD detection of malignant images. Our encouraging results demonstrate potential for OOD detection of melanoma using NFs. We achieve a 9% increase in Area Under Curve of the Receiver Operating Characteristics by using wavelet-based NFs. This model requires significantly less parameters for inference making it more applicable on edge devices. The proposed methodology can aid medical experts with diagnosis of skin-cancer patients and continuously increase survival rates. Furthermore, this research paves the way for other areas in oncology with similar data imbalance issues. 黑色素瘤是一种严重的皮肤癌，晚期死亡率很高。幸运的是，如果早期发现，黑色素瘤的预后是有希望的，恶性黑色素瘤的发病率相对较低。因此，数据集严重不平衡，这使得当前最先进的监督分类人工智能模型的训练变得复杂。我们建议使用生成模型来学习良性数据分布，并通过密度估计来检测分布外（OOD）恶性图像。归一化流 (NF) 是 OOD 检测的理想候选者，因为它们能够计算精确的可能性。然而，它们对明显图形特征而不是语义上下文的归纳偏差阻碍了准确的 OOD 检测。在这项工作中，我们的目标是将这些偏差与黑色素瘤的领域级知识结合起来，以改进基于可能性的恶性图像 OOD 检测。我们令人鼓舞的结果证明了使用 NF 进行 OOD 检测黑色素瘤的潜力。通过使用基于小波的 NF，我们将接收器工作特性曲线下面积增加了 9%。该模型需要的推理参数明显减少，使其更适用于边缘设备。所提出的方法可以帮助医学专家诊断皮肤癌患者并不断提高生存率。此外，这项研究为具有类似数据不平衡问题的肿瘤学其他领域铺平了道路。 本文提出利用小波变换的归一化流模型，通过密度估计实现黑色素瘤图像的出分布检测，以解决数据不平衡问题。 M. title: A Means-End Account of Explainable Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 可解释人工智能的手段与目的说明
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) seeks to produce explanations for those machine learning methods which are deemed opaque. However, there is considerable disagreement about what this means and how to achieve it. Authors disagree on what should be explained (topic), to whom something should be explained (stakeholder), how something should be explained (instrument), and why something should be explained (goal). In this paper, I employ insights from means-end epistemology to structure the field. According to means-end epistemology, different means ought to be rationally adopted to achieve different epistemic ends. Applied to XAI, different topics, stakeholders, and goals thus require different instruments. I call this the means-end account of XAI. The means-end account has a descriptive and a normative component: on the one hand, I show how the specific means-end relations give rise to a taxonomy of existing contributions to the field of XAI; on the other hand, I argue that the suitability of XAI methods can be assessed by analyzing whether they are prescribed by a given topic, stakeholder, and goal.
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) seeks to produce explanations for those machine learning methods which are deemed opaque. However, there is considerable disagreement about what this means and how to achieve it. Authors disagree on what should be explained (topic), to whom something should be explained (stakeholder), how something should be explained (instrument), and why something should be explained (goal). In this paper, I employ insights from means-end epistemology to structure the field. According to means-end epistemology, different means ought to be rationally adopted to achieve different epistemic ends. Applied to XAI, different topics, stakeholders, and goals thus require different instruments. I call this the means-end account of XAI. The means-end account has a descriptive and a normative component: on the one hand, I show how the specific means-end relations give rise to a taxonomy of existing contributions to the field of XAI; on the other hand, I argue that the suitability of XAI methods can be assessed by analyzing whether they are prescribed by a given topic, stakeholder, and goal.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能（XAI）旨在为那些被认为不透明的机器学习方法提供解释。然而，对于这意味着什么以及如何实现它存在很大分歧。作者在应该解释什么（主题）、应该向谁解释（利益相关者）、应该如何解释某事（工具）以及为什么应该解释某事（目标）方面存在分歧。在本文中，我运用手段-目的认识论的见解来构建该领域。根据手段目的认识论，应该合理地采用不同的手段来达到不同的认识目的。因此，应用于 XAI 时，不同的主题、利益相关者和目标需要不同的工具。我将其称为 XAI 的手段-最终账户。手段-目的说明具有描述性和规范性组成部分：一方面，我展示了特定的手段-目的关系如何产生对 XAI 领域现有贡献的分类；另一方面，我认为可以通过分析 XAI 方法是否由给定主题、利益相关者和目标规定来评估它们的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过手段-目的认识论构建可解释人工智能（XAI）的理论框架，解决其在解释内容、对象、方式及目标上的分歧。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI领域在解释内容、对象、方式及目标上存在分歧，缺乏统一理论框架，需建立系统性方法以指导实践。
AI.method: 采用手段-目的认识论，将XAI的解释主题、利益相关者及目标与不同解释工具对应，构建分类与评估体系。
AI.result: 构建了XAI现有研究的分类体系，并提出基于主题、利益相关者及目标的XAI方法适用性评估标准。
AI.conclusion: 手段-目的理论为XAI提供了系统性框架，有助于统一分类和规范方法评估，推动领域发展。

authors_text: Sania Gul,Muhammad Salman Khan,Syed Waqar Shah,Ata Ur-Rehman
title: Recycling an anechoic pre-trained speech separation deep neural network for binaural dereverberation of a single source
title_zh: 回收用于单声源双耳去混响的消声预训练语音分离深度神经网络
abstract: Reverberation results in reduced intelligibility for both normal and hearing-impaired listeners. This paper presents a novel psychoacoustic approach of dereverberation of a single speech source by recycling a pre-trained binaural anechoic speech separation neural network. As training the deep neural network (DNN) is a lengthy and computationally expensive process, the advantage of using a pre-trained separation network for dereverberation is that the network does not need to be retrained, saving both time and computational resources. The interaural cues of a reverberant source are given to this pretrained neural network to discriminate between the direct path signal and the reverberant speech. The results show an average improvement of 1.3% in signal intelligibility, 0.83 dB in SRMR (signal to reverberation energy ratio) and 0.16 points in perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) over other state-of-the-art signal processing dereverberation algorithms and 14% in intelligibility and 0.35 points in quality over orthogonal matching pursuit with spectral subtraction (OSS), a machine learning based dereverberation algorithm.
summary: Reverberation results in reduced intelligibility for both normal and hearing-impaired listeners. This paper presents a novel psychoacoustic approach of dereverberation of a single speech source by recycling a pre-trained binaural anechoic speech separation neural network. As training the deep neural network (DNN) is a lengthy and computationally expensive process, the advantage of using a pre-trained separation network for dereverberation is that the network does not need to be retrained, saving both time and computational resources. The interaural cues of a reverberant source are given to this pretrained neural network to discriminate between the direct path signal and the reverberant speech. The results show an average improvement of 1.3% in signal intelligibility, 0.83 dB in SRMR (signal to reverberation energy ratio) and 0.16 points in perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) over other state-of-the-art signal processing dereverberation algorithms and 14% in intelligibility and 0.35 points in quality over orthogonal matching pursuit with spectral subtraction (OSS), a machine learning based dereverberation algorithm.
abstract_zh: 混响会导致正常听众和有听力障碍的听众的清晰度降低。本文提出了一种通过回收预训练的双耳消声语音分离神经网络来消除单个语音源混响的新颖心理声学方法。由于训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 是一个漫长且计算成本高昂的过程，因此使用预先训练的分离网络进行混响的优点是不需要重新训练网络，从而节省时间和计算资源。混响源的耳间提示被提供给这个预训练的神经网络，以区分直接路径信号和混响语音。结果显示，与其他最先进的信号处理去混响算法相比，信号清晰度平均提高了 1.3%，SRMR（信号与混响能量比）平均提高了 0.83 dB，语音质量感知评估 (PESQ) 提高了 0.16 分，与谱减法 (OSS)（一种基于机器学习的机器学习算法）正交匹配追踪算法相比，清晰度平均提高了 14%，质量提高了 0.35 分。去混响算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用预训练双耳无混响语音分离神经网络进行单源混响消除的新方法。
AI.motivation: 混响会降低语音可懂度，而训练深度神经网络耗时且计算成本高，因此需要高效利用预训练模型进行混响消除。
AI.method: 通过将混响信号的双耳线索输入预训练的分离网络，区分直达声与混响声，无需重新训练网络。
AI.result: 相较其他先进算法，平均提升1.3%可懂度、0.83dB SRMR和0.16分PESQ；相较OSS算法提升14%可懂度和0.35分质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用预训练模型实现高效混响消除，在客观指标和主观质量上均优于现有技术。

search_text: Recycling an anechoic pre-trained speech separation deep neural network for binaural dereverberation of a single source 回收用于单声源双耳去混响的消声预训练语音分离深度神经网络 Reverberation results in reduced intelligibility for both normal and hearing-impaired listeners. This paper presents a novel psychoacoustic approach of dereverberation of a single speech source by recycling a pre-trained binaural anechoic speech separation neural network. As training the deep neural network (DNN) is a lengthy and computationally expensive process, the advantage of using a pre-trained separation network for dereverberation is that the network does not need to be retrained, saving both time and computational resources. The interaural cues of a reverberant source are given to this pretrained neural network to discriminate between the direct path signal and the reverberant speech. The results show an average improvement of 1.3% in signal intelligibility, 0.83 dB in SRMR (signal to reverberation energy ratio) and 0.16 points in perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) over other state-of-the-art signal processing dereverberation algorithms and 14% in intelligibility and 0.35 points in quality over orthogonal matching pursuit with spectral subtraction (OSS), a machine learning based dereverberation algorithm. 混响会导致正常听众和有听力障碍的听众的清晰度降低。本文提出了一种通过回收预训练的双耳消声语音分离神经网络来消除单个语音源混响的新颖心理声学方法。由于训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 是一个漫长且计算成本高昂的过程，因此使用预先训练的分离网络进行混响的优点是不需要重新训练网络，从而节省时间和计算资源。混响源的耳间提示被提供给这个预训练的神经网络，以区分直接路径信号和混响语音。结果显示，与其他最先进的信号处理去混响算法相比，信号清晰度平均提高了 1.3%，SRMR（信号与混响能量比）平均提高了 0.83 dB，语音质量感知评估 (PESQ) 提高了 0.16 分，与谱减法 (OSS)（一种基于机器学习的机器学习算法）正交匹配追踪算法相比，清晰度平均提高了 14%，质量提高了 0.35 分。去混响算法。 本文提出了一种利用预训练双耳无混响语音分离神经网络进行单源混响消除的新方法。 Sania Gul,Muhammad Salman Khan,Syed Waqar Shah,Ata Ur-Rehman eess.AS,cs.SD

title: An Anchor-Free Detector for Continuous Speech Keyword Spotting
title_zh: 用于连续语音关键词识别的无锚检测器
abstract: Continuous Speech Keyword Spotting (CSKWS) is a task to detect predefined keywords in a continuous speech. In this paper, we regard CSKWS as a one-dimensional object detection task and propose a novel anchor-free detector, named AF-KWS, to solve the problem. AF-KWS directly regresses the center locations and lengths of the keywords through a single-stage deep neural network. In particular, AF-KWS is tailored for this speech task as we introduce an auxiliary unknown class to exclude other words from non-speech or silent background. We have built two benchmark datasets named LibriTop-20 and continuous meeting analysis keywords (CMAK) dataset for CSKWS. Evaluations on these two datasets show that our proposed AF-KWS outperforms reference schemes by a large margin, and therefore provides a decent baseline for future research.
summary: Continuous Speech Keyword Spotting (CSKWS) is a task to detect predefined keywords in a continuous speech. In this paper, we regard CSKWS as a one-dimensional object detection task and propose a novel anchor-free detector, named AF-KWS, to solve the problem. AF-KWS directly regresses the center locations and lengths of the keywords through a single-stage deep neural network. In particular, AF-KWS is tailored for this speech task as we introduce an auxiliary unknown class to exclude other words from non-speech or silent background. We have built two benchmark datasets named LibriTop-20 and continuous meeting analysis keywords (CMAK) dataset for CSKWS. Evaluations on these two datasets show that our proposed AF-KWS outperforms reference schemes by a large margin, and therefore provides a decent baseline for future research.
abstract_zh: 连续语音关键词识别 (CSKWS) 是一项检测连续语音中预定义关键词的任务。在本文中，我们将 CSKWS 视为一维目标检测任务，并提出了一种新颖的无锚检测器，称为 AF-KWS，来解决该问题。 AF-KWS通过单级深度神经网络直接回归关键词的中心位置和长度。特别是，AF-KWS 是针对此语音任务量身定制的，因为我们引入了一个辅助未知类来排除非语音或无声背景中的其他单词。我们为 CSKWS 构建了两个名为 LibriTop-20 的基准数据集和连续会议分析关键词 (CMAK) 数据集。对这两个数据集的评估表明，我们提出的 AF-KWS 大大优于参考方案，因此为未来的研究提供了一个不错的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无锚点检测器AF-KWS，用于连续语音关键词检测任务，通过直接回归关键词位置和长度实现高效检测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在连续语音关键词检测中存在锚点设置复杂、背景干扰处理不足等问题，需设计更高效的检测框架并构建专用数据集。
AI.method: 将CSKWS视为一维目标检测任务，设计单阶段神经网络直接回归关键词中心位置和长度，并引入辅助未知类过滤非语音干扰。
AI.result: 在LibriTop-20和CMAK数据集上显著优于现有方法，为后续研究提供了有效基准。
AI.conclusion: AF-KWS通过创新架构和专用数据集构建，为连续语音关键词检测任务提供了性能优越的解决方案。

authors_text: Yue Duan,Lei Qi,Lei Wang,Luping Zhou,Yinghuan Shi
title: RDA: Reciprocal Distribution Alignment for Robust Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: RDA：鲁棒半监督学习的倒数分布对齐
abstract: In this work, we propose Reciprocal Distribution Alignment (RDA) to address semi-supervised learning (SSL), which is a hyperparameter-free framework that is independent of confidence threshold and works with both the matched (conventionally) and the mismatched class distributions. Distribution mismatch is an often overlooked but more general SSL scenario where the labeled and the unlabeled data do not fall into the identical class distribution. This may lead to the model not exploiting the labeled data reliably and drastically degrade the performance of SSL methods, which could not be rescued by the traditional distribution alignment. In RDA, we enforce a reciprocal alignment on the distributions of the predictions from two classifiers predicting pseudo-labels and complementary labels on the unlabeled data. These two distributions, carrying complementary information, could be utilized to regularize each other without any prior of class distribution. Moreover, we theoretically show that RDA maximizes the input-output mutual information. Our approach achieves promising performance in SSL under a variety of scenarios of mismatched distributions, as well as the conventional matched SSL setting. Our code is available at: https://github.com/NJUyued/RDA4RobustSSL.
summary: In this work, we propose Reciprocal Distribution Alignment (RDA) to address semi-supervised learning (SSL), which is a hyperparameter-free framework that is independent of confidence threshold and works with both the matched (conventionally) and the mismatched class distributions. Distribution mismatch is an often overlooked but more general SSL scenario where the labeled and the unlabeled data do not fall into the identical class distribution. This may lead to the model not exploiting the labeled data reliably and drastically degrade the performance of SSL methods, which could not be rescued by the traditional distribution alignment. In RDA, we enforce a reciprocal alignment on the distributions of the predictions from two classifiers predicting pseudo-labels and complementary labels on the unlabeled data. These two distributions, carrying complementary information, could be utilized to regularize each other without any prior of class distribution. Moreover, we theoretically show that RDA maximizes the input-output mutual information. Our approach achieves promising performance in SSL under a variety of scenarios of mismatched distributions, as well as the conventional matched SSL setting. Our code is available at: https://github.com/NJUyued/RDA4RobustSSL.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了倒数分布对齐（RDA）来解决半监督学习（SSL）问题，这是一个无超参数的框架，独立于置信阈值，并且适用于匹配（传统）和不匹配的类分布。分布不匹配是一种经常被忽视但更常见的 SSL 场景，其中标记数据和未标记数据不属于相同的类分布。这可能会导致模型无法可靠地利用标记数据，并极大地降低 SSL 方法的性能，而传统的分布对齐无法挽救这种情况。在 RDA 中，我们对两个分类器的预测分布进行相互对齐，这两个分类器预测未标记数据上的伪标签和互补标签。这两个分布携带互补信息，可以用来相互正则化，而无需任何先验的类分布。此外，我们从理论上证明了 RDA 最大化了输入输出互信息。我们的方法在各种不匹配分布的场景以及传统的匹配 SSL 设置下，在 SSL 中实现了有希望的性能。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/NJUyued/RDA4RobustSSL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RDA的超参数无关框架，用于解决半监督学习中的分布错配问题，适用于匹配和不匹配的类别分布场景。
AI.motivation: 传统半监督学习方法在面对标签数据与未标签数据类别分布不匹配时性能显著下降，而现有方法难以有效应对这一普遍存在的挑战。
AI.method: 通过强制对齐两个分类器在未标签数据上生成的伪标签和互补标签的预测分布，利用互补信息进行相互正则化，无需先验类别分布知识，并理论上证明其最大化输入输出互信息。
AI.result: 在多种分布错配和传统匹配场景下均取得优异半监督学习性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: RDA为半监督学习提供了鲁棒框架，在匹配与不匹配分布场景中均表现出色，具有广泛适用性。

Moreover, we theoretically show that RDA maximizes the input-output mutual information. Our approach achieves promising performance in SSL under a variety of scenarios of mismatched distributions, as well as the conventional matched SSL setting. Our code is available at: https://github.com/NJUyued/RDA4RobustSSL. 在这项工作中，我们提出了倒数分布对齐（RDA）来解决半监督学习（SSL）问题，这是一个无超参数的框架，独立于置信阈值，并且适用于匹配（传统）和不匹配的类分布。分布不匹配是一种经常被忽视但更常见的 SSL 场景，其中标记数据和未标记数据不属于相同的类分布。这可能会导致模型无法可靠地利用标记数据，并极大地降低 SSL 方法的性能，而传统的分布对齐无法挽救这种情况。在 RDA 中，我们对两个分类器的预测分布进行相互对齐，这两个分类器预测未标记数据上的伪标签和互补标签。这两个分布携带互补信息，可以用来相互正则化，而无需任何先验的类分布。此外，我们从理论上证明了 RDA 最大化了输入输出互信息。我们的方法在各种不匹配分布的场景以及传统的匹配 SSL 设置下，在 SSL 中实现了有希望的性能。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/NJUyued/RDA4RobustSSL。 本文提出了一种名为RDA的超参数无关框架，用于解决半监督学习中的分布错配问题，适用于匹配和不匹配的类别分布场景。 Yue Duan,Lei Qi,Lei Wang,Luping Zhou,Yinghuan Shi cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Quoc-Huy Trinh,Trong-Hieu Nguyen Mau,Radmir Zosimov,Minh-Van Nguyen
title: EfficientNet for Brain-Lesion classification
title_zh: 用于脑损伤分类的 EfficientNet
abstract: In the development of technology, there are increasing cases of brain disease, there are more treatments proposed and achieved a positive result. However, with Brain-Lesion, the early diagnoses can improve the possibility for successful treatment and can help patients recuperate better. From this reason, Brain-Lesion is one of the controversial topics in medical images analysis nowadays. With the improvement of the architecture, there is a variety of methods that are proposed and achieve competitive scores. In this paper, we proposed a technique that uses efficient-net for 3D images, especially the Efficient-net B0 for Brain-Lesion classification task solution, and achieve the competitive score. Moreover, we also proposed the method to use Multiscale-EfficientNet to classify the slices of the MRI data
summary: In the development of technology, there are increasing cases of brain disease, there are more treatments proposed and achieved a positive result. However, with Brain-Lesion, the early diagnoses can improve the possibility for successful treatment and can help patients recuperate better. From this reason, Brain-Lesion is one of the controversial topics in medical images analysis nowadays. With the improvement of the architecture, there is a variety of methods that are proposed and achieve competitive scores. In this paper, we proposed a technique that uses efficient-net for 3D images, especially the Efficient-net B0 for Brain-Lesion classification task solution, and achieve the competitive score. Moreover, we also proposed the method to use Multiscale-EfficientNet to classify the slices of the MRI data

AI.tldr: 本文主要利用EfficientNet模型进行脑部病变分类，提出使用EfficientNet B0处理3D图像及多尺度方法处理MRI切片。
AI.motivation: 早期诊断脑部病变可提高治疗成功率，但当前方法在准确性和效率上仍有提升空间，需更有效的模型。
AI.method: 采用EfficientNet B0处理3D脑部图像，并提出多尺度EfficientNet方法对MRI切片进行分类。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在脑部病变分类任务中达到有竞争力的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 证明了EfficientNet在脑部病变分类中的有效性，未来可进一步优化模型结构或结合更多数据。

title: Classification of electromagnetic interference induced image noise in an analog video link
title_zh: 模拟视频链路中电磁干扰引起的图像噪声的分类
abstract: With the ever-increasing electrification of the vehicle showing no sign of retreating, electronic systems deployed in automotive applications are subject to more stringent Electromagnetic Immunity compliance constraints than ever before, to ensure the proximity of nearby electronic systems will not affect their operation. The EMI compliance testing of an analog camera link requires video quality to be monitored and assessed to validate such compliance, which up to now, has been a manual task. Due to the nature of human interpretation, this is open to inconsistency. Here, we propose a solution using deep learning models that analyse, and grade video content derived from an EMI compliance test. These models are trained using a dataset built entirely from real test image data to ensure the accuracy of the resultant model(s) is maximised. Starting with the standard AlexNet, we propose four models to classify the EMI noise level
summary: With the ever-increasing electrification of the vehicle showing no sign of retreating, electronic systems deployed in automotive applications are subject to more stringent Electromagnetic Immunity compliance constraints than ever before, to ensure the proximity of nearby electronic systems will not affect their operation. The EMI compliance testing of an analog camera link requires video quality to be monitored and assessed to validate such compliance, which up to now, has been a manual task. Due to the nature of human interpretation, this is open to inconsistency. Here, we propose a solution using deep learning models that analyse, and grade video content derived from an EMI compliance test. These models are trained using a dataset built entirely from real test image data to ensure the accuracy of the resultant model(s) is maximised. Starting with the standard AlexNet, we propose four models to classify the EMI noise level
abstract_zh: 随着车辆电气化程度不断提高且没有任何退缩的迹象，汽车应用中部署的电子系统受到比以往更严格的电磁抗扰度合规性约束，以确保附近电子系统的接近不会影响其运行。模拟摄像机链路的 EMI 合规性测试需要监控和评估视频质量以验证这种合规性，而到目前为止，这一直是一项手动任务。由于人类解释的本质，这可能会出现不一致。在这里，我们提出了一种使用深度学习模型的解决方案，该模型可以对 EMI 合规性测试得出的视频内容进行分析和分级。这些模型使用完全由真实测试图像数据构建的数据集进行训练，以确保所得模型的准确性最大化。从标准 AlexNet 开始，我们提出了四种模型来对 EMI 噪声级别进行分类

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度学习模型对模拟视频链中电磁干扰（EMI）引起的图像噪声进行分类，以自动化替代传统人工评估方法。
AI.motivation: 随着车辆电气化加剧，电子系统需满足更严格的电磁兼容性要求，但传统人工评估EMI测试中的视频质量存在主观性和不一致性。
AI.method: 基于AlexNet架构设计四个深度学习模型，利用真实EMI测试图像数据集进行训练，实现对图像噪声水平的自动分类。
AI.result: 提出的模型能够有效分类EMI噪声等级，验证了深度学习在自动化视频质量评估中的可行性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法可高效、客观地完成EMI合规测试中的视频质量评估，满足现代汽车电子系统日益严苛的电磁兼容性要求。

title: Res-Dense Net for 3D Covid Chest CT-scan classification
title_zh: 用于 3D Covid 胸部 CT 扫描分类的 Res-Dense Net
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.07524 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.07524 by other authors
abstract: One of the most contentious areas of research in Medical Image Preprocessing is 3D CT-scan. With the rapid spread of COVID-19, the function of CT-scan in properly and swiftly diagnosing the disease has become critical. It has a positive impact on infection prevention. There are many tasks to diagnose the illness through CT-scan images, include COVID-19. In this paper, we propose a method that using a Stacking Deep Neural Network to detect the Covid 19 through the series of 3D CT-scans images . In our method, we experiment with two backbones are DenseNet 121 and ResNet 101. This method achieves a competitive performance on some evaluation metrics
summary: One of the most contentious areas of research in Medical Image Preprocessing is 3D CT-scan. With the rapid spread of COVID-19, the function of CT-scan in properly and swiftly diagnosing the disease has become critical. It has a positive impact on infection prevention. There are many tasks to diagnose the illness through CT-scan images, include COVID-19. In this paper, we propose a method that using a Stacking Deep Neural Network to detect the Covid 19 through the series of 3D CT-scans images . In our method, we experiment with two backbones are DenseNet 121 and ResNet 101. This method achieves a competitive performance on some evaluation metrics
abstract_zh: 医学图像预处理中最具争议的研究领域之一是 3D CT 扫描。随着COVID-19的迅速传播，CT扫描正确、快速诊断疾病的功能变得至关重要。它对预防感染有积极的影响。通过 CT 扫描图像诊断疾病的任务有很多，包括 COVID-19。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用堆叠深度神经网络通过一系列 3D CT 扫描图像检测 Covid 19 的方法。在我们的方法中，我们使用两个主干网 DenseNet 121 和 ResNet 101 进行实验。该方法在某些评估指标上实现了有竞争力的性能

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于3D CT扫描图像的Res-Dense网络结构，用于COVID-19的分类诊断
AI.motivation: 由于CT扫描在快速准确诊断COVID-19中的关键作用，需开发高效且准确的分类方法以提高感染预防效率
AI.method: 采用堆叠深度神经网络，结合DenseNet 121和ResNet 101作为主干结构，处理3D CT扫描图像进行分类
AI.result: 在多个评估指标上达到竞争性性能，证明方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为基于3D CT扫描的COVID-19分类提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用潜力

title: Generative models-based data labeling for deep networks regression: application to seed maturity estimation from UAV multispectral images
title_zh: 基于生成模型的深度网络回归数据标记：应用于无人机多光谱图像种子成熟度估计
abstract: Monitoring seed maturity is an increasing challenge in agriculture due to climate change and more restrictive practices. Seeds monitoring in the field is essential to optimize the farming process and to guarantee yield quality through high germination. Traditional methods are based on limited sampling in the field and analysis in laboratory. Moreover, they are time consuming and only allow monitoring sub-sections of the crop field. This leads to a lack of accuracy on the condition of the crop as a whole due to intra-field heterogeneities. Multispectral imagery by UAV allows uniform scan of fields and better capture of crop maturity information. On the other hand, deep learning methods have shown tremendous potential in estimating agronomic parameters, especially maturity. However, they require large labeled datasets. Although large sets of aerial images are available, labeling them with ground truth is a tedious, if not impossible task. In this paper, we propose a method for estimating parsley seed maturity using multispectral UAV imagery, with a new approach for automatic data labeling. This approach is based on parametric and non-parametric models to provide weak labels. We also consider the data acquisition protocol and the performance evaluation of the different steps of the method. Results show good performance, and the non-parametric kernel density estimator model can improve neural network generalization when used as a labeling method, leading to more robust and better performing deep neural models.
summary: Monitoring seed maturity is an increasing challenge in agriculture due to climate change and more restrictive practices. Seeds monitoring in the field is essential to optimize the farming process and to guarantee yield quality through high germination. Traditional methods are based on limited sampling in the field and analysis in laboratory. Moreover, they are time consuming and only allow monitoring sub-sections of the crop field. This leads to a lack of accuracy on the condition of the crop as a whole due to intra-field heterogeneities. Multispectral imagery by UAV allows uniform scan of fields and better capture of crop maturity information. On the other hand, deep learning methods have shown tremendous potential in estimating agronomic parameters, especially maturity. However, they require large labeled datasets. Although large sets of aerial images are available, labeling them with ground truth is a tedious, if not impossible task. In this paper, we propose a method for estimating parsley seed maturity using multispectral UAV imagery, with a new approach for automatic data labeling. This approach is based on parametric and non-parametric models to provide weak labels. We also consider the data acquisition protocol and the performance evaluation of the different steps of the method. Results show good performance, and the non-parametric kernel density estimator model can improve neural network generalization when used as a labeling method, leading to more robust and better performing deep neural models.
abstract_zh: 由于气候变化和更严格的做法，监测种子成熟度成为农业领域日益严峻的挑战。田间种子监测对于优化耕作过程并通过高发芽率保证产量质量至关重要。传统方法基于现场有限采样和实验室分析。此外，它们非常耗时，并且只能监测农田的部分区域。由于田间的异质性，这导致作物整体状况缺乏准确性。无人机的多光谱图像可以对田地进行统一扫描并更好地捕获作物成熟度信息。另一方面，深度学习方法在估计农艺参数，尤其是成熟度方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，它们需要大量标记数据集。尽管有大量航空图像可用，但用地面实况标记它们是一项乏味甚至不可能的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用多光谱无人机图像估算欧芹种子成熟度的方法，以及一种自动数据标记的新方法。这种方法基于参数和非参数模型来提供弱标签。我们还考虑了数据采集协议和该方法不同步骤的性能评估。结果显示出良好的性能，并且非参数核密度估计器模型在用作标记方法时可以提高神经网络的泛化能力，从而产生更稳健、性能更好的深度神经模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生成模型的自动数据标注方法，利用无人机多光谱图像估计 parsley 种子成熟度。
AI.motivation: 传统种子成熟度监测方法存在采样有限、耗时且难以全面评估田间异质性问题，而深度学习需大量标注数据但无人机图像手动标注困难。
AI.method: 采用参数化和非参数化模型生成弱标签，结合数据采集协议与性能评估，重点使用非参数核密度估计模型进行标注。
AI.result: 非参数核密度估计模型作为标注方法可提升神经网络泛化能力，使深度模型更稳健且性能更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决农业数据标注难题，提高成熟度估计准确性，为作物监测提供可行方案。

authors_text: Dennis Vetter,Jesmin Jahan Tithi,Magnus Westerlund,Roberto V. Zicari,Gemma Roig
title: Using Sentence Embeddings and Semantic Similarity for Seeking Consensus when Assessing Trustworthy AI
title_zh: 在评估可信人工智能时使用句子嵌入和语义相似性寻求共识
abstract: Assessing the trustworthiness of artificial intelligence systems requires knowledge from many different disciplines. These disciplines do not necessarily share concepts between them and might use words with different meanings, or even use the same words differently. Additionally, experts from different disciplines might not be aware of specialized terms readily used in other disciplines. Therefore, a core challenge of the assessment process is to identify when experts from different disciplines talk about the same problem but use different terminologies. In other words, the problem is to group problem descriptions (a.k.a. issues) with the same semantic meaning but described using slightly different terminologies. In this work, we show how we employed recent advances in natural language processing, namely sentence embeddings and semantic textual similarity, to support this identification process and to bridge communication gaps in interdisciplinary teams of experts assessing the trustworthiness of an artificial intelligence system used in healthcare.
summary: Assessing the trustworthiness of artificial intelligence systems requires knowledge from many different disciplines. These disciplines do not necessarily share concepts between them and might use words with different meanings, or even use the same words differently. Additionally, experts from different disciplines might not be aware of specialized terms readily used in other disciplines. Therefore, a core challenge of the assessment process is to identify when experts from different disciplines talk about the same problem but use different terminologies. In other words, the problem is to group problem descriptions (a.k.a. issues) with the same semantic meaning but described using slightly different terminologies. In this work, we show how we employed recent advances in natural language processing, namely sentence embeddings and semantic textual similarity, to support this identification process and to bridge communication gaps in interdisciplinary teams of experts assessing the trustworthiness of an artificial intelligence system used in healthcare.
abstract_zh: 评估人工智能系统的可信度需要许多不同学科的知识。这些学科之间不一定共享概念，并且可能使用具有不同含义的词语，甚至不同地使用相同的词语。此外，来自不同学科的专家可能不知道其他学科中容易使用的专业术语。因此，评估过程的核心挑战是识别不同学科的专家何时谈论同一问题但使用不同的术语。换句话说，问题是将具有相同语义但使用略有不同的术语描述的问题描述（又称问题）分组。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何利用自然语言处理的最新进展，即句子嵌入和语义文本相似性，来支持这一识别过程，并弥合评估医疗保健中人工智能系统可信度的跨学科专家团队的沟通差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用句子嵌入和语义相似度技术，解决跨学科专家在评估AI可信度时因术语差异导致的沟通障碍问题。
AI.motivation: 不同学科专家在评估AI可信度时可能使用不同术语描述同一问题，导致共识难以达成，需解决术语差异引发的沟通障碍。
AI.method: 采用自然语言处理技术中的句子嵌入模型和语义文本相似度算法，将不同表述的问题映射到语义空间进行相似度计算，从而分组具有相同语义的问题描述。
AI.result: 验证了该方法能有效识别跨学科专家间术语差异下的语义一致性，提升了评估团队在AI可信度评估中的共识达成效率。
AI.conclusion: 基于语义相似度的跨学科问题分组方法可有效缓解术语差异带来的沟通障碍，为AI可信度评估提供了技术支撑。

title: Robotic Untangling of Herbs and Salads with Parallel Grippers
title_zh: 使用平行夹具机器人解开香草和沙拉
abstract: The picking of one or more objects from an unsorted pile continues to be non-trivial for robotic systems. This is especially so when the pile consists of a granular material (GM) containing individual items that tangle with one another, causing more to be picked out than desired. One of the key features of such tangle-prone GMs is the presence of protrusions extending out from the main body of items in the pile. This work characterises the role the latter play in causing mechanical entanglement and their impact on picking consistency. It reports experiments in which picking GMs with different protrusion lengths (PLs) results in up to 76% increase in picked mass variance, suggesting PL to be an informative feature in the design of picking strategies. Moreover, to counter this effect, it proposes a new spread-and-pick (SnP) approach that significantly reduces tangling, making picking more consistent. Compared to prior approaches that seek to pick from a tangle-free point in the pile, the proposed method results in a decrease in picking error (PE) of up to 51%, and shows good generalisation to previously unseen GMs.
summary: The picking of one or more objects from an unsorted pile continues to be non-trivial for robotic systems. This is especially so when the pile consists of a granular material (GM) containing individual items that tangle with one another, causing more to be picked out than desired. One of the key features of such tangle-prone GMs is the presence of protrusions extending out from the main body of items in the pile. This work characterises the role the latter play in causing mechanical entanglement and their impact on picking consistency. It reports experiments in which picking GMs with different protrusion lengths (PLs) results in up to 76% increase in picked mass variance, suggesting PL to be an informative feature in the design of picking strategies. Moreover, to counter this effect, it proposes a new spread-and-pick (SnP) approach that significantly reduces tangling, making picking more consistent. Compared to prior approaches that seek to pick from a tangle-free point in the pile, the proposed method results in a decrease in picking error (PE) of up to 51%, and shows good generalisation to previously unseen GMs.
abstract_zh: 对于机器人系统来说，从未分类的一堆物体中拾取一个或多个物体仍然是一件很重要的事情。当该堆由颗粒材料 (GM) 组成时尤其如此，其中包含相互缠结的单个物品，导致挑选出的物品比预期的多。这种容易缠结的 GM 的主要特征之一是存在从堆中的物品主体延伸出来的突出物。这项工作描述了后者在引起机械缠结中所起的作用及其对采摘一致性的影响。它报告了一些实验，其中采摘具有不同突出长度 (PL) 的 GM 导致采摘质量方差增加高达 76%，这表明 PL 是采摘策略设计中的一个信息丰富的特征。此外，为了抵消这种影响，它提出了一种新的展开拾取（SnP）方法，可显着减少缠结，使拾取更加一致。与之前寻求从堆中无缠结点进行拣选的方法相比，所提出的方法可将拣选误差 (PE) 降低高达 51%，并且对以前未见过的 GM 表现出良好的泛化性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用平行夹爪的机器人系统，用于解决香草和沙拉等易缠绕物品的抓取问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人系统在抓取易缠绕的颗粒状物料时存在抓取不一致的问题，尤其当物料存在突出结构时会导致抓取质量显著下降。
AI.method: 通过实验分析突出长度对缠绕的影响，提出了一种新型的分散-抓取（SnP）方法，通过先分散物料再抓取来减少缠绕。
AI.result: SnP方法使抓取误差降低51%，并能有效推广到未见过的物料类型，突出长度被证实为关键设计特征。
AI.conclusion: SnP方法通过减少缠绕显著提升了抓取一致性，为复杂物料的机器人操作提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用平行夹爪的机器人系统，用于解决香草和沙拉等易缠绕物品的抓取问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有机器人系统在抓取易缠绕的颗粒状物料时存在抓取不一致的问题，尤其当物料存在突出结构时会导致抓取质量显著下降。
ai_content.method: 通过实验分析突出长度对缠绕的影响，提出了一种新型的分散-抓取（SnP）方法，通过先分散物料再抓取来减少缠绕。
ai_content.result: SnP方法使抓取误差降低51%，并能有效推广到未见过的物料类型，突出长度被证实为关键设计特征。
ai_content.conclusion: SnP方法通过减少缠绕显著提升了抓取一致性，为复杂物料的机器人操作提供了新思路。

search_text: Robotic Untangling of Herbs and Salads with Parallel Grippers 使用平行夹具机器人解开香草和沙拉 The picking of one or more objects from an unsorted pile continues to be non-trivial for robotic systems. This is especially so when the pile consists of a granular material (GM) containing individual items that tangle with one another, causing more to be picked out than desired. One of the key features of such tangle-prone GMs is the presence of protrusions extending out from the main body of items in the pile. This work characterises the role the latter play in causing mechanical entanglement and their impact on picking consistency. It reports experiments in which picking GMs with different protrusion lengths (PLs) results in up to 76% increase in picked mass variance, suggesting PL to be an informative feature in the design of picking strategies. Moreover, to counter this effect, it proposes a new spread-and-pick (SnP) approach that significantly reduces tangling, making picking more consistent. Compared to prior approaches that seek to pick from a tangle-free point in the pile, the proposed method results in a decrease in picking error (PE) of up to 51%, and shows good generalisation to previously unseen GMs. 对于机器人系统来说，从未分类的一堆物体中拾取一个或多个物体仍然是一件很重要的事情。当该堆由颗粒材料 (GM) 组成时尤其如此，其中包含相互缠结的单个物品，导致挑选出的物品比预期的多。这种容易缠结的 GM 的主要特征之一是存在从堆中的物品主体延伸出来的突出物。这项工作描述了后者在引起机械缠结中所起的作用及其对采摘一致性的影响。它报告了一些实验，其中采摘具有不同突出长度 (PL) 的 GM 导致采摘质量方差增加高达 76%，这表明 PL 是采摘策略设计中的一个信息丰富的特征。此外，为了抵消这种影响，它提出了一种新的展开拾取（SnP）方法，可显着减少缠结，使拾取更加一致。与之前寻求从堆中无缠结点进行拣选的方法相比，所提出的方法可将拣选误差 (PE) 降低高达 51%，并且对以前未见过的 GM 表现出良好的泛化性。 本文提出了一种使用平行夹爪的机器人系统，用于解决香草和沙拉等易缠绕物品的抓取问题。 Prabhakar Ray,Matthew Howard cs.RO

authors_text: Umar Masud,Ethan Cohen,Ihab Bendidi,Guillaume Bollot,Auguste Genovesio
title: Comparison of semi-supervised learning methods for High Content Screening quality control
title_zh: 高内容筛选质量控制的半监督学习方法比较
abstract: Progress in automated microscopy and quantitative image analysis has promoted high-content screening (HCS) as an efficient drug discovery and research tool. While HCS offers to quantify complex cellular phenotypes from images at high throughput, this process can be obstructed by image aberrations such as out-of-focus image blur, fluorophore saturation, debris, a high level of noise, unexpected auto-fluorescence or empty images. While this issue has received moderate attention in the literature, overlooking these artefacts can seriously hamper downstream image processing tasks and hinder detection of subtle phenotypes. It is therefore of primary concern, and a prerequisite, to use quality control in HCS. In this work, we evaluate deep learning options that do not require extensive image annotations to provide a straightforward and easy to use semi-supervised learning solution to this issue. Concretely, we compared the efficacy of recent self-supervised and transfer learning approaches to provide a base encoder to a high throughput artefact image detector. The results of this study suggest that transfer learning methods should be preferred for this task as they not only performed best here but present the advantage of not requiring sensitive hyperparameter settings nor extensive additional training.
summary: Progress in automated microscopy and quantitative image analysis has promoted high-content screening (HCS) as an efficient drug discovery and research tool. While HCS offers to quantify complex cellular phenotypes from images at high throughput, this process can be obstructed by image aberrations such as out-of-focus image blur, fluorophore saturation, debris, a high level of noise, unexpected auto-fluorescence or empty images. While this issue has received moderate attention in the literature, overlooking these artefacts can seriously hamper downstream image processing tasks and hinder detection of subtle phenotypes. It is therefore of primary concern, and a prerequisite, to use quality control in HCS. In this work, we evaluate deep learning options that do not require extensive image annotations to provide a straightforward and easy to use semi-supervised learning solution to this issue. Concretely, we compared the efficacy of recent self-supervised and transfer learning approaches to provide a base encoder to a high throughput artefact image detector. The results of this study suggest that transfer learning methods should be preferred for this task as they not only performed best here but present the advantage of not requiring sensitive hyperparameter settings nor extensive additional training.
abstract_zh: 自动显微镜和定量图像分析的进步促进了高内涵筛选（HCS）成为一种有效的药物发现和研究工具。虽然 HCS 能够以高通量从图像中量化复杂的细胞表型，但该过程可能会受到图像畸变的阻碍，例如失焦图像模糊、荧光团饱和、碎片、高水平噪声、意外的自发荧光或空图像。虽然这个问题在文献中受到了适度的关注，但忽视这些伪影可能会严重阻碍下游图像处理任务并阻碍微妙表型的检测。因此，在 HCS 中使用质量控制是首要关注的问题，也是先决条件。在这项工作中，我们评估了不需要大量图像注释的深度学习选项，从而为该问题提供直接且易于使用的半监督学习解决方案。具体来说，我们比较了最近的自监督和迁移学习方法为高吞吐量伪影图像检测器提供基础编码器的功效。这项研究的结果表明，迁移学习方法应该是这项任务的首选，因为它们不仅在这里表现最好，而且具有不需要敏感的超参数设置或大量额外训练的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了半监督学习方法在高内涵筛选（HCS）质量控制中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: HCS图像中存在模糊、噪声等异常可能影响后续分析，但传统方法依赖大量标注数据，而半监督学习可降低标注需求。
AI.method: 通过对比自监督学习与迁移学习方法，构建用于检测HCS图像异常的深度学习模型。
AI.result: 迁移学习方法在检测效果和训练效率上优于自监督方法，且无需复杂参数调整。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习更适合HCS质量控制任务，因其性能更优且实用性强。

title: Stronger Privacy Amplification by Shuffling for Rényi and Approximate Differential Privacy
title_zh: 通过 Rényi 洗牌和近似差分隐私增强隐私放大
abstract: The shuffle model of differential privacy has gained significant interest as an intermediate trust model between the standard local and central models [EFMRTT19; CSUZZ19]. A key result in this model is that randomly shuffling locally randomized data amplifies differential privacy guarantees. Such amplification implies substantially stronger privacy guarantees for systems in which data is contributed anonymously [BEMMRLRKTS17]. In this work, we improve the state of the art privacy amplification by shuffling results both theoretically and numerically. Our first contribution is the first asymptotically optimal analysis of the Rényi differential privacy parameters for the shuffled outputs of LDP randomizers. Our second contribution is a new analysis of privacy amplification by shuffling. This analysis improves on the techniques of [FMT20] and leads to tighter numerical bounds in all parameter settings.
summary: The shuffle model of differential privacy has gained significant interest as an intermediate trust model between the standard local and central models [EFMRTT19; CSUZZ19]. A key result in this model is that randomly shuffling locally randomized data amplifies differential privacy guarantees. Such amplification implies substantially stronger privacy guarantees for systems in which data is contributed anonymously [BEMMRLRKTS17]. In this work, we improve the state of the art privacy amplification by shuffling results both theoretically and numerically. Our first contribution is the first asymptotically optimal analysis of the Rényi differential privacy parameters for the shuffled outputs of LDP randomizers. Our second contribution is a new analysis of privacy amplification by shuffling. This analysis improves on the techniques of [FMT20] and leads to tighter numerical bounds in all parameter settings.
abstract_zh: 差分隐私的洗牌模型作为标准本地模型和中央模型之间的中间信任模型引起了人们的极大兴趣 [EFMRTT19; CSUZZ19]。该模型的一个关键结果是随机洗牌局部随机数据放大了差异隐私保证。这种放大意味着对匿名贡献数据的系统有更强的隐私保证[BEMMRLRKTS17]。在这项工作中，我们通过理论和数值上的重组结果来改进最先进的隐私放大。我们的第一个贡献是对 LDP 随机化器的混洗输出的 Rényi 差分隐私参数进行首次渐近最优分析。我们的第二个贡献是对通过洗牌进行隐私放大的新分析。该分析改进了 [FMT20] 的技术，并导致所有参数设置中的数值范围更严格。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了差分隐私中通过洗牌增强隐私保护的理论分析与数值结果，针对Rényi和近似差分隐私模型提出更优方法。
AI.motivation: 洗牌模型作为本地与中心化差分隐私的中间方案，其隐私增强效果需更精确的理论支持以提升实际系统安全性。
AI.method: 首次对本地差分隐私随机化器的洗牌输出进行渐近最优的Rényi参数分析，并改进现有技术以获得更紧致的数值界。
AI.result: 在理论和数值层面均提升了隐私增强效果，所有参数设置下均实现更优的隐私保证界限。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论创新和方法优化，本文为洗牌模型下的隐私保护提供了更强的理论支撑与实践指导。

authors_text: Ruichu Cai,Weilin Chen,Zeqin Yang,Shu Wan,Chen Zheng,Xiaoqing Yang,Jiecheng Guo
title: Long-term Causal Effects Estimation via Latent Surrogates Representation Learning
title_zh: 通过潜在代理表示学习进行长期因果效应估计
abstract: Estimating long-term causal effects based on short-term surrogates is a significant but challenging problem in many real-world applications, e.g., marketing and medicine. Despite its success in certain domains, most existing methods estimate causal effects in an idealistic and simplistic way - ignoring the causal structure among short-term outcomes and treating all of them as surrogates. However, such methods cannot be well applied to real-world scenarios, in which the partially observed surrogates are mixed with their proxies among short-term outcomes. To this end, we develop our flexible method, Laser, to estimate long-term causal effects in the more realistic situation that the surrogates are observed or have observed proxies.Given the indistinguishability between the surrogates and proxies, we utilize identifiable variational auto-encoder (iVAE) to recover the whole valid surrogates on all the surrogates candidates without the need of distinguishing the observed surrogates or the proxies of latent surrogates. With the help of the recovered surrogates, we further devise an unbiased estimation of long-term causal effects. Extensive experimental results on the real-world and semi-synthetic datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Estimating long-term causal effects based on short-term surrogates is a significant but challenging problem in many real-world applications, e.g., marketing and medicine. Despite its success in certain domains, most existing methods estimate causal effects in an idealistic and simplistic way - ignoring the causal structure among short-term outcomes and treating all of them as surrogates. However, such methods cannot be well applied to real-world scenarios, in which the partially observed surrogates are mixed with their proxies among short-term outcomes. To this end, we develop our flexible method, Laser, to estimate long-term causal effects in the more realistic situation that the surrogates are observed or have observed proxies.Given the indistinguishability between the surrogates and proxies, we utilize identifiable variational auto-encoder (iVAE) to recover the whole valid surrogates on all the surrogates candidates without the need of distinguishing the observed surrogates or the proxies of latent surrogates. With the help of the recovered surrogates, we further devise an unbiased estimation of long-term causal effects. Extensive experimental results on the real-world and semi-synthetic datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实世界的应用中，例如营销和医学，基于短期替代因素估计长期因果效应是一个重要但具有挑战性的问题。尽管在某些领域取得了成功，但大多数现有方法以理想化和简单化的方式估计因果效应——忽略短期结果之间的因果结构并将所有这些结果视为替代因素。然而，这种方法不能很好地应用于现实世界的场景，其中部分观察到的替代物与短期结果中的替代物混合在一起。为此，我们开发了灵活的方法“激光”，以在观察代理或已观察代理的更现实情况下估计长期因果效应。考虑到代理和代理之间的不可区分性，我们利用可识别变分自动编码器（iVAE）来恢复所有候选代理的全部有效代理，而无需区分观察到的代理或潜在的代理代理人。在康复替代者的帮助下，我们进一步设计了对长期因果影响的公正估计。对现实世界和半合成数据集的广泛实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在代理表示学习的方法，用于在短期代理变量混杂的情况下估计长期因果效应。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度简化短期代理变量间的因果关系，无法处理实际场景中代理变量与代理变量混杂的问题，导致估计偏差。
AI.method: 开发Laser方法，利用可识别变分自编码器（iVAE）从所有候选变量中恢复完整有效代理变量，并基于此构建无偏长期因果效应估计框架。
AI.result: 在真实世界和半合成数据集上的实验验证了该方法在估计精度上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效识别和恢复潜在代理变量，Laser方法能更准确估计长期因果效应，解决了实际场景中代理变量混杂的挑战。

search_text: Long-term Causal Effects Estimation via Latent Surrogates Representation Learning 通过潜在代理表示学习进行长期因果效应估计 Estimating long-term causal effects based on short-term surrogates is a significant but challenging problem in many real-world applications, e.g., marketing and medicine. Despite its success in certain domains, most existing methods estimate causal effects in an idealistic and simplistic way - ignoring the causal structure among short-term outcomes and treating all of them as surrogates. However, such methods cannot be well applied to real-world scenarios, in which the partially observed surrogates are mixed with their proxies among short-term outcomes. To this end, we develop our flexible method, Laser, to estimate long-term causal effects in the more realistic situation that the surrogates are observed or have observed proxies.Given the indistinguishability between the surrogates and proxies, we utilize identifiable variational auto-encoder (iVAE) to recover the whole valid surrogates on all the surrogates candidates without the need of distinguishing the observed surrogates or the proxies of latent surrogates. With the help of the recovered surrogates, we further devise an unbiased estimation of long-term causal effects. Extensive experimental results on the real-world and semi-synthetic datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. 在许多现实世界的应用中，例如营销和医学，基于短期替代因素估计长期因果效应是一个重要但具有挑战性的问题。尽管在某些领域取得了成功，但大多数现有方法以理想化和简单化的方式估计因果效应——忽略短期结果之间的因果结构并将所有这些结果视为替代因素。然而，这种方法不能很好地应用于现实世界的场景，其中部分观察到的替代物与短期结果中的替代物混合在一起。为此，我们开发了灵活的方法“激光”，以在观察代理或已观察代理的更现实情况下估计长期因果效应。考虑到代理和代理之间的不可区分性，我们利用可识别变分自动编码器（iVAE）来恢复所有候选代理的全部有效代理，而无需区分观察到的代理或潜在的代理代理人。在康复替代者的帮助下，我们进一步设计了对长期因果影响的公正估计。对现实世界和半合成数据集的广泛实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于潜在代理表示学习的方法，用于在短期代理变量混杂的情况下估计长期因果效应。 Ruichu Cai,Weilin Chen,Zeqin Yang,Shu Wan,Chen Zheng,Xiaoqing Yang,Jiecheng Guo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yiheng Lu,Maoguo Gong,Wei Zhao,Kaiyuan Feng,Hao Li
title: SBPF: Sensitiveness Based Pruning Framework For Convolutional Neural Network On Image Classification
title_zh: SBPF：基于敏感度的图像分类卷积神经网络剪枝框架
abstract: Pruning techniques are used comprehensively to compress convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on image classification. However, the majority of pruning methods require a well pre-trained model to provide useful supporting parameters, such as C1-norm, BatchNorm value and gradient information, which may lead to inconsistency of filter evaluation if the parameters of the pre-trained model are not well optimized. Therefore, we propose a sensitiveness based method to evaluate the importance of each layer from the perspective of inference accuracy by adding extra damage for the original model. Because the performance of the accuracy is determined by the distribution of parameters across all layers rather than individual parameter, the sensitiveness based method will be robust to update of parameters. Namely, we can obtain similar importance evaluation of each convolutional layer between the imperfect-trained and fully trained models. For VGG-16 on CIFAR-10, even when the original model is only trained with 50 epochs, we can get same evaluation of layer importance as the results when the model is trained fully. Then we will remove filters proportional from each layer by the quantified sensitiveness. Our sensitiveness based pruning framework is verified efficiently on VGG-16, a customized Conv-4 and ResNet-18 with CIFAR-10, MNIST and CIFAR-100, respectively.
summary: Pruning techniques are used comprehensively to compress convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on image classification. However, the majority of pruning methods require a well pre-trained model to provide useful supporting parameters, such as C1-norm, BatchNorm value and gradient information, which may lead to inconsistency of filter evaluation if the parameters of the pre-trained model are not well optimized. Therefore, we propose a sensitiveness based method to evaluate the importance of each layer from the perspective of inference accuracy by adding extra damage for the original model. Because the performance of the accuracy is determined by the distribution of parameters across all layers rather than individual parameter, the sensitiveness based method will be robust to update of parameters. Namely, we can obtain similar importance evaluation of each convolutional layer between the imperfect-trained and fully trained models. For VGG-16 on CIFAR-10, even when the original model is only trained with 50 epochs, we can get same evaluation of layer importance as the results when the model is trained fully. Then we will remove filters proportional from each layer by the quantified sensitiveness. Our sensitiveness based pruning framework is verified efficiently on VGG-16, a customized Conv-4 and ResNet-18 with CIFAR-10, MNIST and CIFAR-100, respectively.
abstract_zh: 剪枝技术被综合用于压缩图像分类上的卷积神经网络（CNN）。然而，大多数剪枝方法需要一个良好的预训练模型来提供有用的支持参数，例如C1-norm、BatchNorm值和梯度信息，如果预训练模型的参数没有得到很好的优化，可能会导致滤波器评估的不一致。因此，我们提出了一种基于敏感性的方法，通过对原始模型添加额外的损伤，从推理精度的角度评估每一层的重要性。由于精度的性能是由参数在所有层上的分布而不是单个参数决定的，因此基于灵敏度的方法对于参数的更新具有鲁棒性。也就是说，我们可以在不完全训练和完全训练的模型之间获得每个卷积层的相似重要性评估。对于 CIFAR-10 上的 VGG-16，即使原始模型仅训练了 50 个 epoch，我们也可以获得与模型完全训练时的结果相同的层重要性评估。然后，我们将通过量化的敏感度从每层中按比例删除过滤器。我们基于敏感性的剪枝框架在 VGG-16、定制的 Conv-4 和 ResNet-18 上分别与 CIFAR-10、MNIST 和 CIFAR-100 进行了有效验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于敏感度的剪枝框架（SBPF），用于在图像分类任务中压缩卷积神经网络（CNN），无需依赖高度优化的预训练模型。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法依赖预训练模型的参数（如C1范数、BatchNorm值等），但若预训练模型未充分优化，可能导致滤波器评估不一致。因此需一种更鲁棒的评估方法。
AI.method: 通过量化模型参数变化对推理精度的影响（即敏感度），从整体参数分布角度评估各层重要性，并按敏感度比例移除滤波器。
AI.result: 在VGG-16、Conv-4和ResNet-18上验证，即使预训练模型仅训练50轮，仍能获得与完全训练模型相似的层重要性评估，且在CIFAR-10、MNIST等数据集上有效。
AI.conclusion: SBPF框架无需依赖高度优化的预训练模型，通过敏感度评估实现鲁棒的CNN剪枝，为模型压缩提供了新思路。

title: More Interpretable Graph Similarity Computation via Maximum Common Subgraph Inference
title_zh: 通过最大公共子图推理进行更可解释的图相似性计算
abstract: Graph similarity measurement, which computes the distance/similarity between two graphs, arises in various graph-related tasks. Recent learning-based methods lack interpretability, as they directly transform interaction information between two graphs into one hidden vector and then map it to similarity. To cope with this problem, this study proposes a more interpretable end-to-end paradigm for graph similarity learning, named Similarity Computation via Maximum Common Subgraph Inference (INFMCS). Our critical insight into INFMCS is the strong correlation between similarity score and Maximum Common Subgraph (MCS). We implicitly infer MCS to obtain the normalized MCS size, with the supervision information being only the similarity score during training. To capture more global information, we also stack some vanilla transformer encoder layers with graph convolution layers and propose a novel permutation-invariant node Positional Encoding. The entire model is quite simple yet effective. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that INFMCS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines for graph-graph classification and regression tasks. Ablation experiments verify the effectiveness of the proposed computation paradigm and other components. Also, visualization and statistics of results reveal the interpretability of INFMCS.
summary: Graph similarity measurement, which computes the distance/similarity between two graphs, arises in various graph-related tasks. Recent learning-based methods lack interpretability, as they directly transform interaction information between two graphs into one hidden vector and then map it to similarity. To cope with this problem, this study proposes a more interpretable end-to-end paradigm for graph similarity learning, named Similarity Computation via Maximum Common Subgraph Inference (INFMCS). Our critical insight into INFMCS is the strong correlation between similarity score and Maximum Common Subgraph (MCS). We implicitly infer MCS to obtain the normalized MCS size, with the supervision information being only the similarity score during training. To capture more global information, we also stack some vanilla transformer encoder layers with graph convolution layers and propose a novel permutation-invariant node Positional Encoding. The entire model is quite simple yet effective. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that INFMCS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines for graph-graph classification and regression tasks. Ablation experiments verify the effectiveness of the proposed computation paradigm and other components. Also, visualization and statistics of results reveal the interpretability of INFMCS.
abstract_zh: 图相似度测量，计算两个图之间的距离/相似度，出现在各种与图相关的任务中。最近的基于学习的方法缺乏可解释性，因为它们直接将两个图之间的交互信息转换为一个隐藏向量，然后将其映射到相似性。为了解决这个问题，本研究提出了一种更具可解释性的端到端图相似性学习范式，称为通过最大公共子图推理进行相似性计算（INFMCS）。我们对 INFMCS 的关键见解是相似性得分和最大公共子图 (MCS) 之间的强相关性。我们隐式推断 MCS 以获得归一化的 MCS 大小，监督信息只是训练期间的相似度得分。为了捕获更多的全局信息，我们还将一些普通的 Transformer 编码器层与图卷积层堆叠在一起，并提出了一种新颖的排列不变节点位置编码。整个模型非常简单但有效。综合实验表明，INFMCS 在图-图分类和回归任务方面始终优于最先进的基线。消融实验验证了所提出的计算范式和其他组件的有效性。此外，结果的可视化和统计揭示了 INFMCS 的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种更可解释的图相似性计算方法INFMCS，通过隐式推断最大公共子图（MCS）来提升模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有图相似性学习方法缺乏可解释性，直接将图交互信息映射为隐藏向量，难以理解其决策依据。
AI.method: 提出INFMCS框架，隐式推断MCS并利用相似度分数监督训练；结合Transformer编码器与图卷积层，设计新的置换不变节点位置编码。
AI.result: 实验表明INFMCS在图分类和回归任务上优于现有方法，消融实验验证各组件有效性，可视化结果展示模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: INFMCS通过MCS推理机制实现了更可解释的图相似性计算，在保持性能的同时提升了模型透明度。

search_text: More Interpretable Graph Similarity Computation via Maximum Common Subgraph Inference 通过最大公共子图推理进行更可解释的图相似性计算 Graph similarity measurement, which computes the distance/similarity between two graphs, arises in various graph-related tasks. Recent learning-based methods lack interpretability, as they directly transform interaction information between two graphs into one hidden vector and then map it to similarity. To cope with this problem, this study proposes a more interpretable end-to-end paradigm for graph similarity learning, named Similarity Computation via Maximum Common Subgraph Inference (INFMCS). Our critical insight into INFMCS is the strong correlation between similarity score and Maximum Common Subgraph (MCS). We implicitly infer MCS to obtain the normalized MCS size, with the supervision information being only the similarity score during training. To capture more global information, we also stack some vanilla transformer encoder layers with graph convolution layers and propose a novel permutation-invariant node Positional Encoding. The entire model is quite simple yet effective. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that INFMCS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines for graph-graph classification and regression tasks. Ablation experiments verify the effectiveness of the proposed computation paradigm and other components. Also, visualization and statistics of results reveal the interpretability of INFMCS. 图相似度测量，计算两个图之间的距离/相似度，出现在各种与图相关的任务中。最近的基于学习的方法缺乏可解释性，因为它们直接将两个图之间的交互信息转换为一个隐藏向量，然后将其映射到相似性。为了解决这个问题，本研究提出了一种更具可解释性的端到端图相似性学习范式，称为通过最大公共子图推理进行相似性计算（INFMCS）。我们对 INFMCS 的关键见解是相似性得分和最大公共子图 (MCS) 之间的强相关性。我们隐式推断 MCS 以获得归一化的 MCS 大小，监督信息只是训练期间的相似度得分。为了捕获更多的全局信息，我们还将一些普通的 Transformer 编码器层与图卷积层堆叠在一起，并提出了一种新颖的排列不变节点位置编码。整个模型非常简单但有效。综合实验表明，INFMCS 在图-图分类和回归任务方面始终优于最先进的基线。消融实验验证了所提出的计算范式和其他组件的有效性。此外，结果的可视化和统计揭示了 INFMCS 的可解释性。 本文提出一种更可解释的图相似性计算方法INFMCS，通过隐式推断最大公共子图（MCS）来提升模型可解释性。 Zixun Lan,Binjie Hong,Ye Ma,Fei Ma cs.LG,cs.AI

title: The Impact of Data Corruption on Named Entity Recognition for Low-resourced Languages
title_zh: 数据损坏对资源匮乏语言的命名实体识别的影响
abstract: Data availability and quality are major challenges in natural language processing for low-resourced languages. In particular, there is significantly less data available than for higher-resourced languages. This data is also often of low quality, rife with errors, invalid text or incorrect annotations. Many prior works focus on dealing with these problems, either by generating synthetic data, or filtering out low-quality parts of datasets. We instead investigate these factors more deeply, by systematically measuring the effect of data quantity and quality on the performance of pre-trained language models in a low-resourced setting. Our results show that having fewer completely-labelled sentences is significantly better than having more sentences with missing labels; and that models can perform remarkably well with only 10% of the training data. Importantly, these results are consistent across ten low-resource languages, English, and four pre-trained models.
summary: Data availability and quality are major challenges in natural language processing for low-resourced languages. In particular, there is significantly less data available than for higher-resourced languages. This data is also often of low quality, rife with errors, invalid text or incorrect annotations. Many prior works focus on dealing with these problems, either by generating synthetic data, or filtering out low-quality parts of datasets. We instead investigate these factors more deeply, by systematically measuring the effect of data quantity and quality on the performance of pre-trained language models in a low-resourced setting. Our results show that having fewer completely-labelled sentences is significantly better than having more sentences with missing labels; and that models can perform remarkably well with only 10% of the training data. Importantly, these results are consistent across ten low-resource languages, English, and four pre-trained models.
abstract_zh: 数据可用性和质量是资源匮乏语言的自然语言处理的主要挑战。特别是，与资源丰富的语言相比，可用数据要少得多。这些数据通常质量低下，充满错误、无效文本或不正确的注释。许多先前的工作都集中在通过生成合成数据或过滤掉数据集的低质量部分来处理这些问题。相反，我们通过系统地测量数据数量和质量对资源匮乏环境中预训练语言模型性能的影响来更深入地研究这些因素。我们的结果表明，拥有更少的完全标记的句子比拥有更多缺少标签的句子要好得多；并且模型只需 10% 的训练数据就可以表现得非常好。重要的是，这些结果在十种低资源语言、英语和四种预训练模型中是一致的。

AI.tldr: 研究数据量和质量对低资源语言命名实体识别的影响
AI.motivation: 低资源语言面临数据稀缺和质量差的挑战，现有方法未深入分析数据量与质量对模型性能的具体影响
AI.method: 系统测量不同数据量和质量对预训练语言模型在低资源场景下的性能影响
AI.result: 完全标注的少量数据优于大量部分标注数据，10%训练数据即可获得良好效果，结果在10种低资源语言和英语中一致
AI.conclusion: 数据质量比数量更重要，预训练模型在低资源场景下具有较强鲁棒性
