authors_text: Qihua Zhang,Junning Liu,Yuzhuo Dai,Yiyan Qi,Yifan Yuan,Kunlun Zheng,Fan Huang,Xianfeng Tan
title: Multi-Task Fusion via Reinforcement Learning for Long-Term User Satisfaction in Recommender Systems
title_zh: 通过强化学习实现推荐系统中长期用户满意度的多任务融合
comment: This paper has been accepted by SIGKDD 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by SIGKDD 2022
abstract: Recommender System (RS) is an important online application that affects billions of users every day. The mainstream RS ranking framework is composed of two parts: a Multi-Task Learning model (MTL) that predicts various user feedback, i.e., clicks, likes, sharings, and a Multi-Task Fusion model (MTF) that combines the multi-task outputs into one final ranking score with respect to user satisfaction. There has not been much research on the fusion model while it has great impact on the final recommendation as the last crucial process of the ranking. To optimize long-term user satisfaction rather than obtain instant returns greedily, we formulate MTF task as Markov Decision Process (MDP) within a recommendation session and propose a Batch Reinforcement Learning (RL) based Multi-Task Fusion framework (BatchRL-MTF) that includes a Batch RL framework and an online exploration. The former exploits Batch RL to learn an optimal recommendation policy from the fixed batch data offline for long-term user satisfaction, while the latter explores potential high-value actions online to break through the local optimal dilemma. With a comprehensive investigation on user behaviors, we model the user satisfaction reward with subtle heuristics from two aspects of user stickiness and user activeness. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on a billion-sample level real-world dataset to show the effectiveness of our model. We propose a conservative offline policy estimator (Conservative-OPEstimator) to test our model offline. Furthermore, we take online experiments in a real recommendation environment to compare performance of different models. As one of few Batch RL researches applied in MTF task successfully, our model has also been deployed on a large-scale industrial short video platform, serving hundreds of millions of users.
summary: Recommender System (RS) is an important online application that affects billions of users every day. The mainstream RS ranking framework is composed of two parts: a Multi-Task Learning model (MTL) that predicts various user feedback, i.e., clicks, likes, sharings, and a Multi-Task Fusion model (MTF) that combines the multi-task outputs into one final ranking score with respect to user satisfaction. There has not been much research on the fusion model while it has great impact on the final recommendation as the last crucial process of the ranking. To optimize long-term user satisfaction rather than obtain instant returns greedily, we formulate MTF task as Markov Decision Process (MDP) within a recommendation session and propose a Batch Reinforcement Learning (RL) based Multi-Task Fusion framework (BatchRL-MTF) that includes a Batch RL framework and an online exploration. The former exploits Batch RL to learn an optimal recommendation policy from the fixed batch data offline for long-term user satisfaction, while the latter explores potential high-value actions online to break through the local optimal dilemma. With a comprehensive investigation on user behaviors, we model the user satisfaction reward with subtle heuristics from two aspects of user stickiness and user activeness. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on a billion-sample level real-world dataset to show the effectiveness of our model. We propose a conservative offline policy estimator (Conservative-OPEstimator) to test our model offline. Furthermore, we take online experiments in a real recommendation environment to compare performance of different models. As one of few Batch RL researches applied in MTF task successfully, our model has also been deployed on a large-scale industrial short video platform, serving hundreds of millions of users.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统（RS）是一个重要的在线应用程序，每天影响数十亿用户。主流的RS排名框架由两部分组成：多任务学习模型（MTL），用于预测各种用户反馈，即点击、点赞、分享；多任务融合模型（MTF），将多任务输出结合成一个关于用户满意度的最终排名分数。目前对于融合模型的研究还不是很多，但它作为排名的最后一个关键过程，对最终的推荐影响很大。为了优化长期用户满意度而不是贪婪地获得即时回报，我们将 MTF 任务制定为推荐会话中的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并提出了一种基于批量强化学习（RL）的多任务融合框架（BatchRL-MTF），其中包括批量 RL 框架和在线探索。前者利用Batch RL从离线的固定批量数据中学习最优推荐策略，以实现长期用户满意度，而后者则在线探索潜在的高价值动作，以突破局部最优困境。通过对用户行为的全面调查，我们从用户粘性和用户活跃度两个方面对用户满意度奖励进行了微妙的启发式建模。最后，我们对十亿级样本级别的真实数据集进行了广泛的实验，以展示我们模型的有效性。我们提出了一个保守的离线策略估计器（Conservative-OPEstimator）来离线测试我们的模型。此外，我们在真实的推荐环境中进行在线实验来比较不同模型的性能。作为少数成功应用于 MTF 任务的 Batch RL 研究之一，我们的模型也已部署在大型工业短视频平台上，服务数亿用户。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的多任务融合框架（BatchRL-MTF），旨在通过优化长期用户满意度提升推荐系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统中多任务融合模型（MTF）研究不足，且传统方法仅关注短期收益而忽视长期用户满意度，需探索更有效的融合策略。
AI.method: 将MTF任务建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），结合批量强化学习（Batch RL）与在线探索，通过用户粘性与活跃度的启发式奖励模型优化长期满意度。
AI.result: 在百亿级真实数据集和工业级短视频平台实验表明，模型有效提升推荐效果，并通过保守离线策略评估器验证其可靠性。
AI.conclusion: BatchRL-MTF是少数成功应用于MTF任务的批量强化学习方法，已在大规模平台部署，验证了其在长期用户满意度优化中的有效性。

There has not been much research on the fusion model while it has great impact on the final recommendation as the last crucial process of the ranking. To optimize long-term user satisfaction rather than obtain instant returns greedily, we formulate MTF task as Markov Decision Process (MDP) within a recommendation session and propose a Batch Reinforcement Learning (RL) based Multi-Task Fusion framework (BatchRL-MTF) that includes a Batch RL framework and an online exploration. The former exploits Batch RL to learn an optimal recommendation policy from the fixed batch data offline for long-term user satisfaction, while the latter explores potential high-value actions online to break through the local optimal dilemma. With a comprehensive investigation on user behaviors, we model the user satisfaction reward with subtle heuristics from two aspects of user stickiness and user activeness. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on a billion-sample level real-world dataset to show the effectiveness of our model. We propose a conservative offline policy estimator (Conservative-OPEstimator) to test our model offline. Furthermore, we take online experiments in a real recommendation environment to compare performance of different models. As one of few Batch RL researches applied in MTF task successfully, our model has also been deployed on a large-scale industrial short video platform, serving hundreds of millions of users. 推荐系统（RS）是一个重要的在线应用程序，每天影响数十亿用户。主流的RS排名框架由两部分组成：多任务学习模型（MTL），用于预测各种用户反馈，即点击、点赞、分享；多任务融合模型（MTF），将多任务输出结合成一个关于用户满意度的最终排名分数。目前对于融合模型的研究还不是很多，但它作为排名的最后一个关键过程，对最终的推荐影响很大。为了优化长期用户满意度而不是贪婪地获得即时回报，我们将 MTF 任务制定为推荐会话中的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并提出了一种基于批量强化学习（RL）的多任务融合框架（BatchRL-MTF），其中包括批量 RL 框架和在线探索。前者利用Batch RL从离线的固定批量数据中学习最优推荐策略，以实现长期用户满意度，而后者则在线探索潜在的高价值动作，以突破局部最优困境。通过对用户行为的全面调查，我们从用户粘性和用户活跃度两个方面对用户满意度奖励进行了微妙的启发式建模。最后，我们对十亿级样本级别的真实数据集进行了广泛的实验，以展示我们模型的有效性。我们提出了一个保守的离线策略估计器（Conservative-OPEstimator）来离线测试我们的模型。此外，我们在真实的推荐环境中进行在线实验来比较不同模型的性能。作为少数成功应用于 MTF 任务的 Batch RL 研究之一，我们的模型也已部署在大型工业短视频平台上，服务数亿用户。 本文提出基于强化学习的多任务融合框架（BatchRL-MTF），旨在通过优化长期用户满意度提升推荐系统的性能。 Qihua Zhang,Junning Liu,Yuzhuo Dai,Yiyan Qi,Yifan Yuan,Kunlun Zheng,Fan Huang,Xianfeng Tan cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Wei-Jer Chang,Yeping Hu,Chenran Li,Wei Zhan,Masayoshi Tomizuka
title: Analyzing and Enhancing Closed-loop Stability in Reactive Simulation
title_zh: 分析和增强反应仿真中的闭环稳定性
abstract: Simulation has played an important role in efficiently evaluating self-driving vehicles in terms of scalability. Existing methods mostly rely on heuristic-based simulation, where traffic participants follow certain human-encoded rules that fail to generate complex human behaviors. Therefore, the reactive simulation concept is proposed to bridge the human behavior gap between simulation and real-world traffic scenarios by leveraging real-world data. However, these reactive models can easily generate unreasonable behaviors after a few steps of simulation, where we regard the model as losing its stability. To the best of our knowledge, no work has explicitly discussed and analyzed the stability of the reactive simulation framework. In this paper, we aim to provide a thorough stability analysis of the reactive simulation and propose a solution to enhance the stability. Specifically, we first propose a new reactive simulation framework, where we discover that the smoothness and consistency of the simulated state sequences are crucial factors to stability. We then incorporate the kinematic vehicle model into the framework to improve the closed-loop stability of the reactive simulation. Furthermore, along with commonly-used metrics, several novel metrics are proposed in this paper to better analyze the simulation performance.
summary: Simulation has played an important role in efficiently evaluating self-driving vehicles in terms of scalability. Existing methods mostly rely on heuristic-based simulation, where traffic participants follow certain human-encoded rules that fail to generate complex human behaviors. Therefore, the reactive simulation concept is proposed to bridge the human behavior gap between simulation and real-world traffic scenarios by leveraging real-world data. However, these reactive models can easily generate unreasonable behaviors after a few steps of simulation, where we regard the model as losing its stability. To the best of our knowledge, no work has explicitly discussed and analyzed the stability of the reactive simulation framework. In this paper, we aim to provide a thorough stability analysis of the reactive simulation and propose a solution to enhance the stability. Specifically, we first propose a new reactive simulation framework, where we discover that the smoothness and consistency of the simulated state sequences are crucial factors to stability. We then incorporate the kinematic vehicle model into the framework to improve the closed-loop stability of the reactive simulation. Furthermore, along with commonly-used metrics, several novel metrics are proposed in this paper to better analyze the simulation performance.
abstract_zh: 仿真在有效评估自动驾驶车辆的可扩展性方面发挥了重要作用。现有的方法主要依赖于基于启发式的模拟，其中交通参与者遵循某些人类编码的规则，而这些规则无法生成复杂的人类行为。因此，提出了反应式模拟概念，通过利用真实世界的数据来弥合模拟与真实交通场景之间的人类行为差距。然而，这些反应性模型在经过几步模拟后很容易产生不合理的行为，我们认为模型失去了稳定性。据我们所知，还没有任何工作明确讨论和分析反应式模拟框架的稳定性。在本文中，我们的目标是对反应模拟进行彻底的稳定性分析，并提出增强稳定性的解决方案。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种新的反应式模拟框架，我们发现模拟状态序列的平滑性和一致性是稳定性的关键因素。然后，我们将运动车辆模型纳入框架中，以提高反应模拟的闭环稳定性。此外，除了常用的指标之外，本文还提出了几种新颖的指标，以更好地分析模拟性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析反应式模拟的闭环稳定性问题，并提出增强稳定性的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有启发式模拟方法无法生成复杂人类行为，导致反应式模拟在长时间运行中出现不稳定行为，缺乏对稳定性的系统分析。
AI.method: 提出新的反应式模拟框架，引入运动学车辆模型并设计新型评估指标，从状态序列平滑性与一致性角度提升闭环稳定性。
AI.result: 通过实验验证了框架有效性，证明新方法能显著提升模拟稳定性并改善性能评估效果。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为反应式模拟稳定性分析提供了理论基础与实践方案，未来可扩展至更多复杂交通场景。

title: High Recall Data-to-text Generation with Progressive Edit
title_zh: 通过渐进式编辑实现高召回率数据到文本生成
abstract: Data-to-text (D2T) generation is the task of generating texts from structured inputs. We observed that when the same target sentence was repeated twice, Transformer (T5) based model generates an output made up of asymmetric sentences from structured inputs. In other words, these sentences were different in length and quality. We call this phenomenon "Asymmetric Generation" and we exploit this in D2T generation. Once asymmetric sentences are generated, we add the first part of the output with a no-repeated-target. As this goes through progressive edit (ProEdit), the recall increases. Hence, this method better covers structured inputs than before editing. ProEdit is a simple but effective way to improve performance in D2T generation and it achieves the new stateof-the-art result on the ToTTo dataset
summary: Data-to-text (D2T) generation is the task of generating texts from structured inputs. We observed that when the same target sentence was repeated twice, Transformer (T5) based model generates an output made up of asymmetric sentences from structured inputs. In other words, these sentences were different in length and quality. We call this phenomenon "Asymmetric Generation" and we exploit this in D2T generation. Once asymmetric sentences are generated, we add the first part of the output with a no-repeated-target. As this goes through progressive edit (ProEdit), the recall increases. Hence, this method better covers structured inputs than before editing. ProEdit is a simple but effective way to improve performance in D2T generation and it achieves the new stateof-the-art result on the ToTTo dataset
abstract_zh: 数据到文本 (D2T) 生成是从结构化输入生成文本的任务。我们观察到，当相同的目标句子重复两次时，基于 Transformer (T5) 的模型会根据结构化输入生成由不对称句子组成的输出。换句话说，这些句子的长度和质量不同。我们将这种现象称为“不对称生成”，并在 D2T 生成中利用这一现象。一旦生成不对称句子，我们就添加输出的第一部分和无重复目标。随着渐进式编辑 (ProEdit) 的进行，召回率会增加。因此，该方法比编辑之前更好地覆盖结构化输入。 ProEdit 是一种简单但有效的提高 D2T 生成性能的方法，它在 ToTTo 数据集上取得了新的最先进结果

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种渐进式编辑方法（ProEdit），用于提高数据到文本生成任务中的召回率。
AI.motivation: 传统模型在生成重复目标时会出现不对称生成问题，导致信息覆盖不全，因此需要一种方法来提升召回率。
AI.method: 通过渐进式编辑（ProEdit）方法，将不对称生成的句子与非重复目标结合，逐步优化输出以提高召回率。
AI.result: 在TotTo数据集上实现了新的最先进结果，显著提升了召回率。
AI.conclusion: ProEdit是一种简单有效的改进方法，能够有效提升数据到文本生成的性能。

authors_text: Mohammad Adiban,Kalin Stefanov,Sabato Marco Siniscalchi,Giampiero Salvi
title: Hierarchical Residual Learning Based Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder for Image Reconstruction and Generation
title_zh: 用于图像重建和生成的基于向量量化变分自编码器的分层残差学习
comment: 12 pages plus supplementary material. Submitted to BMVC 2022
comments: 12 pages plus supplementary material. Submitted to BMVC 2022
abstract: We propose a multi-layer variational autoencoder method, we call HR-VQVAE, that learns hierarchical discrete representations of the data. By utilizing a novel objective function, each layer in HR-VQVAE learns a discrete representation of the residual from previous layers through a vector quantized encoder. Furthermore, the representations at each layer are hierarchically linked to those at previous layers. We evaluate our method on the tasks of image reconstruction and generation. Experimental results demonstrate that the discrete representations learned by HR-VQVAE enable the decoder to reconstruct high-quality images with less distortion than the baseline methods, namely VQVAE and VQVAE-2. HR-VQVAE can also generate high-quality and diverse images that outperform state-of-the-art generative models, providing further verification of the efficiency of the learned representations. The hierarchical nature of HR-VQVAE i) reduces the decoding search time, making the method particularly suitable for high-load tasks and ii) allows to increase the codebook size without incurring the codebook collapse problem.
summary: We propose a multi-layer variational autoencoder method, we call HR-VQVAE, that learns hierarchical discrete representations of the data. By utilizing a novel objective function, each layer in HR-VQVAE learns a discrete representation of the residual from previous layers through a vector quantized encoder. Furthermore, the representations at each layer are hierarchically linked to those at previous layers. We evaluate our method on the tasks of image reconstruction and generation. Experimental results demonstrate that the discrete representations learned by HR-VQVAE enable the decoder to reconstruct high-quality images with less distortion than the baseline methods, namely VQVAE and VQVAE-2. HR-VQVAE can also generate high-quality and diverse images that outperform state-of-the-art generative models, providing further verification of the efficiency of the learned representations. The hierarchical nature of HR-VQVAE i) reduces the decoding search time, making the method particularly suitable for high-load tasks and ii) allows to increase the codebook size without incurring the codebook collapse problem.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种多层变分自动编码器方法，称为 HR-VQVAE，它学习数据的分层离散表示。通过利用新颖的目标函数，HR-VQVAE 中的每一层都通过矢量量化编码器学习前一层残差的离散表示。此外，每一层的表示都与先前层的表示分层链接。我们在图像重建和生成任务上评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，HR-VQVAE 学习的离散表示使解码器能够重建高质量图像，并且比基线方法（即 VQVAE 和 VQVAE-2）失真更少。 HR-VQVAE 还可以生成高质量且多样化的图像，其性能优于最先进的生成模型，从而进一步验证学习表示的效率。 HR-VQVAE 的分层性质 i) 减少了解码搜索时间，使得该方法特别适合高负载任务，并且 ii) 允许增加码本大小而不会引发码本崩溃问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层次残差学习的向量量化变分自编码器（HR-VQVAE），用于提升图像重建与生成的质量和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有VQVAE方法在图像重建质量、生成多样性及大规模代码本应用中存在局限，需改进离散表示学习与层次结构设计。
AI.method: 设计多层变分自编码器，通过分层链接结构与残差目标函数，使每层学习前层残差的离散表示，结合向量量化编码器实现层次化离散表征。
AI.result: HR-VQVAE在图像重建中优于VQVAE/VQVAE-2，生成图像多样性更优；层次结构降低解码时间，支持更大代码本规模而无代码本崩溃问题。
AI.conclusion: 层次残差学习机制有效提升离散表征质量，HR-VQVAE在重建与生成任务中表现优异，适合高负载场景与大规模代码本应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于层次残差学习的向量量化变分自编码器（HR-VQVAE），用于提升图像重建与生成的质量和效率。

search_text: Hierarchical Residual Learning Based Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder for Image Reconstruction and Generation 用于图像重建和生成的基于向量量化变分自编码器的分层残差学习 We propose a multi-layer variational autoencoder method, we call HR-VQVAE, that learns hierarchical discrete representations of the data. By utilizing a novel objective function, each layer in HR-VQVAE learns a discrete representation of the residual from previous layers through a vector quantized encoder. Furthermore, the representations at each layer are hierarchically linked to those at previous layers. We evaluate our method on the tasks of image reconstruction and generation. Experimental results demonstrate that the discrete representations learned by HR-VQVAE enable the decoder to reconstruct high-quality images with less distortion than the baseline methods, namely VQVAE and VQVAE-2. HR-VQVAE can also generate high-quality and diverse images that outperform state-of-the-art generative models, providing further verification of the efficiency of the learned representations. The hierarchical nature of HR-VQVAE i) reduces the decoding search time, making the method particularly suitable for high-load tasks and ii) allows to increase the codebook size without incurring the codebook collapse problem. 我们提出了一种多层变分自动编码器方法，称为 HR-VQVAE，它学习数据的分层离散表示。通过利用新颖的目标函数，HR-VQVAE 中的每一层都通过矢量量化编码器学习前一层残差的离散表示。此外，每一层的表示都与先前层的表示分层链接。我们在图像重建和生成任务上评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，HR-VQVAE 学习的离散表示使解码器能够重建高质量图像，并且比基线方法（即 VQVAE 和 VQVAE-2）失真更少。 HR-VQVAE 还可以生成高质量且多样化的图像，其性能优于最先进的生成模型，从而进一步验证学习表示的效率。 HR-VQVAE 的分层性质 i) 减少了解码搜索时间，使得该方法特别适合高负载任务，并且 ii) 允许增加码本大小而不会引发码本崩溃问题。 本文提出一种基于层次残差学习的向量量化变分自编码器（HR-VQVAE），用于提升图像重建与生成的质量和效率。 Mohammad Adiban,Kalin Stefanov,Sabato Marco Siniscalchi,Giampiero Salvi cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Multi-target Tracking of Zebrafish based on Particle Filter
title_zh: 基于粒子滤波器的斑马鱼多目标跟踪
abstract: Zebrafish is an excellent model organism, which has been widely used in the fields of biological experiments, drug screening, and swarm intelligence. In recent years, there are a large number of techniques for tracking of zebrafish involved in the study of behaviors, which makes it attack much attention of scientists from many fields. Multi-target tracking of zebrafish is still facing many challenges. The high mobility and uncertainty make it difficult to predict its motion; the similar appearances and texture features make it difficult to establish an appearance model; it is even hard to link the trajectories because of the frequent occlusion. In this paper, we use particle filter to approximate the uncertainty of the motion. Firstly, by analyzing the motion characteristics of zebrafish, we establish an efficient hybrid motion model to predict its positions; then we establish an appearance model based on the predicted positions to predict the postures of every targets, meanwhile weigh the particles by comparing the difference of predicted pose and observation pose ; finally, we get the optimal position of single zebrafish through the weighted position, and use the joint particle filter to process trajectory linking of multiple zebrafish.
summary: Zebrafish is an excellent model organism, which has been widely used in the fields of biological experiments, drug screening, and swarm intelligence. In recent years, there are a large number of techniques for tracking of zebrafish involved in the study of behaviors, which makes it attack much attention of scientists from many fields. Multi-target tracking of zebrafish is still facing many challenges. The high mobility and uncertainty make it difficult to predict its motion; the similar appearances and texture features make it difficult to establish an appearance model; it is even hard to link the trajectories because of the frequent occlusion. In this paper, we use particle filter to approximate the uncertainty of the motion. Firstly, by analyzing the motion characteristics of zebrafish, we establish an efficient hybrid motion model to predict its positions; then we establish an appearance model based on the predicted positions to predict the postures of every targets, meanwhile weigh the particles by comparing the difference of predicted pose and observation pose ; finally, we get the optimal position of single zebrafish through the weighted position, and use the joint particle filter to process trajectory linking of multiple zebrafish.
abstract_zh: 斑马鱼是一种优秀的模式生物，在生物实验、药物筛选、群体智能等领域有着广泛的应用。近年来，有大量的斑马鱼追踪技术涉及到行为研究，这使得斑马鱼受到了各领域科学家的广泛关注。斑马鱼的多目标跟踪仍面临许多挑战。高流动性和不确定性使其运动难以预测；相似的外观和纹理特征导致外观模型的建立困难；由于频繁的遮挡，甚至很难将轨迹连接起来。在本文中，我们使用粒子滤波器来近似运动的不确定性。首先，通过分析斑马鱼的运动特征，建立高效的混合运动模型来预测其位置；然后根据预测位置建立外观模型来预测每个目标的姿态，同时通过比较预测姿态和观察姿态的差异来对粒子进行加权；最后，通过加权位置得到单个斑马鱼的最优位置，并使用联合粒子滤波器处理多个斑马鱼的轨迹链接。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于粒子滤波的斑马鱼多目标跟踪方法，以应对斑马鱼运动不确定性、外观相似性及频繁遮挡等挑战。
AI.motivation: 斑马鱼作为重要的模式生物，在生物实验、药物筛选和群体智能研究中广泛应用。然而，其高机动性、外观相似性和频繁遮挡等问题使得多目标跟踪仍面临诸多挑战。
AI.method: 本文采用粒子滤波方法逼近运动不确定性，通过分析斑马鱼运动特征建立高效混合运动模型预测位置，基于预测位置建立外观模型预测目标姿态，并通过比较预测姿态与观测姿态的差异对粒子进行加权，最终利用联合粒子滤波处理多斑马鱼轨迹链接。
AI.result: 该方法成功实现了对单个斑马鱼最优位置的估计，并通过联合粒子滤波实现了多目标轨迹的链接。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于粒子滤波的多目标跟踪方法有效解决了斑马鱼跟踪中的不确定性、外观相似性和遮挡问题，为相关研究提供了新的解决方案。

title: Disentangled Representation Learning Using ($β$-)VAE and GAN
title_zh: 使用 ($β$-)VAE 和 GAN 进行解缠结表示学习
abstract: Given a dataset of images containing different objects with different features such as shape, size, rotation, and x-y position; and a Variational Autoencoder (VAE); creating a disentangled encoding of these features in the hidden space vector of the VAE was the task of interest in this paper. The dSprite dataset provided the desired features for the required experiments in this research. After training the VAE combined with a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN), each dimension of the hidden vector was disrupted to explore the disentanglement in each dimension. Note that the GAN was used to improve the quality of output image reconstruction.
summary: Given a dataset of images containing different objects with different features such as shape, size, rotation, and x-y position; and a Variational Autoencoder (VAE); creating a disentangled encoding of these features in the hidden space vector of the VAE was the task of interest in this paper. The dSprite dataset provided the desired features for the required experiments in this research. After training the VAE combined with a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN), each dimension of the hidden vector was disrupted to explore the disentanglement in each dimension. Note that the GAN was used to improve the quality of output image reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 给定一个图像数据集，其中包含具有不同特征（例如形状、大小、旋转和 x-y 位置）的不同对象；和变分自动编码器（VAE）；在 VAE 的隐藏空间向量中创建这些特征的解缠结编码是本文感兴趣的任务。 dSprite 数据集为本研究中所需的实验提供了所需的特征。在结合生成对抗网络（GAN）训练 VAE 后，隐藏向量的每个维度都被打乱，以探索每个维度的解缠结。请注意，GAN 用于提高输出图像重建的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用β-VAE和GAN结合的方法，实现图像数据集中不同对象特征（如形状、大小、旋转、位置）的解耦表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统VAE在生成模型中难以实现特征的完全解耦，而通过引入GAN优化重构质量，可提升特征分离效果。
AI.method: 基于dSprite数据集，训练结合GAN的β-VAE模型，并通过扰动潜在空间向量的每个维度验证特征解耦性。
AI.result: 实验表明，潜在向量的每个维度能独立控制对应特征（如形状、位置），且GAN增强了图像重构质量。
AI.conclusion: β-VAE与GAN的结合有效提升了特征解耦能力，为生成模型的可控性提供了新方法。

The dSprite dataset provided the desired features for the required experiments in this research. Note that the GAN was used to improve the quality of output image reconstruction. 给定一个图像数据集，其中包含具有不同特征（例如形状、大小、旋转和 x-y 位置）的不同对象；和变分自动编码器（VAE）；在 VAE 的隐藏空间向量中创建这些特征的解缠结编码是本文感兴趣的任务。 dSprite 数据集为本研究中所需的实验提供了所需的特征。在结合生成对抗网络（GAN）训练 VAE 后，隐藏向量的每个维度都被打乱，以探索每个维度的解缠结。请注意，GAN 用于提高输出图像重建的质量。 本文旨在利用β-VAE和GAN结合的方法，实现图像数据集中不同对象特征（如形状、大小、旋转、位置）的解耦表示学习。 Mohammad Haghir Ebrahimabadi cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Inconsistencies in the Definition and Annotation of Student Engagement in Virtual Learning Datasets: A Critical Review
title_zh: 虚拟学习数据集中学生参与度的定义和注释的不一致：批判性评论
abstract: Background: Student engagement (SE) in virtual learning can have a major impact on meeting learning objectives and program dropout risks. Developing Artificial Intelligence (AI) models for automatic SE measurement requires annotated datasets. However, existing SE datasets suffer from inconsistent definitions and annotation protocols mostly unaligned with the definition of SE in educational psychology. This issue could be misleading in developing generalizable AI models and make it hard to compare the performance of these models developed on different datasets. The objective of this critical review was to explore the existing SE datasets and highlight inconsistencies in terms of differing engagement definitions and annotation protocols. Methods: Several academic databases were searched for publications introducing new SE datasets. The datasets containing students' single- or multi-modal data in online or offline computer-based virtual learning sessions were included. The definition and annotation of SE in the existing datasets were analyzed based on our defined seven dimensions of engagement annotation: sources, data modalities, timing, temporal resolution, level of abstraction, combination, and quantification. Results: Thirty SE measurement datasets met the inclusion criteria. The reviewed SE datasets used very diverse and inconsistent definitions and annotation protocols. Unexpectedly, very few of the reviewed datasets used existing psychometrically validated scales in their definition of SE. Discussion: The inconsistent definition and annotation of SE are problematic for research on developing comparable AI models for automatic SE measurement. Some of the existing SE definitions and protocols in settings other than virtual learning that have the potential to be used in virtual learning are introduced.

abstract_zh: Background: Student engagement (SE) in virtual learning can have a major impact on meeting learning objectives and program dropout risks. Developing Artificial Intelligence (AI) models for automatic SE measurement requires annotated datasets.然而，现有的SE数据集存在不一致的定义和注释协议，大多与教育心理学中SE的定义不一致。这个问题可能会在开发通用人工智能模型时产生误导，并且很难比较在不同数据集上开发的这些模型的性能。这次批判性审查的目的是探索现有的 SE 数据集，并强调不同参与定义和注释协议方面的不一致之处。 Methods: Several academic databases were searched for publications introducing new SE datasets. The datasets containing students' single- or multi-modal data in online or offline computer-based virtual learning sessions were included.根据我们定义的参与注释的七个维度，对现有数据集中SE的定义和注释进行了分析：来源、数据模式、时间、时间分辨率、抽象级别、组合和量化。 Results: Thirty SE measurement datasets met the inclusion criteria. The reviewed SE datasets used very diverse and inconsistent definitions and annotation protocols. Unexpectedly, very few of the reviewed datasets used existing psychometrically validated scales in their definition of SE.讨论：SE 的定义和注释不一致，对于开发用于自动 SE 测量的可比人工智能模型的研究来说是个问题。介绍了虚拟学习之外的一些现有的 SE 定义和协议，这些定义和协议有可能在虚拟学习中使用。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过批判性综述分析虚拟学习数据集中学生参与度定义与标注的不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有学生参与度数据集定义和标注协议不一致，导致AI模型泛化能力受限且难以跨数据集比较性能。
AI.method: 搜索学术数据库获取包含单/多模态数据的虚拟学习数据集，基于七个维度（来源、数据模态、时间粒度等）分析其定义与标注协议。
AI.result: 共纳入30个数据集，发现其定义和标注协议存在显著差异，且极少采用经心理测量验证的量表。
AI.conclusion: 定义与标注不一致性阻碍AI模型研究，需借鉴非虚拟学习场景中可迁移的参与度定义与协议。
